options_zh: {"A": "金票证", "B": "Kerberoasting", "C": "传递票证", "D": "暴力破解"}
explanation_en: Golden ticket attacks use the hash of the Kerberos service account to create tickets in an Active Directory environment. Kerberoasting attacks rely on collected TGS tickets. Pass the ticket attacks rely on tickets harvested from the lsass process. Brute-force attacks depend on random guessing without any additional information.
explanation_zh: 金票证攻击使用 Kerberos 服务帐户的哈希在 Active Directory 环境中创建票证。 Kerberoasting 攻击依赖于收集的 TGS 票证。传递票证攻击依赖于从 lsass 进程中获取的票证。暴力攻击依赖于随机猜测，没有任何附加信息。

question_en: Sherry conducted an inventory of the cryptographic technologies in use within her organization and found the following algorithms and protocols in use. Which one of these technologies should she replace because it is no longer considered secure?
question_zh: Sherry 对其组织内使用的加密技术进行了盘点，发现了以下正在使用的算法和协议。她应该更换其中哪一项技术，因为它不再被认为是安全的？
explanation_en: The MD5hash algorithm has known collisions and, as of 2005, is no longer considered secure for use in modern environments. The AES, PGP, and WPA3 algorithms are all still considered secure.
explanation_zh: MD5hash 算法存在已知的冲突，并且从 2005 年开始，不再被认为在现代环境中使用是安全的。 AES、PGP 和 WPA3 算法仍然被认为是安全的。

question_en: Robert is investigating a security breach and discovers the Mimikatz tool installed on a system in his environment. What type of attack has likely taken place?
question_zh: Robert 正在调查安全漏洞，并发现他环境中的系统上安装了 Mimikatz 工具。可能发生了什么类型的攻击？
options_zh: {"A": "密码破解", "B": "传递哈希值", "C": "MAC 欺骗", "D": "ARP 中毒"}
explanation_en: The use of the Mimikatz tool is indicative of an attempt to capture user password hashes for use in a pass-the-hash attack against Microsoft Active Directory accounts.
explanation_zh: 使用 Mimikatz 工具表明有人试图捕获用户密码哈希值，以用于对 Microsoft Active Directory 帐户进行哈希值传递攻击。

question_en: Tom is a cryptanalyst and is working on breaking a cryptographic algorithm’s secret key. He has a copy of an intercepted message that is encrypted, and he also has a copy of the decrypted version of that message. He wants to use both the encrypted message and its decrypted plaintext to retrieve the secret key for use in decrypting other messages. What type of attack is Tom engaging in?
question_zh: Tom 是一名密码分析师，正在致力于破解密码算法的密钥。他拥有一份已截获的加密消息的副本，以及该消息的解密版本的副本。他想要使用加密的消息及其解密的明文来检索密钥以用于解密其他消息。汤姆正在进行什么类型的攻击？
options_zh: {"A": "选择的密文", "B": "选择的明文", "C": "已知的明文", "D": "暴力破解"}
explanation_en: In a known plaintext attack, the attacker has a copy of the encrypted message along with the plaintext message used to generate that ciphertext. In a chosen plaintext attack, the attacker has the ability to choose the plaintext to be encrypted. In a chosen ciphertext attack, the attacker can choose the ciphertext output. In a brute-force attack, the attacker simply tries all possible key combinations.
explanation_zh: 在已知的明文攻击中，攻击者拥有加密消息的副本以及用于生成该密文的明文消息。在选择明文攻击中，攻击者能够选择要加密的明文。在选择密文攻击中，攻击者可以选择密文输出。在暴力攻击中，攻击者只需尝试所有可能的组合键即可。

question_en: A hacker recently violated the integrity of data in James’s company by modifying a file using a precise timing attack. The attacker waited until James verified the integrity of a file’s contents using a hash value and then modified the file between the time that James verified the integrity and read the contents of the file. What type of attack took place?
question_zh: 一名黑客最近通过精确定时攻击修改文件，侵犯了 James 公司的数据完整性。攻击者等到 James 使用哈希值验证文件内容的完整性，然后在 James 验证完整性和读取文件内容之间修改文件。发生了什么类型的攻击？
options_zh: {"A": "社会工程", "B": "TOCTOU", "C": "数据欺骗", "D": "参数检查"}
explanation_en: In a time of check to time of use (TOCTOU) attack, the attacker exploits the difference in time between when a security control is verified and the data protected by the control is actually used.
explanation_zh: 在检查使用时间（TOCTOU）攻击中，攻击者利用了安全控制验证和受控制保护的数据实际使用之间的时间差。

question_en: Carl is deploying a set of video sensors that will be placed in remote locations as part of a research project. Due to connectivity limitations, he would like to perform as much image processing and computation as possible on the device itself before sending results back to the cloud for further analysis. What computing model would best meet his needs?
question_zh: Carl 正在部署一组视频传感器，作为研究项目的一部分，这些传感器将被放置在偏远地区。由于连接限制，他希望在设备本身上执行尽可能多的图像处理和计算，然后再将结果发送回云端进行进一步分析。哪种计算模型最能满足他的需求？
options_zh: {"A": "Serverless 计算", "B": "边缘计算", "C": "IaaS 计算", "D": "SaaS 计算"}
explanation_en: In this case, most cloud service models (including IaaS, SaaS, and serverless/FaaS) would require transmitting most information back to the cloud. The edge computing service model would be far more appropriate, as it places computing power at the sensor, minimizing the data that must be sent back to the cloud over limited connectivity network links.
explanation_zh: 在这种情况下，大多数云服务模型（包括 IaaS、SaaS 和 Serverless/FaaS）都需要将大部分信息传回云端。边缘计算服务模型将更加合适，因为它将计算能力放在传感器上，最大限度地减少必须通过有限的连接网络链接发送回云端的数据。

question_en: What action can you take to prevent accidental data disclosure due to wear leveling on an SSD device before reusing the drive?
question_zh: 在重新使用驱动器之前，您可以采取什么措施来防止由于 SSD 设备上的磨损均衡导致的意外数据泄露？
options_zh: {"A": "重新格式化", "B": "磁盘加密", "C": "消磁", "D": "物理破坏"}
explanation_en: Encrypting data on SSD drives does protect against wear leveling. Disk formatting does not effectively remove data from any device. Degaussing is only effective for magnetic media. Physically destroying the drive would not permit reuse.
explanation_zh: 对 SSD 驱动器上的数据进行加密确实可以防止磨损均衡。磁盘格式化并不能有效地从任何设备中删除数据。消磁仅对磁性介质有效。物理破坏驱动器将不允许重新使用。

question_en: Johnson Widgets strictly limits access to total sales volume information, classifying it as a competitive secret. However, shipping clerks have unrestricted access to order records to facilitate transaction completion. A shipping clerk recently pulled all of the individual sales records for a quarter from the database and totaled them up to determine the total sales volume. What type of attack occurred?
question_zh: Johnson Widgets 严格限制对总销量信息的访问，将其归类为竞争秘密。然而，运输职员可以不受限制地访问订单记录以促进交易完成。一位货运职员最近从数据库中提取了一个季度的所有个人销售记录，并将它们加起来以确定总销量。发生了什么类型的攻击？
explanation_en: In an aggregation attack, individual(s) use their access to specific pieces of information to piece together a larger picture that they are not authorized to access.
explanation_zh: 在聚合攻击中，个人利用其对特定信息的访问权限来拼凑出他们无权访问的更大图片。

question_en: What physical security control broadcasts false emanations constantly to mask the presence of true electromagnetic emanations from computing equipment?
question_zh: 什么物理安全控制会不断广播虚假辐射，以掩盖计算设备中真实电磁辐射的存在？
options_zh: {"A": "法拉第笼", "B": "铜注入窗口", "C": "屏蔽布线", "D": "白噪声"}
explanation_en: While all of the controls mentioned protect against unwanted electromagnetic emanations, only white noise is an active control. White noise generates false emanations that effectively “jam” the true emanations from electronic equipment.
explanation_zh: 虽然提到的所有控制措施都可以防止不需要的电磁辐射，但只有白噪声是主动控制。白噪声产生虚假辐射，有效地“干扰”电子设备的真实辐射。

question_en: In a software as a service cloud computing environment, who is normally responsible for ensuring that appropriate firewall controls are in place to protect the application?
options_en: {"A": "Customer’s security team", "B": "Vendor", "C": "Customer’s networking team", "D": "Customer’s infrastructure management team"}
question_zh: 在软件即服务云计算环境中，谁通常负责确保采取适当的防火墙控制来保护应用程序？
options_zh: {"A": "客户的安全团队", "B": "供应商", "C": "客户的网络团队", "D": "客户的基础设施管理团队"}
explanation_en: In a software as a service environment, the customer has no access to any underlying infrastructure, so firewall management is a vendor responsibility under the cloud computing shared responsibility model.
explanation_zh: 在软件即服务环境中，客户无法访问任何底层基础设施，因此在云计算共享责任模型下，防火墙管理是供应商的责任。

question_en: Alice has read permissions on an object, and she would like Bob to have those same rights. Which one of the rules in the Take-Grant protection model would allow her to complete this operation?
question_zh: Alice 对某个对象具有读取权限，她希望 Bob 也拥有这些相同的权限。 Take-Grant 保护模型中的哪一条规则允许她完成此操作？
options_zh: {"A": "创建规则", "B": "删除规则", "C": "授予规则", "D": "获取规则"}
explanation_en: The grant rule allows a subject to grant rights that it possesses on an object to another subject.
explanation_zh: 授予规则允许一个主体将其对某个对象拥有的权利授予另一个主体。

question_en: As part of his incident response process, Charles securely wipes the drive of a compromised machine and reinstalls the operating system (OS) from original media. Once he is done, he patches the machine fully and applies his organization’s security templates before reconnecting the system to the network. Almost immediately after the system is returned to service, he discovers that it has reconnected to the same botnet it was part of before. Where should Charles look for the malware that is causing this behavior?
options_en: {"A": "The operating system partition", "B": "The system BIOS or firmware", "C": "The system memory", "D": "The installation media"}
question_zh: 作为事件响应流程的一部分，Charles 安全地擦除了受感染计算机的驱动器，并从原始介质重新安装了操作系统 (OS)。完成后，他会对机器进行全面修补并应用其组织的安全模板，然后将系统重新连接到网络。系统恢复服务后几乎立即，他发现系统已重新连接到之前所属的同一僵尸网络。 Charles 应该在哪里寻找导致此行为的恶意软件？
options_zh: {"A": "操作系统分区", "B": "系统 BIOS 或固件", "C": "系统内存", "D": "安装介质"}
explanation_en: The system Charles is remediating may have a firmware or BIOS infection, with malware resident on the system board. While uncommon, this type of malware can be difficult to find and remove. Since he used original media, it is unlikely that the malware came from the software vendor. Charles wiped the system partition, and the system would have been rebooted before being rebuilt, thus clearing system memory.
explanation_zh: Charles 正在修复的系统可能存在固件或 BIOS 感染，恶意软件驻留在系统板上。虽然这种类型的恶意软件并不常见，但很难发现和删除。由于他使用的是原始媒体，因此恶意软件不太可能来自软件供应商。查尔斯擦除了系统分区，系统在重建之前会重新启动，从而清除系统内存。

question_en: Lauren implements ASLR to help prevent system compromises. What technique has she used to protect her system?
options_en: {"A": "Encryption", "B": "Mandatory access control", "C": "Memory address randomization", "D": "Discretionary access control"}
question_zh: Lauren 实施 ASLR 来帮助防止系统受损。她使用了什么技术来保护她的系统？
options_zh: {"A": "加密", "B": "强制访问控制", "C": "内存地址随机化", "D": "自主访问控制"}
explanation_en: Lauren has implemented address space layout randomization, a memory protection methodology that randomizes memory locations, which prevents attackers from using known address spaces and contiguous memory regions to execute code via overflow or stack smashing attacks.
explanation_zh: Lauren实现了地址空间布局随机化，这是一种随机化内存位置的内存保护方法，可防止攻击者使用已知的地址空间和连续内存区域通过溢出或堆栈粉碎攻击来执行代码。

question_en: Alan intercepts an encrypted message and wants to determine what type of algorithm was used to create the message. He first performs a frequency analysis and notes that the frequency of letters in the message closely matches the distribution of letters in the English language. What type of cipher was most likely used to create this message?
question_zh: 艾伦截获一条加密消息，并想要确定创建该消息所使用的算法类型。他首先进行了频率分析，并注意到消息中字母的频率与英语中字母的分布非常匹配。最有可能使用什么类型的密码来创建此消息？
options_zh: {"A": "替换密码", "B": "AES", "C": "转置密码", "D": "3DES"}
explanation_en: This message was most likely encrypted with a transposition cipher. The use of a substitution cipher, a category that includes AES and 3DES, would change the frequency distribution so that it did not mirror that of the English language. This type of attack, where the attacker only has access to an encrypted message, is also known as a ciphertext-only attack.
explanation_zh: 该消息很可能是使用转置密码加密的。使用替代密码（包括 AES 和 3DES 的类别）将改变频率分布，使其不反映英语的频率分布。攻击者只能访问加密消息的这种类型的攻击也称为纯密文攻击。

question_en: The Double DES (2DES) encryption algorithm was never used as a viable alternative to the original DES algorithm. What implementation attack is 2DES vulnerable to that does not exist for the DES or 3DES approach?
question_zh: 双 DES (2DES) 加密算法从未用作原始 DES 算法的可行替代方案。 2DES 容易受到哪些 DES 或 3DES 方法不存在的实施攻击？
options_zh: {"A": "选择密文", "B": "暴力破解", "C": "中间人", "D": "中间相遇"}
explanation_en: The meet-in-the-middle attack uses a known plaintext message and uses both encryption of the plaintext and decryption of the ciphertext simultaneously in a brute-force manner to identify the encryption key in approximately double the time of a brute-force attack against the basic DES algorithm.
explanation_zh: 中间相遇攻击使用已知的明文消息，并以暴力方式同时使用明文加密和密文解密，以大约两倍的速度识别加密密钥对基本 DES 算法进行暴力攻击的时间。

question_en: Grace would like to implement application control technology in her organization. Users often need to install new applications for research and testing purposes, and she does not want to interfere with that process. At the same time, she would like to block the use of known malicious software. What type of application control would be appropriate in this situation?
question_zh: Grace 希望在她的组织中实施应用程序控制技术。用户经常需要安装新的应用程序用于研究和测试目的，而她不想干扰该过程。同时，她希望阻止使用已知的恶意软件。在这种情况下，哪种类型的应用程序控制比较合适？
explanation_en: The blacklisting approach to application control allows users to install any software they wish except for packages specifically identified by the administrator as prohibited. This would be an appropriate approach in a scenario where users should be able to install any nonmalicious software they wish to use.
explanation_zh: 应用程序控制的黑名单方法允许用户安装他们想要安装的任何软件，但管理员明确指定禁止的软件包除外。在用户应该能够安装他们希望使用的任何非恶意软件的情况下，这将是一种合适的方法。

question_en: Warren is designing a physical intrusion detection system for use in a sensitive media storage facility and wants to include technology that issues an alert if the communications lines for the alarm system are unexpectedly cut. What technology would meet this requirement?
question_zh: Warren 正在设计一种用于敏感媒体存储设施的物理入侵检测系统，并希望采用在警报系统的通信线路意外切断时发出警报的技术。什么技术可以满足这个要求？
options_zh: {"A": "心跳传感器", "B": "放射安全", "C": "运动探测器", "D": "法拉第笼"}
explanation_en: Heartbeat sensors send periodic status messages from the alarm system to the monitoring center. The monitoring center triggers an alarm if it does not receive a status message for a prolonged period of time, indicating that communications were disrupted.
explanation_zh: 心跳传感器将定期状态消息从报警系统发送到监控中心。如果监控中心长时间没有收到状态消息，则触发警报，表明通信中断。

question_en: John and Gary are negotiating a business transaction, and John must demonstrate to Gary that he has access to a system. He engages in an electronic version of the “magic door” scenario shown here. What technique is John using? 1 2
question_zh: John 和 Gary 正在协商一项业务交易，John 必须向 Gary 证明他有权访问系统。他参与了此处所示的“魔门”场景的电子版本。约翰使用什么技术？ 1 2
options_zh: {"A": "分裂知识证明", "B": "零知识证明", "C": "逻辑证明", "D": "数学证明"}
explanation_en: In a zero-knowledge proof, one individual demonstrates to another that they can achieve a result that requires sensitive information without actually disclosing the sensitive information.
explanation_zh: 在零知识证明中，一个人向另一个人证明，他们可以在不实际披露敏感信息的情况下实现需要敏感信息的结果。

question_en: After scanning all of the systems on his wireless network, Mike notices that one system is identified as an iOS device running a massively out-of-date version of Apple’s mobile operating system. When he investigates further, he discovers that the device is an original iPad and that it cannot be updated to a current secure version of the operating system. What would be the best option for handling this device?
options_en: {"A": "Retire or replace the device.", "B": "Isolate the device on a dedicated wireless network.", "C": "Install a firewall on the tablet.", "D": "Reinstall the OS."}
question_zh: 扫描无线网络上的所有系统后，Mike 注意到其中一个系统被识别为 iOS 设备，运行的是严重过时的 Apple 移动操作系统版本。当他进一步调查时，他发现该设备是原始 iPad，并且无法更新到当前安全版本的操作系统。处理该设备的最佳选择是什么？
options_zh: {"A": "报废或更换设备。", "B": "将设备隔离在专用无线网络上。", "C": "在平板电脑上安装防火墙。", "D": "重新安装操作系统。"}
explanation_en: When operating system patches are no longer available for mobile devices, the best option is typically to retire or replace the device. Building isolated networks will not stop the device from being used for browsing or other purposes, which means it is likely to continue to be exposed to threats. Installing a firewall will not remediate the security flaws in the OS, although it may help somewhat. Finally, reinstalling the OS will not allow new updates or fix the root issue.
explanation_zh: 当操作系统补丁不再适用于移动设备时，最好的选择通常是淘汰或更换设备。构建隔离网络不会阻止设备用于浏览或其他目的，这意味着它可能会继续受到威胁。安装防火墙并不能修复操作系统中的安全缺陷，尽管它可能会有所帮助。最后，重新安装操作系统将不允许新的更新或修复根本问题。

question_en: Tonya believes that an attacker was able to eavesdrop on legitimate HTTPS communications between her users and remote web servers by engaging in a DNS poisoning attack. After conducting DNS poisoning, what technique would an attacker likely use to conduct this eavesdropping?
question_zh: Tonya 认为，攻击者能够通过 DNS 投毒攻击来窃听用户与远程 Web 服务器之间的合法 HTTPS 通信。进行 DNS 投毒后，攻击者可能会使用什么技术来进行窃听？
options_zh: {"A": "中间人", "B": "暴力破解", "C": "计时", "D": "中间相遇"}
explanation_en: In a man-in-the-middle attack, the attacker tricks the user into establishing a connection with the attacker. The attacker then establishes a connection to the legitimate server and relays communications between the two, eavesdropping on the contents. A meet-inthe-middle attack is an attack against cryptographic algorithms that use multiple rounds of encryption. There is no indication in the scenario that the attacker used an exhaustive bruteforce attack or a specialized timing attack to achieve their goals.
explanation_zh: 在中间人攻击中，攻击者诱骗用户与攻击者建立连接。然后，攻击者建立与合法服务器的连接，并在两者之间中继通信，从而窃听内容。中间相遇攻击是针对使用多轮加密的加密算法的攻击。该场景中没有迹象表明攻击者使用了详尽的暴力攻击或专门的定时攻击来实现其目标。

question_en: Howard is choosing a cryptographic algorithm for his organization, and he would like to choose an algorithm that supports the creation of digital signatures. Which one of the following algorithms would meet his requirement?
question_zh: Howard 正在为他的组织选择一种加密算法，他希望选择一种支持创建数字签名的算法。以下哪一种算法可以满足他的要求？
options_zh: {"A": "RSA", "B": "3DES", "C": "AES", "D": "Blowfish"}
explanation_en: Digital signatures are possible only when using an asymmetric encryption algorithm. Of the algorithms listed, only RSA is asymmetric and supports digital signature capabilities.
explanation_zh: 仅当使用非对称加密算法时才可以进行数字签名。在列出的算法中，只有 RSA 是非对称的并且支持数字签名功能。

question_en: Laura is responsible for securing her company’s web-based applications and wants to conduct an educational program for developers on common web application security vulnerabilities. Where can she turn for a concise listing of the most common web application issues?
question_zh: Laura 负责保护公司基于 Web 的应用程序，并希望为开发人员开展有关常见 Web 应用程序安全漏洞的教育计划。她可以在哪里找到最常见 Web 应用程序问题的简明列表？
options_zh: {"A": "CVE", "B": "NSA", "C": "OWASP", "D": "CSA"}
explanation_en: The Open Web Application Security Project (OWASP) produces an annual list of the top ten web application security issues that developers and security professionals around the world rely upon for education and training purposes. The OWASP vulnerabilities form the basis for many web application security testing products.
explanation_zh: 开放 Web 应用程序安全项目 (OWASP) 每年都会发布十大 Web 应用程序安全问题列表，全世界的开发人员和安全专业人员都依赖这些问题进行教育和培训。 OWASP 漏洞构成了许多 Web 应用程序安全测试产品的基础。

question_en: The Bell-LaPadula and Biba models implement state machines in a fashion that uses what specific state machine model?
question_zh: Bell-LaPadula 和 Biba 模型以使用什么特定状态机模型的方式实现状态机？
explanation_en: The information flow model applies state machines to the flow of information. The BellLaPadula model applies the information flow model to confidentiality while the Biba model applies it to integrity.
explanation_zh: 信息流模型将状态机应用于信息流。 BellLaPadula 模型将信息流模型应用于机密性，而 Biba 模型将其应用于完整性。

question_en: During a third-party vulnerability scan and security test, Danielle’s employer recently discovered that the embedded systems that were installed to manage her company’s new buildings have a severe remote access vulnerability. The manufacturer has gone out of business, and there is no patch or update for the devices. What should Danielle recommend that her employer do about the hundreds of devices that are vulnerable?
options_en: {"A": "Identify a replacement device model and replace every device.", "B": "Turn off all of the devices.", "C": "Move the devices to a secure and isolated network segment.", "D": "Reverse engineer the devices and build an in-house patch."}
question_zh: 在第三方漏洞扫描和安全测试中，Danielle 的雇主最近发现用于管理公司新大楼的嵌入式系统存在严重的远程访问漏洞。该制造商已经倒闭，并且没有针对该设备的补丁或更新。丹妮尔应该建议她的雇主对数百台易受攻击的设备采取什么措施？
options_zh: {"A": "确定替换设备型号并替换每个设备。", "B": "关闭所有设备。", "C": "将设备移至安全且隔离的网段。", "D": "对设备进行逆向工程并构建内部补丁。"}
explanation_en: The most reasonable choice presented is to move the devices to a secure and isolated network segment. This will allow the devices to continue to serve their intended function while preventing them from being compromised. All of the other scenarios either create major new costs or deprive her organization of the functionality that the devices were purchased to provide.
explanation_zh: 最合理的选择是将设备移动到安全且隔离的网段。这将使设备能够继续发挥其预期功能，同时防止它们受到损害。所有其他情况要么会产生重大的新成本，要么会剥夺她的组织购买设备所提供的功能。

question_en: What type of motion detector senses changes in the electromagnetic fields in monitored areas?
question_zh: 什么类型的运动探测器可以感知监控区域电磁场的变化？
explanation_en: Capacitance motion detectors monitor the electromagnetic field in a monitored area, sensing disturbances that correspond to motion.
explanation_zh: 电容运动探测器可监控受监控区域中的电磁场，感测与运动相对应的干扰。

question_en: Mike has been tasked with preventing an outbreak of malware like Mirai, a botnet that targeted IP-based cameras and routers. What type of systems should be protected in his organization?
question_zh: Mike 的任务是防止 Mirai 等恶意软件的爆发，Mirai 是一个针对基于 IP 的摄像机和路由器的僵尸网络。他的组织中应该保护什么类型的系统？
options_zh: {"A": "服务器", "B": "SCADA", "C": "移动设备", "D": "物联网 (IoT) 设备"}
explanation_en: Mirai targeted “Internet of Things” devices, including routers, cameras, and DVRs. As organizations bring an increasing number of devices like these into their corporate networks, protecting both internal and external targets from insecure, infrequently updated, and often vulnerable IoT devices is increasingly important.
explanation_zh: Mirai 针对“物联网”设备，包括路由器、摄像头和 DVR。随着组织将越来越多的此类设备引入其企业网络，保护内部和外部目标免受不安全、不经常更新且经常易受攻击的物联网设备的侵害变得越来越重要。

question_en: Which one of the following statements is correct about the Biba model of access control?
options_en: {"A": "It addresses confidentiality and integrity.", "B": "It addresses integrity and availability.", "C": "It prevents covert channel attacks.", "D": "It focuses on protecting objects from integrity threats."}
question_zh: 以下关于访问控制 Biba 模型的说法哪一项是正确的？
options_zh: {"A": "它解决机密性和完整性问题。", "B": "它解决完整性和可用性问题。", "C": "防止隐蔽通道攻击。", "D": "它专注于保护对象免受完整性威胁。"}
explanation_en: The Biba model focuses only on protecting integrity and does not provide protection against confidentiality or availability threats. It also does not provide protection against covert channel attacks. The Biba model focuses on external threats and assumes that internal threats are addressed programmatically.
explanation_zh: Biba 模型仅关注保护完整性，不提供针对机密性或可用性威胁的保护。它也不提供针对隐蔽通道攻击的保护。 Biba 模型侧重于外部威胁，并假设内部威胁以编程方式得到解决。

question_en: In Transport Layer Security, what type of key is used to encrypt the actual content of communications between a web server and a client?
options_en: {"A": "Ephemeral session key", "B": "Client’s public key", "C": "Server’s public key", "D": "Server’s private key"}
question_zh: 在传输层安全中，使用什么类型的密钥来加密 Web 服务器和客户端之间的实际通信内容？
options_zh: {"A": "临时会话密钥", "B": "客户端公钥", "C": "服务器公钥", "D": "服务器私钥"}
explanation_en: In TLS, both the server and the client communicate using an ephemeral symmetric session key. They exchange this key using asymmetric cryptography, but all encrypted content is protected using symmetric cryptography.
explanation_zh: 在 TLS 中，服务器和客户端都使用临时对称会话密钥进行通信。他们使用非对称加密技术交换此密钥，但所有加密内容均使用对称加密技术进行保护。

question_en: Beth would like to include technology in a secure area of her data center to protect against unwanted electromagnetic emanations. What technology would assist her with this goal?
question_zh: Beth 希望将技术纳入其数据中心的安全区域，以防止不必要的电磁辐射。什么技术可以帮助她实现这一目标？
options_zh: {"A": "心跳传感器", "B": "法拉第笼", "C": "搭载", "D": "WPA2"}
explanation_en: A Faraday cage is a metal skin that prevents electromagnetic emanations from exiting. It is a rarely used technology because it is unwieldy and expensive, but it is quite effective at blocking unwanted radiation.
explanation_zh: 法拉第笼是一种金属外壳，可防止电磁辐射逸出。这是一种很少使用的技术，因为它笨重且昂贵，但它在阻挡不需要的辐射方面非常有效。

question_en: In a virtualized computing environment, what component is responsible for enforcing separation between guest machines?
question_zh: 在虚拟化计算环境中，哪个组件负责强制来宾计算机之间的隔离？
options_zh: {"A": "来宾操作系统", "B": "虚拟机管理程序", "C": "内核", "D": "保护管理器"}
explanation_en: The hypervisor is responsible for coordinating access to physical hardware and enforcing isolation between different virtual machines running on the same physical platform.
explanation_zh: 虚拟机管理程序负责协调对物理硬件的访问，并在同一物理平台上运行的不同虚拟机之间实施隔离。

question_en: Rick is an application developer who works primarily in Python. He recently decided to evaluate a new service where he provides his Python code to a vendor who then executes it on their server environment. What type of cloud computing environment is this service?
question_zh: Rick 是一名主要使用 Python 工作的应用程序开发人员。他最近决定评估一项新服务，他将自己的 Python 代码提供给供应商，然后供应商在其服务器环境上执行该代码。该服务是什么类型的云计算环境？
options_zh: {"A": "SaaS", "B": "PaaS", "C": "IaaS", "D": "CaaS"}
explanation_en: Cloud computing systems where the customer only provides application code for execution on a vendor-supplied computing platform are examples of platform as a service (PaaS) computing.
explanation_zh: 客户仅提供应用程序代码以在供应商提供的计算平台上执行的云计算系统是平台即服务 (PaaS) 计算的示例。

question_en: A component failure in the primary HVAC system leads to a high temperature alarm in the data center that Kim manages. After resolving the issue, what should Kim consider to prevent future issues like this?
options_en: {"A": "A closed loop chiller", "B": "Redundant cooling systems", "C": "Swamp coolers", "D": "Relocating the data center to a colder climate"}
question_zh: 主 HVAC 系统中的组件故障导致 Kim 管理的数据中心出现高温警报。问题解决后，金正恩应该考虑怎样避免类似问题再次发生？
options_zh: {"A": "闭环冷水机", "B": "冗余冷却系统", "C": "沼泽冷却器", "D": "将数据中心搬迁到气候较冷的地方"}
explanation_en: A well-designed data center should have redundant systems and capabilities for each critical part of its infrastructure. That means that power, cooling, and network connectivity should all be redundant. Kim should determine how to ensure that a single system failure cannot take her data center offline.
explanation_zh: 设计良好的数据中心应为其基础设施的每个关键部分配备冗余系统和功能。这意味着电源、冷却和网络连接都应该是冗余的。 Kim 应该确定如何确保单个系统故障不会导致她的数据中心离线。

question_en: Tommy is planning to implement a power conditioning UPS for a rack of servers in his data center. Which one of the following conditions will the UPS be unable to protect against if it persists for an extended period of time?
question_zh: Tommy 计划为其数据中心的服务器机架安装电源调节 UPS。如果下列哪一种情况长期存在，UPS 将无法提供防护？
explanation_en: UPSs are designed to protect against short-term power losses, such as power faults. When they conduct power conditioning, they are also able to protect against sags and noise. UPSs have limited-life batteries and are not able to maintain continuous operating during a sustained blackout.
explanation_zh: UPS 旨在防止短期断电，例如电源故障。当它们进行功率调节时，它们还能够防止电压骤降和噪声。 UPS 的电池寿命有限，无法在持续停电期间保持连续运行。

question_en: Which one of the following humidity values is within the acceptable range for a data center operation?
question_zh: 以下哪一项湿度值在数据中心运行可接受的范围内？
explanation_en: Data center humidity should be maintained between 40 percent and 60 percent. Values below this range increase the risk of static electricity, while values above this range may generate moisture that damages equipment.
explanation_zh: 数据中心湿度应保持在 40% 到 60% 之间。低于此范围的值会增加静电风险，而高于此范围的值可能会产生湿气，从而损坏设备。

question_en: Kristen’s organization suffered a ransomware infection and has lost access to critical business data. She is considering paying the ransom to regain access to her data. Which of the following statements about this payment are correct? (Select all that apply.)
options_en: {"A": "Payment of the ransom may be illegal.", "B": "Payment of the ransom may result in further demands for payments.", "C": "Payment of the ransom guarantees access to the decryption key.", "D": "Payment of the ransom may cause a data breach."}
question_zh: Kristen 的组织遭受勒索软件感染，无法访问关键业务数据。她正在考虑支付赎金以重新访问她的数据。以下关于这笔付款的哪些表述是正确的？ （选择所有适用项。）
options_zh: {"A": "支付赎金可能是非法的。", "B": "支付赎金可能会导致进一步的付款要求。", "C": "支付赎金可以保证获得解密密钥。", "D": "支付赎金可能会导致数据泄露。"}
explanation_en: Payment of a ransom often results in the release of a decryption key, but this is not guaranteed by any means. There is also no link between the payment of a ransom and a future data breach, as an attacker may choose to release confidential information regardless of whether the ransom was paid. Depending upon applicable jurisdictions, payment of a ransom may be illegal under corrupt practices laws or embargoes against terrorist organizations. For example, the U.S. Office of Foreign Assets Control (OFAC) issued an advisory in 2020 stating that ransom payments may violate sanctions. Payment of a ransom may also cause attackers to consider the victim a “mark” and demand future payments in exchange for continued access to their data.
explanation_zh: 支付赎金通常会导致解密密钥的释放，但这并不能以任何方式保证。支付赎金与未来的数据泄露之间也没有联系，因为无论是否支付赎金，攻击者都可能选择发布机密信息。根据适用的司法管辖区，根据腐败行为法或针对恐怖组织的禁运，支付赎金可能是非法的。例如，美国外国资产控制办公室 (OFAC) 在 2020 年发布了一份咨询报告，指出支付赎金可能违反制裁。支付赎金还可能导致攻击者将受害者视为“标记”，并要求未来支付赎金以换取继续访问其数据。

question_en: Alex’s employer creates most of their work output as PDF files. Alex is concerned about limiting the audience for the PDF files to those individuals who have paid for them. What technology can he use to most effectively control the access to and distribution of these files?
question_zh: Alex 的雇主将大部分工作输出创建为 PDF 文件。 Alex 担心 PDF 文件的受众仅限于已付费的个人。他可以使用什么技术来最有效地控制这些文件的访问和分发？
explanation_en: Alex can use digital rights management technology to limit use of the PDFs to paying customers. While DRM is rarely a perfect solution, in this case, it may fit his organization’s needs. EDM is electronic dance music, which his customers may appreciate but which won’t solve the problem. Encryption and digital signatures can help to keep the files secure and to prove who they came from but won’t solve the rights management issue Alex is tackling.
explanation_zh: Alex 可以使用数字版权管理技术来限制付费客户对 PDF 的使用。虽然 DRM 很少是完美的解决方案，但在这种情况下，它可能适合他的组织的需求。 EDM 是电子舞曲，他的客户可能会欣赏，但并不能解决问题。加密和数字签名可以帮助确保文件安全并证明文件来自谁，但无法解决 Alex 正在解决的权限管理问题。

question_en: As part of his team’s forensic investigation process, Matt signs out drives and other evidence from an evidence storage facility before working with them. What type of documentation is he creating?
question_zh: 作为团队取证调查过程的一部分，Matt 在使用驱动器和其他证据之前从证据存储设施中签出它们。他正在创建什么类型的文档？
explanation_en: Matt is helping to maintain the chain of custody documentation for his electronic evidence. This can be important if his organization needs to prove that the digital evidence they handled has not been tampered with. A better process would involve more than one person to ensure that no tampering was possible.
explanation_zh: Matt 正在帮助维护其电子证据的监管链文件。如果他的组织需要证明他们处理的数字证据没有被篡改，这一点可能很重要。更好的流程应该涉及多个人，以确保不可能发生篡改。

question_en: Todd believes that a digital certificate used by his organization has been compromised and he wants to add it to the certificate revocation list (CRL). What element of the certificate goes on the CRL?
question_zh: Todd 认为其组织使用的数字证书已被泄露，他希望将其添加到证书吊销列表 (CRL) 中。 CRL 上包含证书的哪些元素？
explanation_en: The certificate revocation list contains the serial numbers of digital certificates issued by a certificate authority that have later been revoked.
explanation_zh: 证书吊销列表包含由证书颁发机构颁发的后来被吊销的数字证书的序列号。

question_en: Alison is examining a digital certificate presented to her by her bank’s website. Which one of the following requirements is not necessary for her to trust the digital certificate?
options_en: {"A": "She knows that the server belongs to the bank.", "B": "She trusts the certificate authority.", "C": "She verifies that the certificate is not listed on a CRL.", "D": "She verifies the digital signature on the certificate."}
question_zh: 艾莉森正在检查银行网站向她提供的数字证书。下列哪一项要求对于她信任数字证书来说不是必需的？
options_zh: {"A": "她知道服务器是银行的。", "B": "她信任证书颁发机构。", "C": "她验证该证书未在 CRL 中列出。", "D": "她验证证书上的数字签名。"}
explanation_en: The point of the digital certificate is to prove to Alison that the server belongs to the bank, so she does not need to have this trust in advance. To trust the certificate, she must verify the CA’s digital signature on the certificate, trust the CA, verify that the certificate is not listed on a CRL, and verify that the certificate contains the name of the bank.
explanation_zh: 数字证书的意义在于向艾莉森证明服务器属于银行，所以她不需要提前拥有这种信任。要信任该证书，她必须验证该证书上的 CA 数字签名、信任该 CA、验证该证书是否未在 CRL 中列出，并验证该证书是否包含银行名称。

question_en: Which one of the following is an example of a covert timing channel when used to exfiltrate information from an organization?
options_en: {"A": "Sending an electronic mail message", "B": "Posting a file on a peer-to-peer file sharing service", "C": "Typing with the rhythm of Morse code", "D": "Writing data to a shared memory space"}
question_zh: 以下哪一项是用于从组织中窃取信息的隐蔽定时通道的示例？
options_zh: {"A": "发送电子邮件", "B": "在点对点文件共享服务上发布文件", "C": "以莫尔斯电码的节奏打字", "D": "将数据写入共享内存空间"}
explanation_en: Covert channels use surreptitious communications’ paths. Covert timing channels alter the use of a resource in a measurable fashion to exfiltrate information. If a user types using a specific rhythm of Morse code, this is an example of a covert timing channel. Someone watching or listening to the keystrokes could receive a secret message with no trace of the message left in logs.
explanation_zh: 隐蔽通道使用秘密通信路径。隐蔽定时通道以可测量的方式改变资源的使用以泄露信息。如果用户使用莫尔斯电码的特定节奏进行打字，这就是隐蔽定时通道的示例。观看或收听击键的人可能会收到一条秘密消息，而日志中不会留下该消息的任何痕迹。

question_en: Which one of the following would be a reasonable application for the use of self-signed digital certificates?
options_en: {"A": "Digital commerce website", "B": "Banking application", "C": "Internal scheduling application", "D": "Customer portal"}
question_zh: 以下哪一项是使用自签名数字证书的合理申请？
options_zh: {"A": "数字商务网站", "B": "银行应用程序", "C": "内部调度应用程序", "D": "客户门户"}
explanation_en: Self-signed digital certificates should be used only for internal-facing applications, where the user base trusts the internally generated digital certificate.
explanation_zh: 自签名数字证书应仅用于面向内部的应用程序，其中用户群信任内部生成的数字证书。

question_en: Ron is investigating a security incident that took place at a highly secure government facility. He believes that encryption keys were stolen during the attack and finds evidence that the attackers used dry ice to freeze an encryption component. What type of attack was likely attempted?
options_en: {"A": "Side channel attack", "B": "Brute-force attack", "C": "Timing attack", "D": "Fault injection attack"}
question_zh: 罗恩正在调查发生在高度安全的政府设施中的安全事件。他认为加密密钥在攻击过程中被盗，并发现攻击者使用干冰冻结加密组件的证据。可能尝试了什么类型的攻击？
options_zh: {"A": "旁道攻击", "B": "暴力攻击", "C": "定时攻击", "D": "故障注入攻击"}
explanation_en: In a fault injection attack, the attacker attempts to compromise the integrity of a cryptographic device by causing some type of external fault. For example, they might use high-voltage electricity, high or low temperature, or other factors to cause a malfunction that undermines the security of the device. Side-channel attacks seek to use information about system activity and retrieve information that is actively being encrypted. Brute-force attacks attempt every possible valid combination for a key or password. In a timing attack, the attacker measures precisely how long cryptographic operations take to complete, gaining information about the cryptographic process that may be used to undermine its security.
explanation_zh: 在故障注入攻击中，攻击者试图通过引起某种类型的外部故障来破坏加密设备的完整性。例如，他们可能会使用高压电、高温或低温或其他因素导致故障，从而破坏设备的安全性。旁道攻击寻求使用有关系统活动的信息并检索正在主动加密的信息。暴力攻击会尝试密钥或密码的所有可能的有效组合。在定时攻击中，攻击者精确测量加密操作完成所需的时间，获取有关可能用于破坏其安全性的加密过程的信息。

question_en: Match the following numbered security models with the appropriate lettered security descriptions: Security models 1. Clark-Wilson 2. Graham-Denning 3. Bell-LaPadula 4. Biba Descriptions
options_en: {"A": "This model blocks lower-classified objects from accessing higher-classified objects, thus ensuring confidentiality.", "B": "The * property of this model can be summarized as “no write-up.”", "C": "This model uses security labels to grant access to objects via transformation procedures and a restricted interface model.", "D": "This model focuses on the secure creation and deletion of subjects and objects using eight primary protection rules or actions."}
question_zh: 将以下编号的安全模型与适当的字母安全描述相匹配： 安全模型 1. Clark-Wilson 2. Graham-Denning 3. Bell-LaPadula 4. Biba 描述
options_zh: {"A": "该模型阻止较低级别的对象访问较高级别的对象，从而确保机密性。", "B": "该模型的 * 属性可以概括为“无写”。", "C": "该模型使用安全标签通过转换过程和受限接口模型授予对对象的访问权限。", "D": "该模型侧重于使用八个主要保护规则或操作来安全创建和删除主体和客体。"}
explanation_en: The security models match with the descriptions as follows: 1. Clark-Wilson: C. This model uses security labels to grant access to objects via transformation procedures and a restricted interface model. 2. Graham-Denning: D. This model focuses on the secure creation and deletion of subjects and objects using eight primary protection rules or actions. 3. Bell-LaPadula: A. This model blocks lower-classified objects from accessing higherclassified objects, thus ensuring confidentiality. 4. Biba: B. The * property of this model can be summarized as “no write-up.”
explanation_zh: 安全模型与描述相符如下： 1. Clark-Wilson：C。该模型使用安全标签通过转换过程和受限接口模型授予对对象的访问权限。 2. Graham-Denning：D。该模型侧重于使用八个主要保护规则或操作来安全创建和删除主体和客体。 3. Bell-LaPadula：A。该模型阻止较低级别的对象访问较高级别的对象，从而确保机密性。 4. Biba：B。这个模型的 * 属性可以概括为“无记录”。

question_en: Match each of these following numbered architecture security concepts with the appropriate lettered description: Architectural security concepts 1. Time of check 2. Covert channel 3. Time of use 4. Maintenance hooks 5. Parameter checking 6. Race condition Descriptions
options_en: {"A": "A method used to pass information over a path not normally used for communication", "B": "The exploitation of the reliance of a system’s behavior on the sequence of events that occur externally", "C": "The time at which the subject checks whether an object is available", "D": "The time at which a subject can access an object", "E": "An access method known only to the developer of the system", "F": "A method that can help prevent buffer overflow attacks"}
question_zh: 将以下每个编号的架构安全概念与适当的字母描述相匹配： 架构安全概念 1. 检查时间 2. 隐蔽通道 3. 使用时间 4. 维护挂钩 5. 参数检查 6. 竞争条件描述
options_zh: {"A": "用于通过通常不用于通信的路径传递信息的方法", "B": "利用系统对外部发生的事件序列的行为", "C": "主体检查对象是否可用的时间", "D": "主体可以访问对象的时间", "E": "只有系统开发人员知道的访问方法", "F": "有助于防止缓冲区溢出攻击的方法"}
explanation_en: The architecture security concepts match with the descriptions as follows: 1. Time of check: C. The time at which the subject checks whether an object is available 2. Covert channel: A. A method used to pass information over a path not normally used for communication 3. Time of use: D. The time at which a subject can access an object 4. Maintenance hooks: E. An access method known only to the developer of the system 5. Parameter checking: F. A method that can help prevent buffer overflow attacks 6. Race condition: B. The exploitation of the reliance of a system’s behavior on the sequence of events that occur externally
explanation_zh: 架构安全概念与描述相符： 1. 检查时间：C.主体检查对象是否可用的时间 2. 隐蔽通道：A. 用于通过通常不用于通信的路径传递信息的方法 3. 使用时间：D. 主体可以访问对象的时间 4. 维护挂钩：E. 只有系统开发人员知道的访问方法 5. 参数检查：F. 有助于防止缓冲区溢出攻击的方法 6. 竞争条件：B. 利用系统行为对事件序列的依赖发生在外部的

question_en: Gary wants to distribute a large file and prefers a peer-to-peer CDN. Which of the following is the most common example of this type of technology?
question_zh: Gary 想要分发大文件并且更喜欢点对点 CDN。以下哪项是此类技术最常见的示例？
options_zh: {"A": "CloudFlare", "B": "BitTorrent", "C": "Amazon CloudFront", "D": "Akamai Edge"}
explanation_en: BitTorrent is an example of a peer-to-peer (P2P) content delivery network. It is commonly used for legitimate purposes to distribute large files like Linux ISOs and other freely distributed software packages and files in addition to its less legitimate uses. CloudFlare, CloudFront, and Akamai’s Edge are all hosted CDNs.
explanation_zh: BitTorrent 是点对点 (P2P) 内容交付网络的示例。除了不太合法的用途之外，它通常用于合法目的分发 Linux ISO 等大型文件以及其他自由分发的软件包和文件。 CloudFlare、CloudFront 和 Akamai’s Edge 都是托管 CDN。

question_en: During a security assessment of a wireless network, Jim discovers that LEAP is in use on a network using WPA. What recommendation should Jim make?
options_en: {"A": "Continue to use LEAP. It provides better security than TKIP for WPA networks.", "B": "Use an alternate protocol like PEAP or EAP-TLS and implement WPA2 if supported.", "C": "Continue to use LEAP to avoid authentication issues, but move to WPA2.", "D": "Use an alternate protocol like PEAP or EAP-TLS, and implement Wired Equivalent Privacy to avoid wireless security issues."}
question_zh: 在对无线网络进行安全评估期间，Jim 发现使用 WPA 的网络上正在使用 LEAP。吉姆应该提出什么建议？
options_zh: {"A": "继续使用LEAP。它为 WPA 网络提供比 TKIP 更好的安全性。", "B": "使用 PEAP 或 EAP-TLS 等替代协议并实施 WPA2（如果支持）。", "C": "继续使用 LEAP 以避免身份验证问题，但转向 WPA2。", "D": "使用 PEAP 或 EAP-TLS 等替代协议，并实施有线等效隐私以避免无线安全问题。"}
explanation_en: LEAP, the Lightweight Extensible Authentication Protocol, is a Cisco proprietary protocol designed to handle problems with TKIP. Unfortunately, LEAP has significant security issues as well and should not be used. Any modern hardware should support WPA2 and technologies like PEAP or EAP-TLS. Using WEP, the predecessor to WPA and WPA2, would be a major step back in security for any network.
explanation_zh: LEAP（轻量级可扩展身份验证协议）是 Cisco 专有协议，旨在处理 TKIP 问题。不幸的是，LEAP 也存在严重的安全问题，不应使用。任何现代硬件都应该支持 WPA2 和 PEAP 或 EAP-TLS 等技术。使用 WEP（WPA 和 WPA2 的前身）将是任何网络安全性的重大倒退。

question_en: Ben has connected his laptop to his tablet PC using an 802.11ac connection. What wireless network mode has he used to connect these devices?
options_en: {"A": "Infrastructure mode", "B": "Wired extension mode", "C": "Ad hoc mode", "D": "Standalone mode"}
question_zh: Ben 已使用 802.11ac 连接将笔记本电脑连接到平板电脑。他使用什么无线网络模式来连接这些设备？
options_zh: {"A": "基础设施模式", "B": "有线扩展模式", "C": "Ad hoc 模式", "D": "独立模式"}
explanation_en: Ben is using ad hoc mode, which directly connects two clients. It can be easy to confuse this with standalone mode, which connects clients using a wireless access point but not to wired resources like a central network. Infrastructure mode connects endpoints to a central network, not directly to each other. Finally, wired extension mode uses a wireless access point to link wireless clients to a wired network.
explanation_zh: Ben 使用 ad hoc 模式，直接连接两个客户端。这很容易与独立模式混淆，独立模式使用无线接入点连接客户端，但不连接到中央网络等有线资源。基础设施模式将端点连接到中央网络，而不是直接相互连接。最后，有线扩展模式使用无线接入点将无线客户端链接到有线网络。

question_en: Selah’s and Nick’s PCs simultaneously send traffic by transmitting at the same time. What network term describes the range of systems on a network that could be affected by this same issue?
options_en: {"A": "The subnet", "B": "The supernet", "C": "A collision domain", "D": "A broadcast domain"}
question_zh: Selah 和 Nick 的 PC 通过同时传输来同时发送流量。什么网络术语描述了网络上可能受同一问题影响的系统范围？
explanation_en: A collision domain is the set of systems that could cause a collision if they transmitted at the same time. Systems outside a collision domain cannot cause a collision if they send at the same time. This is important, as the number of systems in a collision domain increases the likelihood of network congestion due to an increase in collisions. A broadcast domain is the set of systems that can receive a broadcast from each other. A subnet is a logical division of a network, while a supernet is made up of two or more networks.
explanation_zh: 冲突域是同时传输时可能导致冲突的系统集合。冲突域之外的系统如果同时发送，就不会引起冲突。这很重要，因为冲突域中的系统数量会增加由于冲突增加而导致网络拥塞的可能性。广播域是一组可以相互接收广播的系统。子网是网络的逻辑划分，而超网由两个或多个网络组成。

question_en: Sarah is manually reviewing a packet capture of TCP traffic and finds that a system is setting the RST flag in the TCP packets it sends repeatedly during a short period of time. What does this flag mean in the TCP packet header?
options_en: {"A": "RST flags mean “Rest.” The server needs traffic to briefly pause.", "B": "RST flags mean “Relay-set.” The packets will be forwarded to the address set in the packet.", "C": "RST flags mean “Resume Standard.” Communications will resume in their normal format.", "D": "RST means “Reset.” The TCP session will be disconnected."}
question_zh: Sarah 正在手动检查 TCP 流量的数据包捕获，发现系统在短时间内重复发送的 TCP 数据包中设置了 RST 标志。 TCP 数据包标头中的该标志有何含义？
options_zh: {"A": "RST 标志的意思是“休息”。服务器需要流量短暂暂停。", "B": "RST 标志的意思是“继电器设置”。数据包将被转发到数据包中设置的地址。", "C": "RST 标志的意思是“恢复标准”。通信将恢复正常格式。", "D": "RST 意思是“重置”。 TCP 会话将被断开。"}
explanation_en: The RST flag is used to reset or disconnect a session. It can be resumed by restarting the connection via a new three-way handshake.
explanation_zh: RST 标志用于重置或断开会话。可以通过新的三向握手重新启动连接来恢复它。

question_en: Gary is deploying a wireless network and wants to deploy the fastest possible wireless technology. Which one of the following wireless networking standards should he use?
question_zh: Gary 正在部署无线网络，并希望部署尽可能最快的无线技术。他应该使用以下哪一种无线网络标准？
explanation_en: He should choose 802.11ac, which supports theoretical speeds up to 3.4 Gbps. 802.11n supports up to 600 Mbps, 802.11g and 802.11a are only capable of 54 Mbps.
explanation_zh: 他应该选择802.11ac，它支持理论速度高达3.4 Gbps。 802.11n 支持高达 600 Mbps，802.11g 和 802.11a 仅支持 54 Mbps。

question_en: Michele wants to replace FTP traffic with a secure replacement. What secure protocol should she select instead?
question_zh: Michele 希望用安全的替代方案来替代 FTP 流量。她应该选择什么安全协议？
options_zh: {"A": "TFTP", "B": "HFTPS", "C": "SecFTP", "D": "SFTP"}
explanation_en: Both FTP/S and SFTP are commonly used as replacement insecure FTP services. SFTP offers the advantage of using SSH for transfers, making it easy to use existing firewall rules. TFTP is trivial FTP, an insecure quick transfer method often used to transfer files for network devices, among other uses. HFTPS and SecFTP were made up for this question.
explanation_zh: FTP/S 和 SFTP 都通常用作替代不安全 FTP 服务。 SFTP 提供了使用 SSH 进行传输的优势，可以轻松使用现有的防火墙规则。 TFTP 是一种普通的 FTP，是一种不安全的快速传输方法，通常用于为网络设备传输文件等。 HFTPS和SecFTP就是针对这个问题而提出来的。

question_en: Jake has been told that there is a layer 3 problem with his network. Which of the following is associated with layer 3 in the OSI model?
options_en: {"A": "IP addresses", "B": "TCP and UDP protocols", "C": "MAC addresses", "D": "Sending and receiving bits via hardware"}
question_zh: Jake 被告知他的网络存在第 3 层问题。以下哪项与 OSI 模型中的第 3 层相关？
options_zh: {"A": "IP 地址", "B": "TCP 和 UDP 协议", "C": "MAC 地址", "D": "通过硬件发送和接收位"}
explanation_en: The Network layer, or layer 3, uses IP addresses for logical addressing. TCP and UDP protocols are used at the Transport layer, which is layer 4. Hardware addresses are used at layer 2, the Data Link layer, and sending and receiving bits via hardware is done at the Physical layer (layer 1).
explanation_zh: 网络层（或第 3 层）使用 IP 地址进行逻辑寻址。 TCP 和 UDP 协议用于传输层，即第 4 层。硬件地址用于第 2 层，即数据链路层，通过硬件发送和接收位是在物理层（第 1 层）完成的。

question_en: Frank is responsible for ensuring that his organization has reliable, supported network hardware. Which of the following is not a common concern for network administrators as they work to ensure their network continues to be operational?
options_en: {"A": "If the devices have vendor support", "B": "If the devices are under warranty", "C": "If major devices support redundant power supplies", "D": "If all devices support redundant power supplies"}
question_zh: Frank 负责确保其组织拥有可靠、受支持的网络硬件。在网络管理员努力确保网络持续运行时，以下哪一项不是他们普遍关心的问题？
options_zh: {"A": "如果设备有供应商支持", "B": "如果设备在保修期内", "C": "如果主要设备支持冗余电源", "D": "如果所有设备都支持冗余电源"}
explanation_en: Most networks include many edge devices like wireless access points and edge switches. These devices often have a single power supply to balance cost against reliability and will simply be replaced if they fail. More critical devices like routers and core switches are typically equipped with redundant power supplies to ensure that larger segments of the network do not fail if a component fails. Of course, making sure devices are supported so they get updates and that they are under warranty are both common practices for supportable networks.
explanation_zh: 大多数网络包含许多边缘设备，例如无线接入点和边缘交换机。这些设备通常具有单个电源，以平衡成本与可靠性，并且如果出现故障，只需更换即可。路由器和核心交换机等更关键的设备通常配备冗余电源，以确保在组件发生故障时较大的网络段不会发生故障。当然，确保设备受到支持以便获得更新并处于保修期内都是可支持网络的常见做法。

question_en: Brian is selecting an authentication protocol for a PPP connection. He would like to select an option that encrypts both usernames and passwords and protects against replay using a challenge/response dialog. He would also like to reauthenticate remote systems periodically. Which protocol should he use?
question_zh: Brian 正在为 PPP 连接选择身份验证协议。他希望选择一个选项来加密用户名和密码，并使用质询/响应对话框防止重播。他还希望定期重新验证远程系统。他应该使用哪种协议？
options_zh: {"A": "PAP", "B": "CHAP", "C": "EAP", "D": "LEAP"}
explanation_en: The Challenge-Handshake Authentication Protocol, or CHAP, is used by PPP servers to authenticate remote clients. It encrypts both the username and password and performs periodic reauthentication while connected using techniques to prevent replay attacks. LEAP provides reauthentication but was designed for WEP, while PAP sends passwords unencrypted. EAP is extensible and was used for PPP connections, but it doesn’t directly address the listed items.
explanation_zh: 质询握手身份验证协议 (CHAP) 由 PPP 服务器用来对远程客户端进行身份验证。它对用户名和密码进行加密，并在连接时使用防止重放攻击的技术定期进行重新身份验证。 LEAP 提供重新身份验证，但专为 WEP 设计，而 PAP 发送未加密的密码。 EAP 是可扩展的，用于 PPP 连接，但它不直接处理列出的项目。

question_en: Which one of the following protocols is commonly used to provide back-end authentication services for a VPN?
question_zh: 以下哪一种协议通常用于为 VPN 提供后端身份验证服务？
options_zh: {"A": "HTTPS", "B": "RADIUS", "C": "ESP", "D": "AH"}
explanation_en: The Remote Access Dial In User Service (RADIUS) protocol was originally designed to support dial-up modem connections but is still commonly used for VPN-based authentication. HTTPS is not an authentication protocol. ESP and AH are IPsec protocols but do not provide authentication services for other systems.
explanation_zh: 远程访问拨入用户服务 (RADIUS) 协议最初设计用于支持拨号调制解调器连接，但仍常用于基于 VPN 的身份验证。 HTTPS 不是身份验证协议。 ESP和AH都是IPsec协议，但不为其他系统提供认证服务。

question_en: Isaac wants to ensure that his VoIP session initialization is secure. What protocol should he ensure is enabled and required?
options_en: {"A": "SVOIP", "B": "PBSX", "C": "SIPS", "D": "SRTP For questions 13–15, please refer to the following scenario and diagram: Chris is designing layered network security for his organization. Internet A Web Server Firewall B C Router VPN Concentrator Switch"}
question_zh: Isaac 希望确保他的 VoIP 会话初始化是安全的。他应该确保启用并需要什么协议？
options_zh: {"A": "SVOIP", "B": "PBSX", "C": "SIPS", "D": "SRTP 对于问题 13-15，请参考以下场景和图表： Chris 正在为其组织设计分层网络安全。互联网 A Web 服务器防火墙 B C 路由器 VPN 集中器交换机"}
explanation_en: SIPS, the secure version of the Session Initialization Protocol for VoIP, adds TLS encryption to keep the session initialization process secure. SVOIP and PBSX are not real protocols, but SRTP is the secure version of RTP, the Real time Transport Protocol.
explanation_zh: SIPS 是 VoIP 会话初始化协议的安全版本，添加了 TLS 加密以确保会话初始化过程的安全。 SVOIP 和 PBSX 不是真正的协议，但 SRTP 是 RTP（实时传输协议）的安全版本。

question_en: What type of firewall design is shown in the diagram?
options_en: {"A": "A single-tier firewall", "B": "A two-tier firewall", "C": "A three-tier firewall", "D": "A four-tier firewall"}
question_zh: 图中显示的是哪种类型的防火墙设计？
options_zh: {"A": "单层防火墙", "B": "两层防火墙", "C": "三层防火墙", "D": "四层防火墙"}
explanation_en: The firewall in the diagram has two protected zones behind it, making it a two-tier firewall design.
explanation_zh: 图中的防火墙后面有两个保护区，使其成为两层防火墙设计。

question_en: If the VPN grants remote users the same access to network and system resources as local workstations have, what security issue should Chris raise?
options_en: {"A": "VPN users will not be able to access the web server.", "B": "There is no additional security issue; the VPN concentrator’s logical network location matches the logical network location of the workstations.", "C": "Web server traffic is not subjected to stateful inspection.", "D": "VPN users should only connect from managed PCs."}
question_zh: 如果 VPN 授予远程用户与本地工作站相同的网络和系统资源访问权限，Chris 应该提出什么安全问题？
options_zh: {"A": "VPN 用户将无法访问 Web 服务器。", "B": "没有额外的安全问题； VPN 集中器的逻辑网络位置与工作站的逻辑网络位置相匹配。", "C": "Web 服务器流量不受状态检查。", "D": "VPN 用户只能从受管理的 PC 进行连接。"}
explanation_en: Remote PCs that connect to a protected network need to comply with security settings and standards that match those required for the internal network. The VPN concentrator logically places remote users in the protected zone behind the firewall, but that means user workstations (and users) must be trusted in the same way that local workstations are.
explanation_zh: 连接到受保护网络的远程 PC 需要遵守与内部网络所需的安全设置和标准相匹配的安全设置和标准。 VPN 集中器逻辑上将远程用户放置在防火墙后面的受保护区域中，但这意味着用户工作站（和用户）必须像本地工作站一样受到信任。

question_en: If Chris wants to stop cross-site scripting attacks against the web server, what is the best device for this purpose, and where should he put it?
options_en: {"A": "A firewall, location A", "B": "An IDS, location A", "C": "An IPS, location B", "D": "A WAF, location C"}
question_zh: 如果 Chris 想要阻止针对 Web 服务器的跨站脚本攻击，那么实现此目的的最佳设备是什么？他应该把它放在哪里？
options_zh: {"A": "防火墙，位置 A", "B": "IDS，位置 A", "C": "IPS，位置 B", "D": "A WAF，位置 C"}
explanation_en: An intrusion protection system can scan traffic and stop both known and unknown attacks. A web application firewall, or WAF, is also a suitable technology, but placing it at location C would only protect from attacks via the organization’s VPN, which should only be used by trusted users. A firewall typically won’t have the ability to identify and stop cross-site scripting attacks, and IDS systems only monitor and don’t stop attacks.
explanation_zh: 入侵防护系统可以扫描流量并阻止已知和未知的攻击。 Web 应用程序防火墙 (WAF) 也是一种合适的技术，但将其放置在位置 C 只能防止通过组织的 VPN 进行攻击，而 VPN 只能由受信任的用户使用。防火墙通常无法识别和阻止跨站点脚本攻击，而 IDS 系统只能监控而不能阻止攻击。

question_en: Susan is deploying a routing protocol that maintains a list of destination networks with metrics that include the distance in hops to them and the direction traffic should be sent to them. What type of protocol is she using?
options_en: {"A": "A link-state protocol", "B": "A link-distance protocol", "C": "A destination metric protocol", "D": "A distance-vector protocol"}
question_zh: Susan 正在部署一种路由协议，该协议维护一个目标网络列表，其指标包括到这些网络的跳数距离以及应将流量发送到这些网络的方向。她使用什么类型的协议？
options_zh: {"A": "链路状态协议", "B": "链路距离协议", "C": "目标度量协议", "D": "距离矢量协议"}
explanation_en: Distance-vector protocols use metrics including the direction and distance in hops to remote networks to make decisions. A link-state routing protocol considers the shortest distance to a remote network. Destination metric and link-distance protocols don’t exist.
explanation_zh: 距离矢量协议使用包括到远程网络的方向和距离（以跳数为单位）的度量来做出决策。链路状态路由协议考虑到远程网络的最短距离。目标度量和链路距离协议不存在。

question_en: Ben has configured his network to not broadcast an SSID. Why might Ben disable SSID broadcast, and how could his SSID be discovered?
options_en: {"A": "Disabling SSID broadcast prevents attackers from discovering the encryption key. The SSID can be recovered from decrypted packets.", "B": "Disabling SSID broadcast hides networks from unauthorized personnel. The SSID can be discovered using a wireless sniffer.", "C": "Disabling SSID broadcast prevents issues with beacon frames. The SSID can be recovered by reconstructing the BSSID.", "D": "Disabling SSID broadcast helps avoid SSID conflicts. The SSID can be discovered by attempting to connect to the network."}
question_zh: Ben 已将其网络配置为不广播 SSID。为什么 Ben 可能会禁用 SSID 广播，以及他的 SSID 如何被发现？
options_zh: {"A": "禁用 SSID 广播可防止攻击者发现加密密钥。 SSID 可以从解密的数据包中恢复。", "B": "禁用 SSID 广播可以向未经授权的人员隐藏网络。可以使用无线嗅探器发现 SSID。", "C": "禁用 SSID 广播可防止信标帧出现问题。通过重建BSSID可以恢复SSID。", "D": "禁用 SSID 广播有助于避免 SSID 冲突。可以通过尝试连接到网络来发现 SSID。"}
explanation_en: Disabling SSID broadcast can help prevent unauthorized personnel from attempting to connect to the network. Since the SSID is still active, it can be discovered by using a wireless sniffer. Encryption keys are not related to SSID broadcast, beacon frames are used to broadcast the SSID, and it is possible to have multiple networks with the same SSID.
explanation_zh: 禁用 SSID 广播有助于防止未经授权的人员尝试连接到网络。由于 SSID 仍然处于活动状态，因此可以使用无线嗅探器发现它。加密密钥与 SSID 广播无关，信标帧用于广播 SSID，并且可以有多个网络具有相同的 SSID。

question_en: What network tool can be used to protect the identity of clients while providing Internet access by accepting client requests, altering the source addresses of the requests, mapping requests to clients, and sending the modified requests out to their destination?
question_zh: 在提供 Internet 访问时，可以使用什么网络工具通过接受客户端请求、更改请求的源地址、将请求映射到客户端以及将修改后的请求发送到目的地来保护客户端的身份？
explanation_en: A proxy is a form of gateway that provides clients with a filtering, caching, or other service that protects their information from remote systems. A router connects networks, while a firewall uses rules to limit traffic permitted through it. A switch is used to connect systems and does not provide these capabilities.
explanation_zh: 代理是网关的一种形式，为客户端提供过滤、缓存或其他服务，以保护其信息免受远程系统的影响。路由器连接网络，而防火墙使用规则来限制允许通过的流量。交换机用于连接系统，不提供这些功能。

question_en: Susan wants to secure her communications traffic via multiple internet service providers as it is sent to her company’s second location. What technology should she use to protect the traffic for an always on, always connected link between the sites?
question_zh: Susan 希望通过多个互联网服务提供商确保其通信流量在发送到公司第二个地点时的安全。她应该使用什么技术来保护站点之间始终在线、始终连接的链接的流量？
options_zh: {"A": "FCoE", "B": "SDWAN", "C": "点对点 IPsec VPN", "D": "Zigbee"}
explanation_en: A point-to-point IPsec VPN can provide a secure, encrypted channel that is established on an ongoing basis between the two sites, ensuring that Susan’s traffic is not exposed along the path that it travels. FCoE is Fibre Channel over Ethernet, a storage protocol. SD-WAN is a software-defined wide area network, and Zigbee is a low-power wireless protocol. None of these addresses Susan’s needs.
explanation_zh: 点对点 IPsec VPN 可以提供在两个站点之间持续建立的安全加密通道，确保 Susan 的流量不会沿其传输路径暴露。 FCoE 是以太网光纤通道，一种存储协议。 SD-WAN是软件定义的广域网，Zigbee是低功耗无线协议。这些都不能满足苏珊的需求。

question_en: Melissa wants to combine multiple physical networks in her organization in a way that is transparent to users but allows the resources to be allocated as needed for networked services. What type of network should she deploy?
question_zh: Melissa 希望以对用户透明的方式组合组织中的多个物理网络，但允许根据网络服务的需要分配资源。她应该部署什么类型的网络？
options_zh: {"A": "iSCSI", "B": "虚拟网络", "C": "SDWAN", "D": "CDN"}
explanation_en: A virtual network can be used to combine existing networks or to divide a network into multiple segments. Melissa can use a virtual network to combine existing networks and then use software-defined networking capabilities to allocate and manage network resources. iSCSI is a converged storage protocol. An SD-WAN is a software-defined wide area network, and this question does not specify LAN or WAN technologies. A CDN is a content distribution network and helps with load and denial-of-service attacks.
explanation_zh: 虚拟网络可用于组合现有网络或将网络划分为多个网段。 Melissa 可以使用虚拟网络来组合现有网络，然后使用软件定义的网络功能来分配和管理网络资源。 iSCSI 是一种融合存储协议。 SD-WAN 是软件定义的广域网，该问题未指定 LAN 或 WAN 技术。 CDN 是一种内容分发网络，有助于应对负载和拒绝服务攻击。

question_en: Which email security solution provides two major usage modes: (1) signed messages that provide integrity, sender authentication, and nonrepudiation; and (2) an enveloped message mode that provides integrity, sender authentication, and confidentiality?
question_zh: 哪种电子邮件安全解决方案提供两种主要使用模式： (1) 签名消息，提供完整性、发件人身份验证和不可否认性； (2) 提供完整性、发送者身份验证和机密性的封装消息模式？
options_zh: {"A": "S/MIME", "B": "MOSS", "C": "PEM", "D": "DKIM"}
explanation_en: S/MIME supports both signed messages and a secure envelope method. While the functionality of S/MIME can be replicated with other tools, the secure envelope is an S/MIME-specific concept. MOSS, or MIME Object Security Services, and PEM can also both provide authentication, confidentiality, integrity, and nonrepudiation, while DKIM, or Domain Keys Identified Mail, is a domain validation tool.
explanation_zh: S/MIME 支持签名消息和安全信封方法。虽然 S/MIME 的功能可以用其他工具复制，但安全信封是 S/MIME 特定的概念。 MOSS（即 MIME 对象安全服务）和 PEM 还可以提供身份验证、机密性、完整性和不可否认性，而 DKIM（即域密钥识别邮件）是一种域验证工具。

question_en: During a security assessment, Jim discovers that the organization he is working with uses a multilayer protocol to handle SCADA systems and recently connected the SCADA network to the rest of the organization’s production network. What concern should he raise about serial data transfers carried via TCP/IP?
options_en: {"A": "SCADA devices that are now connected to the network can now be attacked over the network.", "B": "Serial data over TCP/IP cannot be encrypted.", "C": "Serial data cannot be carried in TCP packets.", "D": "TCP/IP’s throughput can allow for easy denial-of-service attacks against serial devices."}
question_zh: 在安全评估期间，Jim 发现他所工作的组织使用多层协议来处理 SCADA 系统，并且最近将 SCADA 网络连接到组织生产网络的其余部分。对于通过 TCP/IP 进行的串行数据传输，他应该关注什么？
options_zh: {"A": "现在连接到网络的 SCADA 设备现在可以通过网络受到攻击。", "B": "TCP/IP 上的串行数据无法加密。", "C": "TCP 数据包中不能携带串行数据。", "D": "TCP/IP 的吞吐量可以轻松地对串行设备进行拒绝服务攻击。"}
explanation_en: Multilayer protocols like DNP3 allow SCADA and other systems to use TCP/IP-based networks to communicate. Many SCADA devices were never designed to be exposed to a network, and adding them to a potentially insecure network can create significant risks. TLS or other encryption can be used on TCP packets, meaning that even serial data can be protected. Serial data can be carried via TCP packets because TCP packets don’t care about their content; it is simply another payload. Finally, TCP/IP does not have a specific throughput as designed, so issues with throughput are device-level issues.
explanation_zh: DNP3 等多层协议允许 SCADA 和其他系统使用基于 TCP/IP 的网络进行通信。许多 SCADA 设备从未被设计为暴露在网络中，将它们添加到潜在不安全的网络中可能会产生重大风险。 TLS 或其他加密可用于 TCP 数据包，这意味着甚至串行数据也可以受到保护。串行数据可以通过 TCP 数据包携带，因为 TCP 数据包不关心其内容；它只是另一个有效负载。最后，TCP/IP 没有设计的特定吞吐量，因此吞吐量问题是设备级问题。

question_en: Ben provides networking and security services for a small chain of coffee shops. The coffee shop chain wants to provide secure, free wireless for customers. Which of the following is the best option available to Ben to allow customers to connect securely to his wireless network without needing a user account if Ben does not need to worry about protocol support issues?
options_en: {"A": "Use WPA2 in PSK mode.", "B": "Use WPA3 in SAE mode.", "C": "Use WPA2 in Enterprise mode.", "D": "Use a captive portal."}
question_zh: Ben 为一家小型连锁咖啡店提供网络和安全服务。这家连锁咖啡店希望为顾客提供安全、免费的无线网络。如果 Ben 不需要担心协议支持问题，那么以下哪一项是 Ben 可以使用的最佳选项，可以让客户无需用户帐户即可安全连接到他的无线网络？
options_zh: {"A": "在 PSK 模式下使用 WPA2。", "B": "在 SAE 模式下使用 WPA3。", "C": "在企业模式下使用 WPA2。", "D": "使用强制门户。"}
explanation_en: WPA3’s new SAE (simultaneous authentication of equals) mode improves on WPA2’s PSK mode by allowing for secure authentication between clients and the wireless network without enterprise user accounts. If Ben needed to worry about support for WPA3, which may not be available to all systems that may want to connect, he might have to choose WPA2. A captive portal is often used with open guest networks, and Enterprise mode requires user accounts.
explanation_zh: WPA3 的新 SAE（同等身份验证）模式在 WPA2 的 PSK 模式的基础上进行了改进，允许在客户端和无线网络之间进行安全身份验证，而无需企业用户帐户。如果 Ben 需要担心对 WPA3 的支持（这可能不适用于所有想要连接的系统），他可能必须选择 WPA2。强制门户通常与开放访客网络一起使用，企业模式需要用户帐户。

question_en: Alicia’s company has implemented multifactor authentication using SMS messages to provide a numeric code. What is the primary security concern that Alicia may want to express about this design?
options_en: {"A": "SMS messages are not encrypted.", "B": "SMS messages can be spoofed by senders.", "C": "SMS messages may be received by more than one phone.", "D": "SMS messages may be stored on the receiving phone."}
question_zh: Alicia 的公司已使用 SMS 消息提供数字代码来实施多重身份验证。 Alicia 可能想表达的关于此设计的主要安全问题是什么？
options_zh: {"A": "SMS 消息未加密。", "B": "短信可能会被发件人欺骗。", "C": "短信可能会被多个手机接收。", "D": "SMS 消息可能会存储在接收手机上。"}
explanation_en: SMS messages are not encrypted, meaning that they could be sniffed and captured. While using two factors is more secure than a single factor, SMS is one of the less secure ways to implement two-factor authentication because of this. SMS messages can be spoofed, can be received by more than one phone, and are typically stored on the recipient’s phone. The primary threat here, however, is the unencrypted message itself.
explanation_zh: SMS 消息未加密，这意味着它们可能会被嗅探和捕获。虽然使用两个因素比单一因素更安全，但短信是实现双因素身份验证的安全性较低的方法之一。 SMS 消息可能会被欺骗，可以被多部手机接收，并且通常存储在收件人的手机上。然而，这里的主要威胁是未加密的消息本身。

question_en: What speed and frequency range are used by 802.11n?
options_en: {"A": "5 GHz only", "B": "900 MHz and 2.4 GHz", "C": "2.4 GHz and 5 GHz", "D": "2.4 GHz only"}
question_zh: 802.11n 使用什么速度和频率范围？
options_zh: {"A": "仅 5 GHz", "B": "900 MHz 和 2.4 GHz", "C": "2.4 GHz 和 5 GHz", "D": "仅 2.4 GHz"}
explanation_en: 802.11n can operate on both the 2.4 and 5 GHz frequency range. The 900 MHz range has frequently been used for phones and non-WiFi wireless networks as well as other amateur radio uses. Knowing that multiple ranges are available and that they may behave differently based on how many access points are in use and whether other devices that may cause interference on that band are in the area can be important for wireless network deployments.
explanation_zh: 802.11n 可以在 2.4 和 5 GHz 频率范围上运行。 900 MHz 范围经常用于电话和非 WiFi 无线网络以及其他业余无线电用途。了解多个范围可用，并且根据正在使用的接入点数量以及该区域中是否存在可能对该频段造成干扰的其他设备，这些范围的行为可能会有所不同，这对于无线网络部署非常重要。

question_en: The Address Resolution Protocol (ARP) and the Reverse Address Resolution Protocol (RARP) operate at what layer of the OSI model?
question_zh: 地址解析协议 (ARP) 和反向地址解析协议 (RARP) 在 OSI 模型的哪一层运行？
explanation_en: ARP and RARP operate at the Data Link layer, the second layer of the OSI model. Both protocols deal with physical hardware addresses, which are used above the Physical layer (layer 1) and below the Network layer (layer 3), thus falling at the Data Link layer.
explanation_zh: ARP 和 RARP 工作在数据链路层，即 OSI 模型的第二层。两种协议都处理物理硬件地址，这些地址在物理层（第 1 层）之上和网络层（第 3 层）之下使用，因此属于数据链路层。

question_en: Which of the following is a converged protocol that allows storage mounts over TCP, and which is frequently used as a lower-cost alternative to Fibre Channel?
question_zh: 以下哪一项是允许通过 TCP 安装存储的聚合协议，并且经常用作光纤通道的低成本替代方案？
options_zh: {"A": "MPLS", "B": "SDN", "C": "VoIP", "D": "iSCSI"}
explanation_en: iSCSI is a converged protocol that allows location-independent file services over traditional network technologies. It costs less than traditional Fibre Channel. VoIP is Voice over IP, SDN is software-defined networking, and MPLS is Multiprotocol Label Switching, a technology that uses path labels instead of network addresses.
explanation_zh: iSCSI 是一种融合协议，允许通过传统网络技术提供位置无关的文件服务。它的成本低于传统的光纤通道。 VoIP 是 IP 语音，SDN 是软件定义网络，MPLS 是多协议标签交换，一种使用路径标签而不是网络地址的技术。

question_en: Chris is building an Ethernet network and knows that he needs to span a distance of more than 150 meters with his 1000BaseT network. What network technology should he use to help with this?
options_en: {"A": "Install a repeater, a switch, or a concentrator before 100 meters.", "B": "Use Category 7 cable, which has better shielding for higher speeds.", "C": "Install a gateway to handle the distance.", "D": "Use STP cable to handle the longer distance at high speeds. For questions 29–31, please refer to the following scenario and diagram: Selah’s organization has used a popular messaging service for a number of years. Recently, concerns have been raised about the use of messaging. Messaging Traffic via TCP 80 B Internet Firewall Router Switch Messaging Traffic via TCP 80 A C"}
question_zh: Chris 正在构建以太网网络，并且知道他需要使用 1000BaseT 网络跨越 150 米以上的距离。他应该使用什么网络技术来帮助解决这个问题？
options_zh: {"A": "100米前安装中继器、交换机或集中器。", "B": "使用7类线，屏蔽效果更好，速度更高。", "C": "安装网关来处理距离。", "D": "使用 STP 电缆可以高速处理更长的距离。对于问题 29-31，请参考以下场景和图表：Selah 的组织多年来一直使用流行的消息服务。最近，人们对消息传递的使用提出了担忧。通过 TCP 80 B 的消息流量 互联网防火墙路由器交换机 通过 TCP 80 A C 的消息流量"}
explanation_en: A repeater, switch, or concentrator will amplify the signal, ensuring that the 100-meter distance limitation of 1000BaseT is not an issue. A gateway would be useful if network protocols were changing, while Cat7 cable is appropriate for a 10 Gbps network at much shorter distances. STP cable is limited to 155 Mbps and 100 meters, which would leave Chris with network problems.
explanation_zh: 中继器、交换机或集中器将放大信号，确保 1000BaseT 的 100 米距离限制不是问题。如果网络协议发生变化，网关将很有用，而 Cat7 电缆适用于距离更短的 10 Gbps 网络。 STP 电缆的传输速度限制为 155 Mbps 和 100 米，这会给 Chris 带来网络问题。

question_en: What protocol is the messaging traffic most likely to use based on the diagram?
question_zh: 根据图表，消息流量最有可能使用什么协议？
options_zh: {"A": "SLACK", "B": "HTTP", "C": "SMTP", "D": "HTTPS"}
explanation_en: The use of TCP port 80 indicates that the messaging service is using the HTTP protocol. Slack is a messaging service that runs over HTTPS, which uses port 443. SMTP is an email protocol that uses port 25.
explanation_zh: 使用 TCP 端口 80 表示消息传递服务正在使用 HTTP 协议。 Slack 是一种通过 HTTPS 运行的消息传递服务，使用端口 443。SMTP 是一种使用端口 25 的电子邮件协议。

question_en: What security concern does sending internal communications from A to B raise?
options_en: {"A": "The firewall does not protect system B.", "B": "System C can see the broadcast traffic from system A to B.", "C": "It is traveling via an unencrypted protocol.", "D": "Messaging does not provide nonrepudation."}
question_zh: 从 A 向 B 发送内部通信会引起什么安全问题？
options_zh: {"A": "防火墙不保护系统 B。", "B": "系统 C 可以看到从系统 A 到 B 的广播流量。", "C": "它通过未加密的协议传输。", "D": "消息传递不提供不可否认性。"}
explanation_en: HTTP traffic is typically sent via TCP80. Unencrypted HTTP traffic can be easily captured at any point between A and B, meaning that the messaging solution chosen does not provide confidentiality for the organization’s corporate communications.
explanation_zh: HTTP 流量通常通过 TCP80 发送。未加密的 HTTP 流量可以在 A 和 B 之间的任何点轻松捕获，这意味着所选的消息传递解决方案不会为组织的企业通信提供机密性。

question_en: How could Selah’s company best address a desire for secure messaging for users of internal systems A and C?
options_en: {"A": "Use a third-party messaging service.", "B": "Implement and use a locally hosted service.", "C": "Use HTTPS.", "D": "Discontinue use of messaging and instead use email, which is more secure."}
question_zh: Selah 的公司如何才能最好地满足内部系统 A 和 C 用户对安全消息传递的需求？
options_zh: {"A": "使用第三方消息服务。", "B": "实施和使用本地托管服务。", "C": "使用 HTTPS。", "D": "停止使用消息传递，转而使用更安全的电子邮件。"}
explanation_en: If a business need requires messaging, using a local messaging server is the best option. This prevents traffic from traveling to a third-party server and can offer additional benefits such as logging, archiving, and control of security options like the use of encryption.
explanation_zh: 如果业务需要需要消息传递，那么使用本地消息传递服务器是最好的选择。这可以防止流量传输到第三方服务器，并可以提供额外的好处，例如日志记录、存档和安全选项的控制（例如使用加密）。

question_en: Which of the following drawbacks is a concern when multilayer protocols are allowed?
options_en: {"A": "A range of protocols may be used at higher layers.", "B": "Covert channels are allowed.", "C": "Filters cannot be bypassed.", "D": "Encryption can’t be incorporated at multiple layers."}
question_zh: 当允许多层协议时，需要考虑以下哪些缺点？
options_zh: {"A": "高层可以使用一系列协议。", "B": "允许使用隐蔽通道。", "C": "过滤器无法被绕过。", "D": "加密不能在多层中合并。"}
explanation_en: Multilayer protocols create three primary concerns for security practitioners: they can conceal covert channels (and thus covert channels are allowed), filters can be bypassed by traffic concealed in layered protocols, and the logical boundaries put in place by network segments can be bypassed under some circumstances. Multilayer protocols allow encryption at various layers and support a range of protocols at higher layers.
explanation_zh: 多层协议给安全从业者带来了三个主要问题：它们可以隐藏隐蔽通道（因此允许隐蔽通道），过滤器可以被分层协议中隐藏的流量绕过，以及在某些情况下可以绕过网段设置的逻辑边界。多层协议允许在各个层进行加密，并支持较高层的一系列协议。

question_en: Which of the following is not an example of a converged protocol?
question_zh: 以下哪一项不是融合协议的示例？
options_zh: {"A": "MIME", "B": "FCoE", "C": "iSCSI", "D": "VoIP"}
explanation_en: Fibre Channel over Ethernet (FCoE), Internet Small Computer Systems Interface (iSCSI), and Voice over Internet Protocol (VoIP) are all examples of converged protocols that combine specialized protocols with standard protocols like TCP/IP. MIME, Multipurpose Internet Mail Extensions, is not a converged protocol.
explanation_zh: 以太网光纤通道 (FCoE)、互联网小型计算机系统接口 (iSCSI) 和互联网协议语音 (VoIP) 都是将专用协议与 TCP/IP 等标准协议相结合的融合协议的示例。 MIME（多用途互联网邮件扩展）不是一个融合协议。

question_en: Chris uses a cellular hot spot to provide internet access when he is traveling. If he leaves the hot spot connected to his PC while his PC is on his organization’s corporate network, what security issue might he cause?
options_en: {"A": "Traffic may not be routed properly, exposing sensitive data.", "B": "His system may act as a bridge from the internet to the local network.", "C": "His system may be a portal for a reflected DDoS attack.", "D": "Security administrators may not be able to determine his IP address if a security issue occurs."}
question_zh: Chris 在旅行时使用蜂窝热点提供互联网接入。如果他让热点连接到他的 PC，而他的 PC 位于其组织的公司网络上，他可能会导致什么安全问题？
options_zh: {"A": "流量可能无法正确路由，从而暴露敏感数据。", "B": "他的系统可以充当互联网到本地网络的桥梁。", "C": "他的系统可能是反射式 DDoS 攻击的门户。", "D": "如果发生安全问题，安全管理员可能无法确定他的 IP 地址。"}
explanation_en: When a workstation or other device is connected simultaneously to both a secure network and a nonsecure network like the internet, it may act as a bridge, bypassing the security protections located at the edge of a corporate network. It is unlikely that traffic will be routed improperly leading to the exposure of sensitive data, as traffic headed to internal systems and networks is unlikely to be routed to the external network. Reflected DDoS attacks are used to hide identities rather than to connect through to an internal network, and security administrators of managed systems should be able to determine both the local and wireless IP addresses his system uses.
explanation_zh: 当工作站或其他设备同时连接到安全网络和互联网等非安全网络时，它可能充当桥梁，绕过位于公司网络边缘的安全保护。由于流向内部系统和网络的流量不太可能被路由到外部网络，因此流量不太可能被不正确地路由而导致敏感数据的暴露。反射式 DDoS 攻击用于隐藏身份，而不是连接到内部网络，托管系统的安全管理员应该能够确定其系统使用的本地和无线 IP 地址。

question_en: In her role as an information security professional, Susan has been asked to identify areas where her organization’s wireless network may be accessible even though it isn’t intended to be. What should Susan do to determine where her organization’s wireless network is accessible?
question_zh: 作为一名信息安全专业人员，Susan 被要求确定其组织的无线网络可以访问的区域（尽管并非如此）。 Susan 应该怎样做才能确定她的组织的无线网络在哪里可以访问？
explanation_en: Wardriving and warwalking are both processes used to locate wireless networks, but are not typically as detailed and thorough as a site survey, and design map is a made-up term.
explanation_zh: 巡视和巡视都是用于定位无线网络的过程，但通常不如现场巡视那么详细和彻底，而设计地图是一个虚构的术语。

question_en: What features can IPsec provide for secure communication?
options_en: {"A": "Encryption, access control, nonrepudiation and message authentication", "B": "Protocol convergence, content distribution, micro-segmentation, and network virtualization", "C": "Encryption, authorization, nonrepudiation, and message integrity checking", "D": "Micro-segmentation, network virtualization, encryption, and message authentication"}
question_zh: IPsec 可以为安全通信提供哪些功能？
options_zh: {"A": "加密、访问控制、不可否认和消息认证", "B": "协议融合、内容分发、微分段和网络虚拟化", "C": "加密、授权、不可否认和消息完整性检查", "D": "微分段、网络虚拟化、加密和消息认证"}
explanation_en: IPsec, or Internet Protocol Security, can provide encryption, access control, nonrepudiation, and message authentication using public key cryptography. It does not provide authorization, protocol convergence, content distribution, or the other items listed.
explanation_zh: IPsec，即互联网协议安全，可以提供加密、授权、不可否认和消息完整性检查使用公钥加密的访问控制、不可否认性和消息认证。它不提供授权、协议融合、内容分发或列出的其他项目。

question_en: Casey has been asked to determine if Zigbee network traffic can be secured in transit. What security mechanism does Zigbee use to protect data traffic?
question_zh: Casey 被要求确定 Zigbee 网络流量是否可以在传输过程中得到保护。 Zigbee 使用什么安全机制来保护数据流量？
options_zh: {"A": "3DES 加密", "B": "AES 加密", "C": "ROT13 加密", "D": "Blowfish 加密"}
explanation_en: Zigbee uses AES to protect network traffic, providing integrity and confidentiality controls. It does not use 3DES, and ROT13 is a simple rotational cipher you might find in a cereal box or secret decoder ring.
explanation_zh: Zigbee 使用 AES 保护网络流量，提供完整性和机密性控制。它不使用 3DES，并且 ROT13 是一种简单的旋转密码，您可能会在麦片盒或秘密解码器环中找到它。

question_en: Sue modifies her MAC address to one that is allowed on a network that uses MAC filtering to provide security. What is the technique Sue used, and what nonsecurity issue could her actions cause?
options_en: {"A": "Broadcast domain exploit, address conflict", "B": "Spoofing, token loss", "C": "Spoofing, address conflict", "D": "Sham EUI creation, token loss"}
question_zh: Sue 将其 MAC 地址修改为使用 MAC 过滤来提供安全性的网络所允许的地址。 Sue 使用的技术是什么？她的行为可能导致什么非安全问题？
options_zh: {"A": "广播域利用、地址冲突", "B": "欺骗、令牌丢失", "C": "欺骗、地址冲突", "D": "假冒 EUI 创建、令牌丢失"}
explanation_en: The process of using a fake MAC (Media Access Control) address is called spoofing, and spoofing a MAC address already in use on the network can lead to an address collision, preventing traffic from reaching one or both systems. Tokens are used in token ring networks, which are outdated, and EUI refers to an Extended Unique Identifier, another term for MAC address, but token loss is still not the issue. Broadcast domains refer to the set of machines a host can send traffic to via a broadcast message.
explanation_zh: 使用虚假 MAC（媒体访问控制）地址的过程称为欺骗，欺骗网络上已使用的 MAC 地址可能会导致地址冲突，从而阻止流量到达某个地址或两个系统。令牌用于令牌环网络，这已经过时了，EUI 指的是扩展唯一标识符，MAC 地址的另一个术语，但令牌丢失仍然不是问题。广播域是指主机可以通过广播消息向其发送流量的一组机器。

question_en: Joanna wants to deploy 4G LTE as an out-of-band management solution for devices at remote sites. Which of the following security capabilities is not commonly available from 4G service providers?
options_en: {"A": "Encryption capabilities", "B": "Device-based authentication", "C": "Dedicated towers and antennas for secure service subscribers", "D": "SIM-based authentication"}
question_zh: Joanna 希望部署 4G LTE 作为远程站点设备的带外管理解决方案。 4G 服务提供商通常不提供以下哪项安全功能？
options_zh: {"A": "加密功能", "B": "基于设备的身份验证", "C": "用于安全服务用户的专用塔和天线", "D": "基于 SIM 的身份验证"}
explanation_en: While security features vary from provider to provider, encryption, device-based authentication (for example, using certificates), and SIM-based authentication are all common options for 4G connectivity solutions. Joanna should work with her provider to determine what capabilities are available and assess whether they meet her needs.
explanation_zh: 虽然安全功能因提供商而异，但加密、基于设备的身份验证（例如，使用证书）和基于 SIM 的身份验证都是 4G 连接解决方​​案的常见选项。乔安娜应与她的提供商合作，确定可用的功能并评估这些功能是否满足她的需求。

question_en: SMTP, HTTP, and SNMP all occur at what layer of the OSI model?
question_zh: SMTP、HTTP 和 SNMP 都出现在 OSI 模型的哪一层？
explanation_en: Application-specific protocols are handled at layer 7, the Application layer of the OSI model.
explanation_zh: 应用程序特定协议在第 7 层（OSI 模型的应用程序层）处理。

question_en: Melissa uses the ping utility to check whether a remote system is up as part of a penetration testing exercise. If she does not want to see her own ping packets, what protocol should she filter out from her packet sniffer’s logs?
question_zh: Melissa 使用 ping 实用程序来检查远程系统是否已启动，作为渗透测试练习的一部分。如果她不想看到自己的 ping 数据包，她应该从数据包嗅探器的日志中过滤掉什么协议？
explanation_en: Ping uses ICMP, the Internet Control Message Protocol, to determine whether a system responds and how many hops there are between the originating system and the remote system. Melissa simply needs to filter out ICMP to not see her pings.
explanation_zh: Ping 使用 ICMP（互联网控制消息协议）来确定系统是否响应以及源系统和远程系统之间有多少跳。 Melissa 只需过滤掉 ICMP，就看不到她的 ping。

question_en: Selah wants to provide port-based authentication on her network to ensure that clients must authenticate before using the network. What technology is an appropriate solution for this requirement?
question_zh: Selah 希望在其网络上提供基于端口的身份验证，以确保客户端在使用网络之前必须进行身份验证。什么技术是满足此要求的合适解决方案？
explanation_en: 802.1x provides port-based authentication and can be used with technologies like EAP, the Extensible Authentication Protocol. 802.11a is a wireless standard, 802.3 is the standard for Ethernet, and 802.15.1was the original Bluetooth IEEE standard.
explanation_zh: 802.1x 提供基于端口的身份验证，可与 EAP（可扩展身份验证协议）等技术一起使用。 802.11a是无线标准，802.3是以太网标准，802.15.1是最初的蓝牙IEEE标准。
