explanation_zh: 没有足够的日志源并不是日志管理系统设计中常见的考虑因素，尽管这可能是安全管理员担心无法捕获所需数据的问题。日志管理系统设计必须考虑日志数据量及其消耗的网络带宽、数据的安全性以及分析数据所需的工作量。

question_en: Ryan’s organization wants to ensure that proper account management is occurring but does not have a central identity and access management tool in place. Ryan has a limited amount of time to do his verification process. What is his best option to test the account management process as part of an internal audit?
options_en: {"A": "Validate all accounts changed in the past 90 days.", "B": "Select high-value administrative accounts for validation.", "C": "Validate all account changes in the past 180 days.", "D": "Validate a random sample of accounts."}
question_zh: Ryan 的组织希望确保进行适当的帐户管理，但没有适当的中央身份和访问管理工具。 Ryan 进行验证过程的时间有限。作为内部审计的一部分，测试账户管理流程的最佳选择是什么？
options_zh: {"A": "验证过去 90 天内更改的所有帐户。", "B": "选择高价值的管理帐户进行验证。", "C": "验证过去 180 天内的所有帐户更改。", "D": "验证帐户的随机样本。如果无法验证所有帐户，则"}
explanation_en: Random sampling of accounts is the recommended best practice if all accounts cannot be validated. Selecting only recently changed accounts will not identify long-term issues or historic issues, and only checking high-value accounts will not show if there are issues or bad practices with other account types.
explanation_zh: 随机抽样帐户是建议的最佳实践。仅选择最近更改的帐户不会识别长期问题或历史问题，并且仅检查高价值帐户不会显示其他帐户类型是否存在问题或不良做法。

question_en: When a Windows system is rebooted, what type of log is generated?
question_zh: Windows系统重启时，会生成什么类型​​的日志？
explanation_en: Rebooting a Windows machine results in an information log entry. Windows defines five types of events: errors, which indicate a significant problem; warnings, which may indicate future problems; information, which describes successful operation; success audits, which record successful security accesses; and failure audits, which record failed security access attempts.
explanation_zh: 重新启动 Windows 计算机会生成信息日志条目。 Windows 定义了五种类型的事件： 错误，表明存在严重问题；警告，可能表明未来的问题；信息，描述成功操作；成功审核，记录成功的安全访问；和失败审核，记录失败的安全访问尝试。

question_en: During a review of access logs, Alex notices that Michelle logged into her workstation in New York at 8 a.m. daily but that she was recorded as logging into her department’s main web application shortly after 3 a.m. daily. What common logging issue has Alex likely encountered?
options_en: {"A": "Inconsistent log formatting", "B": "Modified logs", "C": "Inconsistent timestamps", "D": "Multiple log sources"}
question_zh: 在查看访问日志时，Alex 注意到 Michelle 每天早上 8 点登录她在纽约的工作站，但她被记录为每天凌晨 3 点后不久登录她部门的主 Web 应用程序。 Alex 可能遇到过哪些常见的日志记录问题？
options_zh: {"A": "日志格式不一致", "B": "修改的日志", "C": "时间戳不一致", "D": "多个日志源"}
explanation_en: Inconsistent timestamps are a common problem, often caused by improperly set time zones or due to differences in how system clocks are set. In this case, a consistent time difference often indicates that one system uses local time, and the other is using Greenwich mean time (GMT). Logs from multiple sources tend to cause problems with centralization and collection, whereas different log formats can create challenges in parsing log data. Finally, modified logs are often a sign of intrusion or malicious intent.
explanation_zh: 时间戳不一致是一个常见问题，通常是由于时区设置不当或系统时钟设置方式差异造成的。在这种情况下，一致的时差通常表明一个系统使用当地时间，而另一个系统使用格林威治标准时间 (GMT)。来自多个来源的日志往往会导致集中和收集方面的问题，而不同的日志格式会给解析日志数据带来挑战。最后，修改日志通常是入侵或恶意意图的迹象。

question_en: What type of vulnerability scan accesses configuration information from the systems it is run against as well as information that can be accessed via services available via the network?
options_en: {"A": "Authenticated scans", "B": "Web application scans", "C": "Unauthenticated scans", "D": "Port scans For questions 78–80, please refer to the following scenario: Ben’s organization has begun to use STRIDE to assess its software and has identified threat agents and the business impacts that these threats could have. Now they are working to identify appropriate controls for the issues they have identified."}
question_zh: 什么类型的漏洞扫描会访问其所针对的系统的配置信息以及可通过网络提供的服务访问的信息？
options_zh: {"A": "经过身份验证的扫描", "B": "Web 应用程序扫描", "C": "未经身份验证的扫描", "D": "端口扫描 对于问题 78-80，请参阅以下场景： Ben 的组织已开始使用 STRIDE 评估其软件，并已识别威胁代理以及这些威胁可能产生的业务影响。现在他们正在努力为他们发现的问题确定适当的控制措施。"}
explanation_en: Authenticated scans use a read-only account to access configuration files, allowing more accurate testing of vulnerabilities. Web application scans, unauthenticated scans, and port scans don’t have access to configuration files unless they are inadvertently exposed.
explanation_zh: 经过身份验证的扫描使用只读帐户访问配置文件，从而可以更准确地测试漏洞。 Web 应用程序扫描、未经身份验证的扫描和端口扫描无法访问配置文件，除非它们无意中暴露。

question_en: Ben’s development team needs to address an authorization issue, resulting in an elevation of privilege threat. Which of the following controls is most appropriate to this type of issue?
options_en: {"A": "Auditing and logging are enabled.", "B": "Role-based access control is used for specific operations.", "C": "Data type and format checks are enabled.", "D": "User input is tested against a whitelist."}
question_zh: Ben 的开发团队需要解决授权问题，从而导致特权提升威胁。以下哪项控制措施最适合此类问题？
options_zh: {"A": "启用审核和日志记录。", "B": "基于角色的访问控制用于特定操作。", "C": "启用数据类型和格式检查。", "D": "用户输入根据白名单进行测试。"}
explanation_en: Microsoft’s STRIDE threat assessment model places threats into one of six categories: ■■ Spoofing—threats that involve user credentials and authentication, or falsifying legitimate communications ■■ Tampering—threats that involve the malicious modification of data ■■ Repudiation—threats that cause actions to occur that cannot be denied by a user ■■ Information disclosure—threats that involve exposure of data to unauthorized individuals ■■ Denial of service—threats that deny service to legitimate users ■■ Elevation of privilege—threats that provide higher privileges to unauthorized users Using role-based access controls (RBACs) for specific operations will help to ensure that users cannot perform actions that they should not be able to. Auditing and logging can help detect abuse but won’t prevent it; and data type, format checks, and whitelisting are all useful for preventing attacks like SQL injection and buffer overflow attacks but are not as directly aimed at authorization issues.
explanation_zh: Microsoft 的 STRIDE 威胁评估模型将威胁分为六类之一： ■■ 欺骗 — 涉及用户凭据和身份验证，或伪造合法通信的威胁 ■■ 篡改 — 涉及恶意修改数据的威胁 ■■ 否认 — 导致发生用户无法拒绝的操作的威胁 ■■ 信息泄露 — 涉及将数据暴露给未经授权的个人的威胁 ■■ 拒绝服务 — 拒绝向以下人员提供服务的威胁合法用户 权限提升——向未经授权的用户提供更高权限的威胁 对特定操作使用基于角色的访问控制 (RBAC) 将有助于确保用户无法执行他们不应执行的操作。审计和日志记录可以帮助检测滥用行为，但不能阻止滥用行为；数据类型、格式检查和白名单对于防止 SQL 注入和缓冲区溢出攻击等攻击都很有用，但并不是直接针对授权问题。

question_en: Ben’s team is attempting to categorize a transaction identification issue that is caused by use of a symmetric key shared by multiple servers. What STRIDE category should this fall into?
question_zh: Ben 的团队正在尝试对由于使用多个服务器共享的对称密钥而导致的交易识别问题进行分类。这应该属于哪个 STRIDE 类别？
explanation_en: Since a shared symmetric key could be used by any of the servers, transaction identification problems caused by a shared key are likely to involve a repudiation issue. If encrypted transactions cannot be uniquely identified by a server, they cannot be proved to have come from a specific server.
explanation_zh: 由于共享对称密钥可以被任何服务器使用，因此共享密钥引起的交易识别问题很可能涉及否认问题。如果加密交易无法被服务器唯一识别，则无法证明它们来自特定服务器。

question_en: Ben wants to use a third-party service to help assess denial-of-service attack vulnerabilities due the amount of traffic during denial-of-service attacks. What type of engagement should he suggest to his organization?
options_en: {"A": "A social engineering engagement", "B": "A penetration test", "C": "Load or stress testing", "D": "Testing using a fuzzer"}
question_zh: Ben 希望使用第三方服务来帮助评估由于拒绝服务攻击期间的流量而导致的拒绝服务攻击漏洞。他应该向他的组织建议哪种类型的参与？
options_zh: {"A": "社会工程参与", "B": "渗透测试", "C": "负载或压力测试", "D": "使用模糊器测试"}
explanation_en: Ben should engage a company that can perform a load or stress test to validate how the application performs under both expected and extreme loads so that he knows what a denial-of-service attack based on load will look like. Social engineering does not test the ability of sites to handle load, and penetration testers may conduct denial-of-service attacks but typically do not. Fuzzers send random input to test how applications handle unexpected input rather than relying on extreme load. They might help test for flaws that could result in a denial-of-service condition, but the question specifically asks about load-based conditions, not software flaws.
explanation_zh: Ben 应聘请一家能够执行负载或压力测试的公司来验证应用程序在预期负载和极端负载下的执行情况，以便他知道基于负载的拒绝服务攻击会是什么样子。社会工程不测试站点处理负载的能力，渗透测试人员可能会进行拒绝服务攻击，但通常不会。模糊器发送随机输入来测试应用程序如何处理意外输入，而不是依赖极端负载。它们可能有助于测试可能导致拒绝服务情况的缺陷，但该问题具体询问基于负载的情况，而不是软件缺陷。

question_en: Chris is troubleshooting an issue with his organization’s SIEM reporting. After analyzing the issue, he believes that the timestamps on log entries from different systems are inconsistent. What protocol can he use to resolve this issue?
question_zh: Chris 正在解决其组织的 SIEM 报告问题。经过分析问题，他认为不同系统的日志条目的时间戳不一致。他可以使用什么协议来解决这个问题？
explanation_en: The Network Time Protocol (NTP) allows the synchronization of system clocks with a standardized time source. The Secure Shell (SSH) protocol provides encrypted administrative connections to servers. The File Transfer Protocol (FTP) is used for data exchange. Transport Layer Security (TLS) is an encryption process used to protect information in transit over a network.
explanation_zh: 网络时间协议 (NTP) 允许系统时钟与标准化时间源同步。 Secure Shell (SSH) 协议提供与服务器的加密管理连接。文件传输协议（FTP）用于数据交换。传输层安全 (TLS) 是一种加密过程，用于保护通过网络传输的信息。

question_en: Ryan is considering the use of fuzz testing in his web application testing program. Which one of the following statements about fuzz testing should Ryan consider when making his decision?
options_en: {"A": "Fuzzers only find complex faults.", "B": "Testers must manually generate input.", "C": "Fuzzers may not fully cover the code.", "D": "Fuzzers can’t reproduce errors."}
question_zh: Ryan 正在考虑在他的 Web 应用程序测试程序中使用模糊测试。 Ryan 在做出决定时应考虑以下哪一项有关模糊测试的陈述？
options_zh: {"A": "模糊器只能发现复杂的故障。", "B": "测试人员必须手动生成输入。", "C": "模糊器可能无法完全覆盖代码。", "D": "模糊器无法重现错误。"}
explanation_en: Fuzz testers are capable of automatically generating input sequences to test an application. Therefore, testers do not need to manually generate input, although they may do so if they want. Fuzzers can reproduce errors (and thus, “fuzzers can’t reproduce errors” is not an issue) but typically don’t fully cover the code—code coverage tools are usually paired with fuzzers to validate how much coverage was possible. Fuzzers are often limited to simple errors because they won’t handle business logic or attacks that require knowledge from the application user.
explanation_zh: 模糊测试器能够自动生成输入序列来测试应用程序。因此，测试人员不需要手动生成输入，尽管他们可以根据需要手动生成输入。模糊器可以重现错误（因此，“模糊器无法重现错误”不是问题），但通常不会完全覆盖代码——代码覆盖工具通常与模糊器配合使用，以验证可能的覆盖范围。模糊器通常仅限于简单的错误，因为它们无法处理需要应用程序用户知识的业务逻辑或攻击。

question_en: Ken is designing a testing process for software developed by his team. He is designing a test that verifies that every line of code was executed during the test. What type of analysis is Ken performing?
options_en: {"A": "Branch coverage", "B": "Condition coverage", "C": "Function coverage", "D": "Statement coverage For questions 84–86, please refer to the following scenario. During a port scan, Ben uses nmap’s default settings and sees the following results."}
question_zh: Ken 正在为其团队开发的软件设计测试流程。他正在设计一个测试，验证测试期间每一行代码都被执行。 Ken 正在执行什么类型的分析？
options_zh: {"A": "分支覆盖率", "B": "条件覆盖率", "C": "函数覆盖率", "D": "语句覆盖率 对于问题 84-86，请参考以下场景。在端口扫描期间，Ben 使用 nmap 的默认设置并看到以下结果。"}
explanation_en: Statement coverage tests verify that every line of code was executed during the test. Branch coverage verifies that every if statement was executed under all if and else conditions. Condition coverage verifies that every logical test in the code was executed under all sets of inputs. Function coverage verifies that every function in the code was called and returns results.
explanation_zh: 语句覆盖率测试验证测试期间每行代码都被执行。分支覆盖率验证每个 if 语句是否在所有 if 和 else 条件下执行。条件覆盖验证代码中的每个逻辑测试是否在所有输入集下执行。函数覆盖率验证代码中的每个函数都被调用并返回结果。

question_en: If Ben is conducting a penetration test, what should his next step be after receiving these results?
options_en: {"A": "Connect to the web server using a web browser.", "B": "Connect via Telnet to test for vulnerable accounts.", "C": "Identify interesting ports for further scanning.", "D": "Use sqlmap against the open databases."}
question_zh: 如果 Ben 正在进行渗透测试，收到这些结果后他的下一步应该是什么？
options_zh: {"A": "使用 Web 浏览器连接到 Web 服务器。", "B": "通过 Telnet 连接以测试易受攻击的帐户。", "C": "识别感兴趣的端口以进行进一步扫描。", "D": "对开放数据库使用 sqlmap。"}
explanation_en: After scanning for open ports using a port scanning tool like nmap, penetration testers will identify interesting ports and then conduct vulnerability scans to determine what services may be vulnerable. This will perform many of the same activities that connecting via a web server will and will typically be more useful than trying to manually test for vulnerable accounts via Telnet. sqlmap would typically be used after a vulnerability scanner identifies additional information about services, and the vulnerability scanner will normally provide a wider range of useful information.
explanation_zh: 使用nmap等端口扫描工具扫描开放端口后，渗透测试人员会识别出感兴趣的端口，然后进行漏洞扫描，以确定哪些服务可能存在漏洞。这将执行许多与通过 Web 服务器连接相同的活动，并且通常比尝试通过 Telnet 手动测试易受攻击的帐户更有用。 sqlmap 通常在漏洞扫描器识别出有关服务的附加信息后使用，并且漏洞扫描器通常会提供更广泛的有用信息。

question_en: Based on the scan results, what operating system (OS) was the system that was scanned most likely running?
question_zh: 根据扫描结果，被扫描的系统最有可能运行什么操作系统（OS）？
options_zh: {"A": "Windows 桌面", "B": "Linux", "C": "网络设备", "D": "Windows Server"}
explanation_en: The system is likely a Linux system. The system shows X11, as well as login, shell, and nfs ports, all of which are more commonly found on Linux systems than Windows systems or network devices. This system is also very poorly secured; many of the services running on it should not be exposed in a modern secure network.
explanation_zh: 该系统可能是 Linux 系统。该系统显示了 X11，以及登录、shell 和 nfs 端口，所有这些在 Linux 系统上比 Windows 系统或网络设备上更常见。该系统的安全性也很差；在其上运行的许多服务不应暴露在现代安全网络中。

question_en: Ben’s manager expresses concern about the coverage of his scan. Why might his manager have this concern?
options_en: {"A": "Ben did not test UDP services.", "B": "Ben did not discover ports outside the “well-known ports.”", "C": "Ben did not perform OS fingerprinting.", "D": "Ben tested only a limited number of ports."}
question_zh: Ben 的经理对他的扫描覆盖范围表示担忧。为什么他的经理会有这种担忧？
options_zh: {"A": "Ben 没有测试 UDP 服务。", "B": "Ben 没有发现“知名端口”之外的端口。", "C": "Ben 没有执行操作系统指纹识别。", "D": "Ben 只测试了有限数量的端口。"}
explanation_en: Nmap only scans 1000 TCP and UDP ports by default, including ports outside the 0–1024 range of “well-known” ports. By using the defaults for nmap, Ben missed 64,535 ports. OS fingerprinting won’t cover more ports but would have provided a best guess of the OS running on the scanned system.
explanation_zh: Nmap 默认情况下仅扫描 1000 个 TCP 和 UDP 端口，包括 0-1024“众所周知”端口范围之外的端口。通过使用 nmap 的默认设置，Ben 错过了 64,535 个端口。操作系统指纹识别不会覆盖更多端口，但可以提供对扫描系统上运行的操作系统的最佳猜测。

question_en: Lucca is reviewing his organization’s disaster recovery process data and notes that the MTD for the business’s main website is two hours. What does he know about the RTO for the site when he does testing and validation?
options_en: {"A": "It needs to be less than two hours.", "B": "It needs to be at least two hours.", "C": "The MTD is too short and needs to be longer.", "D": "The RTO is too short and needs to be longer."}
question_zh: Lucca 正在审查其组织的灾难恢复流程数据，并注意到该企业主网站的 MTD 为两个小时。当他进行测试和验证时，他对站点的 RTO 了解多少？
options_zh: {"A": "需要不到两个小时。", "B": "至少需要两个小时。", "C": "MTD 太短，需要更长。", "D": "RTO 太短，需要更长。"}
explanation_en: When Lucca reviews the recovery time objective (RTO) data, he needs to ensure that the organization can recover from an outage in less than two hours based on the maximum tolerable downtime (MTD) of two hours.
explanation_zh: 当 Lucca 检查恢复时间目标 (RTO) 数据时，他需要确保组织能够在两小时内从最大可容忍停机时间 (MTD) 的停机时间中恢复。

question_en: Diana has engaged third-party auditors and wants to release an audit attestation to third parties without including details of the audit. What type of SSAE 18 SOC report should she request?
question_zh: Diana 已聘请第三方审计师，并希望向第三方发布审计证明，但不包含审计详细信息。她应该请求什么类型的 SSAE 18 SOC 报告？
explanation_en: Diana should request an SOC 3 report, which is intended for distribution to third parties. They include the auditor’s opinions and management assertions, along with information about the service organization. SOC3 reports are specifically intended for external release, unlike SOC 1 (financial reporting) and SOC 2 (confidential security and privacy) engagements.
explanation_zh: Diana 应请求 SOC 3 报告，该报告旨在分发给第三方。其中包括审计员的意见和管理层的主张，以及有关服务组织的信息。与 SOC 1（财务报告）和 SOC 2（机密安全和隐私）活动不同，SOC3 报告专门用于外部发布。

question_en: While reviewing the software testing output for her organization’s new application, Madhuri notices that the application has produced errors that included directory and file information shown to the web application tester. What issue should she include in her report about the application?
options_en: {"A": "It does not perform proper exception handling.", "B": "The software does not handle misuse case testing properly.", "C": "Debugging statements need to be removed.", "D": "The code was not fully tested due to errors."}
question_zh: 在检查其组织的新应用程序的软件测试输出时，Madhuri 注意到该应用程序产生了错误，其中包括向 Web 应用程序测试人员显示的目录和文件信息。她应该在有关申请的报告中包含哪些问题？
options_zh: {"A": "它不执行正确的异常处理。", "B": "软件无法正确处理误用案例测试。", "C": "需要删除调试语句。", "D": "由于错误，代码未经过充分测试。"}
explanation_en: Showing end users error information about the code, particularly with directory and file information included, means that the application does not perform proper exception handling. Errors should be logged or noted in a way that the administrator can handle, but end users (and attackers!) should not see that information. The software may be handling misuse properly, as the problem does not note if this was due to normal testing or misuse testing. There is no information about debugging code causing the output, and test coverage was not noted in the question.
explanation_zh: 向最终用户显示有关代码的错误信息，特别是包含目录和文件信息，意味着应用程序未执行正确的异常处理。应以管理员可以处理的方式记录或记录错误，但最终用户（和攻击者！）不应看到该信息。该软件可能会正确处理误用，因为问题没有说明这是由于正常测试还是误用测试造成的。没有有关调试导致输出的代码的信息，并且问题中未注明测试覆盖率。

question_en: What is the first step that should occur before a penetration test is performed?
question_zh: 在执行渗透测试之前应该执行的第一步是什么？
options_zh: {"A": "数据收集", "B": "端口扫描", "C": "获得许可", "D": "规划"}
explanation_en: The most important first step for a penetration test is getting permission. Once permission has been received, planning, data gathering, and then elements of the actual test like port scanning can commence.
explanation_zh: 渗透测试最重要的第一步是获得许可。一旦收到许可，就可以开始规划、数据收集以及端口扫描等实际测试的要素。

question_en: The president of Josh’s company is concerned about a significant increase in cryptographic malware that is impacting other companies in their industry. She has asked John to ensure that the company’s data will be recoverable if malware strikes and encrypts their production systems. What process does Josh need to undertake to be able to tell her that the company is covered?
options_en: {"A": "Encrypt all sensitive data.", "B": "Hash all of the organization’s data to detect cryptographic malware.", "C": "Perform backup verification.", "D": "Use anti-encryption technology to prevent the malware from encrypting drives."}
question_zh: Josh 公司的总裁担心加密恶意软件的显着增加正在影响其行业中的其他公司。她要求约翰确保公司的数据在恶意软件攻击并加密其生产系统时可以恢复。乔什需要采取什么程序才能告诉她公司已受到保护？
options_zh: {"A": "加密所有敏感数据。", "B": "对组织的所有数据进行哈希处理以检测加密恶意软件。", "C": "执行备份验证。", "D": "使用反加密技术来防止恶意软件对驱动器进行加密。"}
explanation_en: Validating that the organization has secure and usable backups is Josh’s best answer. If cryptographic malware strikes, the best answer is to have backups that you can rely on and that will not also be encrypted, which means a separation of systems and potentially a need to do versioning so that unencrypted backups are not replaced by encrypted and thus inaccessible versions. Encrypting sensitive data won’t stop attackers from re-encrypting it, making it inaccessible. Hashing to detect the attack won’t stop it or make it possible to recover, and anti-encryption technology does what the option suggests does not exist.
explanation_zh: 验证组织是否拥有安全且可用的备份是 Josh 的最佳答案。如果加密恶意软件遭到攻击，最好的答案是拥有可以信赖且不会加密的备份，这意味着系统的分离，并且可能需要进行版本控制，以便未加密的备份不会被加密且无法访问的版本所取代。加密敏感数据并不能阻止攻击者对其进行重新加密，从而使其无法访问。检测攻击的散列不会阻止攻击或使恢复成为可能，并且反加密技术会执行该选项所建议的不存在的操作。

question_en: Joanna is her organization’s CISO, and in her security operations oversight role she wants to ensure that management oversight is happening for security-related changes. What system should she focus on to track this type of data in most organizations?
options_en: {"A": "The SIEM system", "B": "The IPS system", "C": "The CMS tool", "D": "The ITSM tool"}
question_zh: Joanna 是其组织的 CISO，在担任安全运营监督角色时，她希望确保对与安全相关的变更进行管理监督。在大多数组织中，她应该关注什么系统来跟踪此类数据？
options_zh: {"A": "SIEM 系统", "B": "IPS 系统", "C": "CMS 工具", "D": "ITSM 工具"}
explanation_en: IT service management, or ITSM, tools include change management and thus the type of approvals and review processes that Joanna is looking for. An SIEM helps with security logs and events, an IPS looks for intrusions and unwanted traffic, and a CMS is a content management tool.
explanation_zh: IT 服务管理或 ITSM 工具包括变更管理，以及 Joanna 正在寻找的批准和审核流程类型。 SIEM 帮助处理安全日志和事件，IPS 查找入侵和不需要的流量，CMS 是内容管理工具。

question_en: Henry wants to validate that his backups are working. Which of the following options is the best way for him to ensure that the backups will be useful in a true disaster recovery scenario?
options_en: {"A": "Periodically restore a random file to ensure that the backups are working.", "B": "Review configurations and settings on a regular schedule to validate backup settings.", "C": "Review the backup logs to ensure no errors are occurring.", "D": "Regularly perform full restores from backups to validate their success."}
question_zh: Henry 希望验证他的备份是否正常工作。以下哪个选项是他确保备份在真正的灾难恢复场景中有用的最佳方法？
options_zh: {"A": "定期恢复随机文件以确保备份正常工作。", "B": "定期检查配置和设置以验证备份设置。", "C": "查看备份日志以确保没有发生错误。", "D": "定期从备份执行完整恢复以验证其成功。"}
explanation_en: All of these are useful parts of a backup strategy, but performing full restores from backups on a regular basis is the best option listed. If regular restores work, then individual files will be recoverable, but individual files may not show larger issues with backups. Configuration and setting reviews are important but will not validate the backups themselves, and error messages can indicate problems but won’t demonstrate intact logs either.
explanation_zh: 所有这些都是备份策略的有用部分，但定期从备份执行完整恢复是列出的最佳选择。如果定期恢复有效，则单个文件将是可恢复的，但单个文件可能不会显示备份的更大问题。配置和设置审查很重要，但不会验证备份本身，错误消息可以指示问题，但也不会显示完整的日志。

question_en: What type of vulnerabilities will not be found by a vulnerability scanner?
options_en: {"A": "Local vulnerabilities", "B": "Service vulnerabilities", "C": "Zero-day vulnerabilities", "D": "Vulnerabilities that require authentication"}
question_zh: 漏洞扫描器不会发现什么类型的漏洞？
options_zh: {"A": "本地漏洞", "B": "服务漏洞", "C": "零日漏洞", "D": "需要身份验证的漏洞"}
explanation_en: Vulnerability scanners cannot detect vulnerabilities for which they do not have a test, plug-in, or signature. Signatures often include version numbers, service fingerprints, or configuration data. They can detect local vulnerabilities as well as those that require authentication if they are provided with credentials, and of course, they can detect service vulnerabilities.
explanation_zh: 漏洞扫描程序无法检测到没有测试、插件或签名的漏洞。签名通常包括版本号、服务指纹或配置数据。他们可以检测本地漏洞以及那些需要身份验证（如果提供凭据）的漏洞，当然，他们还可以检测服务漏洞。

question_en: Jacinda wants to measure the effectiveness of her security training as one of her security metrics. Which of the following measures are the most useful for assessing the effectiveness of security awareness training? (Select all that apply.)
options_en: {"A": "How many people took the training", "B": "The level of security awareness before and after the training", "C": "The length of the training in hours", "D": "The number of training events each individual attended this year"}
question_zh: Jacinda 希望衡量她的安全培训的有效性，作为她的安全指标之一。以下哪项措施对于评估安全意识培训的有效性最有用？ （请选择所有适用项。）
options_zh: {"A": "有多少人参加了培训", "B": "培训前后的安全意识水平", "C": "培训时长（以小时为单位）", "D": "今年每个人参加的培训活动数量"}
explanation_en: The number of staff who took a given training and the average change in their awareness from before the training to after the training can provide insight into how many trained staff you have and how impactful the training was. Over time, this will allow you to determine if your training is helping and if awareness is increasing. The length of the training does not assess its impact; in addition, the number of events each individual attended does not mean that staff are becoming more aware.
explanation_zh: 参加某次培训的员工人数以及从培训前到培训后安全意识的平均变化可以帮助您了解您有多少受过培训的员工以及如何进行培训培训的影响力很大。随着时间的推移，这将使您能够确定您的培训是否有帮助以及意识是否有所提高。培训时间长短不评估其影响；此外，每个人参加的活动数量并不意味着工作人员的认识有所提高。

question_en: Elaine has discovered a previously unknown critical vulnerability in a product that her organization uses. Her organization has a strong commitment to ethical disclosure, and Elaine wants to follow common ethical disclosure practices. What should she do first?
options_en: {"A": "Build an in-house remediation or control and then publicly disclosure the vulnerability to prompt the vendor to patch it quickly.", "B": "Build an in-house remediation or control and then notify the vendor of the issue.", "C": "Notify the vendor and give them a reasonable amount of time to fix the issue.", "D": "Publicly disclose the vulnerability so that the vendor will patch it in an appropriate amount of time. For questions 97–99, please refer to the following scenario. NIST Special Publication 800115, the Technical Guide to Information Security Testing and Assessment, provides NIST’s process for penetration testing. Use this image as well as your knowledge of penetration testing to answer the questions. Additional Discovery Planning Discovery Attack Reporting Source: NIST SP 800-115."}
question_zh: Elaine 在她的组织使用的产品中发现了一个以前未知的严重漏洞。她的组织对道德披露有着坚定的承诺，伊莱恩希望遵循常见的道德披露实践。她首先应该做什么？
options_zh: {"A": "建立内部修复或控制，然后公开披露漏洞以促使供应商快速修补。", "B": "建立内部补救措施或控制措施，然后将问题通知供应商。", "C": "通知供应商并给他们合理的时间来解决问题。", "D": "公开披露该漏洞，以便厂商在适当的时间内进行修补。对于问题97-99，请参考以下场景。 NIST 特别出版物 800115，《信息安全测试和评估技术指南》，提供了 NIST 的渗透测试流程。使用此图像以及您的渗透测试知识来回答问题。其他发现计划发现攻击报告来源：NIST SP 800-115。"}
explanation_en: Ethical (or responsible) disclosure norms include notifying the vendor and providing them with a reasonable amount of time to remediate the issue. Public disclosures before notifying the vendor or in a short period of time are considered unethical in most circumstances. While this time frame varies, 90 to 120 days is not uncommon across the industry due to the complexity of software and other technologies.
explanation_zh: 道德（或负责任）披露规范包括通知供应商并为他们提供合理的时间来纠正问题。在大多数情况下，在通知供应商之前或在短时间内公开披露被认为是不道德的。虽然这个时间范围各不相同，但由于软件和其他技术的复杂性，90 到 120 天在整个行业并不罕见。

question_en: Which of the following is not a part of the discovery phase?
options_en: {"A": "Hostname and IP address information gathering", "B": "Service information capture", "C": "Dumpster diving", "D": "Privilege escalation"}
question_zh: 以下哪项不属于发现阶段？
options_zh: {"A": "主机名和 IP 地址信息收集", "B": "服务信息捕获", "C": "垃圾箱潜水", "D": "提权"}
explanation_en: Privilege escalation occurs during the attack phase of a penetration test. Host and service information gathering, as well as activities like dumpster diving that can provide information about the organization, its systems, and security, are all part of the discovery phase.
explanation_zh: 提权发生在渗透测试的攻击阶段。主机和服务信息收集以及诸如垃圾箱挖掘之类的活动（可以提供有关组织、其系统和安全性的信息）都是发现阶段的一部分。

question_en: NIST specifies four attack phase steps: gaining access, escalating privileges, system browsing, and installing additional tools. Once attackers install additional tools, what phase will a penetration tester typically return to?
question_zh: NIST 指定了四个攻击阶段步骤：获取访问权限、升级权限、系统浏览和安装附加工具。一旦攻击者安装了额外的工具，渗透测试人员通常会返回到哪个阶段？
options_zh: {"A": "发现", "B": "获得访问权限", "C": "升级权限", "D": "系统浏览"}
explanation_en: Once additional tools have been installed, penetration testers will typically use them to gain additional access. From there they can further escalate privileges, search for new targets or data, and, once again, install more tools to allow them to pivot further into infrastructure or systems.
explanation_zh: 一旦安装了其他工具，渗透测试人员通常会使用它们来获得额外的访问权限。从那里他们可以进一步升级权限，搜索新的目标或数据，并再次安装更多工具以允许他们进一步转向基础设施或系统。

question_en: Which of the following is not a typical part of a penetration test report?
options_en: {"A": "A list of identified vulnerabilities", "B": "All sensitive data that was gathered during the test", "C": "Risk ratings for each issue discovered", "D": "Mitigation guidance for issues identified"}
question_zh: 以下哪一项不是渗透测试报告的典型部分？
options_zh: {"A": "已识别漏洞的列表", "B": "测试期间收集的所有敏感数据", "C": "对发现的每个问题的风险评级", "D": "针对已发现问题的缓解指南"}
explanation_en: Penetration testing reports often do not include the specific data captured during the assessment, as the readers of the report may not be authorized to access all of the data, and exposure of the report could result in additional problems for the organization. A listing of the issues discovered, risk ratings, and remediation guidance are all common parts of a penetration test report.
explanation_zh: 渗透测试报告通常不包括评估期间捕获的特定数据，因为报告的读者可能无权访问所有数据，并且报告的暴露可能会给组织带来其他问题。发现的问题列表、风险评级和补救指南都是渗透测试报告的常见部分。

question_en: Alex is using nmap to perform port scanning of a system, and he receives three different port status messages in the results. Match each of the numbered status messages with the appropriate lettered description. You should use each item exactly once. Status message 1. Open 2. Closed 3. Filtered Description
options_en: {"A": "The port is accessible on the remote system, but no application is accepting connections on that port.", "B": "The port is not accessible on the remote system.", "C": "The port is accessible on the remote system, and an application is accepting connections on that port."}
question_zh: Alex 正在使用 nmap 对系统进行端口扫描，他在结果中收到了三种不同的端口状态消息。将每条编号的状态消息与适当的字母描述相匹配。每个项目应该只使用一次。状态消息 1. 打开 2. 关闭 3. 已过滤 说明
options_zh: {"A": "端口可在远程系统上访问，但没有应用程序接受该端口上的连接。", "B": "远程系统上无法访问该端口。", "C": "该端口可在远程系统上访问，并且应用程序正在接受该端口上的连接。"}
explanation_en: The status messages match with the descriptions as follows: 1. Open: C. The port is accessible on the remote system and an application is accepting connections on that port. 2. Closed: B. The port is not accessible on the remote system. 3. Filtered: A. The port is accessible on the remote system, but no application is accepting connections on that port.
explanation_zh: 状态消息与描述相符，如下所示： 1. 打开：C。端口在远程系统上可访问，并且应用程序正在接受该端口上的连接。 2. 关闭：B。远程系统上无法访问该端口。 3. 已过滤： A. 该端口可在远程系统上访问，但没有应用程序接受该端口上的连接。

question_en: Mary is reviewing the availability controls for the system architecture shown here. What technology is shown that provides fault tolerance for the database servers? DB1 Network RAID load balancing array Web 1 Internet Load access balancer Web 2 Database used by database DB2 servers Web 3
question_zh: Mary 正在检查此处显示的系统架构的可用性控制。展示了哪些技术可以为数据库服务器提供容错能力？ DB1 网络 RAID 负载平衡阵列 Web 1 Internet 负载访问平衡器 Web 2 数据库使用的数据库 DB2 服务器 Web 3
options_zh: {"A": "故障转移群集", "B": "UPS", "C": "磁带备份", "D": "冷站点"}
explanation_en: The illustration shows an example of a failover cluster, where DB1 and DB2 are both configured as database servers. At any given time, only one will function as the active database server, while the other remains ready to assume responsibility if the first one fails. While the environment may use UPS, tape backup, and cold sites as disaster recovery and business continuity controls, they are not shown in the diagram.
explanation_zh: 下图显示了故障转移群集的示例，其中 DB1 和 DB2 都配置为数据库服务器。在任何给定时间，只有一个将充当活动数据库服务器，而另一个则准备好在第一个数据库服务器发生故障时承担责任。虽然环境可能使用 UPS、磁带备份和冷站点作为灾难恢复和业务连续性控制，但它们未在图中显示。

question_en: Joe is the security administrator for an ERP system. He is preparing to create accounts for several new employees. What default access should he give to all of the new employees as he creates the accounts?
question_zh: Joe 是 ERP 系统的安全管理员。他正准备为几名新员工创建帐户。在创建帐户时，他应该向所有新员工授予什么默认访问权限？
options_zh: {"A": "只读", "B": "编辑器", "C": "管理员", "D": "无访问权限"}
explanation_en: The principle of least privilege should guide Joe in this case. He should apply no access permissions by default and then give each user the necessary permissions to perform their job responsibilities. Read only, editor, and administrator permissions may be necessary for one or more of these users, but those permissions should be assigned based upon business need and not by default.
explanation_zh: 在这种情况下，最小权限原则应该指导 Joe。默认情况下，他不应应用任何访问权限，然后为每个用户提供履行其工作职责所需的权限。其中一个或多个用户可能需要只读、编辑和管理员权限，但这些权限应根据业务需要而不是默认分配。

question_en: Tim is configuring a privileged account management solution for his organization. Which one of the following is not a privileged administrative activity that should be automatically sent to a log of superuser actions?
options_en: {"A": "Purging log entries", "B": "Restoring a system from backup", "C": "Logging into a workstation", "D": "Managing user accounts"}
question_zh: Tim 正在为其组织配置特权帐户管理解决方案。以下哪一项不是应自动发送到超级用户操作日志的特权管理活动？
options_zh: {"A": "清除日志条目", "B": "从备份中恢复系统", "C": "登录工作站", "D": "管理用户帐户"}
explanation_en: While most organizations would want to log attempts to log in to a workstation, this is not considered a privileged administrative activity and would go through normal logging processes.
explanation_zh: 虽然大多数组织希望记录登录工作站的尝试，但这并不被视为特权管理活动，而是会经过正常的日志记录流程。

question_en: When one of the employees of Alice’s company calls in for support, she uses a code word that the company agreed to use if employees were being forced to perform an action. What is this scenario called?
question_zh: 当 Alice 公司的一名员工致电寻求支持时，她使用了公司同意在员工被迫执行某项操作时使用的暗号。这个场景叫什么？
options_zh: {"A": "社会工程", "B": "胁迫", "C": "不可抗力", "D": "斯德哥尔摩综合症"}
explanation_en: Duress, or being under threat of violence or other constraints, is a concern for organizations such as banks, jewelry stores, or other organizations where an attacker may attempt to force an employee to perform actions. Organizations that expect that a scenario like this may occur will often use duress code words that let others know that they are performing actions under threat.
explanation_zh: 胁迫或受到暴力威胁或其他限制是银行、珠宝店或其他组织等组织所关注的问题，攻击者可能会在这些组织中试图强迫员工执行操作。预计可能会发生类似情况的组织通常会使用胁迫代码字，让其他人知道他们正在受到威胁的情况下执行操作。

question_en: Jordan is preparing to bring evidence into court after a cybersecurity incident investigation. He is responsible for preparing the physical artifacts, including affected servers and mobile devices. What type of evidence consists entirely of tangible items that may be brought into a court of law?
question_zh: 约旦正准备在网络安全事件调查后将证据提交法庭。他负责准备物理工件，包括受影响的服务器和移动设备。哪种类型的证据完全由可带入法庭的有形物品组成？
options_zh: {"A": "文件证据", "B": "口头证据", "C": "证词证据", "D": "真实证据"}
explanation_en: Real evidence consists of things that may actually be brought into a courtroom as evidence. For example, real evidence includes hard disks, weapons, and items containing fingerprints. Documentary evidence consists of written items that may or may not be in tangible form. Testimonial evidence is verbal testimony given by witnesses with relevant information. The parol evidence rule says that when an agreement is put into written form, the written document is assumed to contain all the terms of the agreement.
explanation_zh: 真实证据由实际可以带入法庭作为证据的物品组成。例如，真实证据包括硬盘、武器和含有指纹的物品。文件证据由可能是也可能不是有形形式的书面项目组成。证言证据是证人提供的具有相关信息的口头证词。口头证据规则规定，当协议以书面形式提出时，书面文件被假定包含协议的所有条款。

question_en: Lauren wants to ensure that her users only run software that her organization has approved. What technology should she deploy?
question_zh: Lauren 希望确保她的用户仅运行其组织批准的软件。她应该部署什么技术？
options_zh: {"A": "黑名单", "B": "配置管理", "C": "白名单", "D": "灰名单"}
explanation_en: A whitelist of allowed applications will ensure that Lauren’s users can run only the applications that she preapproves. Blacklists would require her to maintain a list of every application that she doesn’t want to allow, which is an almost impossible task. Graylisting is not a technology option, and configuration management can be useful for making sure the right applications are on a PC but typically can’t directly prevent users from running undesired applications or programs.
explanation_zh: 允许的应用程序白名单将确保 Lauren 的用户只能运行她预先批准的应用程序。黑名单要求她维护一份她不想允许的每个应用程序的列表，这几乎是不可能的任务。灰名单不是一种技术选项，配置管理可用于确保 PC 上有正确的应用程序，但通常无法直接阻止用户运行不需要的应用程序或程序。

question_en: Colin is responsible for managing his organization’s use of cybersecurity deception technologies. Which one of the following should he use on a honeypot system to consume an attacker’s time while alerting administrators?
question_zh: Colin 负责管理其组织对网络安全欺骗技术的使用。他应该在蜜罐系统上使用以下哪一项来消耗攻击者的时间，同时向管理员发出警报？
options_zh: {"A": "Honeynet", "B": "伪缺陷", "C": "警告横幅", "D": "暗网"}
explanation_en: A pseudoflaw is a false vulnerability in a system that may distract an attacker. A honeynet is a network of multiple honeypots that creates a more sophisticated environment for intruders to explore, rather than a feature Colin could use on a honeypot. A darknet is a segment of unused network address space that should have no network activity and, therefore, may be easily used to monitor for illicit activity. A warning banner is a legal tool used to notify intruders that they are not authorized to access a system.
explanation_zh: 伪缺陷是系统中可能分散攻击者注意力的虚假漏洞。蜜网是由多个蜜罐组成的网络，它为入侵者创造了一个更复杂的环境来探索，而不是科林可以在蜜罐上使用的功能。暗网是一段未使用的网络地址空间，不应有任何网络活动，因此可轻松用于监控非法活动。警告横幅是一种合法工具，用于通知入侵者他们无权访问系统。

question_en: Toni responds to the desk of a user who reports slow system activity. Upon checking outbound network connections from that system, Toni notices a large amount of social media traffic originating from the system. The user does not use social media, and when Toni checks the accounts in question, they contain strange messages that appear encrypted. What is the most likely cause of this traffic?
options_en: {"A": "Other users are relaying social media requests through the user’s computer.", "B": "The user’s computer is part of a botnet.", "C": "The user is lying about her use of social media.", "D": "Someone else is using the user’s computer when she is not present."}
question_zh: Toni 回复报告系统活动缓慢的用户的办公桌。在检查该系统的出站网络连接后，托尼注意到来自该系统的大量社交媒体流量。该用户不使用社交媒体，当托尼检查相关帐户时，它们包含看似加密的奇怪消息。造成此流量的最可能原因是什么？
options_zh: {"A": "其他用户正在通过该用户的计算机转发社交媒体请求。", "B": "用户的计算机是僵尸网络的一部分。", "C": "用户在使用社交媒体时撒了谎。", "D": "当用户不在场时，其他人正在使用她的计算机。"}
explanation_en: Social media is commonly used as a command-and-control system for botnet activity. The most likely scenario here is that the user’s computer was infected with malware and joined to a botnet. This accounts for both the unusual social media traffic and the slow system activity.
explanation_zh: 社交媒体通常用作僵尸网络活动的命令和控制系统。最有可能的情况是用户的计算机感染了恶意软件并加入了僵尸网络。这既是社交媒体流量异常，又是系统活动缓慢的原因。

question_en: John deploys his website to multiple regions using load balancers around the world through his cloud infrastructure as a service provider. What availability concept is he using?
question_zh: John 作为服务提供商，通过其云基础设施使用世界各地的负载均衡器将其网站部署到多个区域。他使用什么可用性概念？
options_zh: {"A": "多个处理站点", "B": "暖站点", "C": "冷站点", "D": "蜜网"}
explanation_en: John’s design provides multiple processing sites, distributing load to multiple regions. Not only does this provide business continuity and disaster recovery functionality, but it also means that his design will be more resilient to denial-of-service attacks.
explanation_zh: John 的设计提供了多个处理站点，将负载分布到多个区域。这不仅提供了业务连续性和灾难恢复功能，而且还意味着他的设计将更能抵御拒绝服务攻击。

question_en: Jim would like to identify compromised systems on his network that may be participating in a botnet. He plans to do this by watching for connections made to known command-andcontrol servers. Which one of the following techniques would be most likely to provide this information if Jim has access to a list of known servers?
options_en: {"A": "NetFlow records", "B": "IDS logs", "C": "Authentication logs", "D": "RFC logs For questions 11–15, please refer to the following scenario: Gary was recently hired as the first chief information security officer (CISO) for a local government agency. The agency recently suffered a security breach and is attempting to build a new information security program. Gary would like to apply some best practices for security operations as he is designing this program."}
question_zh: Jim 希望识别其网络上可能参与僵尸网络的受感染系统。他计划通过监视与已知命令和控制服务器的连接来做到这一点。如果 Jim 可以访问已知服务器列表，以下哪一项技术最有可能提供此信息？
options_zh: {"A": "NetFlow 记录", "B": "IDS 日志", "C": "身份验证日志", "D": "RFC 日志 对于问题 11-15，请参考以下场景： Gary 最近被聘为当地政府机构的第一位首席信息安全官 (CISO)。该机构最近遭遇了安全漏洞，并正在尝试建立一个新的信息安全计划。加里（Gary）希望在设计该程序时应用一些安全操作的最佳实践。"}
explanation_en: NetFlow records contain an entry for every network communication session that took place on a network and can be compared to a list of known malicious hosts. IDS logs may contain a relevant record, but it is less likely because they would create log entries only if the traffic triggers the IDS, as opposed to NetFlow records, which encompass all communications. Authentication logs and RFC logs would not have records of any network traffic.
explanation_zh: NetFlow 记录包含网络上发生的每个网络通信会话的条目，并且可以与已知恶意主机的列表进行比较。 IDS 日志可能包含相关记录，但可能性较小，因为只有当流量触发 IDS 时，它们才会创建日志条目，这与包含所有通信的 NetFlow 记录相反。身份验证日志和 RFC 日志不会记录任何网络流量。

question_en: As Gary decides what access permissions he should grant to each user, what principle should guide his decisions about default permissions?
question_zh: 当 Gary 决定应授予每个用户哪些访问权限时，应遵循什么原则来指导他关于默认权限的决策？
options_zh: {"A": "职责分离", "B": "最小权限", "C": "聚合", "D": "权限分离"}
explanation_en: Gary should follow the least privilege principle and assign users only the permissions they need to perform their job responsibilities. Aggregation is a term used to describe the unintentional accumulation of privileges over time, also known as privilege creep. Separation of duties and separation of privileges are principles used to secure sensitive processes.
explanation_zh: Gary 应遵循最小权限原则，仅向用户分配履行其工作职责所需的权限。聚合是一个术语，用于描述特权随时间的无意累积，也称为特权蔓延。职责分离和特权分离是用于保护敏感流程的原则。

question_en: As Gary designs the program, he uses the matrix shown here. What principle of information security does this matrix most directly help enforce? Accounts Payable Database Server Budget Analyst Deploy Patches Verify Patches Roles/Tasks Application Security Database Accounts Programmer Administrator Administrator Administrator Receivable Application Programmer X X X Security Administrator X X X X X X X Database Administrator X X X Database Server Administrator X X X Budget Analyst X X X Accounts Receivable X X X Accounts Payable X X X Deploy Patches X X Verify Patches X Potential Areas of Conflict
question_zh: 当 Gary 设计程序时，他使用此处显示的矩阵。该矩阵最直接有助于执行哪些信息安全原则？应付账款数据库服务器 预算分析师 部署补丁 验证补丁 角色/任务 应用程序安全 数据库帐户 程序员管理员 管理员 管理员 应收应用程序程序员 X X X 安全管理员 X X X X X X X 数据库管理员 X X X 数据库服务器管理员 X X X 预算分析师 X X X 应收账款 X X X 应付账款 X X X 部署补丁 X X 验证补丁 X 潜在冲突领域
options_zh: {"A": "职责分离", "B": "聚合", "C": "两人控制", "D": "纵深防御"}
explanation_en: The matrix shown in the figure is known as a segregation of duties matrix. It is used to ensure that one person does not obtain two privileges that would create a potential conflict. Aggregation is a term used to describe the unintentional accumulation of privileges over time, also known as privilege creep. Two-person control is used when two people must work together to perform a sensitive action. Defense in depth is a general security principle used to describe a philosophy of overlapping security controls.
explanation_zh: 图中所示的矩阵称为职责分离矩阵。它用于确保一个人不会获得可能造成潜在冲突的两项特权。聚合是一个术语，用于描述特权随时间的无意累积，也称为特权蔓延。当两个人必须一起工作才能执行敏感操作时，使用两人控制。深度防御是一种通用安全原则，用于描述重叠安全控制的理念。

question_en: Gary is preparing to create an account for a new user and assign privileges to the HR database. What two elements of information must Gary verify before granting this access?
options_en: {"A": "Credentials and need to know", "B": "Clearance and need to know", "C": "Password and clearance", "D": "Password and biometric scan"}
question_zh: Gary 正准备为新用户创建帐户并向 HR 数据库分配权限。在授予此访问权限之前，Gary 必须验证哪两项信息？
options_zh: {"A": "凭证和需要知道", "B": "许可和需要知道", "C": "密码和许可", "D": "密码和生物识别扫描"}
explanation_en: Before granting access, Gary should verify that the user has a valid security clearance and a business need to know the information. Gary is performing an authorization task, so he does not need to verify the user’s credentials, such as a password or biometric scan.
explanation_zh: 在授予访问权限之前，Gary 应验证用户是否具有有效的安全许可以及业务需要了解这些信息。 Gary 正在执行授权任务，因此他不需要验证用户的凭据，例如密码或生物识别扫描。

question_en: Gary is preparing to develop controls around access to root encryption keys and would like to apply a principle of security designed specifically for very sensitive operations. Which principle should he apply?
options_en: {"A": "Least privilege", "B": "Defense in depth", "C": "Security through obscurity", "D": "Two-person control"}
question_zh: Gary 正准备开发围绕根加密密钥访问的控制措施，并希望应用专门为非常敏感的操作设计的安全原则。他应该应用哪一个原则？
options_zh: {"A": "最小权限", "B": "纵深防御", "C": "通过隐蔽实现安全", "D": "两人控制"}
explanation_en: Gary should follow the principle of two-person control by requiring simultaneous action by two separate authorized individuals to gain access to the encryption keys. He should also apply the principles of least privilege and defense in depth, but these principles apply to all operations and are not specific to sensitive operations. Gary should avoid the security through obscurity principle, the reliance upon the secrecy of security mechanisms to provide security for a system or process.
explanation_zh: Gary 应遵循两人控制原则，要求两个独立的授权个人同时采取行动才能访问加密密钥。他还应该应用最小特权和深度防御的原则，但这些原则适用于所有行动，而不是特定于敏感行动。 Gary 应避免通过模糊性原则实现安全性，即依赖安全机制的保密性来为系统或进程提供安全性。

question_en: How often should Gary and his team conduct a review of the privileged access that a user has to sensitive systems? (Select all that apply.)
options_en: {"A": "On a periodic basis", "B": "When a user leaves the organization", "C": "When a user changes roles", "D": "On a daily basis"}
question_zh: Gary 和他的团队应该多久检查一次用户对敏感系统的特权访问权限？ （选择所有适用项。）
options_zh: {"A": "定期", "B": "当用户离开组织时", "C": "当用户更改角色时", "D": "每天"}
explanation_en: Privileged access reviews are one of the most critical components of an organization’s security program because they ensure that only authorized users have access to perform the most sensitive operations. They should take place whenever a user with privileged access leaves the organization or changes roles as well as on a regular, recurring basis. However, it is not reasonable to expect that these time-consuming reviews would take place on a daily basis.
explanation_zh: 特权访问审查是组织安全计划中最关键的组成部分之一，因为它们确保只有授权用户才有权执行最敏感的操作。每当具有特权访问权限的用户离开组织或更改角色时，就应该进行这些操作，并且定期、重复进行。然而，期望每天进行这些耗时的审查是不合理的。

question_en: Which one of the following terms is often used to describe a collection of unrelated patches released in a large collection?
question_zh: 以下哪一个术语经常用于描述在一个大集合中发布的不相关补丁的集合？
options_zh: {"A": "修补程序", "B": "更新", "C": "安全修补程序", "D": "服务包"}
explanation_en: Hotfixes, updates, and security fixes are all synonyms for single patches designed to correct a single problem. Service packs are collections of many different updates that serve as a major update to an operating system or application.
explanation_zh: 修补程序、更新和安全修补程序都是旨在纠正单个问题的单个补丁的同义词。服务包是许多不同更新的集合，用作操作系统或应用程序的主要更新。

question_en: Tonya is collecting evidence from a series of systems that were involved in a cybersecurity incident. A colleague suggests that she use a forensic disk controller for the collection process. What is the function of this device?
options_en: {"A": "Masking error conditions reported by the storage device", "B": "Transmitting write commands to the storage device", "C": "Intercepting and modifying or discarding commands sent to the storage device", "D": "Preventing data from being returned by a read operation sent to the device"}
question_zh: Tonya 正在从涉及网络安全事件的一系列系统中收集证据。一位同事建议她在收集过程中使用取证磁盘控制器。这个装置的功能是什么？
options_zh: {"A": "屏蔽存储设备报告的错误情况", "B": "向存储设备传输写命令", "C": "拦截并修改或丢弃发送到存储设备的命令", "D": "防止发送到设备的读操作返回数据"}
explanation_en: A forensic disk controller performs four functions. One of those, write blocking, intercepts write commands sent to the device and prevents them from modifying data on the device. The other three functions include returning data requested by a read operation, returning access-significant information from the device, and reporting errors from the device back to the forensic host.
explanation_zh: 取证磁盘控制器执行四种功能。其中之一是写入阻塞，它拦截发送到设备的写入命令并阻止它们修改设备上的数据。其他三个功能包括返回读取操作请求的数据、从设备返回访问重要信息以及将设备的错误报告回取证主机。

question_en: Lydia is processing access control requests for her organization. She comes across a request where the user does have the required security clearance, but there is no business justification for the access. Lydia denies this request. What security principle is she following?
options_en: {"A": "Need to know", "B": "Least privilege", "C": "Separation of duties", "D": "Two-person control"}
question_zh: Lydia 正在处理她的组织的访问控制请求。她遇到一个请求，其中用户确实具有所需的安全许可，但没有访问的业务理由。莉迪亚拒绝了这一要求。她遵循什么安全原则？
options_zh: {"A": "需要知道", "B": "最小特权", "C": "职责分离", "D": "两人控制"}
explanation_en: Lydia is following the need to know principle. While the user may have the appropriate security clearance to access this information, there is no business justification provided, so she does not know that the user has an appropriate need to know the information.
explanation_zh: Lydia 遵循需要知道原则。虽然用户可能具有适当的安全许可来访问此信息，但没有提供商业理由，因此她不知道用户有适当的需要来了解该信息。

question_en: Helen is tasked with implementing security controls in her organization that might be used to deter fraudulent insider activity. Which one of the following mechanisms would be LEAST useful to her work?
question_zh: Helen 的任务是在其组织中实施安全控制，这些控制可用于阻止欺诈性的内部活动。以下哪一种机制对她的工作最没有用？
options_zh: {"A": "工作轮换", "B": "强制休假", "C": "事件响应", "D": "两人控制"}
explanation_en: Job rotation and mandatory vacations deter fraud by increasing the likelihood that it will be detected. Two-person control deters fraud by requiring collusion between two employees. Incident response does not normally serve as a deterrent mechanism.
explanation_zh: 工作轮换和强制休假通过增加检测到欺诈的可能性来阻止欺诈。两人控制通过要求两名员工串通来阻止欺诈。事件响应通常不会起到威慑机制的作用。

question_en: Matt wants to ensure that critical network traffic from systems throughout his company is prioritized over web browsing and social media use at this company. What technology can he use to do this?
question_zh: Matt 希望确保来自整个公司系统的关键网络流量优先于该公司的网络浏览和社交媒体使用。他可以使用什么技术来做到这一点？
options_zh: {"A": "VLAN", "B": "QoS", "C": "VPN", "D": "ISDN"}
explanation_en: Quality of service is a feature found on routers and other network devices that can prioritize specific network traffic. QoS policies define which traffic is prioritized, and traffic is then handled based on the policy.
explanation_zh: 服务质量是路由器和其他网络设备上的一项功能，可以对特定网络流量进行优先级排序。 QoS 策略定义哪些流量具有优先级，然后根据策略处理流量。

question_en: Tom is responding to a recent security incident and is seeking information on the approval process for a recent modification to a system’s security settings. Where would he most likely find this information?
question_zh: Tom 正在响应最近的安全事件，并正在寻求有关最近修改系统安全设置的审批流程的信息。他最有可能在哪里找到这些信息？
options_zh: {"A": "变更日志", "B": "系统日志", "C": "安全日志", "D": "应用程序日志"}
explanation_en: The change log contains information about approved changes and the change management process. While other logs may contain details about the change’s effect, the audit trail for change management would be found in the change log.
explanation_zh: 变更日志包含有关已批准变更和变更管理流程的信息。虽然其他日志可能包含有关更改影响的详细信息，但更改管理的审核跟踪可以在更改日志中找到。

question_en: Staff from Susan’s company often travel internationally and require connectivity to corporate systems for their work. Susan believes that these users may be targeted for corporate espionage activities because of the technologies that her company is developing and wants to include advice in the security training provided to international travelers. What practice should Susan recommend that they adopt for connecting to networks while they travel?
options_en: {"A": "Only connect to public WiFi.", "B": "Use a VPN for all connections.", "C": "Only use websites that support TLS.", "D": "Do not connect to networks while traveling."}
question_zh: Susan 公司的员工经常出差到国外，需要连接到公司系统才能工作。苏珊认为，由于她的公司正在开发技术，这些用户可能成为企业间谍活动的目标，并希望在向国际旅行者提供的安全培训中纳入建议。 Susan 应建议他们在旅行时采用什么做法来连接网络？
options_zh: {"A": "仅连接公共 WiFi。", "B": "对所有连接使用 VPN。", "C": "仅使用支持 TLS 的网站。", "D": "旅行时请勿连接网络。"}
explanation_en: While it may be tempting to tell her staff to simply not connect to any network, Susan knows that they will need connectivity to do their work. Using a VPN to connect their laptops and mobile devices to a trusted network and ensuring that all traffic is tunneled through the VPN is her best bet to secure their internet usage. Susan may also want to ensure that they take “clean” laptops and devices that do not contain sensitive information or documents and that those systems are fully wiped and reviewed when they return.
explanation_zh: 虽然告诉她的员工不要连接到任何网络可能很诱人，但苏珊知道他们需要连接才能完成工作。使用 VPN 将笔记本电脑和移动设备连接到受信任的网络，并确保所有流量都通过 VPN 传输，是确保他们的互联网使用安全的最佳选择。苏珊可能还想确保他们拿走不包含敏感信息或文档的“干净”笔记本电脑和设备，并确保这些系统在返回时得到完全擦除和审查。

question_en: Ricky is seeking a list of information security vulnerabilities in applications, devices, and operating systems. Which one of the following threat intelligence sources would be most useful to him?
question_zh: Ricky 正在寻找应用程序、设备和操作系统中的信息安全漏洞列表。以下哪一项威胁情报来源对他最有用？
options_zh: {"A": "OWASP", "B": "Bugtraq", "C": "Microsoft 安全公告", "D": "CVE"}
explanation_en: The Common Vulnerability and Exposures (CVE) dictionary contains standardized information on many different security issues. The Open Web Application Security Project (OWASP) contains general guidance on web application security issues but does not track specific vulnerabilities or go beyond web applications. The Bugtraq mailing list and Microsoft Security Bulletins are good sources of vulnerability information but are not comprehensive databases of known issues.
explanation_zh: 通用漏洞和暴露 (CVE) 字典包含有关许多不同安全问题的标准化信息。开放 Web 应用程序安全项目 (OWASP) 包含有关 Web 应用程序安全问题的一般指南，但不跟踪特定漏洞或超出 Web 应用程序范围。 Bugtraq 邮件列表和 Microsoft 安全公告是漏洞信息的良好来源，但不是已知问题的综合数据库。

question_en: Which of the following would normally be considered an example of a disaster when performing disaster recovery planning? (Select all that apply.)
question_zh: 在执行灾难恢复计划时，以下哪一项通常会被视为灾难示例？ （选择所有适用项。）
explanation_en: A disaster is any event that can disrupt normal IT operations and can be either natural or manmade. Hacking and terrorism are examples of manmade disasters, while flooding and fire are examples of natural disasters.
explanation_zh: 灾难是指任何可能扰乱 IT 正常运行的事件，可以是自然的，也可以是人为的。黑客攻击和恐怖主义是人为灾难的例子，而洪水和火灾是自然灾害的例子。

question_en: Glenda would like to conduct a disaster recovery test and is seeking a test that will allow a review of the plan with no disruption to normal information system activities and as minimal a commitment of time as possible. What type of test should she choose?
question_zh: Glenda 希望进行灾难恢复测试，并且正在寻求一种测试，该测试可以在不中断正常信息系统活动的情况下审查计划，并且承诺的时间尽可能短。她应该选择什么类型的测试？
options_zh: {"A": "桌面练习", "B": "并行测试", "C": "全中断测试", "D": "检查清单审查"}
explanation_en: The checklist review is the least disruptive type of disaster recovery test. During a checklist review, team members each review the contents of their disaster recovery checklists on their own and suggest any necessary changes. During a tabletop exercise, team members come together and walk through a scenario without making any changes to information systems. During a parallel test, the team actually activates the disaster recovery site for testing, but the primary site remains operational. During a full interruption test, the team takes down the primary site and confirms that the disaster recovery site is capable of handling regular operations. The full interruption test is the most thorough test but also the most disruptive.
explanation_zh: 检查清单审查是灾难恢复测试中破坏性最小的类型。在检查清单审查期间，团队成员各自审查其灾难恢复检查清单的内容并提出任何必要的更改建议。在桌面练习期间，团队成员聚集在一起并演练场景，而不对信息系统进行任何更改。在并行测试期间，团队实际上激活了灾难恢复站点进行测试，但主站点仍保持运行。在全面中断测试期间，团队关闭主站点并确认灾难恢复站点能够处理常规操作。完全中断测试是最彻底的测试，但也是最具破坏性的。

question_en: Which one of the following is not an example of a backup tape rotation scheme?
options_en: {"A": "Grandfather/Father/Son", "B": "Meet in the middle", "C": "Tower of Hanoi", "D": "Six Cartridge Weekly"}
question_zh: 以下哪一项不是备份磁带轮换方案的示例？
options_zh: {"A": "祖父/父亲/儿子", "B": "在中间相遇", "C": "河内塔", "D": "每周六盒磁带"}
explanation_en: The Grandfather/Father/Son, Tower of Hanoi, and Six Cartridge Weekly schemes are all different approaches to rotating backup media that balance reuse of media with data retention concerns. Meet-in-the-middle is a cryptographic attack against 2DES encryption.
explanation_zh: 祖父/父亲/儿子、河内塔和每周六盒磁带计划都是轮换备份介质的不同方法，可平衡介质重用与数据保留问题。中间相遇是针对 2DES 加密的加密攻击。

question_en: Helen is implementing a new security mechanism for granting employees administrative privileges in the accounting system. She designs the process so that both the employee’s manager and the accounting manager must approve the request before the access is granted. What information security principle is Helen enforcing?
question_zh: Helen 正在实施一种新的安全机制，用于在会计系统中授予员工管理权限。她设计的流程使得员工的经理和会计经理都必须批准请求才能授予访问权限。 Helen 执行什么信息安全原则？
options_zh: {"A": "最小权限", "B": "两人控制", "C": "工作轮换", "D": "职责分离"}
explanation_en: In this scenario, Helen designed a process that requires the concurrence of two people to perform a sensitive action. This is an example of two-person control. This is different from separation of duties, where one individual may not have two separate permissions that, when combined, might allow an unwanted action. Separation of duties applied to a situation like this one might say that the same person may not have both the ability to initiate a request and the ability to approve a request. Least privilege says that an individual should have only the necessary permissions required to carry out their job function. Job rotation is a scheme that has users periodically shift job functions in order to detect malfeasance.
explanation_zh: 在这个场景中，Helen 设计了一个需要两个人同时执行敏感操作的流程。这是两人控制的一个例子。这与职责分离不同，在职责分离中，一个人可能没有两个单独的权限，而这两个权限组合起来可能会允许执行不需要的操作。适用于这种情况的职责分离可能会说同一个人可能无法同时具有发起请求的能力和批准请求的能力。最小权限是指个人应该只拥有执行其工作职能所需的必要权限。工作轮换是一种让用户定期轮换工作职能以发现不当行为的方案。

question_en: Frank is considering the use of different types of evidence in an upcoming criminal matter. Which one of the following is not a requirement for evidence to be admissible in court?
options_en: {"A": "The evidence must be relevant.", "B": "The evidence must be material.", "C": "The evidence must be tangible.", "D": "The evidence must be competently acquired."}
question_zh: 弗兰克正在考虑在即将发生的刑事案件中使用不同类型的证据。以下哪一项不是法庭采纳证据的必要条件？
options_zh: {"A": "证据必须是相关的。", "B": "证据必须是实质性的。", "C": "证据必须是有形的。", "D": "必须充分获取证据。"}
explanation_en: Evidence provided in court must be relevant to determining a fact in question, material to the case at hand, and competently obtained. Evidence does not need to be tangible. Witness testimony is an example of intangible evidence that may be offered in court.
explanation_zh: 在法庭上提供的证据必须与确定所涉事实相关、对当前案件至关重要并且是有效获得的。证据不一定是有形的。证人证词是可以在法庭上提供的无形证据的一个例子。

question_en: Harold recently completed leading the postmortem review of a security incident. What documentation should he prepare next?
options_en: {"A": "A lessons learned document", "B": "A risk assessment", "C": "A remediation list", "D": "A mitigation checklist"}
question_zh: Harold 最近完成了对安全事件的事后审查。接下来他应该准备什么文件？
options_zh: {"A": "经验教训文件", "B": "风险评估", "C": "补救清单", "D": "缓解清单"}
explanation_en: A lessons learned document is often created and distributed to involved parties after a postmortem review to ensure that those who were involved in the incident and others who may benefit from the knowledge are aware of what they can do to prevent future issues and to improve response in the event that one occurs.
explanation_zh: 经验教训文件通常是在事后审查后创建并分发给相关各方，以确保参与事件的人员和其他可能从知识中受益的人员了解他们可以采取哪些措施来防止未来出现问题并在发生问题时改进响应。

question_en: Beth is creating a new cybersecurity incident response team (CSIRT) and would like to determine the appropriate team membership. Which of the following groups would she normally include? (Select all that apply.)
question_zh: Beth 正在创建一个新的网络安全事件响应团队 (CSIRT)，并希望确定适当的团队成员。她通常会包括以下哪些组？ （请选择所有适用项。）
options_zh: {"A": "信息安全", "B": "执法", "C": "高级管理人员", "D": "公共事务"}
explanation_en: CSIRT representation normally includes at least representatives of senior management, information security professionals, legal representatives, public affairs staff, and engineering/technical staff. Law enforcement personnel would not be included on such a team and would only be consulted as necessary.
explanation_zh: CSIRT 代表通常至少包括高级管理人员代表、信息安全专业人员、法律代表、公共事务人员和工程/技术人员。执法人员不会被纳入这样的团队，只有在必要时才会被咨询。

question_en: Sam is responsible for backing up his company’s primary file server. He configured a backup schedule that performs full backups every Monday evening at 9 p.m. and differential backups on other days of the week at that same time. Files change according to the information shown in the following figure. How many files will be copied in Wednesday’s backup? File Modifications Monday 8 a.m. - File 1 created Monday 10 a.m. - File 2 created Monday 11 a.m. - File 3 created Monday 4 p.m. - File 1 modified Monday 5 p.m. - File 4 created Tuesday 8 a.m. - File 1 modified Tuesday 9 a.m. - File 2 modified Tuesday 10 a.m. - File 5 created Wednesday 8 a.m. - File 3 modified Wednesday 9 a.m. - File 6 created
question_zh: Sam 负责备份公司的主文件服务器。他配置了一个备份计划，每周一晚上 9 点执行完整备份。并在一周中的其他日子同时进行差异备份。文件根据下图所示信息发生变化。周三的备份中将复制多少文件？文件修改 周一上午 8 点 - 文件 1 创建于周一上午 10 点 - 文件 2 创建于周一上午 11 点 - 文件 3 创建于周一下午 4 点- 文件 1 已修改，周一下午 5 点- 文件 4 于周二上午 8 点创建 - 文件 1 于周二上午 9 点修改 - 文件 2 于周二上午 10 点修改 - 文件 5 于周三上午 8 点创建 - 文件 3 于周三上午 9 点修改 - 文件 6 已创建
explanation_en: In this scenario, all the files on the server will be backed up on Monday evening during the full backup. The differential backup on Wednesday will then copy all files modified since the last full backup. These include files 1, 2, 3, 5, and 6: a total of five files.
explanation_zh: 在此场景中，全量备份会在周一晚上备份服务器上的所有文件。周三的差异备份将复制自上次完整备份以来修改的所有文件。其中包括文件 1、2、3、5 和 6：总共五个文件。

question_en: Which one of the following security tools is not capable of generating an active response to a security event?
question_zh: 以下哪一项安全工具无法对安全事件生成主动响应？
options_zh: {"A": "IPS", "B": "防火墙", "C": "IDS", "D": "防病毒软件"}
explanation_en: Intrusion detection systems (IDSs) provide only passive responses, such as alerting administrators to a suspected attack. Intrusion prevention systems and firewalls, on the other hand, may take action to block an attack attempt. Antivirus software also may engage in active response by quarantining suspect files.
explanation_zh: 入侵检测系统 (IDS) 仅提供被动响应，例如向管理员发出可疑攻击的警报。另一方面，入侵防御系统和防火墙可能会采取行动阻止攻击企图。防病毒软件还可以通过隔离可疑文件来主动响应。

question_en: Scott is responsible for disposing of disk drives that have been pulled from his company’s SAN as they are retired. Which of the following options should he avoid if the data on the SAN is considered highly sensitive by his organization?
options_en: {"A": "Destroy them physically.", "B": "Sign a contract with the SAN vendor that requires appropriate disposal and provides a certification process.", "C": "Reformat each drive before it leaves the organization.", "D": "Use a secure wipe tool like DBAN."}
question_zh: Scott 负责处理从公司 SAN 中取出的退役磁盘驱动器。如果他的组织认为 SAN 上的数据高度敏感，他应该避免以下哪些选项？
options_zh: {"A": "从物理上消灭他们。", "B": "与 SAN 供应商签订合同，要求进行适当的处​​置并提供认证流程。", "C": "在每个驱动器离开组织之前重新格式化它。", "D": "使用 DBAN 等安全擦除工具。"}
explanation_en: Physical destruction, an appropriate contract with certification, and secure wiping are all reasonable options. In each case, a careful inventory and check should be done to ensure that each drive is handled appropriately. Reformatting drives can leave remnant data, making this a poor data lifecycle choice for drives that contain sensitive data.
explanation_zh: 物理销毁、带有认证的适当合同以及安全擦除都是合理的选择。在每种情况下，都应进行仔细的清点和检查，以确保每个驱动器都得到适当的处理。重新格式化驱动器可能会留下残留数据，对于包含敏感数据的驱动器而言，这不是一个糟糕的数据生命周期选择。

question_en: What term is used to describe the default set of privileges assigned to a user when a new account is created?
question_zh: 什么术语用于描述创建新帐户时分配给用户的默认权限集？
explanation_en: Entitlement refers to the privileges granted to users when an account is first provisioned.
explanation_zh: 权利是指首次配置帐户时授予用户的权限。

question_en: Which one of the following types of agreements is the most formal document that contains expectations about availability and other performance parameters between a service provider and a customer?
options_en: {"A": "Service-level agreement (SLA)", "B": "Operational-level agreement (OLA)", "C": "Memorandum of understanding (MOU)", "D": "Statement of work (SOW)"}
question_zh: 以下哪种类型的协议是最正式的文档，其中包含服务提供商和客户之间对可用性和其他性能参数的期望？
options_zh: {"A": "服务级别协议 (SLA)", "B": "操作级别协议 (OLA)", "C": "谅解备忘录 (MOU)", "D": "工作说明书 (SOW)"}
explanation_en: The service-level agreement (SLA) is between a service provider and a customer and documents in a formal manner expectations around availability, performance, and other parameters. An MOU may cover the same items but is not as formal a document. An OLA is between internal service organizations and does not involve customers. An SOW is an addendum to a contract describing work to be performed.
explanation_zh: 服务级别协议 (SLA) 是服务提供商和客户之间的协议，以正式的方式记录对可用性、性能和其他参数的期望。谅解备忘录可能涵盖相同的项目，但不是正式文件。 OLA是内部服务组织之间的，不涉及客户。 SOW 是描述要执行的工作的合同的附录。

question_en: As the CIO of a large organization, Clara would like to adopt standard processes for managing IT activities. Which one of the following frameworks focuses on IT service management and includes topics such as change management, configuration management, and service-level agreements?
question_zh: 作为大型组织的 CIO，Clara 希望采用标准流程来管理 IT 活动。以下哪一个框架专注于 IT 服务管理并包括变更管理、配置管理和服务级别协议等主题？
options_zh: {"A": "ITIL", "B": "PMBOK", "C": "PCI DSS", "D": "TOGAF"}
explanation_en: The IT Infrastructure Library (ITIL) framework focuses on IT service management. The Project Management Body of Knowledge (PMBOK) provides a common core of project management expertise. The Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard (PCI DSS) contains regulations for credit card security. The Open Group Architecture Framework (TOGAF) focuses on IT architecture issues.
explanation_zh: IT 基础设施库 (ITIL) 框架专注于 IT 服务管理。项目管理知识体系 (PMBOK) 提供了项目管理专业知识的共同核心。支付卡行业数据安全标准 (PCI DSS) 包含信用卡安全法规。 Open Group 架构框架 (TOGAF) 重点关注 IT 架构问题。

question_en: Richard is experiencing issues with the quality of network service on his organization’s network. The primary symptom is that packets are consistently taking too long to travel from their source to their destination. What term describes the issue Richard is facing?
question_zh: Richard 在其组织的网络上遇到网络服务质量问题。主要症状是数据包从源到目的地的传输时间始终过长。什么术语描述了理查德面临的问题？
explanation_en: Latency is a delay in the delivery of packets from their source to their destination. Jitter is a variation in the latency for different packets. Packet loss is the disappearance of packets in transit that requires retransmission. Interference is electrical noise or other disruptions that corrupt the contents of packets.
explanation_zh: 延迟是数据包从源到目的地传输过程中的延迟。抖动是不同数据包的延迟变化。数据包丢失是指数据包在传输过程中消失，需要重新传输。干扰是电噪声或其他破坏数据包内容的干扰。

question_en: Joe wants to test a program he suspects may contain malware. What technology can he use to isolate the program while it runs?
question_zh: Joe 想测试一个他怀疑可能包含恶意软件的程序。他可以使用什么技术来隔离程序运行时的情况？
explanation_en: Running the program in a sandbox provides secure isolation that can prevent the malware from impacting other applications or systems. If Joe uses appropriate instrumentation, he can observe what the program does, what changes it makes, and any communications it may attempt. ASLR is a memory location randomization technology, process isolation keeps processes from impacting each other, but a sandbox typically provides greater utility in a scenario like this since it can be instrumented and managed in a way that better supports investigations, and clipping is a term often used in signal processing.
explanation_zh: 在沙箱中运行程序可提供安全隔离，可防止恶意软件影响其他应用程序或系统。如果乔使用适当的仪器，他可以观察程序的作用、所做的更改以及它可能尝试的任何通信。 ASLR 是一种内存位置随机化技术，进程隔离可防止进程相互影响，但沙箱通常在这种情况下提供更大的实用性，因为它可以以更好支持调查的方式进行检测和管理，而剪辑是信号处理中经常使用的术语。

question_en: Which one of the following is an example of a non-natural disaster?
question_zh: 以下哪一项是非自然灾害的示例？
explanation_en: A transformer explosion is a failure of a human-made electrical component. Flooding, mudslides, and hurricanes are all examples of natural disasters.
explanation_zh: 变压器爆炸是人为电气元件的故障。洪水、泥石流和飓风都是自然灾害的例子。

question_en: Anne wants to gather information about security settings as well as build an overall view of her organization’s assets by gathering data about a group of Windows 10 workstations spread throughout her company. What Windows tool is best suited to this type of configuration management task?
question_zh: Anne 希望收集有关安全设置的信息，并通过收集分布在公司各处的一组 Windows 10 工作站的数据来构建组织资产的整体视图。哪种 Windows 工具最适合此类配置管理任务？
options_zh: {"A": "SCCM", "B": "组策略", "C": "SCOM", "D": "自定义 PowerShell 脚本"}
explanation_en: System Center Configuration Manager (SCCM) provides this capability and is designed to allow administrators to evaluate the configuration status of Windows workstations and servers, as well as providing asset management data. SCOM is primarily used to monitor for health and performance, Group Policy can be used for a variety of tasks including deploying settings and software, and custom PowerShell scripts could do this but should not be required for a configuration check.
explanation_zh: System Center Configuration Manager (SCCM) 提供此功能，旨在允许管理员评估 Windows 工作站和服务器的配置状态，并提供资产管理数据。 SCOM 主要用于监控运行状况和性能，组策略可用于各种任务，包括部署设置和软件，自定义 PowerShell 脚本可以执行此操作，但配置检查不需要。

question_en: Javier is verifying that only IT system administrators have the ability to log on to servers used for administrative purposes. What principle of information security is he enforcing?
question_zh: Javier 正在验证只有 IT 系统管理员才能登录用于管理目的的服务器。他执行什么信息安全原则？
options_zh: {"A": "需要知道", "B": "最小特权", "C": "两人控制", "D": "可传递信任"}
explanation_en: The principle of least privilege says that an individual should only have the privileges necessary to complete their job functions. Removing administrative privileges from nonadministrative users is an example of least privilege.
explanation_zh: 最小特权原则是指个人应该只拥有完成其工作职能所需的特权。删除非管理用户的管理权限是最小权限的一个示例。

question_en: Which one of the following is not a basic preventative measure that you can take to protect your systems and applications against attack?
options_en: {"A": "Implement intrusion detection and prevention systems.", "B": "Maintain current patch levels on all operating systems and applications.", "C": "Remove unnecessary accounts and services.", "D": "Conduct forensic imaging of all systems."}
question_zh: 以下哪一项不是您可以采取的保护系统和应用程序免受攻击的基本预防措施？
options_zh: {"A": "实施入侵检测和预防系统。", "B": "维持所有操作系统和应用程序的当前补丁级别。", "C": "删除不必要的帐户和服务。", "D": "对所有系统进行取证成像。"}
explanation_en: There is no need to conduct forensic imaging as a preventative measure. Rather, forensic imaging should be used during the incident response process. Maintaining patch levels, implementing intrusion detection/prevention, and removing unnecessary services and accounts are all basic preventative measures.
explanation_zh: 无需进行法医成像作为预防措施。相反，应在事件响应过程中使用法医成像。维护补丁级别、实施入侵检测/预防以及删除不必要的服务和帐户都是基本的预防措施。

question_en: Tim is a forensic analyst who is attempting to retrieve information from a hard drive. It appears that the user attempted to erase the data, and Tim is trying to reconstruct it. What type of forensic analysis is Tim performing?
question_zh: Tim 是一名法医分析师，他正在尝试从硬盘驱动器检索信息。看来用户试图删除数据，而蒂姆正在尝试重建它。蒂姆正在执行什么类型的取证分析？
options_zh: {"A": "软件分析", "B": "媒体分析", "C": "嵌入式设备分析", "D": "网络分析"}
explanation_en: The scrutiny of hard drives for forensic purposes is an example of media analysis. Embedded device analysis looks at the computers included in other large systems, such as automobiles or security systems. Software analysis analyzes applications and their logs. Network analysis looks at network traffic and logs.
explanation_zh: 用于取证目的的硬盘驱动器检查就是媒体分析的一个示例。嵌入式设备分析着眼于其他大型系统（例如汽车或安全系统）中包含的计算机。软件分析分析应用程序及其日志。网络分析查看网络流量和日志。

question_en: Which one of the following is an example of a computer security incident? (Select all that apply.)
options_en: {"A": "Failure of a backup to complete properly", "B": "System access recorded in a log", "C": "Unauthorized vulnerability scan of a file server", "D": "Update of antivirus signatures"}
question_zh: 以下哪一项是计算机安全事件的示例？ （选择所有适用项。）
options_zh: {"A": "备份未能正确完成", "B": "记录在日志中的系统访问", "C": "文件服务器的未经授权的漏洞扫描", "D": "更新防病毒签名"}
explanation_en: Security incidents negatively affect the confidentiality, integrity, or availability of information or assets and/or violate a security policy. The unauthorized vulnerability scan of a server does violate security policy and may negatively affect the security of that system, so it qualifies as a security incident. The failure of a backup to complete properly jeopardizes availability and is, therefore, also a security incident. The logging of system access and update of antivirus signatures are all routine actions that do not violate policy or jeopardize security, so they are all events rather than incidents.
explanation_zh: 安全事件对信息或资产的机密性、完整性或可用性产生负面影响和/或违反安全策略。对服务器进行未经授权的漏洞扫描确实违反了安全策略，并可能对该系统的安全性产生负面影响，因此它属于安全事件。备份未能正确完成会危及可用性，因此也是安全事件。记录系统访问和更新防病毒签名都是常规操作，不会违反策略或危害安全，因此它们都是事件而不是事件。

question_en: Roland is a physical security specialist in an organization that has a large amount of expensive lab equipment that often moves around the facility. Which one of the following technologies would provide the most automation of an inventory control process in a cost-effective manner?
question_zh: Roland 是一名物理安全专家，所在组织拥有大量昂贵的实验室设备，这些设备经常在设施内移动。以下哪一项技术能够以经济有效的方式提供库存控制流程的最大自动化？
options_zh: {"A": "IPS", "B": "WiFi", "C": "RFID", "D": "以太网"}
explanation_en: Radio Frequency IDentification (RFID) technology is a cost-effective way to track items around a facility. While WiFi could be used for the same purpose, it would be much more expensive to implement.
explanation_zh: 射频识别 (RFID) 技术是一种经济高效的跟踪设施周围物品的方法。虽然 WiFi 可用于相同目的，但实施起来要昂贵得多。

question_en: Connor’s company recently experienced a denial-of-service attack that Connor believes came from an inside source. If true, what type of event has the company experienced?
question_zh: Connor 的公司最近经历了一次拒绝服务攻击，Connor 认为该攻击来自内部来源。如果属实，该公司经历过什么类型的事件？
options_zh: {"A": "间谍活动", "B": "机密泄露", "C": "破坏", "D": "诚信破坏"}
explanation_en: An attack committed against an organization by an insider, such as an employee, is known as sabotage. Espionage and confidentiality breaches involve the theft of sensitive information, which is not alleged to have occurred in this case. Integrity breaches involve the unauthorized modification of information, which is not described in this scenario.
explanation_zh: 内部人员（例如员工）对组织实施的攻击称为破坏。间谍活动和泄密行为涉及敏感信息被盗，但本案并未据称发生这种情况。完整性破坏涉及未经授权的信息修改，本场景中未对此进行描述。

question_en: Evan detects an attack against a server in his organization and examines the TCP flags on a series of packets, shown in the following diagram. What type of attack most likely took place? SYN SYN/ACK SYN SYN/ACK SYN SYN/ACK Attacker Victim
question_zh: Evan 检测到针对其组织中服务器的攻击，并检查一系列数据包上的 TCP 标志，如下图所示。最有可能发生什么类型的攻击？ SYN SYN/ACK SYN SYN/ACK SYN SYN/ACK 攻击者受害者
options_zh: {"A": "SYN Flood", "B": "Ping Flood", "C": "Smurf", "D": "Fraggle"}
explanation_en: In a SYN flood attack, the attacker sends a large number of SYN packets to a system but does not respond to the SYN/ACK packets, attempting to overwhelm the attacked system’s connection state table with half-open connections.
explanation_zh: 在 SYN Flood 攻击中，攻击者向系统发送大量 SYN 数据包，但不响应 SYN/ACK 数据包，试图淹没被攻击系统的系统。具有半打开连接的连接状态表。

question_en: Florian is building a disaster recovery plan for his organization and would like to determine the amount of time that a particular IT service may be down without causing serious damage to business operations. What variable is Florian calculating?
question_zh: Florian 正在为其组织制定灾难恢复计划，并希望确定特定 IT 服务可以停机多长时间而不会对业务运营造成严重损害。 Florian 正在计算什么变量？
explanation_en: The maximum tolerable downtime (MTD) is the longest amount of time that an IT service or component may be unavailable without causing serious damage to the organization. The recovery time objective (RTO) is the amount of time expected to return an IT service or component to operation after a failure. The recovery point objective (RPO) identifies the maximum amount of data, measured in time, that may be lost during a recovery effort. Service-level agreements (SLAs) are written contracts that document service expectations.
explanation_zh: 最大可容忍停机时间 (MTD) 是 IT 服务或组件不可用而不会对组织造成严重损害的最长时间。恢复时间目标 (RTO) 是 IT 服务或组件在发生故障后恢复运行的预期时间。恢复点目标 (RPO) 确定在恢复工作期间可能丢失的最大数据量（按时间测量）。服务级别协议 (SLA) 是记录服务期望的书面合同。

question_en: Which of the following would normally be classified as zero-day attacks? (Select all that apply.)
options_en: {"A": "An attacker who is new to the world of hacking", "B": "A database attack that places the date 00/00/0000 in data tables in an attempt to exploit flaws in business logic", "C": "An attack previously unknown to the security community", "D": "An attack that sets the operating system date and time to 00/00/0000 and 00:00:00"}
question_zh: 以下哪一项通常被归类为零日攻击？ （选择所有适用项。）
options_zh: {"A": "刚接触黑客世界的攻击者", "B": "将日期 00/00/0000 放入数据表中以试图利用业务逻辑缺陷的数据库攻击", "C": "安全社区以前未知的攻击", "D": "将操作系统日期和时间设置为 00/00/0000 的攻击，并且00:00:00"}
explanation_en: Zero-day attacks are those that are previously unknown to the security community and, therefore, have no available patch. These are especially dangerous attacks because they may be highly effective until a solution becomes available. The other attacks described here are all known attacks and would not be classified as zero-day events.
explanation_zh: 零日攻击是安全社区以前未知的攻击，因此没有可用的补丁。这些是特别危险的攻击，因为在解决方案可用之前它们可能非常有效。这里描述的其他攻击都是已知的攻击，不会被归类为零日事件。

question_en: Grant is collecting records as part of the preparation for a possible lawsuit and is worried that his team may be spending too much time collecting information that may be irrelevant. What concept from the Federal Rules of Civil Procedure (FCRP) helps to ensure that additional time and expense are not incurred as part of electronic discovery when the benefits do not outweigh the costs?
question_zh: 格兰特正在收集记录，作为可能的诉讼准备工作的一部分，他担心他的团队可能会花费太多时间收集可能不相关的信息。当收益不超过成本时，《联邦民事诉讼规则》(FCRP) 中的哪些概念有助于确保作为电子证据开示的一部分不会产生额外的时间和费用？
explanation_en: The benefits of additional discovery must be proportional to the additional costs that they will require. This prevents additional discovery requests from becoming inordinately expensive, and the requester will typically have to justify these requests to the judge presiding over the case.
explanation_zh: 额外发现的好处必须与其所需的额外成本成正比。这可以防止额外的证据开示请求变得异常昂贵，并且请求者通常必须向主持案件的法官证明这些请求的合理性。

question_en: During an incident investigation, investigators meet with a system administrator who may have information about the incident but is not a suspect. What type of conversation is taking place during this meeting?
options_en: {"A": "Interview", "B": "Interrogation", "C": "Both an interview and an interrogation", "D": "Neither an interview nor an interrogation"}
question_zh: 在事件调查期间，调查人员会见系统管理员，该管理员可能掌握有关事件的信息，但不是嫌疑人。这次会议期间正在进行什么类型的对话？
options_zh: {"A": "访谈", "B": "审讯", "C": "访谈和审讯", "D": "既不是访谈也不是审讯"}
explanation_en: Interviews occur when investigators meet with an individual who may have information relevant to their investigation but is not a suspect. If the individual is a suspect, then the meeting is an interrogation.
explanation_zh: 当调查人员会见可能掌握与调查相关的信息但不是嫌疑人的个人时，就会发生访谈。如果此人是嫌疑人，那么这次会面就是一次审讯。

question_en: What technique has been used to protect the intellectual property in the following image?
question_zh: 下图中使用了什么技术来保护知识产权？
explanation_en: The image clearly contains the watermark of the U.S. Geological Survey (USGS), which ensures that anyone seeing the image knows its origin. It is not possible to tell from looking at the image whether steganography was used. Sampling and clipping are data analysis techniques and are not used to protect images.
explanation_zh: 图像清楚地包含美国地质调查局 (USGS) 的水印，这确保任何看到图像的人都知道其来源。从图像中无法判断是否使用了隐写术。采样和裁剪是数据分析技术，不用于保护图像。
