question_en: You are working to evaluate the risk of flood to an area as part of a business continuity planning (BCP) effort. You consult the flood maps from the Federal Emergency Management Agency (FEMA). According to those maps, the area lies within a 200-year flood plain. What is the annualized rate of occurrence (ARO) of a flood in that region?
question_zh: 作为业务连续性规划 (BCP) 工作的一部分，您正在评估某个地区的洪水风险。您查阅了联邦紧急事务管理局 (FEMA) 的洪水地图。根据这些地图，该地区位于 200 年洪泛平原内。该地区洪水的年发生率 (ARO) 是多少？
explanation_en: The annualized rate of occurrence (ARO) is the expected number of times an incident will occur each year. In the case of a 200-year flood plain, planners should expect a flood once every 200 years. This is equivalent to a 1/200 chance of a flood in any given year, or 0.005 floods per year.
explanation_zh: 年化发生率 (ARO) 是每年发生事件的预期次数。对于 200 年一遇的洪泛平原，规划者应该预计每 200 年就会发生一次洪水。这相当于任何一年发生洪水的概率为 1/200，或每年发生 0.005 次洪水。

question_en: Which one of the following individuals poses the greatest risk to security in most welldefended organizations?
question_zh: 在大多数防御严密的组织中，以下哪一位人员对安全构成的风险最大？
options_zh: {"A": "政治活动家", "B": "恶意内部人员", "C": "脚本小子", "D": "刺激攻击者"}
explanation_en: While all hackers with malicious intent pose a risk to the organization, the malicious insider poses the greatest risk to security because they likely have legitimate access to sensitive systems that may be used as a launching point for an attack. Other attackers do not begin with this advantage.
explanation_zh: 虽然所有怀有恶意的黑客都会给组织带来风险，但恶意内部人员对安全造成的风险最大，因为他们可能拥有对敏感系统的合法访问权限，而这些系统可能被用作攻击的发起点。其他攻击者并不是从这个优势开始的。

question_en: Veronica is considering the implementation of a database recovery mechanism recommended by a consultant. In the recommended approach, an automated process will move database backups from the primary facility to an off-site location each night. What type of database recovery technique is the consultant describing?
question_zh: Veronica 正在考虑实施顾问推荐的数据库恢复机制。在推荐的方法中，自动化过程每晚都会将数据库备份从主设施移动到异地位置。顾问描述的是哪种类型的数据库恢复技术？
options_zh: {"A": "远程日记", "B": "远程镜像", "C": "电子保管库", "D": "事务日志记录"}
explanation_en: In an electronic vaulting approach, automated technology moves database backups from the primary database server to a remote site on a scheduled basis, typically daily. Transaction logging is not a recovery technique alone; it is a process for generating the logs used in remote journaling. Remote journaling transfers transaction logs to a remote site on a more frequent basis than electronic vaulting, typically hourly. Remote mirroring maintains a live database server at the backup site and mirrors all transactions at the primary site on the server at the backup site.
explanation_zh: 在电子保管库方法中，自动化技术按计划（通常是每天）将数据库备份从主数据库服务器移动到远程站点。事务日志记录不仅仅是一种恢复技术；它也是一种恢复技术。它是生成远程日志记录中使用的日志的过程。远程日记比电子保管库更频繁地将事务日志传输到远程站点，通常每小时一次。远程镜像在备份站点维护实时数据库服务器，并将主站点的所有事务镜像到备份站点的服务器上。

question_en: When designing an access control scheme, Hilda set up roles so that the same person does not have the ability to provision a new user account and assign superuser privileges to an account. What information security principle is Hilda following?
options_en: {"A": "Least privilege", "B": "Separation of duties", "C": "Job rotation", "D": "Security through obscurity"}
question_zh: 在设计访问控制方案时，Hilda 设置了角色，以便同一个人无法配置新用户帐户并向帐户分配超级用户权限。 Hilda 遵循什么信息安全原则？
options_zh: {"A": "最小权限", "B": "职责分离", "C": "工作轮换", "D": "通过默默无闻的安全性"}
explanation_en: Hilda’s design follows the principle of separation of duties. Giving one user the ability to both create new accounts and grant administrative privileges combines two actions that would result in a significant security change that should be divided among two users.
explanation_zh: Hilda 的设计遵循职责分离的原则。赋予一个用户创建新帐户和授予管理权限的能力结合了两项操作，这将导致重大的安全更改，应在两个用户之间进行分配。

question_en: Patrick was charged with implementing a threat hunting program for his organization. Which one of the following is the basic assumption of a threat hunting program that he should use as he plans his work?
options_en: {"A": "Security controls were designed using a defense-in-depth strategy.", "B": "Audits may uncover control deficiencies.", "C": "Attackers may already be present on the network.", "D": "Defense mechanisms may contain unpatched vulnerabilities."}
question_zh: Patrick 被指控为其组织实施威胁搜寻计划。以下哪一项是他在计划工作时应使用的威胁搜寻程序的基本假设？
options_zh: {"A": "安全控制是使用纵深防御策略设计的。", "B": "审计可能会发现控制缺陷。", "C": "攻击者可能已经存在于网络中。", "D": "防御机制可能包含未修补的漏洞。"}
explanation_en: While all of these assumptions are valid premises that Patrick might have going into the exercise, the basic assumption of a threat hunting exercise is the so-called presumption of compromise. This means that Patrick should assume that attackers have already gained access to his system and then hunt for indicators of their presence.
explanation_zh: 虽然所有这些假设都是帕特里克在演习中可能提出的有效前提，但威胁狩猎演习的基本假设是所谓的妥协假设。这意味着帕特里克应该假设攻击者已经访问了他的系统，然后寻找他们存在的迹象。

question_en: Brian is developing the training program for his organization’s disaster recovery program and would like to make sure that participants understand when disaster activity concludes. Which one of the following events marks the completion of a disaster recovery process?
options_en: {"A": "Securing property and life safety", "B": "Restoring operations in an alternate facility", "C": "Restoring operations in the primary facility", "D": "Standing down first responders"}
question_zh: Brian 正在为其组织的灾难恢复计划制定培训计划，并希望确保参与者了解灾难活动何时结束。以下哪一项事件标志着灾难恢复过程的完成？
options_zh: {"A": "确保财产和生命安全", "B": "恢复备用设施的运营", "C": "恢复主要设施的运营", "D": "让第一响应人员停止工作"}
explanation_en: The end goal of the disaster recovery process is restoring normal business operations in the primary facility. All of the other actions listed may take place during the disaster recovery process, but the process is not complete until the organization is once again functioning normally in its primary facilities.
explanation_zh: 灾难恢复过程的最终目标是恢复主要设施的正常业务运营。列出的所有其他操作都可能在灾难恢复过程中发生，但直到组织在其主要设施中再次正常运行时，该过程才完成。

question_en: Melanie suspects that someone is using malicious software to steal computing cycles from her company. Which one of the following security tools would be in the best position to detect this type of incident?
question_zh: Melanie 怀疑有人正在使用恶意软件窃取她公司的计算周期。以下哪一种安全工具最适合检测此类事件？
options_zh: {"A": "NIDS", "B": "防火墙", "C": "HIDS", "D": "DLP"}
explanation_en: A host-based intrusion detection system (HIDS) may be able to detect unauthorized processes running on a system. The other controls mentioned, network intrusion detection systems (NIDSs), firewalls, and DLP systems, are network-based and may not notice rogue processes.
explanation_zh: 基于主机的入侵检测系统 (HIDS) 可能能够检测系统上运行的未经授权的进程。提到的其他控制措施，网络入侵检测系统 (NIDS)、防火墙和 DLP 系统，都是基于网络的，可能不会注意到恶意进程。

question_en: Brandon observes that an authorized user of a system on his network recently misused his account to exploit a system vulnerability against a shared server that allowed him to gain root access to that server. What type of attack took place?
question_zh: Brandon 观察到，其网络上系统的授权用户最近滥用其帐户，利用共享服务器的系统漏洞，使他能够获得该服务器的 root 访问权限。发生了什么类型的攻击？
options_zh: {"A": "拒绝服务", "B": "权限升级", "C": "侦察", "D": "暴力破解"}
explanation_en: The scenario describes a privilege escalation attack where a malicious insider with authorized access to a system misused that access to gain privileged credentials.
explanation_zh: 该场景描述了一种权限升级攻击，其中具有系统授权访问权限的恶意内部人员滥用该访问权限来获取特权凭据。

question_en: Carla has worked for her company for 15 years and has held a variety of different positions. Each time she changed positions, she gained new privileges associated with that position, but no privileges were ever taken away. What concept describes the sets of privileges she has accumulated?
question_zh: Carla 在她的公司工作了 15 年，担任过各种不同的职位。每次她更换职位时，她都会获得与该职位相关的新特权，但任何特权都不会被剥夺。什么概念描述了她所积累的一系列特权？
explanation_en: Carla’s account has experienced aggregation, where privileges accumulated over time. This condition is also known as privilege creep and likely constitutes a violation of the least privilege principle.
explanation_zh: Carla 的帐户经历了聚合，其中权限随着时间的推移而累积。这种情况也称为特权蔓延，可能违反了最小特权原则。

question_en: During what phase of the incident response process do administrators take action to limit the effect or scope of an incident?
options_en: {"A": "Detection", "B": "Response", "C": "Mitigation", "D": "Recovery For questions 63–66, please refer to the following scenario: Ann is a security professional for a midsize business and typically handles log analysis and security monitoring tasks for her organization. One of her roles is to monitor alerts originating from the organization’s intrusion detection system. The system typically generates several dozen alerts each day, and many of those alerts turn out to be false alarms after her investigation. This morning, the intrusion detection system alerted because the network began to receive an unusually high volume of inbound traffic. Ann received this alert and began looking into the origin of the traffic."}
question_zh: 管理员在事件响应流程的哪个阶段采取行动来限制事件的影响或范围？
options_zh: {"A": "检测", "B": "响应", "C": "缓解", "D": "恢复 对于问题 63-66，请参考以下场景： Ann 是一家中型企业的安全专业人员，通常为其组织处理日志分析和安全监控任务。她的职责之一是监控来自组织入侵检测系统的警报。该系统通常每天会生成数十个警报，而在她的调查后，其中许多警报被证明是误报。今天早上，入侵检测系统发出警报，因为网络开始接收异常大量的入站流量。安收到此警报并开始调查流量的来源。"}
explanation_en: The mitigation phase of incident response focuses on actions that can contain the damage incurred during an incident. This includes limiting the scope and or effectiveness of the incident. The detection phase identifies that an incident is taking place. The response phase includes steps taken to assemble a team and triage the incident. The recovery phase resumes normal operations.
explanation_zh: 事件响应的缓解阶段重点关注可以遏制事件期间造成的损害的行动。这包括限制事件的范围和/或有效性。检测阶段确定事件正在发生。响应阶段包括组建团队并对事件进行分类所采取的步骤。恢复阶段恢复正常操作。

question_en: At this point in the incident response process, what term best describes what has occurred in Ann’s organization?
question_zh: 在事件响应流程的这一点上，哪个术语最能描述 Ann 组织中发生的情况？
options_zh: {"A": "安全事件", "B": "安全事件", "C": "安全事件", "D": "安全入侵"}
explanation_en: At this point in the process, Ann has no reason to believe that any actual security compromise or policy violation took place, so this situation does not meet the criteria for a security incident or intrusion. Rather, the alert generated by the intrusion detection system is simply a security event requiring further investigation. Security occurrence is not a term commonly used in incident handling.
explanation_zh: 在此过程中，Ann 没有理由相信发生了任何实际的安全危害或策略违规，因此这种情况不符合安全事件或入侵的标准。相反，入侵检测系统生成的警报只是需要进一步调查的安全事件。安全事件并不是事件处理中常用的术语。

question_en: Ann continues her investigation and realizes that the traffic generating the alert is abnormally high volumes of inbound UDP traffic on port 53. What service typically uses this port?
question_zh: Ann 继续调查并意识到生成警报的流量是端口 53 上异常大量的入站 UDP 流量。什么服务通常使用此端口？
options_zh: {"A": "DNS", "B": "SSH/SCP", "C": "SSL/TLS", "D": "HTTP"}
explanation_en: DNS traffic commonly uses port 53 for both TCP and UDP communications. SSH and SCP use TCP port 22. SSL and TLS do not have ports assigned to them but are commonly used for HTTPS traffic on port 443. Unencrypted web traffic over HTTP often uses port 80.
explanation_zh: DNS 流量通常使用端口 53 进行 TCP 和 UDP 通信。 SSH 和 SCP 使用 TCP 端口 22。SSL 和 TLS 没有分配端口，但通常用于端口 443 上的 HTTPS 流量。通过 HTTP 的未加密 Web 流量通常使用端口 80。

question_en: As Ann analyzes the traffic further, she realizes that the traffic is coming from many different sources and has overwhelmed the network, preventing legitimate uses. The inbound packets are responses to queries that she does not see in outbound traffic. The responses are abnormally large for their type. What type of attack should Ann suspect?
question_zh: 当 Ann 进一步分析流量时，她意识到流量来自许多不同的来源，并且已经使网络不堪重负，从而阻止了合法使用。入站数据包是对她在出站流量中未看到的查询的响应。就其类型而言，响应异常大。安应该怀疑什么类型的攻击？
options_zh: {"A": "侦察", "B": "恶意代码", "C": "系统渗透", "D": "拒绝服务"}
explanation_en: The attack described in this scenario has all the hallmarks of a denial-of-service attack. More specifically, Ann’s organization is likely experiencing a DNS amplification attack where an attacker sends false requests to third-party DNS servers with a forged source IP address belonging to the targeted system. Because the attack uses UDP requests, there is no three-way handshake. The attack packets are carefully crafted to elicit a lengthy response from a short query. The purpose of these queries is to generate responses headed to the target system that are sufficiently large and numerous enough to overwhelm the targeted network or system.
explanation_zh: 此场景中描述的攻击具有拒绝服务攻击的所有特征。更具体地说，Ann 的组织可能正在经历 DNS 放大攻击，攻击者使用属于目标系统的伪造源 IP 地址向第三方 DNS 服务器发送虚假请求。由于攻击使用UDP请求，因此没有三向握手。攻击数据包经过精心设计，可以从简短的查询中引发冗长的响应。这些查询的目的是生成前往目标系统的响应，这些响应足够大且数量足够足以淹没目标网络或系统。

question_en: Now that Ann understands that an attack has taken place that violates her organization’s security policy, what term best describes what has occurred in Ann’s organization?
question_zh: 既然 Ann 了解到发生了违反其组织安全策略的攻击，那么什么术语最能描述 Ann 组织中发生的情况？
options_zh: {"A": "安全事件", "B": "安全事件", "C": "安全事件", "D": "安全入侵"}
explanation_en: Now that Ann suspects an attack against her organization, she has sufficient evidence to declare a security incident. The attack underway seems to have undermined the availability of her network, meeting one of the criteria for a security incident. This is an escalation beyond a security event but does not reach the level of an intrusion because there is no evidence that the attacker has even attempted to gain access to systems on Ann’s network. Security occurrence is not a term commonly used in incident handling.
explanation_zh: 现在 Ann 怀疑她的组织受到攻击，她有足够的证据来宣布安全事件。正在进行的攻击似乎破坏了她的网络的可用性，满足安全事件的标准之一。这是超出安全事件范围的升级，但并未达到入侵级别，因为没有证据表明攻击者甚至试图访问 Ann 网络上的系统。安全事件并不是事件处理中常用的术语。

question_en: Frank is seeking to introduce a hacker’s laptop in court as evidence against the hacker. The laptop does contain logs that indicate the hacker committed the crime, but the court ruled that the search of the apartment that resulted in police finding the laptop was unconstitutional. What admissibility criteria prevents Frank from introducing the laptop as evidence?
question_zh: 弗兰克正在法庭上寻求提供黑客的笔记本电脑作为针对黑客的证据。该笔记本电脑确实包含表明黑客实施犯罪的日志，但法院裁定，警方搜查公寓并发现笔记本电脑的行为违反宪法。哪些可接受标准阻止弗兰克提出笔记本电脑作为证据？
explanation_en: To be admissible, evidence must be relevant, material, and competent. The laptop in this case is clearly material because it contains logs related to the crime in question. It is also relevant because it provides evidence that ties the hacker to the crime. It is not competent because the evidence was not legally obtained.
explanation_zh: 要被采纳，证据必须是相关的、实质性的和有能力的。本案中的笔记本电脑显然是重要的，因为它包含与所涉犯罪相关的日志。它还具有相关性，因为它提供了将黑客与犯罪联系起来的证据。由于证据不是合法取得的，所以不具有管辖权。

question_en: Gordon suspects that a hacker has penetrated a system belonging to his company. The system does not contain any regulated information, and Gordon wants to conduct an investigation on behalf of his company. He has permission from his supervisor to conduct the investigation. Which of the following statements is true?
options_en: {"A": "Gordon is legally required to contact law enforcement before beginning the investigation.", "B": "Gordon may not conduct his own investigation.", "C": "Gordon’s investigation may include examining the contents of hard disks, network traffic, and any other systems or information belonging to the company.", "D": "Gordon may ethically perform “hack back” activities after identifying the perpetrator."}
question_zh: Gordon 怀疑黑客已经侵入了属于他公司的系统。该系统不包含任何受监管的信息，戈登希望代表他的公司进行调查。他已获得主管的许可进行调查。以下哪项陈述是正确的？
options_zh: {"A": "根据法律要求，戈登在开始调查之前必须联系执法部门。", "B": "戈登不得自行进行调查。", "C": "戈登的调查可能包括检查硬盘内容、网络流量以及属于公司的任何其他系统或信息。", "D": "戈登在识别肇事者后可能会合乎道德地执行“黑客反击”活动。"}
explanation_en: Gordon may conduct his investigation as he wishes and use any information that is legally available to him, including information and systems belonging to his employer. There is no obligation to contact law enforcement. However, Gordon may not perform “hack back” activities because those may constitute violations of the law and/or (ISC)2 Code of Ethics.
explanation_zh: 戈登可以按照自己的意愿进行调查，并使用他合法获得的任何信息，包括属于其雇主的信息和系统。没有义务联系执法部门。但是，Gordon 不得执行“黑客攻击”活动，因为这些活动可能违反法律和/或 (ISC)2 道德准则。

question_en: Which one of the following tools provides an organization with the greatest level of protection against a software vendor going out of business?
options_en: {"A": "Service-level agreement", "B": "Escrow agreement", "C": "Mutual assistance agreement", "D": "PCI DSS compliance agreement"}
question_zh: 以下哪一种工具可以为组织提供最高级别的保护，防止软件供应商倒闭？
options_zh: {"A": "服务级别协议", "B": "托管协议", "C": "互助协议", "D": "PCI DSS 合规协议"}
explanation_en: Software escrow agreements place a copy of the source code for a software package in the hands of an independent third party who will turn the code over to the customer if the vendor ceases business operations. Service-level agreements, mutual assistance agreements, and compliance agreements all lose some or all of their effectiveness if the vendor goes out of business.
explanation_zh: 软件托管协议将软件包源代码的副本置于独立第三方手中，如果供应商停止业务运营，该第三方会将代码移交给客户。如果供应商停业，服务级别协议、互助协议和合规协议都会失去部分或全部效力。

question_en: Fran is considering new human resources policies for her bank that will deter fraud. She plans to implement a mandatory vacation policy. What is typically considered the shortest effective length of a mandatory vacation?
question_zh: Fran 正在考虑为她的银行制定新的人力资源政策，以阻止欺诈。她计划实施强制休假政策。通常认为强制休假的最短有效长度是多少？
explanation_en: Most security professionals recommend at least one, and preferably two, weeks of vacation to deter fraud. The idea is that fraudulent schemes will be uncovered during the time that the employee is away and does not have the access required to perpetuate a cover-up.
explanation_zh: 大多数安全专业人员建议至少休假一周，最好是两周，以防止欺诈。这个想法是，在员工离开并且没有永久掩盖真相所需的访问权限期间，欺诈计划将被揭露。

question_en: Which of the following events would constitute a security incident? (Select all that apply.)
options_en: {"A": "An attempted network intrusion", "B": "A successful database intrusion", "C": "A malware infection", "D": "A successful attempt to access a file", "E": "A violation of a confidentiality policy", "F": "An unsuccessful attempt to remove information from a secured area"}
question_zh: 以下哪些事件会构成安全事件？ （选择所有适用项。）
options_zh: {"A": "企图网络入侵", "B": "成功的数据库入侵", "C": "恶意软件感染", "D": "成功尝试访问文件", "E": "违反保密策略", "F": "从安全区域删除信息的不成功尝试"}
explanation_en: Any attempt to undermine the security of an organization or violation of a security policy is a security incident. All of the events described meet this definition and should be treated as an incident, with one exception. A successful attempt to access a file is certainly a security event, but it is not a security incident unless it is established that the individual accessing the file was not authorized to do so.
explanation_zh: 任何破坏组织安全的尝试或违规行为安全策略的定义是安全事件。所描述的所有事件均符合此定义，应被视为事件，但有一个例外。成功尝试访问文件当然是安全事件，但它不是安全事件，除非确定访问该文件的个人未经授权。

question_en: Amanda is configuring her organization’s firewall to implement egress filtering. Which one of the following traffic types should not be blocked by her organization’s egress filtering policy? (Select all that apply.)
options_en: {"A": "Traffic rapidly scanning many IP addresses on port 22", "B": "Traffic with a broadcast destination", "C": "Traffic with a source address from an external network", "D": "Traffic with a destination address on an external network"}
question_zh: Amanda 正在配置其组织的防火墙以实施出口过滤。以下哪一种流量类型不应被其组织的出口过滤策略阻止？ （选择所有适用项。）
options_zh: {"A": "快速扫描端口 22 上的多个 IP 地址的流量", "B": "具有广播目标的流量", "C": "具有来自外部网络的源地址的流量", "D": "具有外部网络上的目标地址的流量"}
explanation_en: Egress filtering scans outbound traffic for potential security policy violations. This includes traffic that is likely malicious, such as an outbound SSH scan on port 22. It also includes traffic that appears to be part of an attack or misconfiguration, such as sending traffic to a broadcast destination address. Finally, it includes spoofed traffic generated by internal systems, which may bear a source address from an external network. The normal traffic that the firewall should expect to see is that bearing a destination address on an external network.
explanation_zh: 出口过滤扫描出站流量是否存在潜在的安全策略违规。这包括可能是恶意的流量，例如端口 22 上的出站 SSH 扫描。还包括看似攻击或错误配置的流量，例如将流量发送到广播目标地址。最后，它包括内部系统生成的欺骗流量，这些流量可能带有来自外部网络的源地址。防火墙应该看到的正常流量是带有外部网络上的目标地址的流量。

question_en: Allie is responsible for reviewing authentication logs on her organization’s network. She does not have the time to review all logs, so she decides to choose only records where there have been four or more invalid authentication attempts. What technique is Allie using to reduce the size of the pool?
question_zh: Allie 负责审查其组织网络上的身份验证日志。她没有时间查看所有日志，因此她决定仅选择有四次或更多无效身份验证尝试的记录。艾莉使用什么技术来减小池的大小？
explanation_en: The two main methods of choosing records from a large pool for further analysis are sampling and clipping. Sampling uses statistical techniques to choose a sample that is representative of the entire pool, while clipping uses threshold values to select those records that exceed a predefined threshold because they may be of most interest to analysts.
explanation_zh: 从大池中选择记录进行进一步分析的两种主要方法是抽样和裁剪。抽样使用统计技术来选择代表整个池的样本，而裁剪使用阈值来选择那些超过预定义阈值的记录，因为它们可能是分析师最感兴趣的。

question_en: You are performing an investigation into a potential bot infection on your network and want to perform a forensic analysis of the information that passed between different systems on your network and those on the internet. You believe that the information was likely encrypted. You are beginning your investigation after the activity concluded. What would be the best and easiest way to obtain the source of this information?
options_en: {"A": "Packet captures", "B": "NetFlow data", "C": "Intrusion detection system logs", "D": "Centralized authentication records"}
question_zh: 您正在对网络上潜在的机器人感染进行调查，并希望对网络上的不同系统和互联网上的系统之间传递的信息进行取证分析。您认为该信息可能已加密。活动结束后您将开始调查。获取此信息来源的最佳和最简单的方法是什么？
options_zh: {"A": "数据包捕获", "B": "NetFlow 数据", "C": "入侵检测系统日志", "D": "集中身份验证记录"}
explanation_en: NetFlow data contains information on the source, destination, and size of all network communications and is routinely saved as a matter of normal activity. Packet capture data would provide relevant information, but it must be captured during the suspicious activity and cannot be re-created after the fact unless the organization is already conducting 100 percent packet capture, which is rare. Additionally, the use of encryption limits the effectiveness of packet capture. Intrusion detection system logs would not likely contain relevant information because the encrypted traffic would probably not match intrusion signatures. Centralized authentication records would not contain information about network traffic.
explanation_zh: NetFlow 数据包含有关所有网络通信的源、目标和大小的信息，并作为正常活动定期保存。数据包捕获数据将提供相关信息，但必须在可疑活动期间捕获，并且无法在事后重新创建，除非组织已经进行 100% 的数据包捕获（这种情况很少见）。此外，加密的使用限制了数据包捕获的有效性。入侵检测系统日志不太可能包含相关信息，因为加密流量可能与入侵签名不匹配。集中式身份验证记录不会包含有关网络流量的信息。

question_en: Which one of the following tools helps system administrators by providing a standard, secure template of configuration settings for operating systems and applications?
question_zh: 以下哪一个工具可以通过为操作系统和应用程序提供标准、安全的配置设置模板来帮助系统管理员？
options_zh: {"A": "安全指南", "B": "安全策略", "C": "基线配置", "D": "运行配置"}
explanation_en: Baseline configurations serve as the starting point for configuring secure systems and applications. They contain the security settings necessary to comply with an organization’s security policy and may then be customized to meet the specific needs of an implementation. While security policies and guidelines may contain information needed to secure a system, they do not contain a set of configuration settings that may be applied to a system. The running configuration of a system is the set of currently applied settings, which may or may not be secure. In this case, Allie is only selecting records that exceed an invalid login threshold, making this an example of clipping. She is not using statistical techniques to select a subset of records, so this is not an example of sampling.
explanation_zh: 基线配置是配置安全系统和应用程序的起点。它们包含遵守组织安全策略所需的安全设置，然后可以进行自定义以满足实施的特定需求。虽然安全策略和指南可能包含保护系统所需的信息，但它们不包含一组可应用于系统的配置设置。系统的运行配置是当前应用的设置的集合，它可能安全也可能不安全。在本例中，Allie 仅选择超过无效登录阈值的记录，这就是剪辑的示例。她没有使用统计技术来选择记录子集，因此这不是抽样示例。

question_en: What type of disaster recovery test activates the alternate processing facility and uses it to conduct transactions but leaves the primary site up and running?
question_zh: 什么类型的灾难恢复测试会激活备用处理设施并使用它来执行事务，但保持主站点正常运行？
options_zh: {"A": "全中断测试", "B": "并行测试", "C": "检查清单审查", "D": "桌面练习"}
explanation_en: During a parallel test, the team actually activates the disaster recovery site for testing, but the primary site remains operational. During a full interruption test, the team takes down the primary site and confirms that the disaster recovery site is capable of handling regular operations. The full interruption test is the most thorough test but also the most disruptive. The checklist review is the least disruptive type of disaster recovery test. During a checklist review, team members each review the contents of their disaster recovery checklists on their own and suggest any necessary changes. During a tabletop exercise, team members come together and walk through a scenario without making any changes to information systems.
explanation_zh: 在并行测试过程中，团队实际上激活了灾难恢复站点进行测试，但主站点仍保持运行。在全面中断测试期间，团队关闭主站点并确认灾难恢复站点能够处理常规操作。完全中断测试是最彻底的测试，但也是最具破坏性的。检查表审查是灾难恢复测试中破坏性最小的类型。在检查清单审查期间，团队成员各自审查其灾难恢复检查清单的内容并提出任何必要的更改建议。在桌面练习期间，团队成员聚集在一起并演练场景，而不对信息系统进行任何更改。

question_en: During which phase of the incident response process would an analyst receive an intrusion detection system alert and verify its accuracy?
question_zh: 在事件响应过程的哪个阶段，分析师会收到入侵检测系统警报并验证其准确性？
explanation_en: Both the receipt of alerts and the verification of their accuracy occur during the Detection phase of the incident response process.
explanation_zh: 警报的接收及其准确性的验证都发生在事件响应过程的检测阶段。

question_en: Kevin is developing a continuous security monitoring strategy for his organization. Which one of the following is not normally used when determining assessment and monitoring frequency?
options_en: {"A": "Threat intelligence", "B": "System categorization/impact level", "C": "Security control operational burden", "D": "Organizational risk tolerance"}
question_zh: Kevin 正在为其组织制定持续安全监控策略。在确定评估和监测频率时通常不使用以下哪一项？
options_zh: {"A": "威胁情报", "B": "系统分类/影响级别", "C": "安全控制操作负担", "D": "组织风险承受能力"}
explanation_en: According to NIST SP 800-137, organizations should use the following factors to determine assessment and monitoring frequency: security control volatility, system categorizations/impact levels, security controls or specific assessment objects providing critical functions, security controls with identified weaknesses, organizational risk tolerance, threat information, vulnerability information, risk assessment results, the output of monitoring strategy reviews, and reporting requirements.
explanation_zh: 根据 NIST SP 800-137，组织应使用以下因素来确定评估和监控频率：安全控制波动性、系统分类/影响级别、安全控制或提供关键功能的特定评估对象、已识别的安全控制弱点、组织风险承受能力、威胁信息、脆弱性信息、风险评估结果、监控策略审查的输出和报告要求。

question_en: Hunter is reviewing his organization’s monitoring strategy and identifying new technologies that they might deploy. His assessment reveals that the firm is not doing enough to monitor employee activity on endpoint devices. Which one of the following technologies would best meet his needs?
question_zh: Hunter 正在审查其组织的监控策略并确定他们可能部署的新技术。他的评估表明，该公司在监控员工在端点设备上的活动方面做得不够。以下哪一项技术最能满足他的需求？
options_zh: {"A": "EDR", "B": "IPS", "C": "IDS", "D": "UEBA"}
explanation_en: All of these technologies have the potential to monitor user behavior on endpoint devices. The key to answering this question correctly is realizing the emphasis on the user. Intrusion detection and prevention systems (IDSs/IPSs) focus on network and host behavior. Endpoint detection and response (EDR) systems focus on endpoint devices. User and entity behavior analytics (UEBA) solutions focus on the user and, therefore, would be the best way to meet Hunter’s requirement.
explanation_zh: 所有这些技术都有可能监控端点设备上的用户行为。正确回答这个问题的关键是认识到对用户的重视。入侵检测和防御系统 (IDS/IPS) 重点关注网络和主机行为。端点检测和响应 (EDR) 系统专注于端点设备。用户和实体行为分析 (UEBA) 解决方案以用户为中心，因此将是满足 Hunter 要求的最佳方式。

question_en: Bruce is seeing quite a bit of suspicious activity on his network. After consulting records in his SIEM, it appears that an outside entity is attempting to connect to all of his systems using a TCP connection on port 22. What type of scanning is the outsider likely engaging in?
question_zh: Bruce 在他的网络上发现了大量可疑活动。在查阅他的 SIEM 中的记录后，发现外部实体似乎正在尝试使用端口 22 上的 TCP 连接来连接到他的所有系统。外部实体可能会进行什么类型的扫描？
options_zh: {"A": "FTP 扫描", "B": "Telnet 扫描", "C": "SSH 扫描", "D": "HTTP 扫描"}
explanation_en: SSH uses TCP port 22, so this attack is likely an attempt to scan for open or weakly secured SSH servers. FTP uses ports 20 and 21. Telnet uses port 23, and HTTP uses port 80.
explanation_zh: SSH 使用 TCP 端口 22，因此此攻击很可能是尝试扫描开放或安全性较弱的 SSH 服务器。 FTP 使用端口 20 和 21。Telnet 使用端口 23，HTTP 使用端口 80。

question_en: Dylan believes that a database server in his environment was compromised using a SQL injection attack. Which one of the following actions would Dylan most likely take during the remediation phase of the attack?
options_en: {"A": "Rebuilding the database from backups", "B": "Adding input validation to a web application", "C": "Reviewing firewall logs", "D": "Reviewing database logs"}
question_zh: Dylan 认为他的环境中的数据库服务器因 SQL 注入攻击而受到损害。在攻击的补救阶段，迪伦最有可能采取以下哪一项行动？
options_zh: {"A": "从备份重建数据库", "B": "向 Web 应用程序添加输入验证", "C": "查看防火墙日志", "D": "查看数据库日志"}
explanation_en: Remediation activities seek to address the issue that caused the incident. In this case, that was a web application that was open to SQL injection attack. Adding input validation seeks to remediate this vulnerability. Rebuilding the database is a recovery action, while reviewing logs is done as part of the detection and response effort.
explanation_zh: 修复活动旨在解决导致事件的问题。在本例中，这是一个容易受到 SQL 注入攻击的 Web 应用程序。添加输入验证旨在修复此漏洞。重建数据库是一种恢复操作，而检查日志是作为检测和响应工作的一部分完成的。

question_en: Roger recently accepted a new position as a security professional at a company that runs its entire IT infrastructure within an IaaS environment. Which one of the following would most likely be the responsibility of Roger’s firm?
options_en: {"A": "Configuring the network firewall", "B": "Applying hypervisor updates", "C": "Patching operating systems", "D": "Wiping drives prior to disposal"}
question_zh: Roger 最近接受了一家新职位，担任安全专业人员，该公司在 IaaS 环境中运行整个 IT 基础设施。以下哪一项最有可能是罗杰公司的责任？
options_zh: {"A": "配置网络防火墙", "B": "应用虚拟机管理程序更新", "C": "修补操作系统", "D": "在处置前擦除驱动器"}
explanation_en: In an infrastructure as a service environment, the vendor is responsible for hardwareand network-related responsibilities. These include configuring network firewalls, maintaining the hypervisor, and managing physical equipment. The customer retains responsibility for patching operating systems on its virtual machine instances.
explanation_zh: 在基础设施即服务环境中，供应商负责与硬件和网络相关的责任。其中包括配置网络防火墙、维护虚拟机管理程序和管理物理设备。客户保留对其虚拟机实例上的操作系统进行修补的责任。

question_en: What technique can application developers use to test applications in an isolated virtualized environment before allowing them on a production network?
question_zh: 应用程序开发人员可以使用什么技术在隔离的虚拟化环境中测试应用程序，然后再允许它们进入生产网络？
options_zh: {"A": "渗透测试", "B": "沙盒", "C": "白盒测试", "D": "黑盒测试"}
explanation_en: Sandboxing is a technique where application developers (or the recipients of an untrusted application) may test the code in a virtualized environment that is isolated from production systems. White-box testing, black-box testing, and penetration testing are all common software testing techniques but do not require the use of an isolated system.
explanation_zh: 沙盒是一种技术，应用程序开发人员（或不受信任的应用程序的接收者）可以在与生产系统隔离的虚拟化环境中测试代码。白盒测试、黑盒测试和渗透测试都是常见的软件测试技术，但不需要使用隔离的系统。

question_en: Gina is the firewall administrator for a small business and recently installed a new firewall. After seeing signs of unusually heavy network traffic, she checked the intrusion detection system, which reported that a SYN flood attack was underway. What firewall configuration change can Gina make to most effectively prevent this attack?
options_en: {"A": "Block SYN from known IPs.", "B": "Block SYN from unknown IPs.", "C": "Enable SYN-ACK spoofing at the firewall.", "D": "Disable TCP."}
question_zh: Gina 是一家小型企业的防火墙管理员，最近安装了新防火墙。在看到异常繁忙的网络流量的迹象后，她检查了入侵检测系统，该系统报告正在进行 SYN 洪水攻击。 Gina 可以对防火墙配置进行哪些更改才能最有效地防止这种攻击？
options_zh: {"A": "阻止来自已知 IP 的 SYN。", "B": "阻止来自未知 IP 的 SYN。", "C": "在防火墙上启用 SYN-ACK 欺骗。", "D": "禁用 TCP。"}
explanation_en: While it may not immediately seem like the obvious answer, many firewalls have a built-in anti–SYN flood defense that responds to SYNs on behalf of protected systems. Once the remote system proves to be a legitimate connection by continuing the three-way handshake, the rest of the TCP session is passed through. If the connection proves to be an attack, the firewall handles the additional load using appropriate mitigation techniques. Blocking SYNs from known or unknown IP addresses is likely to cause issues with systems that should be able to connect, and turning off TCP will break most modern network services!
explanation_zh: 虽然这可能不是立即看起来明显的答案，但许多防火墙都有内置的防 SYN 洪水防御，可以代表受保护的系统响应 SYN。一旦远程系统通过继续三向握手证明是合法连接，TCP 会话的其余部分就会通过。如果连接被证明是攻击，防火墙会使用适当的缓解技术来处理额外的负载。阻止来自已知或未知 IP 地址的 SYN 可能会导致应该能够连接的系统出现问题，而关闭 TCP 将破坏大多数现代网络服务！

question_en: Nancy is leading an effort to modernize her organization’s antimalware protection and would like to add endpoint detection and response (EDR) capabilities. Which of the following actions are normally supported by EDR systems? (Select all that apply.)
options_en: {"A": "Analyzing endpoint memory, filesystem, and network activity for signs of malicious activity", "B": "Automatically isolating possible malicious activity to contain the potential damage", "C": "Conducting simulated phishing campaigns", "D": "Integration with threat intelligence sources"}
question_zh: Nancy 正在领导一项对其组织的反恶意软件保护进行现代化改造的工作，并希望添加端点检测和响应 (EDR) 功能。 EDR 系统通常支持以下哪些操作？ （选择所有适用项。）
options_zh: {"A": "分析端点内存、文件系统和网络活动以查找恶意活动迹象", "B": "自动隔离可能的恶意活动以遏制潜在损害", "C": "进行模拟网络钓鱼活动", "D": "与威胁情报源集成"}
explanation_en: EDR platforms do not conduct simulated phishing campaigns. The most common features of EDR systems are analyzing endpoint memory, filesystem, and network activity for signs of malicious activity; isolating possible malicious activity to contain the potential damage; integrating with threat intelligence sources; and integrating with other incident response mechanisms.
explanation_zh: EDR 平台不进行模拟网络钓鱼活动。 EDR 系统最常见的功能是分析端点内存、文件系统和网络活动以查找恶意活动的迹象；隔离可能的恶意活动以遏制潜在的损害；与威胁情报源集成；并与其他事件响应机制集成。

question_en: Alan is assessing the potential for using machine learning and artificial intelligence in his cybersecurity program. Which of the following activities is most likely to benefit from this technology?
question_zh: 艾伦正在评估在他的网络安全计划中使用机器学习和人工智能的潜力。以下哪项活动最有可能从这项技术中受益？
options_zh: {"A": "入侵检测", "B": "帐户配置", "C": "防火墙规则修改", "D": "媒体清理"}
explanation_en: While any cybersecurity activity has the potential to benefit from machine learning and artificial intelligence capabilities, this technology really shines when used for pattern detection and anomaly detection problems. This is the type of activity performed by an intrusion detection system, and, therefore, this system would benefit the most from the use of ML/AI technology.
explanation_zh: 虽然任何网络安全活动都有可能受益于机器学习和人工智能功能，但该技术在用于模式检测和异常检测问题时确实表现出色。这是入侵检测系统执行的活动类型，因此，该系统将从 ML/AI 技术的使用中受益最多。

question_en: Timber Industries recently got into a dispute with a customer. During a meeting with his account representative, the customer stood up and declared, “There is no other solution. We will have to take this matter to court.” He then left the room. When does Timber Industries have an obligation to begin preserving evidence?
options_en: {"A": "Immediately", "B": "Upon receipt of a notice of litigation from opposing attorneys", "C": "Upon receipt of a subpoena", "D": "Upon receipt of a court order"}
question_zh: Timber Industries 最近与一位客户发生了纠纷。在与客户代表会面时，客户站起来宣称：“没有其他解决方案。我们只能将此事告上法庭。”然后他离开了房间。木材工业何时有义务开始保存证据？
options_zh: {"A": "立即", "B": "收到对方律师的诉讼通知后", "C": "收到传票后", "D": "收到法院命令后"}
explanation_en: Companies have an obligation to preserve evidence whenever they believe that the threat of litigation is imminent. The statement made by this customer that “we will have to take this matter to court” is a clear threat of litigation and should trigger the preservation of any related documents and records.
explanation_zh: 当公司认为诉讼威胁迫在眉睫时，公司有义务保留证据。该客户发表的“我们将不得不将此事告上法庭”的声明是明显的诉讼威胁，应触发保存任何相关文件和记录。

question_en: Candace is designing a backup strategy for her organization’s file server. She would like to perform a backup every weekday that has the smallest possible storage footprint. What type of backup should she perform?
question_zh: Candace 正在为其组织的文件服务器设计备份策略。她希望每个工作日执行一次备份，并尽可能减少存储空间。她应该执行什么类型的备份？
options_zh: {"A": "增量备份", "B": "全量备份", "C": "差异备份", "D": "事务日志备份"}
explanation_en: Incremental backups provide the option that includes the smallest amount of data. In this case, that would be only the data modified since the most recent incremental backup. A differential backup would back up all data modified since the last full backup, which would be a substantial amount. The full backup would include all information on the server. Transaction log backups are specifically designed to support database servers and would not be effective on a file server.
explanation_zh: 增量备份提供包含最小数据量的选项。在这种情况下，这只是自最近增量备份以来修改的数据。差异备份将备份自上次完整备份以来修改的所有数据，这将是一个很大的数量。完整备份将包括服务器上的所有信息。事务日志备份是专门为支持数据库服务器而设计的，在文件服务器上无效。

question_en: Darcy is a computer security specialist who is assisting with the prosecution of a hacker. The prosecutor requests that Darcy give testimony in court about whether, in her opinion, the logs and other records in a case are indicative of a hacking attempt. What type of evidence is Darcy being asked to provide?
question_zh: 达西是一名计算机安全专家，正在协助起诉一名黑客。检察官要求达西在法庭上作证，证明她认为案件中的日志和其他记录是否表明存在黑客企图。达西被要求提供什么类型的证据？
options_zh: {"A": "专家意见", "B": "直接证据", "C": "真实证据", "D": "文件证据"}
explanation_en: Expert opinion evidence allows individuals to offer their opinion based upon the facts in evidence and their personal knowledge. Expert opinion evidence may be offered only if the court accepts the witness as an expert in a particular field. Direct evidence is when witnesses testify about their direct observations. Real evidence consists of tangible items brought into court as evidence. Documentary evidence consists of written records used as evidence in court.
explanation_zh: 专家意见证据允许个人根据证据事实和个人知识提出意见。仅当法庭接受证人为特定领域的专家时，才可以提供专家意见证据。直接证据是指证人就其直接观察结果作证。真正的证据包括作为证据带到法庭的有形物品。文件证据包括在法庭上用作证据的书面记录。

question_en: Which one of the following techniques is not commonly used to remove unwanted remnant data from magnetic tapes?
question_zh: 以下哪一项技术不常用于从磁带中删除不需要的残留数据？
options_zh: {"A": "物理破坏", "B": "消磁", "C": "覆盖", "D": "重新格式化"}
explanation_en: The standard methods for clearing magnetic tapes, according to the NIST Guidelines for Media Sanitization, are overwriting the tape with nonsensitive data, degaussing, and physical destruction via shredding or incineration. Reformatting a tape does not remove remnant data.
explanation_zh: 根据 NIST 介质清理指南，清除磁带的标准方法是用非敏感数据覆盖磁带、消磁以及通过粉碎或焚烧进行物理破坏。重新格式化磁带不会删除残留数据。

question_en: Sally is building a new server for use in her environment and plans to implement RAID level 1 as a storage availability control. What is the minimum number of physical hard disks that she needs to implement this approach?
question_zh: Sally 正在构建一台在她的环境中使用的新服务器，并计划实施 RAID 级别 1 作为存储可用性控制。实施这种方法至少需要多少物理硬盘？
explanation_en: RAID level 1, also known as disk mirroring, uses two disks that contain identical information. If one disk fails, the other contains the data needed for the system to continue operation.
explanation_zh: RAID 级别 1，也称为磁盘镜像，使用包含相同信息的两个磁盘。如果一个磁盘发生故障，另一磁盘包含系统继续运行所需的数据。

question_en: Jerome is conducting a forensic investigation and is reviewing database server logs to investigate query contents for evidence of SQL injection attacks. What type of analysis is he performing?
question_zh: Jerome 正在进行取证调查，并正在审查数据库服务器日志以调查查询内容以获取 SQL 注入攻击的证据。他正在执行什么类型的分析？
options_zh: {"A": "硬件分析", "B": "软件分析", "C": "网络分析", "D": "媒体分析"}
explanation_en: The analysis of application logs is one of the core tasks of software analysis. This is the correct answer because SQL injection attacks are application attacks.
explanation_zh: 应用日志分析是软件分析的核心任务之一。这是正确的答案，因为 SQL 注入攻击是应用程序攻击。

question_en: Quigley Computing regularly ships tapes of backup data across the country to a secondary facility. These tapes contain confidential information. What is the most important security control that Quigley can use to protect these tapes?
question_zh: QuigleyComputing 定期将备份数据磁带运送到全国各地的二级设施。这些磁带包含机密信息。 Quigley 可以用来保护这些磁带的最重要的安全控制是什么？
options_zh: {"A": "上锁的集装箱", "B": "私人快递", "C": "数据加密", "D": "媒体轮换"}
explanation_en: Quigley may choose to use any or all of these security controls, but data encryption is, by far, the most important control. It protects the confidentiality of data stored on the tapes, which are most vulnerable to theft while in transit between two secure locations.
explanation_zh: Quigley 可以选择使用任何或全部这些安全控制措施，但数据加密是迄今为止最重要的控制措施。它可以保护磁带上存储的数据的机密性，这些数据在两个安全位置之间传输时最容易被盗。

question_en: Carolyn is concerned that users on her network may be storing sensitive information, such as Social Security numbers, on their hard drives without proper authorization or security controls. What third-party security service can she implement to best detect this activity?
question_zh: Carolyn 担心其网络上的用户可能会在未经适当授权或安全控制的情况下在其硬盘驱动器上存储敏感信息，例如社会安全号码。她可以实施哪些第三方安全服务来最好地检测此活动？
explanation_en: Data loss prevention (DLP) systems may identify sensitive information stored on endpoint systems or in transit over a network. This is their primary purpose. DLP systems are commonly available as a third party managed service offering. Intrusion detection and prevention systems (IDSs/IPSs) may be used to identify some sensitive information using signatures built for that purpose, but this is not the primary role of those tools and they would not be as effective as DLP systems at this task. TLS is a network encryption protocol that may be used to protect sensitive information, but it does not have any ability to identify sensitive information.
explanation_zh: 数据丢失防护 (DLP) 系统可以识别存储在端点系统上或通过网络传输的敏感信息。这是他们的主要目的。 DLP 系统通常作为第三方托管服务产品提供。入侵检测和防御系统 (IDS/IPS) 可用于使用为此目的构建的签名来识别某些敏感信息，但这不是这些工具的主要作用，并且在执行此任务时它们不会像 DLP 系统那样有效。 TLS是一种网络加密协议，可用于保护敏感信息，但它不具备任何识别敏感信息的能力。

question_en: Gavin is the disaster recovery team leader for his organization, which is currently in the response phase of an incident that has severe customer impact. Gavin just received a phone call from a reporter asking for details on the root cause and an estimated recovery time. Gavin has this information at his fingertips. What should he do?
options_en: {"A": "Provide the information to the reporter.", "B": "Request a few minutes to gather the information and return the call.", "C": "Refer the matter to the public relations department.", "D": "Refuse to provide any information."}
question_zh: Gavin 是其组织的灾难恢复团队负责人，该组织目前正处于对客户产生严重影响的事件的响应阶段。加文刚刚接到记者电话，询问根本原因的详细信息和预计恢复时间。加文掌握着这些信息。他该怎么办？
options_zh: {"A": "向记者提供信息。", "B": "请求几分钟时间收集信息并回电。", "C": "将此事提交给公共关系部门。", "D": "拒绝提供任何信息。"}
explanation_en: Disaster recovery teams should always refer media inquiries to the public relations team to ensure a coordinated, consistent response. They should not attempt to answer questions themselves.
explanation_zh: 灾难恢复团队应始终将媒体询问转介给公共关系团队，以确保得到协调、一致的响应。他们不应试图自己回答问题。

question_en: Pauline is reviewing her organization’s emergency management plans. What should be the highest priority when creating these plans?
options_en: {"A": "Protection of mission-critical data", "B": "Preservation of operational systems", "C": "Collection of evidence", "D": "Preservation of safety"}
question_zh: Pauline 正在审查她的组织的应急管理计划。创建这些计划时最优先考虑的是什么？
options_zh: {"A": "保护关键任务数据", "B": "保护操作系统", "C": "收集证据", "D": "保护安全"}
explanation_en: All of these considerations are important when developing an emergency management plan. However, the safety of human life should always be the overwhelming priority, above all other considerations.
explanation_zh: 在制定应急管理计划时，所有这些考虑因素都很重要。然而，人类生命安全应始终是压倒一切的优先事项，高于一切其他考虑因素。

question_en: Barry is the CIO of an organization that recently suffered a serious operational issue that required activation of the disaster recovery plan. He would like to conduct a lessons learned session to review the incident. Who would be the best facilitator for this session?
options_en: {"A": "Barry, as chief information officer", "B": "Chief information security officer", "C": "Disaster recovery team leader", "D": "External consultant"}
question_zh: Barry 是一家组织的 CIO，该组织最近遭遇了严重的运营问题，需要激活灾难恢复计划。他想召开一次经验教训会议来回顾这一事件。谁是本次会议的最佳协调人？
options_zh: {"A": "Barry，首席信息官", "B": "首席信息安全官", "C": "灾难恢复团队领导", "D": "外部顾问"}
explanation_en: Barry should recruit an independent moderator to facilitate the session. Having a moderator who was not directly involved in the effort encourages honest and open feedback. While it is not necessary to use an external consultant, they may easily fill this role. While it is also possible to find a qualified internal employee to fill this position, it should not be someone who was involved in the incident response effort or has a major stake in the plan, such as Barry, the CISO, or the DR team leader.
explanation_zh: Barry 应聘请一名独立主持人来主持会议。有一个不直接参与该工作的主持人可以鼓励诚实和开放的反馈。虽然没有必要使用外部顾问，但他们可以轻松填补这一角色。虽然也可以找到合格的内部员工来填补该职位，但该人不应该是参与事件响应工作或在计划中拥有主要利益的人，例如 Barry、CISO 或 DR 团队领导。

question_en: Brent is reviewing the controls that will protect his organization in the event of a sustained period of power loss. Which one of the following solutions would best meet his needs?
question_zh: Brent 正在审查在持续断电时保护其组织的控制措施。以下哪一种解决方案最能满足他的需求？
options_zh: {"A": "冗余服务器", "B": "不间断电源 (UPS)", "C": "发电机", "D": "RAID"}
explanation_en: Generators are capable of providing backup power for a sustained period of time in the event of a power loss, but they take time to activate. Uninterruptible power supplies (UPS) provide immediate, battery-driven power for a short period of time to cover momentary losses of power, which would not cover a sustained period of power loss. RAID and redundant servers are high-availability controls but do not cover power loss scenarios.
explanation_zh: 发电机能够在断电时持续提供备用电源，但需要时间来激活。不间断电源 (UPS) 可在短时间内提供即时、电池驱动的电源，以弥补瞬时断电，但无法弥补持续断电。 RAID 和冗余服务器是高可用性控制，但不涵盖断电情况。

question_en: Match each of the numbered terms with its correct lettered definition: Terms 1. Honeypot 2. Honeynet 3. Pseudoflaw 4. Darknet Definitions
options_en: {"A": "An intentionally designed vulnerability used to lure in an attacker", "B": "A network set up with intentional vulnerabilities", "C": "A system set up with intentional vulnerabilities", "D": "A monitored network without any hosts"}
question_zh: 将每个编号术语与其正确的字母定义相匹配： 术语 1. 蜜罐 2. 蜜网 3. 伪缺陷 4. 暗网定义
options_zh: {"A": "用于引诱攻击者的故意设计的漏洞", "B": "故意设置漏洞的网络", "C": "故意设置漏洞的系统", "D": "没有任何主机的受监控网络"}
explanation_en: The terms match with the definitions as follows: 1. Honeypot: C. A system set up with intentional vulnerabilities 2. Honeynet: B. A network set up with intentional vulnerabilities 3. Pseudoflaw: A. An intentionally designed vulnerability used to lure in an attacker 4. Darknet: D. A monitored network without any hosts A darknet is a segment of unused network address space that should have no network activity and, therefore, may be easily used to monitor for illicit activity. A honeypot is a decoy computer system used to bait intruders into attacking. A honeynet is a network of multiple honeypots that creates a more sophisticated environment for intruders to explore. A pseudoflaw is a false vulnerability in a system that may attract an attacker.
explanation_zh: 这些术语与定义匹配如下： 1. 蜜罐：C. 故意设置漏洞的系统 2. 蜜网：B. 故意设置漏洞的网络 3. 伪缺陷：A. 故意设计的漏洞，用于引诱攻击者 4. 暗网：D. 没有任何主机的受监控网络 暗网是一段未使用的网络地址空间，不应有任何网络活动因此，可以很容易地用于监测非法活动。蜜罐是一种诱饵计算机系统，用于引诱入侵者进行攻击。蜜网是由多个蜜罐组成的网络，它为入侵者创造了一个更复杂的探索环境。伪缺陷是系统中可能吸引攻击者的虚假漏洞。

question_en: Match each of the numbered types of recovery capabilities to their correct lettered definition: Terms 1. Hot site 2. Cold site 3. Warm site 4. Service bureau Definitions
options_en: {"A": "An organization that can provide on-site or off-site IT services in the event of a disaster", "B": "A site with dedicated storage and real-time data replication, often with shared equipment that allows restoration of service in a very short time", "C": "A site that relies on shared storage and backups for recovery", "D": "A rented space with power, cooling, and connectivity that can accept equipment as part of a recovery effort"}
question_zh: 将每种编号类型的恢复功能与其正确的字母定义相匹配： 术语 1. 热站点 2. 冷站点 3. 温站点 4. 服务局 定义
options_zh: {"A": "在发生灾难时可以提供现场或异地 IT 服务的组织", "B": "具有专用存储和实时数据复制的站点，通常具有允许恢复的共享设备", "C": "依靠共享存储和备份进行恢复的站点", "D": "租用的空间，具有电力、冷却和连接，可以接受设备作为恢复工作的一部分"}
explanation_en: The terms match with the definitions as follows: 1. Hot site: B. A site with dedicated storage and real-time data replication, often with shared equipment that allows restoration of service in a very short time 2. Cold site: D. A rented space with power, cooling, and connectivity that can accept equipment as part of a recovery effort 3. Warm site: C. A site that relies on shared storage and backups for recovery 4. Service bureau: A. An organization that can provide on-site or off-site IT services in the event of a disaster
explanation_zh: 这些术语与定义相匹配，如下所示： 1. 热站点：B. 具有专用存储和实时数据复制的站点，通常具有共享设备，可以在很短的时间内恢复服务 2. 冷站点：D. A 租用具有电源、冷却和连接功能的空间，可以接受设备作为恢复工作的一部分 3. 温站点：C. 依赖共享存储和备份进行恢复的站点 4. 服务局：A. 在发生灾难时可以提供现场或异地 IT 服务的组织

question_en: Susan provides a public RESTful API for her organization’s data but wants to limit its use to trusted partners. She intends to use API keys. What other recommendation would you give Susan to limit the potential abuse of the service?
options_en: {"A": "Limit request rates", "B": "Force HTTP-only requests", "C": "Avoid tokens due to bandwidth constraints", "D": "Blacklist HTTP methods such as GET, POST, and PUT"}
question_zh: Susan 为其组织的数据提供了公共 RESTful API，但希望将其使用仅限于值得信赖的合作伙伴。她打算使用 API 密钥。您会给苏珊什么其他建议来限制服务的潜在滥用？
options_zh: {"A": "限制请求速率", "B": "强制仅使用 HTTP 请求", "C": "由于带宽限制而避免使用令牌", "D": "将 GET、POST 和 PUT 等 HTTP 方法列入黑名单"}
explanation_en: Limiting request rates can prevent abuse of APIs like this one. The other suggestions are all poor recommendations. In general, requests should require HTTPS, tokens are used for security using tools like JSON web tokens (JWT), and HTTP methods may be restricted, but GET, POST, and PUT are some of the most common methods used for API access and are far more typically whitelisted.
explanation_zh: 限制请求速率可以防止滥用此类 API。其他的建议都是不好的建议。一般来说，请求应该需要 HTTPS，令牌用于使用 JSON Web 令牌 (JWT) 等工具来确保安全，HTTP 方法可能受到限制，但 GET、POST 和 PUT 是用于 API 访问的一些最常用方法，并且通常被列入白名单。

question_en: Darren is conducting a threat hunting exercise and would like to look for botnet indicators of compromise. Which of the following are common ways that attackers leverage botnets? (Select all that apply.)
options_en: {"A": "Mining cryptocurrency", "B": "Conducting brute-force attacks", "C": "Scanning for vulnerable systems", "D": "Conducting man-in-the-middle attacks"}
question_zh: Darren 正在进行威胁搜寻练习，并希望寻找僵尸网络的妥协指标。以下哪些是攻击者利用僵尸网络的常见方式？ （选择所有适用项。）
options_zh: {"A": "挖掘加密货币", "B": "进行暴力攻击", "C": "扫描易受攻击的系统", "D": "进行中间人攻击"}
explanation_en: Botnets are used for a wide variety of malicious purposes, including scanning the network for vulnerable systems, conducting brute-force attacks against other systems, mining cryptocurrency, and sending out spam messages. They are not commonly used to conduct man-in-the-middle attacks, which are normally waged through DNS poisoning or similar mechanisms.
explanation_zh: 僵尸网络用于多种恶意目的，包括扫描网络中是否存在易受攻击的系统、对其他系统进行暴力攻击、挖掘加密货币以及发送垃圾邮件消息。它们通常不用于进行中间人攻击，这些攻击通常通过 DNS 中毒或类似机制发起。

question_en: Which one of the following statements is not true about code review?
options_en: {"A": "Code review should be a peer-driven process that includes multiple developers.", "B": "Code review may be automated.", "C": "Code review occurs during the design phase.", "D": "Code reviewers may expect to review several hundred lines of code per hour."}
question_zh: 以下关于代码审查的说法哪一项是不正确的？
options_zh: {"A": "代码审查应该是一个包含多个开发人员的同行驱动的过程。", "B": "代码审查可以自动化。", "C": "代码审查发生在设计阶段。", "D": "代码审查者可能期望每小时审查数百行代码。"}
explanation_en: Code review takes place after code has been developed, which occurs after the design phase of the system’s development lifecycle (SDLC). Code review may use a combination of manual and automated techniques or rely solely on one or the other. It should be a peerdriven process that includes developers who did not write the code. Developers should expect to complete the review of around 300lines per hour, on average.
explanation_zh: 代码审查发生在代码开发之后，发生在系统开发生命周期 (SDLC) 的设计阶段之后。代码审查可以结合使用手动和自动技术，或者仅依赖其中之一。它应该是一个同行驱动的过程，包括没有编写代码的开发人员。开发人员预计平均每小时完成约 300 行的审查。

question_en: Kathleen is reviewing the Ruby code shown here. What security technique is this code using?
question_zh: Kathleen 正在审查此处显示的 Ruby 代码。该代码使用什么安全技术？
options_zh: {"A": "参数化", "B": "类型转换", "C": "宝石切割", "D": "存储过程"}
explanation_en: This code is an example of parameterization, which can help avoid SQL injection. Note that each parameter has a placeholder, which is then passed to the query.
explanation_zh: 此代码是参数化的示例，可以帮助避免SQL注入。请注意，每个参数都有一个占位符，然后将其传递给查询。

question_en: Jessica is reviewing her organization’s change management process and would like to verify that changes to software include acceptance testing. Which process is responsible for achieving this goal?
question_zh: Jessica 正在审查其组织的变更管理流程，并希望验证软件变更是否包括验收测试。哪个过程负责实现这个目标？
options_zh: {"A": "请求控制", "B": "变更控制", "C": "发布控制", "D": "配置控制"}
explanation_en: One of the responsibilities of the release control process is ensuring that the process includes acceptance testing that confirms that any alterations to end-user work tasks are understood and functional prior to code release. The request control, change control, and configuration control processes do not include acceptance testing.
explanation_zh: 发布控制流程的职责之一是确保该流程包括验收测试，以确认在代码发布之前对最终用户工作任务的任何更改均已被理解且功能正常。请求控制、变更控制和配置控制过程不包括验收测试。

question_en: Ashley is investigating an attack that compromised an account of one of her users. In the attack, the attacker forced the submission of an authenticated request to a third-party site by exploiting trust relationships in the user’s browser. What type of attack most likely took place?
question_zh: Ashley 正在调查一次攻击，该攻击损害了她的一个用户的帐户。在攻击中，攻击者利用用户浏览器中的信任关系，强制向第三方站点提交经过身份验证的请求。最有可能发生什么类型的攻击？
options_zh: {"A": "XSS", "B": "CSRF", "C": "SQL 注入", "D": "会话劫持"}
explanation_en: Cross-site request forgery (XSRF or CSRF) attacks exploit the trust that sites have in a user’s browser by attempting to force the submission of authenticated requests to third-party sites. Session hijacking attacks attempt to steal previously authenticated sessions but do not force the browser to submit requests. SQL injection directly attacks a database through a web application. Cross-site scripting uses reflected input to trick a user’s browser into executing untrusted code from a trusted site.
explanation_zh: 跨站点请求伪造（XSRF 或 CSRF）攻击通过尝试强制向第三方站点提交经过身份验证的请求来利用站点在用户浏览器中的信任。会话劫持攻击试图窃取先前经过身份验证的会话，但不会强制浏览器提交请求。 SQL注入通过Web应用程序直接攻击数据库。跨站点脚本使用反射输入来欺骗用户的浏览器从受信任的站点执行不受信任的代码。

question_en: Arnold is creating a new software package and is making use of the OpenSSL library. What term best describes the library he is using?
question_zh: Arnold 正在创建一个新的软件包并正在使用 OpenSSL 库。什么术语最能描述他正在使用的图书馆？
explanation_en: The OpenSSL package is a widely used implementation of TLS encryption that is available as an open source package. It is not commercial off-the-shelf software (COTS). While it might be developed by third parties, it is more accurate to describe it as open source. The library is available as code for free use, but not as a managed service.
explanation_zh: OpenSSL 包是广泛使用的 TLS 加密实现，可作为开源包提供。它不是商业现成软件 (COTS)。虽然它可能是由第三方开发的，但将其描述为开源更为准确。该库可以作为代码免费使用，但不能作为托管服务。

question_en: Jaime is a technical support analyst and is asked to visit a user whose computer is displaying the error message shown here. What state has this computer entered?
question_zh: Jaime 是一名技术支持分析师，他被要求拜访其计算机显示此处所示错误消息的用户。这台计算机进入了什么状态？
options_zh: {"A": "失败打开", "B": "不可恢复的错误", "C": "内存耗尽", "D": "失败安全"}
explanation_en: The error message shown in the figure is the infamous “Blue Screen of Death” that occurs when a Windows system experiences a dangerous failure and enters a fail secure state. If the system had “failed open,” it would have continued operation. The error described is a memory fault that is likely recoverable by rebooting the system. There is no indication that the system has run out of usable memory.
explanation_zh: 图中显示的错误消息是臭名昭著的“蓝屏死机”，当 Windows 系统遇到危险故障并进入失败安全状态时，就会出现这种情况。如果系统“打开失败”，它将继续运行。所描述的错误是内存故障，可以通过重新启动系统来恢复。没有迹象表明系统已用完可用内存。

question_en: Joshua is developing a software threat modeling program for his organization. Which of the following are appropriate goals for the program? (Select all that apply.)
options_en: {"A": "To reduce the number of security-related design flaws", "B": "To reduce the number of security-related coding flaws", "C": "To reduce the severity of non-security-related flaws", "D": "To reduce the number of threat vectors"}
question_zh: Joshua 正在为其组织开发软件威胁建模程序。以下哪些是该计划的适当目标？ （选择所有适用项。）
options_zh: {"A": "减少安全相关设计缺陷的数量", "B": "减少安全相关编码缺陷的数量", "C": "减少非安全相关缺陷的严重性", "D": "减少威胁向量的数量"}
explanation_en: Software threat modeling is designed to reduce the number of security-related design and coding flaws as well as the severity of other flaws. The developer or evaluator of software has no control over the threat environment, because it is external to the organization.
explanation_zh: 软件威胁建模旨在减少安全相关设计和编码缺陷的数量以及其他缺陷的严重性。软件开发人员或评估人员无法控制威胁环境，因为它位于组织外部。

question_en: In the diagram shown here, which is an example of a method? Account Balance: currency = 0 Owner: string AddFunds(deposit: currency) RemoveFunds(withdrawal: currency)
question_zh: 在此所示的图中，哪一个是方法的示例？ Account Balance:currency = 0 Owner: string AddFunds(deposit:currency)RemoveFunds(withdrawal:currency)
options_zh: {"A": "Account", "B": "Owner", "C": "AddFunds", "D": "Balance"}
explanation_en: In the diagram, Account is the name of the class. Owner and Balance are attributes of that class. AddFunds and RemoveFunds are methods of the class.
explanation_zh: 在图中，Account 是类的名称。 Owner 和 Balance 是该类的属性。 AddFunds 和RemoveFunds 是该类的方法。

question_en: Wanda is reviewing the application development documentation used by her organization and finds the lifecycle illustration shown here. What application development method is her organization using? Requirements Planning User Design Construction Cutover
question_zh: Wanda 正在审查其组织使用的应用程序开发文档，并找到此处显示的生命周期说明。她的组织使用什么应用程序开发方法？需求规划 用户设计 构造切换
explanation_en: Rapid Application Development, or RAD, focuses on fast development and the ability to quickly adjust to changing requirements. RAD uses four phases: requirements planning, user design, construction, and cutover.
explanation_zh: 快速应用程序开发（RAD）专注于快速开发以及快速适应不断变化的需求的能力。 RAD 使用四个阶段：需求规划、用户设计、构建和切换。

question_en: Which one of the following testing methodologies typically works without access to source code?
question_zh: 以下哪一种测试方法通常无需访问源代码即可工作？
options_zh: {"A": "动态测试", "B": "静态测试", "C": "白盒测试", "D": "代码审查"}
explanation_en: Dynamic testing of software typically occurs in a black-box environment where the tester does not have access to the source code. Static testing, white-box testing, and code review approaches all require access to the source code of the application.
explanation_zh: 软件的动态测试通常发生在测试人员无法访问源代码的黑盒环境中。静态测试、白盒测试和代码审查方法都需要访问应用程序的源代码。

question_en: Lucca is analyzing a web application that his organization acquired from a third-party vendor. Lucca determined that the application contains a flaw that causes users who are logged in to be able to take actions they should not be able to in their role. What type of security vulnerability should this be classified as?
question_zh: Lucca 正在分析他的组织从第三方供应商处购买的 Web 应用程序。 Lucca 确定该应用程序包含一个缺陷，导致登录的用户能够执行其角色不应执行的操作。这应该被归类为什么类型的安全漏洞？
options_zh: {"A": "数据验证", "B": "会话管理", "C": "授权", "D": "错误处理"}
explanation_en: Given the list of options here, the root cause is most likely an issue with an authorization check that does not properly limit users to the authorization that they should have. Data validation issues are more likely to allow injection attacks or to allow bad data to be input, while session management issues would allow session hijacking or might actually cause them to be logged in as another user. Finally, error handling would show up as a problem when errors occurred, which this problem does not indicate.
explanation_zh: 鉴于此处的选项列表，根本原因很可能是授权检查存在问题，该检查未正确限制用户应拥有的授权。数据验证问题更有可能允许注入攻击或允许输入错误数据，而会话管理问题将允许会话劫持或实际上可能导致他们以其他用户身份登录。最后，当错误发生时，错误处理会显示为一个问题，但这个问题并没有表明这一点。

question_en: Bobby is investigating how an authorized database user is gaining access to information outside his normal clearance level. Bobby believes that the user is making use of a type of function that summarizes data. What term describes this type of function?
question_zh: Bobby 正在调查授权数据库用户如何访问超出其正常权限级别的信息。 Bobby 认为用户正在使用一种汇总数据的功能。什么术语描述了这种类型的函数？
explanation_en: Aggregate functions summarize large amounts of data and provide only summary information as a result. When carefully crafted, aggregate functions may unintentionally reveal sensitive information.
explanation_zh: 聚合函数汇总大量数据，并仅提供汇总信息作为结果。如果精心设计，聚合函数可能会无意中泄露敏感信息。

question_en: Taylor would like to better protect the applications developed by her organization against buffer overflow attacks. Which of the following controls would best provide this protection?
question_zh: Taylor 希望更好地保护其组织开发的应用程序免受缓冲区溢出攻击。以下哪项控制措施最能提供这种保护？
options_zh: {"A": "加密", "B": "输入验证", "C": "防火墙", "D": "入侵防御系统"}
explanation_en: The best protection against buffer overflow attacks is server-side input validation. This technique limits user input to approved ranges of values that fit within allocated buffers. While firewalls and intrusion prevention systems may contain controls that limit buffer overflows, it would be more effective to perform filtering on the application server. Encryption cannot protect against buffer overflow attacks.
explanation_zh: 针对缓冲区溢出攻击的最佳保护是服务器端输入验证。该技术将用户输入限制在适合分配的缓冲区的批准值范围内。虽然防火墙和入侵防御系统可能包含限制缓冲区溢出的控制，但在应用程序服务器上执行过滤会更有效。加密无法防止缓冲区溢出攻击。

question_en: Kayla recently completed a thorough risk analysis and mitigation review of the software developed by her team and identified three persistent issues: 1. Cross-site scripting 2. SQL injection 3. Buffer overflows What is the most significant deficiency in her team’s work identified by these issues?
options_en: {"A": "Lack of API security", "B": "Improper error handling", "C": "Improper or missing input validation", "D": "Source code design issues For questions 17–20, please refer to the following scenario: Robert is a consultant who helps organizations create and develop mature software development practices. He prefers to use the Software Capability Maturity Model (SW-CMM) to evaluate the current and future status of organizations using both independent review and self-assessments. He is currently working with two different clients. Acme Widgets is not very well organized with its software development practices. It does have a dedicated team of developers who do “whatever it takes” to get software out the door, but it does not have any formal processes. Beta Particles is a company with years of experience developing software using formal, documented software development processes. It uses a standard model for software development but does not have quantitative management of those processes."}
question_zh: Kayla 最近完成了对其团队开发的软件进行彻底的风险分析和缓解审查，并确定了三个持续存在的问题： 1. 跨站点脚本 2. SQL 注入 3. 缓冲区溢出 这些问题确定的团队工作中最显着的缺陷是什么？
options_zh: {"A": "缺乏 API 安全性", "B": "错误处理不当", "C": "输入验证不当或缺失", "D": "源代码设计问题 对于问题 17-20，请参考以下场景： Robert 是一名顾问，帮助组织创建和开发成熟的软件开发实践。他更喜欢使用软件能力成熟度模型 (SW-CMM) 通过独立审查和自我评估来评估组织的当前和未来状态。他目前正在与两个不同的客户合作。 Acme Widgets 的软件开发实践组织得不是很好。它确实有一个专门的开发团队，他们会“不惜一切代价”将软件推出市场，但它没有任何正式的流程。 Beta Particles 是一家拥有多年使用正式、记录的软件开发流程开发软件经验的公司。它使用软件开发的标准模型，但没有对这些过程进行量化管理。"}
explanation_en: Each of these problems is caused by improper or missing input validation and can be resolved by handling inputs properly. In many cases, this can be done using libraries or methods already built into the language or framework that the developer is using.
explanation_zh: 每个问题都是由输入验证不当或缺失引起的，可以通过正确处理输入来解决。在许多情况下，这可以使用开发人员正在使用的语言或框架中内置的库或方法来完成。

question_en: What phase of the SW-CMM should Robert report as the current status of Acme Widgets?
question_zh: Robert 应将 SW-CMM 的哪个阶段报告为 Acme Widgets 的当前状态？
explanation_en: Acme Widgets is clearly in the initial stage of the SW-CMM. This stage is characterized by the absence of formal process. The company may still produce working code, but it does so in a disorganized fashion.
explanation_zh: Acme Widgets显然处于SW-CMM的初始阶段。这一阶段的特点是缺乏正式的流程。该公司可能仍会生成工作代码，但其方式是杂乱无章的。

question_en: Robert is working with Acme Widgets on a strategy to advance their software development practices. What SW-CMM stage should be their next target milestone?
question_zh: Robert 正在与 Acme Widgets 合作制定一项战略，以推进他们的软件开发实践。他们的下一个目标里程碑应该是哪个 SW-CMM 阶段？
explanation_en: The Repeatable stage is the second stage in the SW-CMM, following the Initial stage. It should be the next milestone goal for Acme Widgets. The Repeatable stage is characterized by basic lifecycle management processes.
explanation_zh: 可重复阶段是 SW-CMM 中继初始阶段之后的第二个阶段。这应该是 Acme Widgets 的下一个里程碑目标。可重复阶段的特点是基本的生命周期管理流程。

question_en: What phase of the SW-CMM should Robert report as the current status of Beta Particles?
question_zh: Robert 应该将 SW-CMM 的哪个阶段报告为 Beta 粒子的当前状态？
explanation_en: The Defined stage of the SW-CMM is marked by the presence of basic lifecycle management processes and reuse of code. It includes the use of requirements management, software project planning, quality assurance, and configuration management practices.
explanation_zh: SW-CMM 的定义阶段以基本生命周期管理流程和代码重用的存在为标志。它包括需求管理、软件项目规划、质量保证和配置管理实践的使用。

question_en: Robert is also working with Beta Particles on a strategy to advance their software development practices. What SW-CMM stage should be their next target milestone?
question_zh: Robert 还与 Beta Particles 合作制定一项战略，以推进他们的软件开发实践。他们的下一个目标里程碑应该是哪个 SW-CMM 阶段？
explanation_en: The Managed stage is the fourth stage in the SW-CMM, following the Defined stage. It should be the next milestone goal for Beta Particles. The Managed stage is characterized by the use of quantitative software development measures.
explanation_zh: 托管阶段是 SW-CMM 中继定义阶段之后的第四个阶段。这应该是 Beta 粒子的下一个里程碑目标。托管阶段的特点是使用定量软件开发措施。

question_en: Which one of the following database keys is used to enforce referential integrity relationships between tables?
question_zh: 以下哪一个数据库键用于强制表之间的引用完整性关系？
explanation_en: Referential integrity ensures that records exist in a secondary table when they are referenced with a foreign key from another table. Foreign keys are the mechanism used to enforce referential integrity.
explanation_zh: 参照完整性确保记录在被另一个表的外键引用时存在于辅助表中。外键是用于强制引用完整性的机制。

question_en: Brynn believes that a system in her organization may have been compromised by a macro virus. Which one of the following files is most likely to be the culprit?
question_zh: Brynn 认为她组织中的系统可能已受到宏病毒的危害。以下哪一个文件最有可能是罪魁祸首？
options_zh: {"A": "projects.doc", "B": "command.com", "C": "command.exe", "D": "loopmaster.exe"}
explanation_en: Macro viruses are most commonly found in office productivity documents, such as Microsoft Word documents that end in the .doc or .docx extension. They are not commonly found in executable files with the .com or .exe extension.
explanation_zh: 宏病毒最常见于办公生产力文档中，例如以.doc 或.docx 扩展名结尾的Microsoft Word 文档。它们通常不存在于扩展名为 .com 或 .exe 的可执行文件中。

question_en: Victor created a database table that contains information on his organization’s employees. The table contains the employee’s user ID, three different telephone number fields (home, work, and mobile), the employee’s office location, and the employee’s job title. There are 16 records in the table. What is the degree of this table?
question_zh: Victor 创建了一个数据库表，其中包含有关其组织员工的信息。该表包含员工的用户 ID、三个不同的电话号码字段（家庭、工作和手机）、员工的办公地点以及员工的职位。表中有16条记录。这个表的度数是多少？
explanation_en: The degree of a database table is the number of attributes in the table. Victor’s table has six attributes: the employee’s user ID, home telephone, office telephone, mobile telephone, office location, and job title.
explanation_zh: 数据库表的度是表中属性的数量。 Victor 的表有六个属性：员工的用户 ID、家庭电话、办公室电话、移动电话、办公地点和职位。

question_en: Carrie is analyzing the application logs for her web-based application and comes across the following string: ../../../../../../../../../etc/passwd What type of attack was likely attempted against Carrie’s application?
question_zh: Carrie 正在分析其基于 Web 的应用程序的应用程序日志，并遇到以下字符串： ../../../../../../../../../etc/passwd 针对 Carrie 的应用程序可能尝试了哪种类型的攻击？
options_zh: {"A": "命令注入", "B": "会话劫持", "C": "目录遍历", "D": "暴力破解"}
explanation_en: The string shown in the logs is characteristic of a directory traversal attack where the attacker attempts to force the web application to navigate up the file hierarchy and retrieve a file that should not normally be provided to a web user, such as the password file. The series of “double dots” is indicative of a directory traversal attack because it is the character string used to reference the directory one level up in a hierarchy.
explanation_zh: 日志中显示的字符串是目录遍历攻击的特征，其中攻击者试图强制 Web 应用程序向上导航文件层次结构并检索通常不应提供给 Web 用户的文件，例如密码文件。这一系列“双点”表示目录遍历攻击，因为它是用于引用层次结构中上一级目录的字符串。

question_en: When should a design review take place when following an SDLC approach to software development?
options_en: {"A": "After the code review", "B": "After user acceptance testing", "C": "After the development of functional requirements", "D": "After the completion of unit testing"}
question_zh: 当遵循 SDLC 方法进行软件开发时，应该何时进行设计评审？
options_zh: {"A": "代码审查后", "B": "用户验收测试后", "C": "功能需求开发后", "D": "单元测试完成后"}
explanation_en: Design reviews should take place after the development of functional and control specifications but before the creation of code. The code review, unit testing, and functional testing all take place after the creation of code and, therefore, after the design review.
explanation_zh: 设计审查应在功能和控制规范开发之后、代码创建之前进行。代码审查、单元测试和功能测试都在代码创建之后进行，因此也在设计审查之后进行。

question_en: Tracy is preparing to apply a patch to her organization’s enterprise resource planning system. She is concerned that the patch may introduce flaws that did not exist in prior versions, so she plans to conduct a test that will compare previous responses to input with those produced by the newly patched application. What type of testing is Tracy planning?
question_zh: Tracy 正准备对其组织的企业资源规划系统应用补丁。她担心该补丁可能会引入以前版本中不存在的缺陷，因此她计划进行一项测试，将以前对输入的响应与新修补的应用程序生成的响应进行比较。特雷西计划进行什么类型的测试？
options_zh: {"A": "单元测试", "B": "验收测试", "C": "回归测试", "D": "漏洞测试"}
explanation_en: Regression testing is software testing that runs a set of known inputs against an application and then compares the results to those produced by an earlier version of the software. It is designed to capture unanticipated consequences of deploying new code versions prior to introducing them into a production environment.
explanation_zh: 回归测试是针对应用程序运行一组已知输入，然后将结果与早期版本软件生成的结果进行比较的软件测试。它旨在捕获在将新代码版本引入生产环境之前部署新代码版本的意外后果。

question_en: What term is used to describe the level of confidence that software is free from vulnerabilities, either intentionally designed into the software or accidentally inserted at any time during its lifecycle, and that the software functions in the intended manner?
question_zh: 什么术语用于描述软件不存在漏洞（无论是有意设计到软件中还是在其生命周期的任何时候意外插入）以及软件按预期方式运行的置信度？
explanation_en: Assurance, when it comes to software, is the level of confidence that software is free from vulnerabilities, either intentionally designed into the software or accidentally inserted at any time during its lifecycle, and that the software functions in the intended manner. It is a term typically used in military and defense environments.
explanation_zh: 对于软件而言，保证是指软件不存在漏洞（无论是故意设计到软件中还是在其生命周期的任何时候意外插入）的信心水平，并且软件按预期方式运行。该术语通常用于军事和国防环境。

question_en: Victor recently took a new position at an online dating website and is responsible for leading a team of developers. He realized quickly that the developers are having issues with production code because they are working on different projects that result in conflicting modifications to the production code. What process should Victor invest in improving?
question_zh: Victor 最近在一家在线约会网站担任新职位，负责领导一个开发团队。他很快意识到开发人员在生产代码方面存在问题，因为他们正在处理不同的项目，导致对生产代码的修改发生冲突。 Victor 应该投资改进哪些流程？
options_zh: {"A": "请求控制", "B": "发布控制", "C": "变更控制", "D": "配置控制"}
explanation_en: The change control process is responsible for providing an organized framework within which multiple developers can create and test a solution prior to rolling it out in a production environment. Request control provides a framework for user requests. Release control manages the deployment of code into production. Configuration control ensures that changes to software versions are made in accordance with the change and configuration management policies.
explanation_zh: 变更控制流程负责提供一个有组织的框架，多个开发人员可以在其中创建和测试解决方案，然后再将其部署到生产环境中。请求控制为用户请求提供了一个框架。发布控制管理代码到生产中的部署。配置控制确保根据变更和配置管理策略对软件版本进行更改。

question_en: Tom is assessing security risks related to a database he manages. Examining user access controls, he determines that users have access to individual records in a table that match their clearances, but if they pull multiple records, that collection of facts has a higher classification than the classification of any of those facts standing alone and exceeds the permitted access. What type of issue has Tom identified?
question_zh: Tom 正在评估与其管理的数据库相关的安全风险。通过检查用户访问控制，他确定用户有权访问表中与其许可相匹配的单个记录，但如果他们提取多个记录，则该事实集合的分类比任何这些单独事实的分类更高，并且超出了允许的访问权限。 Tom 发现了什么类型的问题？
options_zh: {"A": "推理", "B": "SQL 注入", "C": "多级安全性", "D": "聚合"}
explanation_en: Aggregation is a security issue that arises when a collection of facts has a higher classification than the classification of any of those facts standing alone. An inference problem occurs when an attacker can pull together pieces of less sensitive information and use them to derive information of greater sensitivity. SQL injection is a web application exploit. Multilevel security is a system control that allows the simultaneous processing of information at different classification levels.
explanation_zh: 聚合是一个安全问题，当事实集合的分类高于任何单独事实的分类时，就会出现这种安全问题。当攻击者可以将不太敏感的信息组合在一起并使用它们来导出更敏感的信息时，就会出现推理问题。 SQL 注入是一种 Web 应用程序漏洞。多级安全性是一种系统控制，允许同时处理不同分类级别的信息。

question_en: Ron leads a team of software developers who find themselves often re-creating code that performs common functions. What software development tool could he use to best address this situation?
question_zh: Ron 领导着一个软件开发人员团队，他们发现自己经常重新创建执行常见功能的代码。他可以使用什么软件开发工具来最好地解决这种情况？
options_zh: {"A": "代码存储库", "B": "代码库", "C": "IDE", "D": "DAST"}
explanation_en: Code libraries are packages of reusable functions that may be incorporated into individual development projects. Ron could use libraries to easily share code among his team. Code repositories may be used to manage the distribution and updating of these libraries, but that is a second-order use case, making code libraries the best answer. Integrated development environments (IDEs) are tools used by developers to create software, while dynamic application security testing (DAST) is used to verify the correct implementation of code.
explanation_zh: 代码库是可重用函数的包，可以合并到单独的开发项目中。 Ron 可以使用库在他的团队之间轻松共享代码。代码存储库可用于管理这些库的分发和更新，但这是一个二阶用例，使代码库成为最佳答案。集成开发环境 (IDE) 是开发人员用来创建软件的工具，而动态应用程序安全测试 (DAST) 用于验证代码的正确实现。

question_en: Vivian would like to hire a software tester to come in and evaluate a new web application from a user’s perspective. Which of the following tests best simulates that perspective?
question_zh: Vivian 想聘请一名软件测试员，从用户的角度评估新的 Web 应用程序。以下哪项测试最能模拟这种观点？
explanation_en: Black-box testing begins with no prior knowledge of the system implementation, simulating a user perspective. White-box and gray-box testing provide full and partial knowledge of the system, respectively, in advance of the test. Blue boxes are a phone hacking tool and are not used in software testing.
explanation_zh: 黑盒测试在不了解系统实现的情况下开始，模拟用户视角。白盒和灰盒测试在测试之前分别提供系统的全部和部分知识。蓝盒子是一种电话黑客工具，不用于软件测试。

question_en: Referring to the database transaction shown here, what would happen if no account exists in the Accounts table with account number 1001?
options_en: {"A": "The database would create a new account with this account number and give it a $250 balance.", "B": "The database would ignore that command and still reduce the balance of the second account by $250.", "C": "The database would roll back the transaction, ignoring the results of both commands.", "D": "The database would generate an error message."}
question_zh: 参考这里显示的数据库事务，如果 Accounts 表中不存在帐号为 1001 的帐户，会发生什么情况？
options_zh: {"A": "数据库将使用该帐号创建一个新帐户，并为其提供 250 美元的余额。", "B": "数据库将忽略该命令，但仍将第二个帐户的余额减少 250 美元。", "C": "数据库将回滚事务，忽略这两个命令的结果。", "D": "数据库将生成错误消息。"}
explanation_en: In this example, the two SQL commands are indeed bundled in a transaction, but it is not an error to issue an update command that does not match any rows. Therefore, the first command would “succeed” in updating zero rows and not generate an error or cause the transaction to roll back. The second command would then execute, reducing the balance of the second account by $250.
explanation_zh: 在这个例子中，两个SQL命令确实捆绑在一个事务中，但是发出不匹配任何行的更新命令并不是错误。因此，第一个命令将“成功”更新零行，并且不会生成错误或导致事务回滚。然后执行第二条命令，将第二个账户的余额减少 250 美元。

question_en: Brandon is a software developer seeking to integrate his software with a popular social media site. The site provides him with software libraries that he can use to better integrate his code as well as other tools that make his work easier. What term best describes the service he is using?
question_zh: Brandon 是一名软件开发人员，寻求将其软件与流行的社交媒体网站集成。该网站为他提供了软件库，他可以使用这些库来更好地集成他的代码以及其他使他的工作更轻松的工具。什么术语最能描述他正在使用的服务？
explanation_en: Software development kits (SDKs) are code libraries and other tools made available to assist developers in creating code. An integrated development environment (IDE) may be a component of an SDK, but it is not necessarily part of every SDK. An application programming interface (API) is a set of functions made available to external developers, but the code does not execute on the users’ machine, as would a code library or other SDK tools. Data loss prevention (DLP) capabilities are not a component of software development toolsets.
explanation_zh: 软件开发工具包 (SDK) 是可帮助开发人员创建代码的代码库和其他工具。集成开发环境 (IDE) 可能是 SDK 的组件，但不一定是每个 SDK 的一部分。应用程序编程接口 (API) 是一组可供外部开发人员使用的函数，但代码不会像代码库或其他 SDK 工具那样在用户的计算机上执行。数据丢失防护 (DLP) 功能不是软件开发工具集的组成部分。

question_en: Kim is troubleshooting an application firewall that serves as a supplement to the organization’s network and host firewalls and intrusion prevention system, providing added protection against web-based attacks. The issue the organization is experiencing is that the firewall technology suffers somewhat frequent restarts that render it unavailable for 10 minutes at a time. What configuration might Kim consider to maintain availability during that period at the lowest cost to the company?
question_zh: Kim 正在对应用程序防火墙进行故障排除，该防火墙作为组织网络和主机防火墙以及入侵防御系统的补充，提供针对基于 Web 的攻击的额外保护。该组织遇到的问题是防火墙技术会频繁重启，导致其一次不可用 10 分钟。 Kim 可能会考虑采用什么配置来以最低的公司成本维持这段时间内的可用性？
options_zh: {"A": "高可用性集群", "B": "故障转移设备", "C": "故障开放", "D": "冗余磁盘"}
explanation_en: A fail open configuration may be appropriate in this case. In this configuration, the firewall would continue to pass traffic without inspection while it is restarting. This would minimize downtime, and the traffic would still be protected by the other security controls described in the scenario. Failover devices and high availability clusters would indeed increase availability, but at potentially significant expense.
