explanation_zh: 获取规则允许主体获取属于另一个客体的权利。如果 Alice 拥有 Bob 的权限，她可以授予自己与 Bob 已拥有的相同权限。

question_en: During a log review, Danielle discovers a series of logs that show login failures: Jan 31 11:39:12 ip-10-0-0-2 sshd[29092]: Invalid user admin from remotehost passwd=aaaaaaaa Jan 31 11:39:20 ip-10-0-0-2 sshd[29098]: Invalid user admin from remotehost passwd=aaaaaaab Jan 31 11:39:23 ip-10-0-0-2 sshd[29100]: Invalid user admin from remotehost passwd=aaaaaaac Jan 31 11:39:31 ip-10-0-0-2 sshd[29106]: Invalid user admin from remotehost passwd=aaaaaaad Jan 31 20:40:53 ip-10-0-0-254 sshd[30520]: Invalid user admin from remotehost passwd=aaaaaaae What type of attack has Danielle discovered?
options_en: {"A": "A pass-the-hash attack", "B": "A brute-force attack", "C": "A man-in-the-middle attack", "D": "A dictionary attack"}
question_zh: 在日志审查过程中，Danielle 发现了一系列显示登录失败的日志： Jan 31 11:39:12 ip-10-0-0-2 sshd[29092]: Invalid user admin from Remotehost passwd=aaaaaaaa Jan 31 11:39:20 ip-10-0-0-2 sshd[29098]：来自远程主机的用户管理无效 passwd=aaaaaaab Jan 31 11:39:23 ip-10-0-0-2 sshd[29100]：来自远程主机的用户管理无效 passwd=aaaaaaac Jan 31 11:39:31 ip-10-0-0-2 sshd[29106]：来自远程主机的无效用户管理 passwd=aaaaaaad Jan 31 20:40:53 ip-10-0-0-254 sshd[30520]：来自远程主机的无效用户管理 passwd=aaaaaaae Danielle 发现了什么类型的攻击？
options_zh: {"A": "哈希传递攻击", "B": "暴力攻击", "C": "中间人攻击", "D": "字典攻击"}
explanation_en: Brute-force attacks try every possible password. In this attack, the password is changing by one letter at each attempt, which indicates that it is a brute-force attack. A dictionary attack would use dictionary words for the attack, whereas a man-in-the-middle or pass-the-hash attack would most likely not be visible in an authentication log except as a successful login.
explanation_zh: 暴力攻击会尝试所有可能的密码。在此攻击中，密码每次尝试都会更改一个字母，这表明这是一种暴力攻击。字典攻击将使用字典单词进行攻击，而中间人或传递哈希攻击很可能在身份验证日志中不可见，除非成功登录。

question_en: Ben is designing a database-driven application and would like to ensure that two executing transactions do not affect each other by storing interim results in the database. What property is he seeking to enforce?
question_zh: Ben 正在设计一个数据库驱动的应用程序，并希望通过将中间结果存储在数据库中来确保两个正在执行的事务不会相互影响。他想要强制执行什么财产？
explanation_en: Isolation requires that transactions operate separately from each other. Atomicity ensures that if any part of a database transaction fails, the entire transaction must be rolled back as if it never occurred. Consistency ensures that all transactions are consistent with the logical rules of the database, such as having a primary key. Durability requires that once a transaction is committed to the database it must be preserved. Together, these properties make up the ACID model.
explanation_zh: 隔离性要求事务彼此独立运行。原子性确保如果数据库事务的任何部分失败，整个事务必须回滚，就好像它从未发生过一样。一致性保证所有事务都符合数据库的逻辑规则，比如有主键。持久性要求一旦事务提交到数据库，就必须将其保留。这些属性共同构成了 ACID 模型。

question_en: Kim is the system administrator for a small business network that is experiencing security problems. She is in the office in the evening working on the problem, and nobody else is there. As she is watching, she can see that systems on the other side of the office that were previously behaving normally are now exhibiting signs of infection one after the other. What type of malware is Kim likely dealing with?
question_zh: Kim 是一家小型企业网络的系统管理员，该网络遇到了安全问题。晚上她在办公室解决这个问题，没有其他人在场。当她观察时，她可以看到办公室另一侧先前运行正常的系统现在相继出现感染迹象。 Kim 可能处理什么类型的恶意软件？
options_zh: {"A": "病毒", "B": "蠕虫", "C": "特洛伊木马", "D": "逻辑炸弹"}
explanation_en: Worms have built-in propagation mechanisms that do not require user interaction, such as scanning for systems containing known vulnerabilities and then exploiting those vulnerabilities to gain access. Viruses and Trojan horses typically require user interaction to spread. Logic bombs do not spread from system to system but lie in wait until certain conditions are met, triggering the delivery of their payload.
explanation_zh: 蠕虫具有不需要用户交互的内置传播机制，例如扫描包含已知漏洞的系统，然后利用这些漏洞获取访问权限。病毒和特洛伊木马通常需要用户交互才能传播。逻辑炸弹不会从一个系统传播到另一个系统，而是等待满足某些条件，触发其有效负载的传送。

question_en: Barb is reviewing the compliance obligations facing her organization and the types of liability that each one might incur. Which of the following laws and regulations may involve criminal penalties if violated? (Select all that apply.)
question_zh: Barb 正在审查其组织面临的合规义务以及每个组织可能承担的责任类型。违反下列哪些法律、法规可能会受到刑事处罚？ （选择所有适用项。）
options_zh: {"A": "FERPA", "B": "HIPAA", "C": "SOX", "D": "PCI DSS"}
explanation_en: The Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act (HIPAA) is a U.S. law governing the healthcare sector that does provide for criminal penalties. The Sarbanes–Oxley (SOX) Act governs publicly traded corporations and also provides for criminal penalties. The Family Educational Rights and Privacy Act (FERPA) is a U.S. law governing educational records, but it does not provide for criminal penalties. PCI DSS, the Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard, is an industry standard for credit card operations and handling. Because it is not a law, PCI DSS violations cannot incur criminal sanctions.
explanation_zh: 健康保险流通与责任法案 (HIPAA) 是一项管理医疗保健行业的美国法律，规定了刑事处罚。 《萨班斯-奥克斯利法案》(SOX) 管辖上市公司，并规定了刑事处罚。 《家庭教育权利和隐私法案》(FERPA) 是一项管理教育记录的美国法律，但没有规定刑事处罚。 PCI DSS（支付卡行业数据安全标准）是信用卡操作和处理的行业标准。由于 PCI DSS 不是法律，因此违反 PCI DSS 的行为不会招致刑事制裁。

question_en: Quentin is analyzing network traffic that he collected with Wireshark on a TCP/IP network. He would like to identify all new connections that were set up during his traffic collection. If he is looking for the three packets that constitute the TCP three-way handshake used to establish a new connection, what flags should be set on the first three packets?
options_en: {"A": "SYN, ACK, SYN/ACK", "B": "PSH, RST, ACK", "C": "SYN, SYN/ACK, ACK", "D": "SYN, RST, FIN"}
question_zh: Quentin 正在分析他在 TCP/IP 网络上使用 Wireshark 收集的网络流量。他想要识别在流量收集期间建立的所有新连接。如果他正在寻找构成用于建立新连接的TCP三向握手的三个数据包，那么前三个数据包应该设置什么标志？
options_zh: {"A": "SYN、ACK、SYN/ACK", "B": "PSH、RST、ACK", "C": "SYN、SYN/ACK、ACK", "D": "SYN、RST、FIN"}
explanation_en: The TCP three-way handshake consists of initial contact via a SYN, or synchronize flagged packet; which receives a response with a SYN/ACK, or synchronize and acknowledge flagged packet; which is acknowledged by the original sender with an ACK, or acknowledge packet. RST is used in TCP to reset a connection, PSH is used to send data immediately, and FIN is used to end a connection.
explanation_zh: TCP 三向握手包括通过 SYN 进行初始接触，或同步标记数据包；它接收带有 SYN/ACK 的响应，或同步和确认标记的数据包；由原始发送者通过 ACK 或确认数据包进行确认。 TCP中RST用于重置连接，PSH用于立即发送数据，FIN用于结束连接。

question_en: Daniel is selecting a new mobile device management (MDM) solution for his organization and is writing the RFP. He is trying to decide what features he should include as requirements after aligning his organization’s security needs with an MDM platform’s capabilities. Which of the following are typical capabilities of MDM solutions? (Select all that apply.)
options_en: {"A": "Remotely wiping the contents of a mobile device", "B": "Assuming control of a nonregistered BYOD mobile device", "C": "Enforcing the use of device encryption", "D": "Managing device backups"}
question_zh: Daniel 正在为其组织选择新的移动设备管理 (MDM) 解决方案并正在编写 RFP。在将组织的安全需求与 MDM 平台的功能进行调整后，他试图决定应包含哪些功能作为要求。以下哪些是 MDM 解决方案的典型功能？ （选择所有适用项。）
options_zh: {"A": "远程擦除移动设备的内容", "B": "承担对未注册 BYOD 移动设备的控制权", "C": "强制使用设备加密", "D": "管理设备备份"}
explanation_en: MDM products do not have the capability of assuming control of a device not currently managed by the organization. This would be equivalent to hacking into a device owned by someone else and might constitute a crime. They do normally provide the ability to manage device backups, enforce the use of encryption, and remotely wipe the contents of mobile devices.
explanation_zh: MDM 产品无法承担对当前不由组织管理的设备的控制权。这相当于侵入他人拥有的设备，可能构成犯罪。它们通常确实提供管理设备备份、强制使用加密以及远程擦除移动设备内容的功能。

question_en: Jim is implementing an IDaaS solution for his organization. What type of technology is he putting in place?
options_en: {"A": "Identity as a service", "B": "Employee ID as a service", "C": "Intrusion detection as a service", "D": "OAuth"}
question_zh: Jim 正在为其组织实施 IDaaS 解决方案。他正在采用什么类型的技术？
options_zh: {"A": "身份即服务", "B": "员工 ID 即服务", "C": "入侵检测即服务", "D": "OAuth"}
explanation_en: Identity as a service (IDaaS) provides an identity platform as a third-party service. This can provide benefits, including integration with cloud services and removing overhead for maintenance of traditional on-premises identity systems, but can also create risk due to third-party control of identity services and reliance on an off-site identity infrastructure.
explanation_zh: 身份即服务 (IDaaS) 提供身份平台作为第三方服务。这可以带来好处，包括与云服务集成以及消除传统本地身份系统的维护开销，但也可能由于身份服务的第三方控制和对异地身份基础设施的依赖而产生风险。

question_en: Gina recently took the CISSP certification exam and then wrote a blog post that included the text of many of the exam questions that she experienced. What aspect of the (ISC)2 Code of Ethics is most directly violated in this situation?
options_en: {"A": "Advance and protect the profession.", "B": "Act honorably, honestly, justly, responsibly, and legally.", "C": "Protect society, the common good, necessary public trust and confidence, and the infrastructure.", "D": "Provide diligent and competent service to principals."}
question_zh: Gina 最近参加了 CISSP 认证考试，然后写了一篇博文，其中包含了她经历的许多考试问题的文本。在这种情况下，(ISC)2 道德准则的哪一方面最直接受到违反？
options_zh: {"A": "促进和保护职业。", "B": "行事诚实、诚实、公正、负责、合法。", "C": "保护社会、共同利益、必要的公众信任和信心以及基础设施。", "D": "为校长提供勤勉、称职的服务。"}
explanation_en: Gina’s actions harm the CISSP certification and information security community by undermining the integrity of the examination process. While Gina also is acting dishonestly, the harm to the profession is more of a direct violation of the (ISC)2 Code of Ethics.
explanation_zh: Gina 的行为破坏了考试过程的完整性，损害了 CISSP 认证和信息安全社区。虽然吉娜也有不诚实的行为，但对职业的伤害更多的是直接违反 (ISC)2 道德准则。

question_en: Gordon is conducting a risk assessment for his organization and determined the amount of damage that flooding is expected to cause to his facilities each year. What metric has Gordon identified?
question_zh: Gordon 正在为其组织进行风险评估，并确定每年洪水预计对其设施造成的损害程度。戈登确定了哪些指标？
explanation_en: The annualized loss expectancy (ALE) is the amount of damage that the organization expects to occur each year as the result of a given risk.
explanation_zh: 年化预期损失 (ALE) 是组织预计每年因给定风险而发生的损失金额。

question_en: Greg would like to implement application control technology in his organization. He would like to limit users to installing only approved software on their systems. What type of application control would be appropriate in this situation?
question_zh: Greg 希望在他的组织中实施应用程序控制技术。他希望限制用户只能在其系统上安装经过批准的软件。在这种情况下，哪种类型的应用程序控制比较合适？
explanation_en: The whitelisting approach to application control allows users to install only those software packages specifically approved by administrators. This would be an appropriate approach in a scenario where application installation needs to be tightly controlled.
explanation_zh: 应用程序控制的白名单方法允许用户仅安装管理员特别批准的软件包。在需要严格控制应用程序安装的情况下，这将是一种合适的方法。

question_en: Frank is the security administrator for a web server that provides news and information to people located around the world. His server received an unusually high volume of traffic that it could not handle and was forced to reject requests. Frank traced the source of the traffic back to a botnet. What type of attack took place?
question_zh: Frank 是一个 Web 服务器的安全管理员，该服务器向世界各地的人们提供新闻和信息。他的服务器收到异常高的流量，无法处理，被迫拒绝请求。弗兰克将流量来源追溯到僵尸网络。发生了什么类型的攻击？
options_zh: {"A": "拒绝服务", "B": "侦察", "C": "妥协", "D": "恶意内部人员"}
explanation_en: This is a clear example of a denial-of-service attack—denying legitimate users authorized access to the system through the use of overwhelming traffic. It goes beyond a reconnaissance attack because the attacker is affecting the system, but it is not a compromise because the attacker did not attempt to gain access to the system. There is no reason to believe that a malicious insider was involved.
explanation_zh: 这是拒绝服务攻击的明显示例 - 通过使用大量流量拒绝合法用户对系统的授权访问。它超越了侦察攻击，因为攻击者正在影响系统，但它不是妥协，因为攻击者没有尝试访问系统。没有理由相信有恶意的内部人员参与其中。

question_en: In the database table shown here, which column would be the best candidate for a primary key? Company ID Company Name Address City State ZIP Code Telephone Sales Rep 1 Acme Widgets 234 Main Street Columbia MD 21040 (301) 555-1212 14 2 Abrams Consulting 1024 Sample Street Miami FL 33131 (305) 555-1995 14 3 Dome Widgets 913 Sorin Street South Bend IN 46556 (574) 555-5863 26
question_zh: 在此显示的数据库表中，哪一列最适合作为主键？公司 ID 公司名称 地址 城市 州 邮政编码 电话销售代表 1 Acme Widgets 234 Main Street Columbia MD 21040 (301) 555-1212 14 2 Abrams Consulting 1024 Sample Street Miami FL 33131 (305) 555-1995 14 3 Dome Widgets 913 Sorin Street South Bend IN 46556 (574) 555-5863 26
options_zh: {"A": "公司 ID", "B": "公司名称", "C": "邮政编码", "D": "销售代表"}
explanation_en: The Company ID column is likely unique for each row in the table, making it the best choice for a primary key. There may be multiple companies that share the same name or ZIP code. Similarly, a single sales representative likely serves more than one company, making those fields unsuitable for use as a unique identifier.
explanation_zh: 公司 ID 列对于表中的每一行可能是唯一的，这使其成为主键的最佳选择。可能有多家公司共享相同的名称或邮政编码。同样，一名销售代表可能为多个公司提供服务，因此这些字段不适合用作唯一标识符。

question_en: Gwen is a cybersecurity professional for a financial services firm that maintains records of their customers. These records include personal information about each customer, including the customer’s name, Social Security number, date and place of birth, and mother’s maiden name. What category best describes these records?
question_zh: Gwen 是一家金融服务公司的网络安全专家，负责维护客户记录。这些记录包括每个客户的个人信息，包括客户的姓名、社会安全号码、出生日期和地点以及母亲的婚前姓名。什么类别最能描述这些记录？
options_zh: {"A": "PHI", "B": "专有数据", "C": "PII", "D": "EDI"}
explanation_en: Personally identifiable information (PII) includes data that can be used to distinguish or trace that person’s identity and also includes information like their medical, educational, financial, and employment information. PHI is personal health information, EDI is electronic data interchange, and proprietary data is used to maintain an organization’s competitive advantage.
explanation_zh: 个人身份信息 (PII) 包括可用于区分或追踪个人身份的数据，还包括医疗、教育、财务和就业信息等信息。 PHI 是个人健康信息，EDI 是电子数据交换，专有数据用于维持组织的竞争优势。

question_en: Bob is configuring egress filtering on his network, examining traffic destined for the internet. His organization uses the public address range 12.8.195.0/24. Packets with which one of the following destination addresses should Bob permit to leave the network?
question_zh: Bob 正在其网络上配置出口过滤，检查发往互联网的流量。他的组织使用公共地址范围 12.8.195.0/24。 Bob 应允许具有以下哪一个目标地址的数据包离开网络？
explanation_en: 129.53.44.124 is a valid public IP address and a legitimate destination for traffic leaving Bob’s network. 12.8.195.15 is a public address on Bob’s network and should not be a destination address on a packet leaving the network. 10.8.15.9 and 192.168.109.55 are both private IP addresses that should not be routed to the internet.
explanation_zh: 129.53.44.124 是有效的公共 IP 地址，也是合法的目的地离开 Bob 网络的流量。 12.8.195.15 是 Bob 网络上的公共地址，不应该是离开网络的数据包的目标地址。 10.8.15.9 和 192.168.109.55 都是私有 IP 地址，不应路由到互联网。

question_en: Brian is considering increasing the length of the cryptographic keys used by his organization. If he adds 8 bits to the encryption key, how many more possible keys will be added to the keyspace for the algorithm?
options_en: {"A": "The size of the keyspace will double.", "B": "The size of the keyspace will increase by a factor of 8.", "C": "The size of the keyspace will increase by a factor of 64.", "D": "The size of the keyspace will increase by a factor of 256."}
question_zh: Brian 正在考虑增加其组织使用的加密密钥的长度。如果他在加密密钥中添加 8 位，那么算法的密钥空间中还会添加多少个可能的密钥？
options_zh: {"A": "键空间的大小将增加一倍。", "B": "密钥空间的大小将增加 8 倍。", "C": "密钥空间的大小将增加 64 倍。", "D": "密钥空间的大小将增加 256 倍。"}
explanation_en: Binary keyspaces contain a number of keys equal to 2 raised to the power of the number of bits. Two to the eighth power is 256, so the keyspace will increase by a factor of 256.
explanation_zh: 二进制密钥空间包含的密钥数量等于 2 的位数次方。 2 的 8 次方为 256，因此密钥空间将增加 256 倍。

question_en: Which of the following data assets may be safely and effectively disposed of using shredding? (Select all that apply.)
question_zh: 以下哪些数据资产可以使用粉碎技术安全有效地处置？ （选择所有适用项。）
options_zh: {"A": "纸质记录", "B": "信用卡", "C": "可移动介质", "D": "SSD 硬盘驱动器"}
explanation_en: Traditional office shredding machines may be used for the disposal of paper records and, depending upon their grade, may also be able to shred credit cards. Industrial shredders are capable of destroying larger pieces of equipment, including removable media and hard drives.
explanation_zh: 传统办公室碎纸机可用于处理纸质记录，并且根据其等级，也可以粉碎信用卡。工业碎纸机能够销毁较大的设备，包括可移动介质和硬盘驱动器。

question_en: GAD Systems is concerned about the risk of hackers stealing sensitive information stored on a file server. They choose to pursue a risk mitigation strategy. Which one of the following actions would support that strategy?
options_en: {"A": "Encrypting the files", "B": "Deleting the files", "C": "Purchasing cyber-liability insurance", "D": "Taking no action"}
question_zh: GAD Systems 担心黑客窃取文件服务器上存储的敏感信息的风险。他们选择采取风险缓解策略。以下哪一项行动将支持该策略？
options_zh: {"A": "加密文件", "B": "删除文件", "C": "购买网络责任保险", "D": "不采取任何行动"}
explanation_en: Encrypting the files reduces the probability that the data will be successfully stolen, so it is an example of risk mitigation. Deleting the files would be risk avoidance. Purchasing insurance would be risk transference. Taking no action would be risk acceptance.
explanation_zh: 加密文件可以降低数据被成功窃取的可能性，因此是风险缓解的示例。删除文件可以避免风险。购买保险就是风险转移。不采取任何行动就等于接受风险。

question_en: Viola is conducting a user account audit to determine whether accounts have the appropriate level of permissions and that all permissions were approved through a formal process. The organization has approximately 50,000 user accounts and an annual employee turnover rate of 24 percent. Which one of the following sampling approaches would be the most effective use of her time when choosing records for manual review?
options_en: {"A": "Select all records that have been modified during the past month.", "B": "Ask access administrators to identify the accounts most likely to have issues and audit those.", "C": "Select a random sample of records, either from the entire population or from the population of records that have changed during the audit period.", "D": "Sampling is not effective in this situation, and all accounts should be audited."}
question_zh: Viola 正在进行用户帐户审核，以确定帐户是否具有适当级别的权限，以及所有权限是否都通过正式流程获得批准。该组织拥有大约 50,000 个用户帐户，年员工流动率为 24%。在选择手动审核记录时，以下哪一种抽样方法最能有效地利用她的时间？
options_zh: {"A": "选择过去一个月内修改过的所有记录。", "B": "要求访问管理员识别最有可能出现问题的帐户并对其进行审核。", "C": "从整个总体或审计期间发生更改的记录总体中选择随机记录样本。", "D": "在这种情况下抽样是无效的，所有的账目都应该被审计。"}
explanation_en: Sampling should be done randomly to avoid human bias. Sampling is an effective process if it is done on a truly random sample of sufficient size to provide effective coverage of the userbase. It is infeasible for a single person to review every single record. In an organization of 50,000 users with a 24 percent annual turnover, it is likely that at least 1,000 of those records have changed in the last month. This is still too many records to review. Asking account administrators to select the records to review is a conflict of interest, as they are the group being audited.
explanation_zh: 抽样应随机进行，以避免人为偏差。如果抽样是在足够大小的真正随机样本上进行的，以提供对用户群的有效覆盖，那么抽样就是一个有效的过程。一个人不可能审查每一条记录。在一个拥有 50,000 名用户且年营业额为 24% 的组织中，上个月可能至少有 1,000 条记录发生了更改。这仍然是太多的记录需要审查。要求帐户管理员选择要审核的记录存在利益冲突，因为他们是正在审核的组。

question_en: Lila is reviewing her organization’s adverse termination process. In that process, when would be the most appropriate time to revoke a user’s access privileges to digital systems?
options_en: {"A": "At the time the user is informed of the termination", "B": "At the end of the last day of employment", "C": "At the time the decision is made", "D": "Several days after the last day of employment"}
question_zh: Lila 正在审查其组织的不利终止流程。在此过程中，什么时候撤销用户对数字系统的访问权限最合适？
options_zh: {"A": "通知用户终止合同时", "B": "雇佣最后一天结束时", "C": "做出决定时", "D": "雇佣最后一天后几天"}
explanation_en: In the case of an involuntary termination under adverse circumstances, the user is being fired and may have a negative and potentially hostile reaction. For this reason, it is important to terminate access immediately upon the user being informed of the termination. Terminating access prior to notification may tip the user off to the termination in advance. Leaving access privileges available after termination poses a risk of malicious insider activity.
explanation_zh: 如果在不利情况下非自愿终止，用户将被解雇，并可能产生负面和潜在的敌意反应。因此，在通知用户终止后立即终止访问非常重要。在通知之前终止访问可能会提前提示用户终止。终止后保留访问权限可能会带来恶意内部活动的风险。

question_en: William is reviewing log files that were stored on a system with a suspected compromise. He finds the log file shown here. What type of log file is this?
question_zh: William 正在检查存储在疑似受到攻击的系统上的日志文件。他找到了此处显示的日志文件。这是什么类型的日志文件？
options_zh: {"A": "防火墙日志", "B": "变更日志", "C": "应用程序日志", "D": "系统日志"}
explanation_en: The file clearly shows HTTP requests, as evidenced by the many GET commands. Therefore, this is an example of an application log from an HTTP server.
explanation_zh: 该文件清楚地显示了 HTTP 请求，正如许多 GET 命令所证明的那样。因此，这是来自 HTTP 服务器的应用程序日志的示例。

question_en: Roger is reviewing a list of security vulnerabilities in his organization and rating them based upon their severity. Which one of the following models would be most useful to his work?
question_zh: Roger 正在审查其组织中的安全漏洞列表，并根据其严重程度对其进行评级。以下哪一种模型对他的工作最有用？
options_zh: {"A": "CVSS", "B": "STRIDE", "C": "PASTA", "D": "ATT&CK"}
explanation_en: The Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) is a standardized approach to rating the severity of vulnerabilities and would be the most helpful tool for Roger’s work. The STRIDE and ATT&CK models are used to classify the nature, not the severity, of threats. The PASTA model is designed to help with countermeasure selection.
explanation_zh: 通用漏洞评分系统 (CVSS) 是一种评估漏洞严重性的标准化方法，将是对 Roger 的工作最有帮助的工具。 STRIDE 和 ATT&CK 模型用于对威胁的性质（而不是严重性）进行分类。 PASTA 模型旨在帮助选择对策。

question_en: An attacker recently called an organization’s help desk and persuaded them to reset a password for another user’s account. What term best describes this attack?
question_zh: 一名攻击者最近致电一个组织的帮助台，并说服他们重置另一个用户帐户的密码。什么术语最能描述这种攻击？
options_zh: {"A": "人类特洛伊木马", "B": "社会工程", "C": "网络钓鱼", "D": "捕鲸"}
explanation_en: Social engineering exploits humans to allow attacks to succeed. Since help-desk employees are specifically tasked with being helpful, they may be targeted by attackers posing as legitimate employees. Trojans are a type of malware, whereas phishing is a targeted attack via electronic communication methods intended to capture passwords or other sensitive data. Whaling is a type of phishing aimed at high-profile or important targets.
explanation_zh: 社会工程利用人类来使攻击成功。由于服务台员工的具体任务是提供帮助，因此他们可能会成为冒充合法员工的攻击者的目标。特洛伊木马是恶意软件的一种，而网络钓鱼是通过电子通信方法进行的有针对性的攻击，旨在捕获密码或其他敏感数据。捕鲸是一种针对引人注目或重要目标的网络钓鱼。

question_en: Greg is evaluating a new vendor that will be supplying networking gear to his organization. Due to the nature of his organization’s work, Greg is concerned that an attacker might attempt a supply chain exploit. Assuming that both Greg’s organization and the vendor operate under reasonable security procedures, which one of the following activities likely poses the greatest supply chain risk to the equipment?
options_en: {"A": "Tampering by an unauthorized third party at the vendor’s site", "B": "Interception of devices in transit", "C": "Misconfiguration by an administrator after installation", "D": "Tampering by an unauthorized third party at Greg’s site"}
question_zh: Greg 正在评估一家将为其组织提供网络设备的新供应商。由于其组织工作的性质，Greg 担心攻击者可能会尝试利用供应链。假设 Greg 的组织和供应商都在合理的安全程序下运营，以下哪一项活动可能对设备造成最大的供应链风险？
options_zh: {"A": "未经授权的第三方在供应商站点进行篡改", "B": "拦截运输途中的设备", "C": "管理员在安装后配置错误", "D": "未经授权的第三方在 Greg 站点进行篡改"}
explanation_en: If the vendor operates with reasonable security procedures, it is unlikely that the devices will be tampered with at the vendor’s site. Similarly, if Greg’s organization has reasonable security procedures, tampering at his site is also unlikely. Misconfiguration by an administrator is always possible, but this is a post-installation risk and not a supply chain risk. It is possible that devices will be intercepted and tampered with while in transit from the vendor to Greg’s organization.
explanation_zh: 如果供应商采用合理的安全程序进行操作，则设备不太可能在供应商站点被篡改。同样，如果格雷格的组织有合理的安全程序，他的网站也不太可能被篡改。管理员配置错误总是有可能的，但这是安装后风险，而不是供应链风险。设备在从供应商运送到 Greg 的组织的过程中可能会被拦截和篡改。

question_en: Kevin is operating in a single-level security environment and is seeking to classify information systems according to the type of information that they process. What procedure would be the best way for him to assign asset classifications?
options_en: {"A": "Assign systems the classification of information that they most commonly process.", "B": "Assign systems the classification of the highest level of information that they are expected to process regularly.", "C": "Assign systems the classification of the highest level of information that they are ever expected to process.", "D": "Assign all systems the same classification level. For questions 41–43, please refer to the following scenario: The organization that Ben works for has a traditional on-site Active Directory environment that uses a manual provisioning process for each addition to their 350-employee company. As the company adopts new technologies, they are increasingly using software as a service applications to replace their internally developed software stack. Ben has been tasked with designing an identity management implementation that will allow his company to use cloud services while supporting their existing systems. Using the logical diagram shown here, answer the following questions about the identity recommendations Ben should make. Business Partner Internet Corporate Secure Border Cloud eCommerce Application Internal Network Active CRM Database Employee Directory Workstations"}
question_zh: Kevin 在单级安全环境中运行，并寻求根据信息系统处理的信息类型对信息系统进行分类。对他来说，分配资产分类的最佳方式是什么？
options_zh: {"A": "为系统分配最常处理的信息分类。", "B": "为系统分配预计定期处理的最高级别信息的分类。", "C": "为系统分配期望处理的最高级别信息的分类。", "D": "为所有系统分配相同的分类级别。对于问题 41-43，请参考以下场景：Ben 工作的组织拥有传统的现场 Active Directory 环境，该环境对拥有 350 名员工的公司的每次新增人员都使用手动配置流程。随着公司采用新技术，他们越来越多地使用软件即服务应用程序来取代其内部开发的软件堆栈。 Ben 的任务是设计一个身份管理实施方案，使他的公司能够在支持现有系统的同时使用云服务。使用此处显示的逻辑图，回答以下有关 Ben 应提出的身份建议的问题。业务合作伙伴 互联网 企业安全边界 云 电子商务应用程序 内部网络 主动 CRM 数据库 员工名录工作站"}
explanation_en: In a single-level security environment, systems should be assigned the classification level of the highest classification of information they are ever expected to process. Systems may not process information that is above their classification level without reclassifying the system upwards.
explanation_zh: 在单级安全环境中，系统应被分配其预期处理的最高信息分类的分类级别。如果不向上重新分类系统，系统可能无法处理高于其分类级别的信息。

question_en: If availability of authentication services is the organization’s biggest priority, what type of identity platform should Ben recommend?
question_zh: 如果身份验证服务的可用性是组织的首要任务，那么 Ben 应推荐哪种类型的身份平台？
explanation_en: A hybrid authentication service can provide authentication services both in the cloud and on-premises, ensuring that service outages due to interrupted links are minimized. An on-site service would continue to work during an internet outage but would not allow the e-commerce website to authenticate. A cloud service would leave the corporate location offline. Outsourcing authentication does not indicate whether the solution is onor off-premises and thus isn’t a useful answer.
explanation_zh: 混合认证服务可以同时提供云端和本地的认证服务，最大限度地减少因链路中断而造成的服务中断。现场服务将在互联网中断期间继续工作，但不允许电子商务网站进行身份验证。云服务将使公司位置离线。外包身份验证并不表明解决方案是在本地还是在外部，因此不是一个有用的答案。

question_en: If Ben needs to share identity information with the business partner shown, what should he investigate?
question_zh: 如果 Ben 需要与所示的业务伙伴共享身份信息，他应该调查什么？
options_zh: {"A": "单点登录", "B": "多重身份验证", "C": "联合", "D": "IDaaS"}
explanation_en: Federation links identity information between multiple organizations. Federating with a business partner can allow identification and authorization to occur between them, making integration much easier. Single sign-on would reduce the number of times a user has to log in but will not facilitate the sharing of identity information. Multifactor can help secure authentication, but again doesn’t help integrate with a third party. Finally, an identity as a service provider might provide federation but doesn’t guarantee it.
explanation_zh: 联合链接多个组织之间的身份信息。与业务合作伙伴联合可以允许在他们之间进行识别和授权，从而使集成变得更加容易。单点登录会减少用户登录的次数，但不利于身份信息的共享。多因素可以帮助确保身份验证的安全，但同样无助于与第三方集成。最后，服务提供商的身份可能会提供联合，但不能保证它。

question_en: What technology is likely to be involved when Ben’s organization needs to provide authentication and authorization assertions to their cloud e-commerce application?
question_zh: 当 Ben 的组织需要为其云电子商务应用程序提供身份验证和授权断言时，可能会涉及哪些技术？
options_zh: {"A": "Active Directory", "B": "SAML", "C": "RADIUS", "D": "SPML"}
explanation_en: Security Assertion Markup Language (SAML) is frequently used to integrate cloud services and provides the ability to make authentication and authorization assertions. Active Directory integrations are possible but are less common for cloud service providers, and RADIUS is not typically used for integrations like this. Service Provisioning Markup Language (SPML) is used to provision users, resources, and services, not for authentication and authorization.
explanation_zh: 安全断言标记语言 (SAML) 经常用于集成云服务，并提供进行身份验证和授权断言的功能。 Active Directory 集成是可能的，但对于云服务提供商来说不太常见，并且 RADIUS 通常不用于此类集成。服务供应标记语言 (SPML) 用于供应用户、资源和服务，而不是用于身份验证和授权。

question_en: Dave is responsible for password security in his organization and would like to strengthen the security of password files. He would like to defend his organization against the use of rainbow tables. Which one of the following techniques is specifically designed to frustrate the use of rainbow tables?
question_zh: Dave 负责其组织中的密码安全，并希望加强密码文件的安全性。他想捍卫他的组织，反对使用彩虹表。以下哪一项技术是专门为阻止彩虹表的使用而设计的？
options_zh: {"A": "密码过期策略", "B": "加盐", "C": "用户教育", "D": "密码复杂度策略"}
explanation_en: Rainbow tables use precomputed password hashes to conduct cracking attacks against password files. They may be frustrated by the use of salting, which adds a specified value to the password prior to hashing, making it much more difficult to perform precomputation. Password expiration policies, password complexity policies, and user education may all contribute to password security, but they are not direct defenses against the use of rainbow tables.
explanation_zh: Rainbow 表使用预先计算的密码哈希值对密码文件进行破解攻击。他们可能会因使用加盐而感到沮丧，加盐会在散列之前向密码添加指定值，从而使执行预计算变得更加困难。密码过期策略、密码复杂性策略和用户教育都可能有助于密码安全，但它们并不是针对彩虹表使用的直接防御。

question_en: Helen recently built a new system as part of her organization’s deception campaign. The system is configured in a manner that makes it vulnerable to attack and that conveys that it might contain highly sensitive information. What term best describes this system?
question_zh: Helen 最近构建了一个新系统，作为其组织欺骗活动的一部分。该系统的配置方式使其容易受到攻击，并表明它可能包含高度敏感的信息。什么术语最能描述这个系统？
explanation_en: A honeypot is a decoy computer system used to bait intruders into attacking. A honeynet is a network of multiple honeypots that creates a more sophisticated environment for intruders to explore. A pseudoflaw is a false vulnerability in a system that may attract an attacker. A darknet is a segment of unused network address space that should have no network activity and, therefore, may be easily used to monitor for illicit activity.
explanation_zh: 蜜罐是一种诱饵计算机系统，用于引诱入侵者进行攻击。蜜网是由多个蜜罐组成的网络，它为入侵者创造了一个更复杂的探索环境。伪缺陷是系统中可能吸引攻击者的虚假漏洞。暗网是一段未使用的网络地址空间，不应有任何网络活动，因此可轻松用于监控非法活动。

question_en: Nandi is evaluating a set of candidate systems to replace a biometric authentication mechanism in her organization. What metric would be the best way to compare the effectiveness of the different systems?
question_zh: Nandi 正在评估一组候选系统，以取代其组织中的生物识别身份验证机制。什么指标是比较不同系统有效性的最佳方法？
explanation_en: The false acceptance rate (FAR) is the rate at which the system inadvertently admits an unauthorized user, while the false rejection rate (FRR) is the rate at which the system inadvertently rejects an authorized user. Both the FAR and FRR may be modified by adjusting the sensitivity of the system. The crossover error rate (CER) is the point where both the false acceptance rate and the false rejection rate cross. The CER is less subject to manipulation and is, therefore, the best metric to use for evaluating systems. The FDR is not a metric used to evaluate authentication systems.
explanation_zh: 错误接受率 (FAR) 是系统无意中接纳未授权用户的比率，而错误拒绝率 (FRR) 是系统无意中拒绝授权用户的比率。 FAR 和 FRR 都可以通过调整系统的灵敏度来修改。交叉错误率（CER）是错误接受率和错误拒绝率交叉的点。 CER 较少受到操纵，因此是用于评估系统的最佳指标。 FDR 不是用于评估身份验证系统的指标。

question_en: Sean suspects that an individual in his company is smuggling out secret information despite his company’s careful use of data loss prevention systems. He discovers that the suspect is posting photos, including the one shown here, to public internet message boards. What type of technique may the individuals be using to hide messages inside this image?
question_zh: Sean 怀疑公司中的某个人正在走私秘密信息，尽管他的公司谨慎使用了数据丢失防护系统。他发现嫌疑人正在将照片（包括此处显示的照片）发布到公共互联网留言板上。人们可能使用什么类型的技术来隐藏该图像中的信息？
options_zh: {"A": "水印", "B": "VPN", "C": "隐写术", "D": "隐蔽定时通道"}
explanation_en: Steganography is the art of using cryptographic techniques to embed secret messages within other content. Steganographic algorithms work by making invisible alterations to files, such as modifying the least significant bits of the many bits that make up image files. VPNs may be used to obscure secret communications, but they provide protection in transit and can’t be used to embed information in an image. Watermarking does embed information in an image but with the intent of protecting intellectual property. A still image would not be used for a covert timing channel because it is a fixed file.
explanation_zh: 隐写术是使用加密技术将秘密消息嵌入其他内容的艺术。隐写算法的工作原理是对文件进行不可见的更改，例如修改组成图像文件的许多位中的最低有效位。 VPN 可用于隐藏秘密通信，但它们提供传输过程中的保护，并且不能用于在图像中嵌入信息。水印确实将信息嵌入图像中，但目的是保护知识产权。静止图像不会用于隐蔽定时通道，因为它是固定文件。

question_en: Roger is concerned that a third-party firm hired to develop code for an internal application will embed a backdoor in the code. The developer retains rights to the intellectual property and will only deliver the software in its final form. Which one of the following languages would be least susceptible to this type of attack because it would provide Roger with code that is human-readable in its final form?
question_zh: Roger 担心受雇为内部应用程序开发代码的第三方公司会在代码中嵌入后门。开发商保留知识产权，并且只会以最终形式交付软件。以下哪一种语言最不容易受到此类攻击，因为它会为 Roger 提供最终形式的人类可读的代码？
options_zh: {"A": "JavaScript", "B": "C", "C": "C++", "D": "Java"}
explanation_en: JavaScript is an interpreted language so the code is not compiled prior to execution, allowing Roger to inspect the contents of the code. C, C++, and Java are all compiled languages—a compiler produces an executable file that is not human-readable.
explanation_zh: JavaScript 是一种解释性语言，因此代码在执行前不会被编译，从而允许 Roger 检查代码的内容。 C、C++ 和 Java 都是编译语言——编译器生成人类无法读取的可执行文件。

question_en: Jesse is looking at the /etc/passwd file on a system configured to use shadowed passwords. What should she expect to see in the password field of this file?
question_zh: Jesse 正在查看配置为使用隐藏密码的系统上的 /etc/passwd 文件。她应该在此文件的密码字段中看到什么？
options_zh: {"A": "明文密码", "B": "加密密码", "C": "哈希密码", "D": "x"}
explanation_en: When a system is configured to use shadowed passwords, the /etc/passwd file contains only the character x in the place of a password. It would not contain any passwords, in either plaintext, encrypted, or hashed form.
explanation_zh: 当系统配置为使用影子密码时，/etc/passwd 文件仅包含字符 x 来代替密码。它不会包含任何明文、加密或散列形式的密码。

question_en: Rob recently received a notice from a vendor that the EOL date is approaching for a firewall platform that is used in his organization. What action should Rob take?
options_en: {"A": "Prepare to discontinue use of the platform as soon as possible.", "B": "Immediately discontinue use of the device.", "C": "Prepare to discontinue use of the device as part of the organization’s normal planning cycle.", "D": "No action is necessary."}
question_zh: Rob 最近收到供应商的通知，称其组织中使用的防火墙平台的 EOL 日期即将到来。罗布应该采取什么行动？
options_zh: {"A": "准备尽快停止使用该平台。", "B": "立即停止使用该设备。", "C": "作为组织正常规划周期的一部分，准备停止使用该设备。", "D": "无需采取任何行动。"}
explanation_en: The end-of-life (EOL) date for a product is normally the date that the vendor will stop selling a product. It is reasonable to continue using the product as long as support remains available. Rob should begin making plans to discontinue use of the product, pending the announcement of an end-of-support (EOS) date.
explanation_zh: 产品的生命周期结束 (EOL) 日期通常是供应商停止销售产品的日期。只要支持仍然可用，就可以继续使用该产品。 Rob 应开始制定停止使用该产品的计划，等待支持终止 (EOS) 日期的公布。

question_en: What principle states that an individual should make every effort to complete his or her responsibilities in an accurate and timely manner?
question_zh: 个人应尽力准确、及时地完成其职责的原则是什么？
options_zh: {"A": "最小特权", "B": "职责分离", "C": "应有谨慎", "D": "尽职调查"}
explanation_en: The due care principle states that an individual should react in a situation using the same level of care that would be expected from any reasonable person. It is a very broad standard. The due diligence principle is a more specific component of due care that states that an individual assigned a responsibility should exercise due care to complete it accurately and in a timely manner. Least privilege says that an individual should have the minimum set of permissions necessary to carry out their work. Separation of duties says that no single person should have the right to perform two distinct tasks, which, when combined, constitute a highly privileged action.
explanation_zh: 应有谨慎原则规定，个人在某种情况下应使用与任何理性人所期望的相同程度的谨慎来做出反应。这是一个非常广泛的标准。尽职调查原则是应有注意的一个更具体的组成部分，它规定被分配责任的个人应该采取应有的注意，准确、及时地完成任务。最小特权是指个人应该拥有执行其工作所需的最低权限。职责分离是指任何人都不应有权执行两项不同的任务，这两项任务结合起来就构成了高度特权的行动。

question_en: Tony is developing a data classification system for his organization. What factor should he use as the primary driver when determining the classification level of each category of information?
question_zh: Tony 正在为其组织开发数据分类系统。在确定每类信息的分类级别时，他应该使用什么因素作为主要驱动因素？
options_zh: {"A": "敏感性", "B": "来源", "C": "盗窃的可能性", "D": "数据丢失的可能性"}
explanation_en: Information should be classified based upon its sensitivity. This may be due to the value of the information to the organization, the damage caused if lost or compromised, or other factors. The source of the information is one possible contributing factor to the sensitivity level. The likelihood of loss or theft is a component of risk, but does not contribute to the classification level.
explanation_zh: 应根据其敏感性对信息进行分类。这可能是由于信息对组织的价值、丢失或泄露造成的损害或其他因素。信息来源是敏感度水平的可能影响因素之一。丢失或被盗的可能性是风险的一个组成部分，但对分类级别没有影响。

question_en: Perry is establishing information handling requirements for his organization. He discovers that the organization often needs to send sensitive information over the internet to a supplier and is concerned about it being intercepted. What handling requirement would best protect against this risk?
options_en: {"A": "Require the use of transport encryption.", "B": "Require proper classification and labeling.", "C": "Require the use of data loss prevention technology.", "D": "Require the use of storage encryption."}
question_zh: Perry 正在为其组织制定信息处理要求。他发现该组织经常需要通过互联网向供应商发送敏感信息，并担心这些信息会被拦截。什么样的处理要求最能防范这种风险？
options_zh: {"A": "要求使用传输加密。", "B": "需要适当的分类和标签。", "C": "要求使用数据丢失防护技术。", "D": "要求使用存储加密。"}
explanation_en: All of these controls are good practices for protecting sensitive information. However, Perry is most concerned about the risk of interception while in transit over the internet. Transport encryption would, therefore, be the most appropriate control, as anyone intercepting the information would be unable to read its contents. Storage encryption would protect against the theft of information at rest, rather than in transit over a network. Classification and labeling would not protect against interception. Data loss prevention technology may block the transfer entirely and would not meet the business requirement if it blocked the transmission and would not meet the security requirement if it did not detect the data transfer.
explanation_zh: 所有这些控制措施都是保护敏感信息的良好实践。然而，佩里最担心的是通过互联网传输时被拦截的风险。因此，传输加密将是最合适的控制，因为任何拦截信息的人都无法读取其内容。存储加密可以防止静态信息被盗，而不是通过网络传输的信息被盗。分类和标签不能防止拦截。数据丢失防护技术可能会完全阻止传输，如果阻止了传输就不能满足业务需求，如果没有检测到数据传输就不能满足安全要求。

question_en: John is developing a tangible asset inventory for his organization. Which of the following items would most likely be included in this inventory? (Select all that apply.)
options_en: {"A": "Intellectual property", "B": "Server hardware", "C": "Files stored on servers", "D": "Mobile devices"}
question_zh: John 正在为其组织开发有形资产清单。以下哪项最有可能包含在此库存中？ （选择所有适用项。）
options_zh: {"A": "知识产权", "B": "服务器硬件", "C": "服务器上存储的文件", "D": "移动设备"}
explanation_en: Tangible asset inventories include physical items owned by the organization. This would include server hardware and mobile devices. Intellectual property and files stored on a server are not tangible property and would instead be included in an intangible asset inventory.
explanation_zh: 有形资产库存包括组织拥有的实物项目。这将包括服务器硬件和移动设备。存储在服务器上的知识产权和文件不是有形财产，而是包含在无形资产清单中。

question_en: Maria is analyzing a security incident where she believes that an attacker gained access to a fiber-optic cable and installed a tap on that cable. What layer of the OSI model did this attack occur at?
question_zh: Maria 正在分析一起安全事件，她认为攻击者访问了光纤电缆并在该电缆上安装了分接头。此攻击发生在 OSI 模型的哪一层？
explanation_en: The Physical layer deals with the electrical impulses or optical pulses that are sent as bits to convey data. This is the layer where cable tapping would occur. Attacks at the Data Link, Network, or Transport layers would involve higher levels of activity in the OSI model, such as compromising a device and using a protocol analyzer to sniff network traffic.
explanation_zh: 物理层处理以比特形式发送的电脉冲或光脉冲以传送数据。这是会发生电缆窃听的层。数据链路、网络或传输层的攻击将涉及 OSI 模型中的更高级别的活动，例如损害设备并使用协议分析器嗅探网络流量。

question_en: Bert is considering the use of an infrastructure as a service cloud computing partner to provide virtual servers. Which one of the following would be a vendor responsibility in this scenario?
options_en: {"A": "Maintaining the hypervisor", "B": "Managing operating system security settings", "C": "Maintaining the host firewall", "D": "Configuring server access control"}
question_zh: Bert 正在考虑使用基础设施即服务云计算合作伙伴来提供虚拟服务器。在这种情况下，以下哪一项是供应商的责任？
options_zh: {"A": "维护虚拟机管理程序", "B": "管理操作系统安全设置", "C": "维护主机防火墙", "D": "配置服务器访问控制"}
explanation_en: In an IaaS server environment, the customer retains responsibility for most server security operations under the shared responsibility model. This includes managing OS security settings, maintaining host firewalls, and configuring server access control. The vendor would be responsible for all security mechanisms at the hypervisor layer and below.
explanation_zh: 在 IaaS 服务器环境中，客户在共担责任模型下保留对大多数服务器安全操作的责任。这包括管理操作系统安全设置、维护主机防火墙和配置服务器访问控制。供应商将负责管理程序层及以下层的所有安全机制。

question_en: When Ben records data and then replays it against his test website to verify how it performs based on a real production workload, what type of performance monitoring is he undertaking?
question_zh: 当 Ben 记录数据，然后在他的测试网站上重放数据以验证其基于真实生产工作负载的性能时，他正在进行什么类型的性能监控？
explanation_en: Proactive monitoring, aka synthetic monitoring, uses recorded or generated traffic to test systems and software. Passive monitoring uses a network span, tap, or other device to capture traffic to be analyzed. Reactive and replay are not industry terms for types of monitoring.
explanation_zh: 主动监控，也称为综合监控，使用记录或生成的流量来测试系统和软件。被动监控使用网络跨度、分路器或其他设备来捕获要分析的流量。反应式和重放不是监控类型的行业术语。

question_en: Kailey is reviewing a set of old records maintained by her organization and wants to dispose of them securely. She is unsure how long the organization should keep the records because they involve tax data. How can Kailey determine whether the records may be disposed?
options_en: {"A": "Consult the organization’s records retention policy.", "B": "Consult IRS requirements.", "C": "Retain the records for at least seven years.", "D": "Retain the records permanently."}
question_zh: Kailey 正在审查她的组织维护的一组旧记录，并希望安全地处理它们。她不确定该组织应保留记录多长时间，因为它们涉及税务数据。 Kailey 如何确定这些记录是否可以处置？
options_zh: {"A": "查阅组织的记录保留政策。", "B": "请参阅 IRS 要求。", "C": "保留记录至少七年。", "D": "永久保留记录。"}
explanation_en: Kailey should consult her organization’s record retentions policy to determine the appropriate length of time to preserve the records. The organization may be subject to tax requirements in this regard, and many accountants recommend preserving records for at least seven years, but the organization’s own requirements may be stricter than these requirements.
explanation_zh: Kailey 应查阅其组织的记录保留政策，以确定保存记录的适当时间长度。该组织可能需要遵守这方面的税务要求，许多会计师建议将记录保存至少七年，但组织本身的要求可能比这些要求更严格。

question_en: Alan is considering the use of new identification cards in his organization that will be used for physical access control. He comes across a sample card and is unsure of the technology. He breaks it open and sees the following internal construction. What type of card is this?
question_zh: 艾伦正在考虑在他的组织中使用新的身份证，用于物理访问控制。他看到一张样本卡，但对这项技术并不确定。他打开它并看到以下内部结构。这是什么类型的卡？
explanation_en: The use of an electromagnetic coil inside the card indicates that this is a proximity card.
explanation_zh: 卡内有电磁线圈，表明这是一张感应卡。

question_en: Mark is planning a disaster recovery test for his organization. He would like to perform a live test of the disaster recovery facility but does not want to disrupt operations at the primary facility. What type of test should Mark choose?
question_zh: Mark 正在计划为其组织进行灾难恢复测试。他想对灾难恢复设施进行现场测试，但不想中断主要设施的运营。马克应该选择什么类型的测试？
options_zh: {"A": "全中断测试", "B": "检查清单审查", "C": "并行测试", "D": "桌面练习"}
explanation_en: During a parallel test, the team actually activates the disaster recovery site for testing, but the primary site remains operational. During a full interruption test, the team takes down the primary site and confirms that the disaster recovery site is capable of handling regular operations. The full interruption test is the most thorough test but also the most disruptive. The checklist review is the least disruptive type of disaster recovery test. During a checklist review, team members each review the contents of their disaster recovery checklists on their own and suggest any necessary changes. During a tabletop exercise, team members come together and walk through a scenario without making any changes to information systems.
explanation_zh: 在并行测试期间，团队实际上激活灾难恢复站点进行测试，但主站点仍保持运行。在全面中断测试期间，团队关闭主站点并确认灾难恢复站点能够处理常规操作。完全中断测试是最彻底的测试，但也是最具破坏性的。检查表审查是灾难恢复测试中破坏性最小的类型。在检查清单审查期间，团队成员各自审查其灾难恢复检查清单的内容并提出任何必要的更改建议。在桌面练习期间，团队成员聚集在一起并演练场景，而不对信息系统进行任何更改。

question_en: Which one of the following is not a principle of the Agile approach to software development?
options_en: {"A": "The best architecture, requirements, and designs emerge from self-organizing teams.", "B": "Deliver working software infrequently, with an emphasis on creating accurate code over longer timelines.", "C": "Welcome changing requirements, even late in the development process.", "D": "Simplicity is essential."}
question_zh: 以下哪一项不是敏捷软件开发方法的原则？
options_zh: {"A": "最好的架构、需求和设计来自自组织团队。", "B": "不频繁地交付工作软件，重点是在较长的时间内创建准确的代码。", "C": "欢迎不断变化的需求，即使是在开发过程的后期。", "D": "简单至关重要。"}
explanation_en: The Agile approach to software development embraces 12 core principles, found in the Agile Manifesto. One of these principles is that the best architecture, requirements, and designs emerge from self-organizing teams. Another is that teams should welcome changing requirements at any step in the process. A third is that simplicity is essential. The Agile approach emphasizes delivering software frequently, not infrequently.
explanation_zh: 软件开发的敏捷方法包含敏捷宣言中的 12 条核心原则。这些原则之一是最好的架构、需求和设计来自自组织团队。另一个是团队应该欢迎流程中任何步骤的需求变化。第三，简单性至关重要。敏捷方法强调频繁而不是不频繁地交付软件。

question_en: During a security audit, Susan discovers that the organization is using hand geometry scanners as the access control mechanism for their secure data center. What recommendation should Susan make about the use of hand geometry scanners?
options_en: {"A": "They have a high FRR and should be replaced.", "B": "A second factor should be added because they are not a good way to reliably distinguish individuals.", "C": "The hand geometry scanners provide appropriate security for the data center and should be considered for other high-security areas.", "D": "They may create accessibility concerns, and an alternate biometric system should be considered."}
question_zh: 在一次安全审计中，Susan 发现该组织正在使用手掌几何扫描仪作为其安全数据中心的访问控制机制。关于手部几何扫描仪的使用，苏珊应该提出什么建议？
options_zh: {"A": "它们的 FRR 很高，应该更换。", "B": "应添加第二个因素，因为它们不是可靠地区分个体的好方法。", "C": "手部几何扫描仪为数据中心提供适当的安全性，并且应考虑用于其他高安全性区域。", "D": "它们可能会造成可访问性问题，因此应考虑使用替代生物识别系统。"}
explanation_en: Hand geometry scanners assess the physical dimensions of an individual’s hand but do not verify other unique factors about the individual, or even verify if they are alive. This means that hand geometry scanners should not be implemented as the sole authentication factor for secure environments. Hand geometry scanners do not have an abnormally high FRR and do not stand out as a particular issue from an accessibility standpoint compared to other biometric systems.
explanation_zh: 手部几何扫描仪评估个人手部的物理尺寸，但不验证有关个人的其他独特因素，甚至不验证他们是否还活着。这意味着手形扫描仪不应作为安全环境的唯一身份验证因素。与其他生物识别系统相比，手部几何扫描仪没有异常高的 FRR，并且从可访问性的角度来看，也不是一个突出的特殊问题。

question_en: Colleen is conducting a business impact assessment for her organization. What metric provides important information about the amount of time that the organization may be without a service before causing irreparable harm?
question_zh: Colleen 正在为其组织进行业务影响评估。什么指标提供了有关组织在造成不可挽回的损害之前可能没有服务的时间长度的重要信息？
explanation_en: The maximum tolerable downtime (MTD) is the amount of time that a business may be without a service before irreparable harm occurs. This measure is sometimes also called maximum tolerable outage (MTO) or maximum allowable downtime (MAD).
explanation_zh: 最大可容忍停机时间 (MTD) 是指企业在发生不可挽回的损害之前可能没有服务的时间量。该措施有时也称为最大可容忍中断 (MTO) 或最大允许停机时间 (MAD)。

question_en: Bailey is concerned that users around her organization are using sensitive information in a variety of cloud services and would like to enforce security policies consistently across those services. What security control would be best suited for her needs?
question_zh: Bailey 担心她的组织周围的用户正在各种云服务中使用敏感信息，并希望在这些服务中一致地实施安全策略。哪种安全控制最适合她的需求？
options_zh: {"A": "DRM", "B": "IPS", "C": "CASB", "D": "DLP"}
explanation_en: Cloud access security brokers (CASB) are designed to enforce security policies consistently across cloud services and would best meet Bailey’s needs. Data loss prevention (DLP) and digital rights management (DRM) solutions may be able to detect, block, and control some use of information in the cloud, but they would not provide a way to consistently enforce security policies across cloud platforms. Intrusion prevention systems (IPS) are designed to detect and block malicious activity and would not be relevant in this scenario.
explanation_zh: 云访问安全代理 (CASB) 旨在跨云服务一致地实施安全策略，最能满足 Bailey 的需求。数据丢失防护 (DLP) 和数字版权管理 (DRM) 解决方案可能能够检测、阻止和控制云中信息的某些使用，但它们无法提供跨云平台一致执行安全策略的方法。入侵防御系统 (IPS) 旨在检测和阻止恶意活动，在这种情况下不相关。

question_en: Matt is designing a set of information handling requirements for his organization and would like to draw upon common industry practices. Which of the following practices should Matt implement? (Select all that apply.)
options_en: {"A": "Labeling both paper and electronic documents with their classification level", "B": "Automatically granting senior executives full access to all classified information", "C": "Automatically granting visitors access to information classified at the lowest level of sensitivity", "D": "Encrypting sensitive information in storage and at rest"}
question_zh: Matt 正在为其组织设计一套信息处理要求，并希望借鉴常见的行业实践。马特应该实施以下哪些做法？ （选择所有适用项。）
options_zh: {"A": "在纸质和电子文档上标记其机密级别", "B": "自动授予高级管理人员对所有机密信息的完全访问权限", "C": "自动授予访问者对最低敏感级别的信息的访问权限", "D": "对存储和静态的敏感信息进行加密"}
explanation_en: Organizations should always label classified information in whatever form, paper or electronic, that it appears. This allows employees to apply proper handling procedures. It is also a common practice to encrypt sensitive information both at rest and in transit. Organizations should grant access to classified information on a need-to-know basis. Automatically granting access to information, whether it is to a visitor or a senior executive, should not occur.
explanation_zh: 组织应始终以任何形式（纸质或电子形式）标记机密信息。这允许员工应用适当的处理程序。对静态和传输中的敏感信息进行加密也是一种常见的做法。组织应在需要了解的基础上授予对机密信息的访问权限。不应自动授予信息访问权限，无论是访问者还是高级管理人员。

question_en: Jerry is investigating an attack where the attacker stole an authentication token from a user’s web session and used it to impersonate the user on the site. What term best describes this attack?
question_zh: Jerry 正在调查一次攻击，攻击者从用户的 Web 会话中窃取身份验证令牌，并用它来冒充网站上的用户。什么术语最能描述这种攻击？
explanation_en: Masquerading (or impersonation) attacks use stolen or falsified credentials to bypass authentication mechanisms. That term does describe this attack, but you should keep reading the answer choices even after finding a possible correct answer. In this case, replay attacks are a more specific type of masquerading attack that relies on captured authentication tokens, and this is, therefore, a better answer. Spoofing attacks rely on falsifying an identity like an IP address or hostname without credentials. Modification attacks occur when captured packets are modified and replayed to a system to attempt to perform an action.
explanation_zh: 伪装（或假冒）攻击使用窃取或伪造的凭据来绕过身份验证机制。该术语确实描述了这种攻击，但即使在找到可能的正确答案后，您也应该继续阅读答案选择。在这种情况下，重放攻击是一种更具体的伪装攻击类型，它依赖于捕获的身份验证令牌，因此这是一个更好的答案。欺骗攻击依赖于伪造身份，例如没有凭据的 IP 地址或主机名。当捕获的数据包被修改并重播到系统以尝试执行操作时，就会发生修改攻击。

question_en: Lisa wants to integrate with a cloud identity provider that uses OAuth 2.0, and she wants to select an appropriate authentication framework. Which of the following best suits her needs?
question_zh: Lisa 希望与使用 OAuth 2.0 的云身份提供商集成，并且她希望选择合适的身份验证框架。以下哪项最适合她的需求？
options_zh: {"A": "OpenID Connect", "B": "SAML", "C": "RADIUS", "D": "Kerberos"}
explanation_en: OpenID Connect is an authentication layer that works with OAuth 2.0 as its underlying authorization framework. It has been widely adopted by cloud service providers and is widely supported. SAML, RADIUS, and Kerberos are alternative authentication technologies but do not have the same level of seamless integration with OAuth.
explanation_zh: OpenID Connect 是一个身份验证层，使用 OAuth 2.0 作为其底层授权框架。它已被云服务提供商广泛采用并得到广泛支持。 SAML、RADIUS 和 Kerberos 是替代身份验证技术，但与 OAuth 的无缝集成程度不一样。

question_en: Owen recently designed a security access control structure that prevents a single user from simultaneously holding the role required to create a new vendor and the role required to issue a check. What principle is Owen enforcing?
question_zh: Owen 最近设计了一种安全访问控制结构，可以防止单个用户同时持有创建新供应商所需的角色和签发支票所需的角色。欧文执行什么原则？
options_zh: {"A": "两人控制", "B": "最低权限", "C": "职责分离", "D": "工作轮换"}
explanation_en: This scenario describes separation of duties—not allowing the same person to hold two roles that, when combined, are sensitive. While two-person control is a similar concept, it does not apply in this case because the scenario does not say that either action requires the concurrence of two users. Least privilege says that an individual should have the minimum set of permissions necessary to carry out their work. Job rotation moves people through jobs on a periodic basis to deter fraud.
explanation_zh: 此场景描述了职责分离 — 不允许同一个人同时担任两个敏感角色。虽然两人控制是一个类似的概念，但它不适用于这种情况，因为该场景没有说明任一操作都需要两个用户的同意。最小特权是指个人应该拥有执行其工作所需的最低权限。工作轮换定期让人们轮换工作，以防止欺诈。

question_en: Denise is preparing for a trial relating to a contract dispute between her company and a software vendor. The vendor is claiming that Denise made a verbal agreement that amended their written contract. What rule of evidence should Denise raise in her defense?
options_en: {"A": "Real evidence rule", "B": "Best evidence rule", "C": "Parol evidence rule", "D": "Testimonial evidence rule"}
question_zh: Denise 正在准备与她的公司和软件供应商之间的合同纠纷有关的审判。供应商声称丹尼斯达成了一项口头协议，修改了他们的书面合同。丹妮丝在辩护中应该提出什么证据规则？
options_zh: {"A": "真实证据规则", "B": "最佳证据规则", "C": "口头证据规则", "D": "证言证据规则"}
explanation_en: The parol evidence rule states that when an agreement between two parties is put into written form, it is assumed to be the entire agreement unless amended in writing. The best evidence rule says that a copy of a document is not admissible if the original document is available. Real evidence and testimonial evidence are evidence types, not rules of evidence.
explanation_zh: 口头证据规则规定，当双方之间的协议以书面形式提出时，除非经过书面修改，否则视为完整协议。最佳证据规则规定，如果有原始文件，则不可接受文件副本。真实证据和证词证据是证据类型，而不是证据规则。

question_en: While Lauren is monitoring traffic on two ends of a network connection, she sees traffic that is inbound to a public IP address show up inside the production network. It is headed for an internal host with an RFC 1918 reserved destination address. What technology should she expect is in use at the network border?
question_zh: 当 Lauren 监控网络连接两端的流量时，她看到入站到公共 IP 地址的流量显示在生产网络内。它前往具有 RFC 1918 保留目标地址的内部主机。她应该期望网络边界使用什么技术？
options_zh: {"A": "NAT", "B": "VLAN", "C": "S/NAT", "D": "BGP"}
explanation_en: Network Address Translation (NAT) translates an internal address to an external address. VLANs are used to logically divide networks, BGP is a routing protocol, and S/NAT is a made-up term.
explanation_zh: 网络地址转换 (NAT) 将内部地址转换为外部地址。 VLAN用于逻辑划分网络，BGP是路由协议，S/NAT是一个虚构的术语。

question_en: Which of the following statements about SSAE-18 are correct? (Select all that apply.)
options_en: {"A": "It mandates a specific control set.", "B": "It is an attestation standard.", "C": "It is used for external audits.", "D": "It uses a framework, including SOC 1, SOC 2, and SOC 3 reports."}
question_zh: 以下关于 SSAE-18 的哪些表述是正确的？ （选择所有适用的选项。）
options_zh: {"A": "它强制要求特定的控制集。", "B": "这是一个认证标准。", "C": "用于外部审核。", "D": "它使用一个框架，包括SOC 1、SOC 2和SOC 3报告。"}
explanation_en: SSAE-18 does not assert specific controls. Instead, it reviews the use and application of controls in an audited organization. It is an attestation standard, used for external audits, and forms part of the underlying framework for SOC 1, 2, and 3 reports.
explanation_zh: SSAE-18 不主张特定控制。相反，它审查受审计组织中控制措施的使用和应用。它是一种认证标准，用于外部审计，并构成 SOC 1、2 和 3 报告的基础框架的一部分。

question_en: Elliott is using an asymmetric cryptosystem and would like to add a digital signature to a message. What key should he use to encrypt the message digest?
options_en: {"A": "Elliott’s private key", "B": "Elliott’s public key", "C": "Recipient’s private key", "D": "Recipient’s public key"}
question_zh: Elliott 使用非对称加密系统，并希望向消息添加数字签名。他应该使用什么密钥来加密消息摘要？
options_zh: {"A": "Elliott 的私钥", "B": "Elliott 的公钥", "C": "接收者的私钥", "D": "接收者的公钥"}
explanation_en: When creating a digital signature, the sender of a message always encrypts the message digest with their own private key. The recipient (or any third party) may then verify the digital signature by decrypting it with the sender’s public key and then comparing that decrypted signature with a message digest that the recipient computes themselves.
explanation_zh: 创建数字签名时，消息的发送者始终使用自己的私钥对消息摘要进行加密。然后，接收者（或任何第三方）可以通过使用发送者的公钥对其进行解密来验证数字签名，然后将解密的签名与接收者自己计算的消息摘要进行比较。

question_en: Greg is building a disaster recovery plan for his organization and would like to determine the amount of time that it should take to restore a particular IT service after an outage. What variable is Greg calculating?
question_zh: Greg 正在为其组织制定灾难恢复计划，并希望确定在中断后恢复特定 IT 服务所需的时间。 Greg 正在计算什么变量？
explanation_en: The recovery time objective (RTO) is the amount of time expected to return an IT service or component to operation after a failure. The maximum tolerable downtime (MTD) is the longest amount of time that an IT service or component may be unavailable without causing serious damage to the organization. The recovery point objective (RPO) identifies the maximum amount of data, measured in time, that may be lost during a recovery effort. Service-level agreements (SLAs) are written contracts that document service expectations.
explanation_zh: 恢复时间目标 (RTO) 是 IT 服务或组件在发生故障后恢复运行的预期时间量。最大可容忍停机时间 (MTD) 是指 IT 服务或组件不可用且不会对组织造成严重损害的最长时间。恢复点目标 (RPO) 确定在恢复工作期间可能丢失的最大数据量（按时间测量）。服务级别协议 (SLA) 是记录服务期望的书面合同。

question_en: What business process typically requires sign-off from a manager before modifications are made to a system?
question_zh: 在对系统进行修改之前，哪些业务流程通常需要经理签字？
options_zh: {"A": "SDN", "B": "发布管理", "C": "变更管理", "D": "版本控制"}
explanation_en: Change management typically requires sign-off from a manager or supervisor before changes are made. This helps to ensure proper awareness and communication. SDN stands for software-defined networking, release management is the process that new software releases go through to be accepted, and versioning is used to differentiate versions of software, code, or other objects.
explanation_zh: 变更管理通常需要在进行变更之前得到经理或主管的签字。这有助于确保适当的意识和沟通。 SDN代表软件定义网络，发布管理是新软件版本被接受的过程，版本控制用于区分软件、代码或其他对象的版本。

question_en: Jen is selecting a fire suppression system for her organization’s data center and would like to narrow down the list of candidates. Which one of the following suppression systems would be LEAST appropriate for use?
question_zh: Jen 正在为其组织的数据中心选择灭火系统，并希望缩小候选范围。以下哪一种抑制系统最不适合使用？
explanation_en: Wet pipe suppression systems have water present in the pipes at all times, posing an unacceptable level of risk for a data center containing electronics that might be damaged if a pipe leaks. Dry pipe and pre-action systems only contain water when triggered in the event of a possible fire. FM-200 is a chemical suppressant commonly used in place of water in data centers.
explanation_zh: 湿管抑制系统的管道中始终存在水，这对包含电子设备的数据中心造成不可接受的风险，如果管道泄漏，电子设备可能会损坏。干管和预作用系统仅在可能发生火灾时触发时才含有水。 FM-200 是一种化学抑制剂，通常在数据中心代替水使用。

question_en: The company Chris works for has notifications posted at each door reminding employees to be careful to not allow people to enter when they do. Which type of control is this?
question_zh: Chris 工作的公司在每个门口都张贴了通知，提醒员工小心不要让别人进入。这是哪种类型的控制？
explanation_en: Notifications and procedures like the signs posted at the company Chris works for are examples of directive access controls. Detective controls are designed to operate after the fact. The doors and the locks on them are examples of physical controls. Preventive controls are designed to stop an event and could also include the locks that are present on the doors.
explanation_zh: 克里斯工作的公司张贴的标志等通知和程序是指令访问控制的示例。检测控制旨在事后操作。门和门上的锁是物理控制的例子。预防性控制旨在阻止事件发生，还可能包括门上的锁。

question_en: Seth is designing the physical security controls for a new facility being constructed by his organization. He would like to deter attacks to the extent possible. Which of the following controls serve as deterrents? (Select all that apply.)
question_zh: Seth 正在为其组织正在建造的新设施设计物理安全控制。他希望尽可能阻止袭击。以下哪项控制措施具有威慑作用？ （选择所有适用项。）
explanation_en: Deterrent controls seek to prevent an intruder from attempting an attack in the first place. Guard dogs have an intimidating presence that serves this purpose well. They do also serve to deny, detect, and delay intrusions depending upon their training. Lighting also deters attacks by making potential intrusions more visible, reducing the likelihood that an intruder will enter a well-lit area. Mantraps are intended to deny intruders access, rather than deter attempts. Motion detectors are intended to detect intruders rather than deter them.
explanation_zh: 威慑控制旨在首先阻止入侵者尝试攻击。看门狗具有令人生畏的存在，可以很好地实现这一目的。根据他们的训练，他们还可以拒绝、检测和延迟入侵。照明还可以使潜在的入侵更加明显，从而降低入侵者进入光线充足区域的可能性，从而阻止攻击。陷阱的目的是拒绝入侵者的访问，而不是阻止入侵者的尝试。运动探测器的目的是检测入侵者而不是阻止他们。

question_en: Thomas recently signed an agreement for a serverless computing environment where his organization’s developers will be able to write functions in Python and deploy them on the cloud provider’s servers for execution. The cloud provider will manage the servers. What term best describes this model?
question_zh: Thomas 最近签署了一项无服务器计算环境协议，他的组织的开发人员将能够用 Python 编写函数并将其部署在云提供商的服务器上执行。云提供商将管理服务器。什么术语最能描述该模型？
options_zh: {"A": "SaaS", "B": "PaaS", "C": "IaaS", "D": "容器化"}
explanation_en: This is an example of function as a service (FaaS) computing. However, FaaS is not listed as an answer choice, so you must also know that FaaS is a subcategory of platform as a service (PaaS) computing to answer this question correctly. This model does not necessarily take advantage of containerization. The cloud provider is managing the infrastructure and only making the platform available to customers, so it is not infrastructure as a service (IaaS). The customers are running their own code, so it is not software as a service (SaaS).
explanation_zh: 这是函数即服务 (FaaS) 计算的示例。但是，FaaS 并未列为答案选择，因此您还必须知道 FaaS 是平台即服务 (PaaS) 计算的子类别，才能正确回答此问题。该模型不一定利用容器化。云提供商负责管理基础设施，并且只向客户提供平台，因此它不是基础设施即服务 (IaaS)。客户运行自己的代码，因此它不是软件即服务 (SaaS)。

question_en: An attacker has intercepted a large amount of data that was all encrypted with the same algorithm and encryption key. With no further information, which of the following cryptanalytic attacks are possible? (Select all that apply.)
options_en: {"A": "Known plaintext", "B": "Chosen ciphertext", "C": "Frequency analysis", "D": "Brute-force For questions 80–82, please refer to the following scenario: Alex has been with the university he works at for more than 10 years. During that time, he has been a system administrator and a database administrator, and he has worked in the university’s help desk. He is now a manager for the team that runs the university’s web applications. Using the provisioning diagram shown here, answer the following questions. B A Provisioning System F Application Servers Incident Management C System E Database Servers Directory Server D Active Directory Enabled Workstations"}
question_zh: 攻击者截获了大量使用相同算法和加密密钥加密的数据。在没有进一步信息的情况下，以下哪些密码分析攻击是可能的？ （请选择所有适用项。）
options_zh: {"A": "已知明文", "B": "选择密文", "C": "频率分析", "D": "暴力破解 第 80-82 题，请参考以下场景： Alex 在他工作的大学工作了 10 多年。在此期间，他担任过系统管理员和数据库管理员，并在大学的服务台工作。他现在是运行该大学网络应用程序的团队的经理。使用此处显示的配置图，回答以下问题。 B A 供应系统 F 应用服务器 事件管理 C 系统 E 数据库服务器 目录服务器 D 支持 Active Directory 的工作站"}
explanation_en: The attacker may attempt to perform frequency analysis or a brute-force attack against the large volume of encrypted ciphertext. As the attacker does not have access to the plaintext information, a known plaintext attack is not possible. The attacker also does not have the ability to encrypt information, so they cannot use a chosen ciphertext attack.
explanation_zh: 攻击者可能会尝试对大量加密密文执行频率分析或暴力攻击。由于攻击者无法访问明文信息，因此不可能进行已知的明文攻击。攻击者也没有加密信息的能力，因此他们无法使用选定的密文攻击。

question_en: If Alex hires a new employee and the employee’s account is provisioned after HR manually inputs information into the provisioning system based on data Alex provides via a series of forms, what type of provisioning has occurred?
options_en: {"A": "Discretionary account provisioning", "B": "Workflow-based account provisioning", "C": "Automated account provisioning", "D": "Self-service account provisioning"}
question_zh: 如果 Alex 雇用了一名新员工，并且 HR 根据 Alex 通过一系列表格提供的数据手动将信息输入配置系统后配置了该员工的帐户，那么发生了哪种类型的配置？
options_zh: {"A": "全权账户配置", "B": "基于工作流程的账户配置", "C": "自动账户配置", "D": "自助服务账户配置"}
explanation_en: Provisioning that occurs through an established workflow, such as through an HR process, is workflow-based account provisioning. If Alex had set up accounts for his new hire on the systems he manages, he would have been using discretionary account provisioning. If the provisioning system allowed the new hire to sign up for an account on their own, they would have used self-service account provisioning, and if there was a central, software-driven process, rather than HR forms, it would have been automated account provisioning.
explanation_zh: 通过已建立的工作流程（例如通过 HR 流程）进行的配置是基于工作流程的账户配置。如果 Alex 在他管理的系统上为他的新员工设置了帐户，他就会使用自主帐户配置。如果配置系统允许新员工自己注册帐户，他们就会使用自助服务帐户配置，如果有一个中央软件驱动的流程，而不是人力资源表格，那么就会使用自动帐户配置。

question_en: Alex has access to B, C, and D in the diagram. What concern should he raise to the university’s identity management team?
options_en: {"A": "The provisioning process did not give him the rights he needs.", "B": "He has excessive privileges.", "C": "Privilege creep may be taking place.", "D": "Logging is not properly enabled."}
question_zh: Alex 有权访问图中的 B、C 和 D。他应该向大学的身份管理团队提出什么担忧？
options_zh: {"A": "配置过程没有给予他所需的权利。", "B": "他拥有过多的特权。", "C": "可能正在发生特权蔓延。", "D": "日志记录未正确启用。"}
explanation_en: As Alex has changed roles, he retained access to systems that he no longer administers. The provisioning system has provided rights to workstations and the application servers he manages, but he should not have access to the databases he no longer administers. Privilege levels are not specified, so we can’t determine if he has excessive rights. Logging may or may not be enabled, but it isn’t possible to tell from the diagram or problem.
explanation_zh: 由于 Alex 改变了角色，他保留了对他不再管理的系统的访问权限。配置系统已向他管理的工作站和应用程序服务器提供了权限，但他不应该有权访问他不再管理的数据库。没有指定权限级别，因此我们无法确定他是否拥有过多的权限。日志记录可能已启用，也可能未启用，但无法从图表或问题中看出。

question_en: When Alex changes roles, what should occur?
options_en: {"A": "He should be de-provisioned, and a new account should be created.", "B": "He should have his new rights added to his existing account.", "C": "He should be provisioned for only the rights that match his role.", "D": "He should have his rights set to match those of the person he is replacing."}
question_zh: 当 Alex 改变角色时，会发生什么？
options_zh: {"A": "应该取消他的配置，并创建一个新帐户。", "B": "他应该将新权利添加到他现有的帐户中。", "C": "应该只为他提供与其角色相匹配的权利。", "D": "他的权利应该与他所取代的人的权利相匹配。"}
explanation_en: When a user’s role changes, they should be provisioned based on their role and other access entitlements. De-provisioning and re-provisioning are time-consuming and can lead to problems with changed IDs and how existing credentials work. Simply adding new rights leads to privilege creep, and matching another user’s rights can lead to excessive privileges due to privilege creep for that other user.
explanation_zh: 当用户的角色发生变化时，应根据其角色和其他访问权限对其进行配置。取消配置和重新配置非常耗时，并且可能会导致 ID 更改以及现有凭据的工作方式出现问题。简单地添加新权限会导致权限蠕变，而匹配另一个用户的权限可能会由于该其他用户的权限蠕变而导致权限过多。

question_en: Robert is reviewing a system that has been assigned the EAL2 evaluation assurance level under the Common Criteria. What is the highest level of assurance that he may have about the system?
options_en: {"A": "It has been functionally tested.", "B": "It has been structurally tested.", "C": "It has been formally verified, designed, and tested.", "D": "It has been semiformally designed and tested."}
question_zh: Robert 正在审查一个已根据通用标准分配 EAL2 评估保证级别的系统。他对该系统的最高程度的保证是什么？
options_zh: {"A": "已经过功能测试。", "B": "它已经过结构测试。", "C": "经过正式验证、设计和测试。", "D": "它已经过半正式设计和测试。"}
explanation_en: EAL2 assurance applies when the system has been structurally tested. It is the second-tolowest level of assurance under the Common Criteria.
explanation_zh: EAL2 保证适用于系统经过结构测试的情况。这是通用标准下第二低的保证级别。

question_en: Adam is processing an access request for an end user. What two items should he verify before granting the access?
options_en: {"A": "Separation and need to know", "B": "Clearance and endorsement", "C": "Clearance and need to know", "D": "Second factor and clearance"}
question_zh: Adam 正在处理最终用户的访问请求。在授予访问权限之前，他应该验证哪两项？
options_zh: {"A": "分离和需要了解", "B": "许可和背书", "C": "许可和需要了解", "D": "第二个因素和许可"}
explanation_en: Before granting any user access to information, Adam should verify that the user has an appropriate security clearance as well as a business need to know the information in question.
explanation_zh: 在授予任何用户访问信息之前，Adam 应验证该用户是否具有适当的安全许可以及了解相关信息的业务需要。

question_en: During what phase of the electronic discovery reference model does an organization ensure that potentially discoverable information is protected against alteration or deletion?
question_zh: 在电子发现参考模型的哪个阶段，组织确保潜在可发现的信息免受更改或删除？
explanation_en: During the preservation phase, the organization ensures that information related to the matter at hand is protected against intentional or unintentional alteration or deletion. The identification phase locates relevant information but does not preserve it. The collection phase occurs after preservation and gathers responsive information. The processing phase performs a rough cut of the collected information for relevance.
explanation_zh: 在保存阶段，组织确保与当前事项相关的信息免受有意或无意的更改或删除。识别阶段定位相关信息但不保留它。收集阶段发生在保存之后并收集响应信息。处理阶段对收集到的信息进行粗略切割以获得相关性。

question_en: Dana is selecting a hash function for use in her organization and would like to balance a concern for a cryptographically strong hash with the speed and efficiency of the algorithm. Which one of the following hash functions would best meet her needs?
question_zh: Dana 正在选择在她的组织中使用的哈希函数，并希望平衡对加密强哈希的关注与算法的速度和效率。以下哪一项哈希函数最能满足她的需求？
explanation_en: The original version of RIPEMD and the MD5hash algorithm have known vulnerabilities and should no longer be used. SHA-2 and SHA-3 are both considered secure today and provide the same level of security. SHA-3 is, however, less efficient than SHA-2, making SHA-2 the better choice for Dana’s needs.
explanation_zh: RIPEMD 的原始版本和 MD5hash 算法存在已知漏洞，不应再使用。如今，SHA-2 和 SHA-3 都被认为是安全的，并且提供相同级别的安全性。然而，SHA-3 的效率低于 SHA-2，这使得 SHA-2 成为满足 Dana 需求的更好选择。

question_en: Harry would like to access a document owned by Sally stored on a file server. Applying the subject/object model to this scenario, who or what is the object of the resource request?
question_zh: Harry 想访问 Sally 拥有的存储在文件服务器上的文档。将主体/客体模型应用到这个场景中，资源请求的对象是谁或者什么？
options_zh: {"A": "Harry", "B": "Sally", "C": "文件服务器", "D": "文档"}
explanation_en: In the subject/object model, the object is the resource being requested by a subject. In this example, Harry would like access to the document, making the document the object of the request.
explanation_zh: 在主体/客体模型中，客体是主体所请求的资源。在此示例中，Harry 希望访问该文档，从而使该文档成为请求的对象。

question_en: What is the process that occurs when the Session layer removes the header from data sent by the Transport layer?
question_zh: 当Session层从Transport层发送的数据中去除头部时，会发生什么过程？
options_zh: {"A": "封装", "B": "数据包解包", "C": "解封装", "D": "有效负载"}
explanation_en: The process of removing a header (and possibly a footer) from the data received from a previous layer in the OSI model is known as de-encapsulation. Encapsulation occurs when the header and/or footer are added. Payloads are part of a virus or malware package that are delivered to a target, and packet unwrapping is a made-up term.
explanation_zh: 从 OSI 模型中的前一层接收到的数据中删除标头（也可能是页脚）的过程称为解封装。添加页眉和/或页脚时会发生封装。有效负载是传送到目标的病毒或恶意软件包的一部分，而数据包解包是一个虚构的术语。

question_en: Rob is reviewing his organization’s campus for physical security using the Crime Prevention Through Environmental Design (CPTED) framework. Which one of the following is NOT a strategy in this framework?
options_en: {"A": "Natural intrusion detection", "B": "Natural access control", "C": "Natural surveillance", "D": "Natural territorial reinforcement"}
question_zh: Rob 正在使用“通过环境设计预防犯罪”(CPTED) 框架审查其组织园区的物理安全。以下哪一项不是该框架中的策略？
options_zh: {"A": "自然入侵检测", "B": "自然访问控制", "C": "自然监视", "D": "自然领土加固"}
explanation_en: CPTED implements three strategies: natural access control, natural surveillance, and natural territorial reinforcement. Natural access control uses barricades and other physical elements to create a separation between secure and insecure spaces. Natural surveillance designs the environment to expose potential intruders to natural scrutiny by legitimate occupants. Natural territorial reinforcement uses fences, signs, and other elements to clearly define secure spaces. Natural intrusion detection is not an element of CPTED.
explanation_zh: CPTED 实施三种策略：自然访问控制、自然监视和自然领土加固。自然访问控制使用路障和其他物理元素在安全和不安全的空间之间创建隔离。自然监视设计的环境使潜在的入侵者受到合法居住者的自然监视。自然领土加固使用栅栏、标志和其他元素来明确界定安全空间。自然入侵检测不是 CPTED 的一个要素。

question_en: What markup language uses the concepts of a requesting authority, a provisioning service point, and a provisioning service target to handle its core functionality?
question_zh: 什么标记语言使用请求机构、供应服务点和供应服务目标的概念来处理其核心功能？
options_zh: {"A": "SAML", "B": "SAMPL", "C": "SPML", "D": "XACML"}
explanation_en: Service Provisioning Markup Language (SPML) uses requesting authorities to issue SPML requests to a provisioning service point. Provisioning service targets are often user accounts and are required to be allowed unique identification of the data in its implementation. SAML is used for security assertions, SAMPL is an algebraic modeling language, and XACML is an access control markup language used to describe and process access control policies in an XML format.
explanation_zh: 服务供应标记语言 (SPML) 使用请求机构向供应服务点发出 SPML 请求。供应服务目标通常是用户帐户，并且需要在其实施中允许对数据进行唯一标识。 SAML用于安全断言，SAMPL是一种代数建模语言，XACML是一种访问控制标记语言，用于以XML格式描述和处理访问控制策略。

question_en: What type of risk assessment uses tools such as the one shown here? Moderate High Risk Risk Probability Low Moderate Risk Risk Impact
question_zh: 哪种类型的风险评估使用此处所示的工具？中等高风险 风险概率 低 中等风险 风险影响
explanation_en: The use of a probability/impact matrix is the hallmark of a qualitative risk assessment. It uses subjective measures of probability and impact, such as “high” and “low,” in place of quantitative measures.
explanation_zh: 使用概率/影响矩阵是定性风险评估的标志。它使用概率和影响的主观衡量标准（例如“高”和“低”）来代替定量衡量标准。

question_en: MAC models use three types of environments. Which of the following is not a mandatory access control design?
question_zh: MAC 型号使用三种类型的环境。以下哪一项不是强制访问控制设计？
explanation_en: Mandatory access control systems can be hierarchical, where each domain is ordered and related to other domains above and below it; compartmentalized, where there is no relationship between each domain; or hybrid, where both hierarchy and compartments are used. There is no concept of bracketing in mandatory access control design.
explanation_zh: 强制访问控制系统可以是分层的，其中每个域都是有序的，并且与其上下的其他域相关；划分，每个域之间没有关系；或混合，其中同时使用层次结构和隔间。强制访问控制设计中没有括号的概念。

question_en: Mandy is the team leader for a project team that includes six people. She would like to provide those people with the ability to communicate privately, such that any pair of people can exchange communications that are not subject to interception by anyone else (team member or nonteam member). She is using an asymmetric encryption algorithm. How many keys are required to implement these requirements?
question_zh: Mandy 是一个由六人组成的项目团队的组长。她希望为这些人提供私下通信的能力，以便任何人都可以交换通信，而不会被其他任何人（团队成员或非团队成员）拦截。她使用的是非对称加密算法。需要多少把钥匙才能实现这些要求？
explanation_en: Asymmetric encryption algorithms require two keys per user, regardless of the number of participants. Therefore, this six-member team would require 12keys. If this team were to use symmetric cryptography, they would require (n*(n-1))/2, or (6*(6-1))/2 = 15keys.
explanation_zh: 非对称加密算法需要每个用户两个密钥，无论参与者数量如何。因此，这个六人团队需要 12 把钥匙。如果该团队要使用对称加密技术，他们将需要 (n*(n-1))/2 或 (6*(6-1))/2 = 15 个密钥。

question_en: Sally is wiring a gigabit Ethernet network. What cabling choices should she make to ensure she can use her network at the full 1000 Mbps she wants to provide to her users?
options_en: {"A": "Cat 5 and Cat 6", "B": "Cat 5e and Cat 6", "C": "Cat 4e and Cat 5e", "D": "Cat 6 and Cat 7"}
question_zh: Sally 正在连接千兆以太网。她应该做出哪些布线选择才能确保能够以她想要向用户提供的 1000 Mbps 的全速使用网络？
options_zh: {"A": "Cat 5 和 Cat 6", "B": "Cat 5e 和 Cat 6", "C": "Cat 4e 和 Cat 5e", "D": "Cat 6 和 Cat 7"}
explanation_en: Category 5e and Category 6 UTP cable are both rated to 1000Mbps. Cat 5 (not Cat 5e) is only rated to 100Mbps, whereas Cat 7 is rated to 10Gbps. There is no Cat 4e.
explanation_zh: 5e 类和 6 类 UTP 电缆的额定速率均为 1000Mbps。 Cat 5（而非 Cat 5e）的额定速率仅为 100Mbps，而 Cat 7 的额定速率为 10Gbps。没有 Cat 4e。

question_en: Ursula is seeking to expand the reach and scalability of her organization’s website. She would like to position copies of her data around the world in locations close to website visitors to reduce loading time and the burden on her servers. What type of cloud service would best meet her needs?
question_zh: Ursula 正在寻求扩大其组织网站的覆盖范围和可扩展性。她希望将世界各地的数据副本放置在靠近网站访问者的位置，以减少加载时间和服务器的负担。哪种类型的云服务最能满足她的需求？
options_zh: {"A": "IaaS", "B": "容器化", "C": "CDN", "D": "SaaS"}
explanation_en: While Ursula may use a variety of different options to meet her needs, the best approach would be the use of a content delivery network (CDN). CDNs are specifically designed for this role, distributing content to many remote endpoints where it may be quickly loaded by local users.
