explanation_zh: 虽然 Ursula 可能会使用各种不同的选项来满足她的需求，但最好的方法是使用内容交付网络 (CDN)。 CDN 是专门为此角色而设计的，可将内容分发到许多远程端点，本地用户可以在其中快速加载内容。

question_en: Robert is the network administrator for a small business and recently installed a new firewall. After seeing signs of unusually heavy network traffic, he checked his intrusion detection system, which reported that a smurf attack was underway. What firewall configuration change can Robert make to most effectively prevent this attack?
options_en: {"A": "Block the source IP address of the attack.", "B": "Block inbound UDP traffic.", "C": "Block the destination IP address of the attack.", "D": "Block inbound ICMP traffic."}
question_zh: Robert 是一家小型企业的网络管理员，最近安装了新的防火墙。在看到异常繁忙的网络流量迹象后，他检查了入侵检测系统，该系统报告称蓝精灵攻击正在进行。 Robert 可以进行哪些防火墙配置更改才能最有效地防止这种攻击？
options_zh: {"A": "封锁攻击源IP地址。", "B": "阻止入站 UDP 流量。", "C": "封锁攻击目的IP地址。", "D": "阻止入站 ICMP 流量。"}
explanation_en: Smurf attacks use a distributed attack approach to send ICMP echo replies at a targeted system from many different source addresses. The most effective way to block this attack would be to block inbound ICMP traffic. Blocking the source addresses is not feasible because the attacker would likely simply change the source addresses. Blocking destination addresses would likely disrupt normal activity. The smurf attack does not use UDP, so blocking that traffic would have no effect.
explanation_zh: Smurf 攻击使用分布式攻击方法从许多不同的源地址向目标系统发送 ICMP 回应回复。阻止此攻击的最有效方法是阻止入站 ICMP 流量。阻止源地址是不可行的，因为攻击者可能只是简单地更改源地址。阻止目标地址可能会扰乱正常活动。 smurf 攻击不使用 UDP，因此阻止该流量不会产生任何效果。

question_en: Which one of the following types of firewalls does not have the ability to track connection status between different packets?
question_zh: 以下哪种类型的防火墙不具备跟踪不同数据包之间的连接状态的能力？
options_zh: {"A": "状态检查", "B": "应用代理", "C": "数据包过滤", "D": "下一代"}
explanation_en: Static packet filtering firewalls are known as first-generation firewalls and do not track connection state. Stateful inspection, application proxying, and next-generation firewalls all add connection state tracking capability.
explanation_zh: 静态数据包过滤防火墙被称为第一代防火墙，不跟踪连接状态。状态检查、应用程序代理和下一代防火墙都增加了连接状态跟踪功能。

question_en: Frances is concerned that equipment failures within her organization’s servers will lead to a loss of power to those servers. Which one of the following controls would best address this risk?
options_en: {"A": "Redundant power sources", "B": "Backup generators", "C": "Dual power supplies", "D": "Uninterruptible power supplies"}
question_zh: Frances 担心其组织服务器内的设备故障将导致这些服务器断电。以下哪一项控制措施最能解决这一风险？
options_zh: {"A": "冗余电源", "B": "备用发电机", "C": "双电源", "D": "不间断电源"}
explanation_en: All of these controls serve to increase the reliability of power to a server. However, only dual power supplies address hardware issues that arise within the server, allowing the server to continue operation if one of the power supplies fails. Redundant power sources, backup generators, and uninterruptible power supplies (UPS) are designed to increase the reliability of power flowing to the server.
explanation_zh: 所有这些控制都用于提高服务器供电的可靠性。然而，只有双电源才能解决服务器内出现的硬件问题，从而在其中一个电源发生故障时允许服务器继续运行。冗余电源、备用发电机和不间断电源 (UPS) 旨在提高服务器电源的可靠性。

question_en: Peter is reviewing the remote access technologies used by his organization and would like to eliminate the use of any techniques that do not include built-in encryption. Which of the following approaches should he retain? (Select all that apply.)
question_zh: Peter 正在审查其组织使用的远程访问技术，并希望消除使用任何不包含内置加密的技术。他应该保留以下哪一种方法？ （选择所有适用项。）
options_zh: {"A": "RDP", "B": "Telnet", "C": "SSH", "D": "拨号"}
explanation_en: The Remote Desktop Protocol (RDP) and Secure Shell (SSH) are modern approaches to remote access that include encryption features. Telnet and dial-up are outdated approaches that do not provide encryption and should not be relied upon for secure access.
explanation_zh: 远程桌面协议 (RDP) 和安全外壳 (SSH) 是包含加密功能的现代远程访问方法。 Telnet 和拨号是过时的方法，不提供加密，不应依赖它们来进行安全访问。

question_en: Matthew is experiencing issues with the quality of network service on his organization’s network. The primary symptom is that packets are occasionally taking too long to travel from their source to their destination. The length of this delay changes for individual packets. What term describes the issue Matthew is facing?
question_zh: Matthew 在其组织的网络上遇到网络服务质量问题。主要症状是数据包从源到目的地的传输时间有时会过长。对于各个数据包，此延迟的长度会发生变化。什么术语描述了马太面临的问题？
explanation_en: Latency is a delay in the delivery of packets from their source to their destination. Jitter is a variation in the latency for different packets. Packet loss is the disappearance of packets in transit that requires retransmission. Interference is electrical noise or other disruptions that corrupt the contents of packets.
explanation_zh: 延迟是数据包从源到目的地传输过程中的延迟。抖动是不同数据包的延迟变化。数据包丢失是指数据包在传输过程中消失，需要重新传输。干扰是电噪声或其他破坏数据包内容的干扰。

question_en: Gavin is an internal auditor working to assess his organization’s cybersecurity posture. Which of the following would be appropriate recipients of the reports he generates from his work? (Select all that apply.)
question_zh: Gavin 是一名内部审计师，致力于评估其组织的网络安全状况。以下哪一位是他从工作中生成的报告的合适接收者？ （选择所有适用项。）
options_zh: {"A": "经理", "B": "个人贡献者", "C": "供应商", "D": "董事会成员"}
explanation_en: It is entirely appropriate to distribute internal audit reports to anyone in the organization who has a valid need to know. This may include both management and individual contributors responsible for remediating issues as well as board members charged with oversight. It would not normally be appropriate to distribute internal audit reports to external entities, such as suppliers and customers.
explanation_zh: 将内部审计报告分发给组织中有切实需要了解的任何人是完全合适的。这可能包括负责修复问题的管理层和个人贡献者以及负责监督的董事会成员。通常不适合将内部审计报告分发给外部实体，例如供应商和客户。

question_en: Kim is conducting testing of a web application developed by her organization and would like to ensure that it is accessible from all commonly used web browsers. What type of testing should she conduct?
question_zh: Kim 正在测试她的组织开发的 Web 应用程序，并希望确保可以从所有常用的 Web 浏览器访问该应用程序。她应该进行什么类型的测试？
options_zh: {"A": "回归测试", "B": "接口测试", "C": "模糊测试", "D": "白盒测试"}
explanation_en: Web applications communicate with web browsers via an interface, making interface testing the best answer here. Regression testing might be used as part of the interface test but is too specific to be the best answer. Similarly, the test might be a white-box, or full knowledge, test, but interface testing better describes this specific example. Fuzzing is less likely as part of a browser compatibility test, as it tests unexpected inputs, rather than functionality.
explanation_zh: Web 应用程序通过接口与 Web 浏览器通信，这使得接口测试成为最佳答案。回归测试可以用作接口测试的一部分，但过于具体，无法成为最佳答案。同样，测试可能是白盒测试或完全知识测试，但接口测试更好地描述了这个特定的示例。模糊测试不太可能作为浏览器兼容性测试的一部分，因为它测试意外的输入，而不是功能。

question_en: Kathleen is implementing an access control system for her organization and builds the following array: Reviewers: update files, delete files Submitters: upload files Editors: upload files, update files Archivists: delete files What type of access control system has Kathleen implemented?
options_en: {"A": "Role-based access control", "B": "Task-based access control", "C": "Rule-based access control", "D": "Discretionary access control"}
question_zh: Kathleen 正在为其组织实施访问控制系统，并构建以下数组： 审阅者：更新文件、删除文件 提交者：上传文件 编辑者：上传文件、更新文件 档案管理员：删除文件 Kathleen 实施了哪种类型的访问控制系统？
options_zh: {"A": "基于角色的访问控制", "B": "基于任务的访问控制", "C": "基于规则的访问控制", "D": "自主访问控制"}
explanation_en: Role-based access control gives each user an array of permissions based on their position in the organization, such as the scheme shown here. Task-based access control is not a standard approach. Rule-based access controls use rules that apply to all subjects, which isn’t something we see in the list. Discretionary access control gives object owners rights to choose how the objects they own are accessed, which is not what this list shows.
explanation_zh: 基于角色的访问控制根据每个用户在组织中的位置为每个用户提供一系列权限，例如此处所示的方案。基于任务的访问控制不是标准方法。基于规则的访问控制使用适用于所有主题的规则，这不是我们在列表中看到的内容。自主访问控制赋予对象所有者选择如何访问其拥有的对象的权利，这不是此列表显示的内容。

question_en: Alan is installing a fire suppression system that will activate after a fire breaks out and protect the equipment in the data center from extensive damage. What metric is Alan attempting to lower?
question_zh: Alan 正在安装灭火系统，该系统将在火灾发生后启动，保护数据中心的设备免受大范围损坏。艾伦试图降低什么指标？
explanation_en: Fire suppression systems do not stop a fire from occurring but do reduce the damage that fires cause. This is an example of reducing risk by lowering the impact of an event.
explanation_zh: 灭火系统不能阻止火灾发生，但可以减少火灾造成的损害。这是通过降低事件影响来降低风险的示例。

question_en: Alan’s Wrenches recently developed a new manufacturing process for its product. They plan to use this technology internally and not share it with others. They would like it to remain protected for as long as possible. What type of intellectual property protection is best suited for this situation?
question_zh: Alan’s Wrenches 最近为其产品开发了一种新的制造工艺。他们计划在内部使用这项技术，而不是与他人分享。他们希望它能够尽可能长时间地受到保护。哪种类型的知识产权保护最适合这种情况？
explanation_en: Patents and trade secrets can both protect intellectual property in the form of a process. Patents require public disclosure and have expiration dates while trade secrets remain in force for as long as they remain secret. Therefore, trade secret protection most closely aligns with the company’s goals.
explanation_zh: 专利和商业秘密都可以以流程的形式保护知识产权。专利需要公开披露并有有效期，而商业秘密只要保密，就一直有效。因此，商业秘密保护与公司的目标最为契合。

question_en: Ben wants to interface with the National Vulnerability Database using a standardized protocol. What option should he use to ensure that the tools he builds work with the data contained in the NVD?
question_zh: Ben 希望使用标准化协议与国家漏洞数据库进行交互。他应该使用什么选项来确保他构建的工具能够与 NVD 中包含的数据配合使用？
options_zh: {"A": "XACML", "B": "SCML", "C": "VSML", "D": "SCAP"}
explanation_en: The Security Content Automation Protocol (SCAP) is a suite of specifications used to handle vulnerability and security configuration information. The National Vulnerability Database provided by NIST uses SCAP. XACML is the eXtensible Access Control Markup Language, an OASIS standard used for access control decisions, and neither VSML nor SCML is an industry term.
explanation_zh: 安全内容自动化协议 (SCAP) 是一套用于处理漏洞和安全配置信息的规范。 NIST 提供的国家漏洞数据库使用 SCAP。 XACML 是可扩展访问控制标记语言，是用于访问控制决策的 OASIS 标准，VSML 和 SCML 都不是行业术语。

question_en: Ron’s organization does not have the resources to conduct penetration testing that uses time-intensive manual techniques, but he would like to achieve some of the benefits of penetration testing. Which one of the following techniques could he engage in that requires the least manual effort?
options_en: {"A": "White-box testing", "B": "Black-box testing", "C": "Gray-box testing", "D": "Breach and attack simulation"}
question_zh: Ron 的组织没有资源来进行使用耗时的手动技术的渗透测试，但他希望实现渗透测试的一些好处。他可以采用以下哪一项需要最少手动操作的技术？
options_zh: {"A": "白盒测试", "B": "黑盒测试", "C": "灰盒测试", "D": "违规和攻击模拟"}
explanation_en: Breach and attack simulation (BAS) platforms are intended to automate some aspects of penetration testing. These systems are designed to inject threat indicators onto systems and networks in an effort to trigger other security controls. White-box, gray-box, and black-box testing all involve more significant manual effort.
explanation_zh: 违规和攻击模拟 (BAS) 平台旨在自动化渗透测试的某些方面。这些系统旨在将威胁指示器注入系统和网络，以触发其他安全控制。白盒、灰盒和黑盒测试都需要更多的手动工作。

question_en: In the figure shown here, Harry’s request to read the data file is blocked. Harry has a Secret security clearance, and the data file has a Top Secret classification. What principle of the Bell–LaPadula model blocked this request? Read Request Harry Data File
options_en: {"A": "Simple Security Property", "B": "Simple Integrity Property", "C": "*-Security Property", "D": "Discretionary Security Property"}
question_zh: 在此所示的图中，Harry 读取数据文件的请求被阻止。 Harry 拥有秘密安全许可，并且数据文件具有绝密分类。贝尔-拉帕杜拉模型的什么原理阻止了这一请求？读取请求 Harry 数据文件
options_zh: {"A": "简单安全属性", "B": "简单完整性属性", "C": "*-安全属性", "D": "任意安全属性"}
explanation_en: The Simple Security Property prevents an individual from reading information at a higher security level than his or her clearance allows. This is also known as the “no read up” rule. The Simple Integrity Property says that a user can’t write data to a higher integrity level than their own. The *-Security Property says that users can’t write data to a lower security level than their own. The Discretionary Security Property allows the use of a matrix to determine access permissions.
explanation_zh: 简单安全属性可防止个人读取高于其权限允许的安全级别的信息。这也称为“禁止阅读”规则。简单完整性属性表示用户不能将数据写入比自己更高的完整性级别。 *-Security 属性表示用户不能将数据写入比自己更低的安全级别。自主安全属性允许使用矩阵来确定访问权限。

question_en: Norm is starting a new software project with a vendor that uses an SDLC approach to development. When he arrives on the job, he receives a document that has the sections shown here. What type of planning document is this? Executive Summary section with a high-level schedule of key activities and milestones Detailed project tasks for the applicable SDLC phases Special interest areas tracked outside the SDLC phase areas as required
options_en: {"A": "Functional requirements", "B": "Work breakdown structure", "C": "Test analysis report", "D": "Project plan"}
question_zh: Norm 正在与一家使用 SDLC 开发方法的供应商启动一个新的软件项目。当他到达工作岗位时，他会收到一份包含此处所示部分的文档。这是什么类型的规划文件？执行摘要部分，包含关键活动和里程碑的高级时间表 适用的 SDLC 阶段的详细项目任务 根据需要在 SDLC 阶段区域之外跟踪的特殊兴趣领域
options_zh: {"A": "功能需求", "B": "工作分解结构", "C": "测试分析报告", "D": "项目计划"}
explanation_en: The work breakdown structure (WBS) is an important project management tool that divides the work done for a large project into smaller components. It is not a project plan because it does not describe timing or resources. Test analyses are used during later phases of the development effort to report test results. Functional requirements may be included in a work breakdown structure, but they are not the full WBS.
explanation_zh: 工作分解结构 (WBS) 是一个重要的项目管理工具，它将大型项目完成的工作划分为更小的组件。它不是项目计划，因为它没有描述时间或资源。在开发工作的后期阶段使用测试分析来报告测试结果。功能需求可能包含在工作分解结构中，但它们不是完整的 WBS。

question_en: Kolin is searching for a network security solution that will allow him to help reduce zeroday attacks while using identities to enforce a security policy on systems before they connect to the network. What type of solution should Kolin implement?
options_en: {"A": "A firewall", "B": "A NAC system", "C": "An intrusion detection system", "D": "Port security"}
question_zh: Kolin 正在寻找一种网络安全解决方案，帮助他减少零日攻击，同时在系统连接到网络之前使用身份在系统上实施安全策略。 Kolin 应该实施什么类型的解决方案？
options_zh: {"A": "防火墙", "B": "NAC 系统", "C": "入侵检测系统", "D": "端口安全"}
explanation_en: Network Access Control (NAC) systems can be used to authenticate users and then validate their system’s compliance with a security standard before they are allowed to connect to the network. Enforcing security profiles can help reduce zero-day attacks, making NAC a useful solution. A firewall can’t enforce system security policies, whereas an IDS can only monitor for attacks and alarm when they happen. Thus, neither a firewall nor an IDS meets Kolin’s needs. Finally, port security is a MAC address-based security feature that can only restrict which systems or devices can connect to a given port.
explanation_zh: 网络访问控制 (NAC) 系统可用于对用户进行身份验证，然后在允许用户连接到网络之前验证其系统是否符合安全标准。实施安全配置文件有助于减少零日攻击，使 NAC 成为有用的解决方案。防火墙无法强制执行系统安全策略，而 IDS 只能监控攻击并在攻击发生时发出警报。因此，无论是防火墙还是IDS都不能满足Kolin的需求。最后，端口安全是一种基于 MAC 地址的安全功能，只能限制哪些系统或设备可以连接到给定端口。

question_en: Gwen comes across an application that is running under a service account on a web server. The service account has full administrative rights to the server. What principle of information security does this violate?
options_en: {"A": "Need to know", "B": "Separation of duties", "C": "Least privilege", "D": "Job rotation"}
question_zh: Gwen 遇到一个在 Web 服务器上的服务帐户下运行的应用程序。服务帐户拥有服务器的完全管理权限。这违反了信息安全的什么原则？
options_zh: {"A": "需要知道", "B": "职责分离", "C": "最小权限", "D": "工作轮换"}
explanation_en: This scenario violates the least privilege principle because an application should never require full administrative rights to run. Gwen should update the service account to have only the privileges necessary to support the application.
explanation_zh: 此场景违反了最小权限原则，因为应用程序永远不应该需要完全的管理权限才能运行。 Gwen 应更新服务帐户，使其仅具有支持应用程序所需的权限。

question_en: Ed is developing a set of key performance and risk indicators for his organization’s information security program. Which of the following are commonly used indicators? (Select all that apply.)
options_en: {"A": "Number of scheduled audits", "B": "Time to resolve vulnerabilities", "C": "Number of malicious site visit attempts", "D": "Number of account compromises"}
question_zh: Ed 正在为其组织的信息安全计划开发一套关键绩效和风险指标。以下哪些是常用的指标？ （选择所有适用项。）
options_zh: {"A": "计划审核次数", "B": "解决漏洞的时间", "C": "恶意站点访问尝试次数", "D": "帐户泄露次数"}
explanation_en: Organizations typically use the time to resolve vulnerabilities, the number of account compromises, and the number of attempts by users to visit malicious sites as indicators. The number of scheduled audits is not normally a measure of the performance of an information security team. A more appropriate indicator in this area is the number of repeat audit findings.
explanation_zh: 组织通常使用解决漏洞的时间、帐户泄露次数以及用户尝试访问恶意站点的次数作为指标。计划审核的数量通常不是衡量信息安全团队绩效的标准。该领域更合适的指标是重复审计结果的数量。

question_en: Kara is documenting the results of a vulnerability scan. After reviewing one finding, she determined that the vulnerability did exist. The team then implemented a configuration change that corrected the issue. How should Kara classify this vulnerability in her report?
options_en: {"A": "True positive", "B": "True negative", "C": "False positive", "D": "False negative For questions 114–116, please refer to the following scenario: During a web application vulnerability scanning test, Steve runs Nikto against a web server he believes may be vulnerable to attacks. Using the Nikto output shown here, answer the following questions."}
question_zh: Kara 正在记录漏洞扫描的结果。在审查了一项发现后，她确定该漏洞确实存在。随后，团队实施了配置更改来纠正该问题。 Kara 应该如何在她的报告中对这个漏洞进行分类？
options_zh: {"A": "真阳性", "B": "真阴性", "C": "假阳性", "D": "假阴性 对于问题 114-116，请参考以下场景： 在 Web 应用程序漏洞扫描测试期间，Steve 对他认为可能容易受到攻击的 Web 服务器运行 Nikto。使用此处显示的 Nikto 输出，回答以下问题。"}
explanation_en: This is a true positive report because the scan detected the vulnerability and the vulnerability actually existed. The fact that the team later remediated the vulnerability could be noted in the report, but it does not change the result of the scan or its classification. True negatives occur when scans correctly note the absence of a vulnerability. False positives occur when scans report the presence of a vulnerability that does not actually exist. False negatives occur when scans report that no vulnerability exists when one does, in fact, exist.
explanation_zh: 这是一个真实的正面报告，因为扫描检测到了该漏洞并且该漏洞确实存在。报告中可能会指出该团队后来修复了该漏洞，但这不会改变扫描结果或其分类。当扫描正确地指出不存在漏洞时，就会出现真正的阴性结果。当扫描报告存在实际并不存在的漏洞时，就会出现误报。当扫描报告不存在漏洞而实际上存在漏洞时，就会出现漏报。

question_en: Why does Nikto flag the /test directory?
options_en: {"A": "The /test directory allows administrative access to PHP.", "B": "It is used to store sensitive data.", "C": "Test directories often contain scripts that can be misused.", "D": "It indicates a potential compromise."}
question_zh: 为什么 Nikto 标记 /test 目录？
options_zh: {"A": "/test 目录允许对 PHP 进行管理访问。", "B": "用于存储敏感数据。", "C": "测试目录通常包含可能被滥用的脚本。", "D": "它表示潜在的妥协。"}
explanation_en: Test directories often include scripts that may have poor protections or may have other data that can be misused. There is not a default test directory that allows administrative access to PHP. Test directories are not commonly used to store sensitive data, nor is the existence of a test directory a common indicator of compromise.
explanation_zh: 测试目录通常包含保护措施较差或可能包含其他可能被滥用的数据的脚本。没有允许对 PHP 进行管理访问的默认测试目录。测试目录通常不用于存储敏感数据，测试目录的存在也不是常见的妥协指标。

question_en: Why does Nikto identify directory indexing as an issue?
options_en: {"A": "It lists files in a directory.", "B": "It may allow for XDRF.", "C": "Directory indexing can result in a denial-of-service attack.", "D": "Directory indexing is off by default, potentially indicating compromise."}
question_zh: 为什么 Nikto 认为目录索引是一个问题？
options_zh: {"A": "它列出目录中的文件。", "B": "它可能允许 XDRF。", "C": "目录索引可能会导致拒绝服务攻击。", "D": "目录索引默认处于关闭状态，这可能表明存在泄露。"}
explanation_en: Directory indexing may not initially seem like an issue during a penetration test, but simply knowing the name and location of files can provide an attacker with quite a bit of information about an organization, as well as a list of potentially accessible files. XDRF is not a type of attack, and indexing is not a denial-of-service attack vector. Directory indexing being turned on is typically either due to misconfiguration or design or because the server was not properly configured at setup, rather than being a sign of attack.
explanation_zh: 在渗透测试期间，目录索引最初看起来可能不像是一个问题，但仅仅知道文件的名称和位置就可以为攻击者提供大量有关组织的信息，以及潜在可访问文件的列表。 XDRF 不是一种攻击，索引也不是拒绝服务攻击媒介。目录索引被打开通常是由于错误配置或设计，或者是因为服务器在设置时未正确配置，而不是攻击的迹象。

question_en: Nikto lists OSVDB-877, noting that the system may be vulnerable to XST. What would this type of attack allow an attacker to do?
options_en: {"A": "Use cross-site targeting.", "B": "Steal a user’s cookies.", "C": "Counter SQL tracing.", "D": "Modify a user’s TRACE information."}
question_zh: Nikto 列出了 OSVDB-877，并指出该系统可能容易受到 XST 的攻击。这种类型的攻击允许攻击者做什么？
options_zh: {"A": "使用跨站点定位。", "B": "窃取用户的cookie。", "C": "计数器 SQL 跟踪。", "D": "修改用户的TRACE信息。"}
explanation_en: Cross-site tracing (XST) leverages the HTTP TRACE or TRACK methods and could be used to steal a user’s cookies via cross-site scripting (XSS). The other options are not industry terms for web application or web server attacks or vulnerabilities.
explanation_zh: 跨站点跟踪 (XST) 利用 HTTP TRACE 或 TRACK 方法，可用于通过跨站点脚本 (XSS) 窃取用户的 cookie。其他选项不是 Web 应用程序或 Web 服务器攻击或漏洞的行业术语。

question_en: Who would be the most appropriate supervisor for an organization’s chief audit executive (CAE)?
question_zh: 谁是组织首席审计执行官 (CAE) 的最合适主管？
options_zh: {"A": "CIO", "B": "CISO", "C": "CEO", "D": "CFO"}
explanation_en: The chief audit executive (CAE) should report to the most senior possible leader to avoid conflicts of interest. Of the choices provided, the chief executive officer (CEO) is the most senior position and the best option. It is also possible to provide an added degree of independence by having the CAE report to the board of directors, either as a primary reporting line or as a dotted line relationship.
explanation_zh: 首席审计执行官 (CAE) 应向最高级别领导汇报，以避免利益冲突。在提供的选择中，首席执行官（CEO）是最高级别的职位，也是最佳选择。通过让 CAE 作为主要报告关系或虚线关系向董事会报告，还可以提供额外的独立性。

question_en: Ursula believes that many individuals in her organization are storing sensitive information on their laptops in a manner that is unsafe and potentially violates the organization’s security policy. What control can she use to identify the presence of these files?
question_zh: Ursula 认为，她的组织中的许多人都以不安全且可能违反组织安全策略的方式在笔记本电脑上存储敏感信息。她可以使用什么控制来识别这些文件的存在？
options_zh: {"A": "网络 DLP", "B": "网络 IPS", "C": "端点 DLP", "D": "端点 IPS"}
explanation_en: Data loss prevention (DLP) systems specialize in the identification of sensitive information. In this case, Ursula would like to identify the presence of this information on endpoint devices, so she should choose an endpoint DLP control. Network-based DLP would not detect stored information unless the user transmits it over the network. Intrusion prevention systems (IPSs) are designed to detect and block attacks in progress, not necessarily the presence of sensitive information.
explanation_zh: 数据丢失防护 (DLP) 系统专门用于识别敏感信息。在这种情况下，Ursula 希望识别端点设备上是否存在此信息，因此她应该选择端点 DLP 控件。基于网络的 DLP 不会检测存储的信息，除非用户通过网络传输信息。入侵防御系统 (IPS) 旨在检测和阻止正在进行的攻击，而不一定是敏感信息的存在。

question_en: In what cloud computing model does the customer build a cloud computing environment in his or her own data center or build an environment in another data center that is for the customer’s exclusive use?
question_zh: 客户是在自己的数据中心搭建云计算环境，还是在其他数据中心搭建客户专用的环境，采用什么云计算模式？
explanation_en: In the private cloud computing model, the cloud computing environment is dedicated to a single organization and does not follow the shared tenancy model. The environment may be built by the company in its own data center or built by a vendor at a co-location site.
explanation_zh: 在私有云计算模型中，云计算环境专用于单个组织，不遵循共享租赁模型。该环境可以由公司在自己的数据中心构建，也可以由供应商在托管站点构建。

question_en: Which one of the following technologies is designed to prevent a web server going offline from becoming a single point of failure in a web application architecture?
question_zh: 以下哪一项技术旨在防止 Web 服务器离线成为 Web 应用架构中的单点故障？
options_zh: {"A": "负载平衡", "B": "双电源", "C": "IPS", "D": "RAID"}
explanation_en: Load balancing helps to ensure that a failed server will not take a website or service offline. Dual power supplies only work to prevent failure of a power supply or power source. IPS can help to prevent attacks, and RAID can help prevent a disk failure from taking a system offline.
explanation_zh: 负载平衡有助于确保发生故障的服务器不会导致网站或服务离线。双电源仅用于防止电源或电源出现故障。 IPS 可以帮助防止攻击，RAID 可以帮助防止磁盘故障导致系统脱机。

question_en: Alice wants to send Bob a message with the confidence that Bob will know the message was not altered while in transit. What security goal is Alice trying to achieve?
question_zh: Alice 希望向 Bob 发送一条消息，并确信 Bob 会知道消息在传输过程中没有被更改。 Alice 想要实现什么安全目标？
options_zh: {"A": "机密性", "B": "不可否认性", "C": "身份验证", "D": "完整性"}
explanation_en: Integrity ensures that unauthorized changes are not made to data while stored or in transit.
explanation_zh: 完整性确保在存储或传输过程中不会对数据进行未经授权的更改。

question_en: What network topology is shown here?
question_zh: 这里显示的网络拓扑是什么？
explanation_en: A star topology uses a central connection device. Ethernet networks may look like a star, but they are actually a logical bus topology that is sometimes deployed in a physical star.
explanation_zh: 星形拓扑使用中央连接设备。以太网网络可能看起来像星形，但它们实际上是逻辑总线拓扑，有时部署在物理星形中。

question_en: Monica is developing a software application that calculates an individual’s body mass index for use in medical planning. She would like to include a control on the field where the physician enters an individual’s weight to ensure that the weight falls within an expected range. What type of control should Monica use?
question_zh: Monica 正在开发一款软件应用程序，用于计算个人的体重指数以用于医疗规划。她希望在医生输入个人体重的字段中加入一个控件，以确保体重落在预期范围内。 Monica 应该使用什么类型的控件？
options_zh: {"A": "失败打开", "B": "失败安全", "C": "限制检查", "D": "缓冲区边界"}
explanation_en: Input validation ensures that the data provided to a program as input matches the expected parameters. Limit checks are a special form of input validation that ensure that the value remains within an expected range, as is the case described in this scenario. Fail open and fail secure are options when planning for possible system failures. Buffer bounds are not a type of software control.
explanation_zh: 输入验证确保作为输入提供给程序的数据与预期参数匹配。限制检查是输入验证的一种特殊形式，可确保值保持在预期范围内，如本场景中所述的情况。在规划可能的系统故障时，可以选择故障开放和故障安全。缓冲区边界不是一种软件控制。

question_en: Match the following numbered types of testing methodologies with the lettered correct level of knowledge: Testing methodologies 1. Black box 2. White box 3. Gray box Level of knowledge
options_en: {"A": "Full knowledge of the system", "B": "Partial or incomplete knowledge", "C": "No prior knowledge of the system"}
question_zh: 将以下编号的测试方法类型与字母正确的知识水平相匹配： 测试方法 1. 黑盒 2. 白盒 3. 灰盒 知识水平
options_zh: {"A": "完全了解系统", "B": "部分或不完整的知识", "C": "没有系统的先验知识"}
explanation_en: The testing methodologies match with the level of knowledge as follows: 1. Black box: C. No prior knowledge of the system 2. White box: A. Full knowledge of the system 3. Gray box: B. Partial or incomplete knowledge
explanation_zh: 测试方法与知识水平如下： 1. 黑盒：C. 对系统没有先验知识 2. 白盒：A. 完全了解系统 3. 灰盒：B. 部分或不完整知识

question_en: Match the following lettered factors to their numbered type: Factors
options_en: {"A": "A PIN", "B": "A token", "C": "A fingerprint", "D": "A password", "E": "A smart card", "F": "A retinal scan", "G": "A security question/answer Types 1. Something you know 2. Something you have 3. Something you are"}
question_zh: 将以下字母因素与其编号类型相匹配： 因素
options_zh: {"A": "PIN", "B": "令牌", "C": "指纹", "D": "密码", "E": "智能卡", "F": "视网膜扫描", "G": "安全问题/答案类型 1。您知道的东西 2. 您拥有的东西 3. 您拥有的东西"}
explanation_en: The factors match to the types as follows: A. A PIN: Something you know B. A token: Something you have C. A fingerprint: Something you are D. A password: Something you know E. A smartcard: Something you have F. A retinal scan: Something you are G. A security question/answer: Something you know
explanation_zh: 这些因素与类型匹配如下： A. PIN：您知道的东西 B. 令牌：您拥有的东西 C. 指纹：您知道的东西 D. 密码：您知道的东西 E. 智能卡：您拥有的东西 F. 视网膜扫描：您知道的东西 G. 安全问题/答案：您知道的东西

question_en: James is building a disaster recovery plan for his organization and would like to determine the amount of acceptable data loss after an outage. What variable is James determining?
question_zh: James 正在为其组织制定灾难恢复计划，并希望确定中断后可接受的数据丢失量。詹姆斯决定什么变量？
explanation_en: The recovery point objective (RPO) identifies the maximum amount of data, measured in time, that may be lost during a recovery effort. The recovery time objective (RTO) is the amount of time expected to return an IT service or component to operation after a failure. The maximum tolerable downtime (MTD) is the longest amount of time that an IT service or component may be unavailable without causing serious damage to the organization. Servicelevel agreements (SLAs) are written contracts that document service expectations.
explanation_zh: 恢复点目标 (RPO) 确定在恢复工作期间可能丢失的最大数据量（按时间测量）。恢复时间目标 (RTO) 是 IT 服务或组件在发生故障后恢复运行的预期时间。最大可容忍停机时间 (MTD) 是指 IT 服务或组件不可用且不会对组织造成严重损害的最长时间。服务级别协议 (SLA) 是记录服务期望的书面合同。

question_en: In his role, Chris is expected to protect the interests of the organization, and the customers whose information he is charged to protect. What term describes the preparation and research undertaken before decisions and actions are made?
question_zh: 在他的角色中，Chris 应该保护组织以及他负责保护其信息的客户的利益。什么术语描述了在做出决定和行动之前进行的准备和研究？
options_zh: {"A": "尽职调查", "B": "合规性", "C": "尽职调查", "D": "监管行动"}
explanation_en: Due care and due diligence can be a confusing pair of terms to keep straight. Chris is engaging in due diligence when he does the preparation and research. Once that is done, he must use due care while undertaking the actions. This is often described in the context of the prudent person rule: would a prudent person have taken the action given the same knowledge?
explanation_zh: 尽职调查和尽职调查可能是一对容易混淆的术语。克里斯在进行准备和研究时正在进行尽职调查。一旦完成，他在采取行动时必须谨慎行事。这通常是在谨慎人规则的背景下描述的：在相同知识的情况下，谨慎人会采取行动吗？

question_en: Alex is preparing to solicit bids for a penetration test of his company’s network and systems. He wants to maximize the effectiveness of the testing rather than the realism of the test. What type of penetration test should he require in his bidding process?
question_zh: Alex 正准备为其公司的网络和系统进行渗透测试招标。他希望最大限度地提高测试的有效性，而不是测试的真实性。在投标过程中他应该要求什么类型的渗透测试？
explanation_en: White-box testing provides the tester with information about networks, systems, and configurations, allowing highly effective testing. It doesn’t simulate an actual attack like blackand gray-box testing can and thus does not have the same realism, and it can lead to attacks succeeding that would fail in a zeroor limited-knowledge attack.
explanation_zh: 白盒测试为测试人员提供有关网络、系统和配置的信息，从而实现高效的测试。它不像黑盒和灰盒测试那样模拟实际攻击，因此不具有相同的真实性，并且它可能导致攻击成功，而在零知识或有限知识攻击中会失败。

question_en: Application banner information is typically recorded during what penetration testing phase?
question_zh: 应用程序横幅信息通常在哪个渗透测试阶段记录？
explanation_en: The discovery phase includes activities such as gathering IP addresses, network ranges, and hostnames, as well as gathering information about employees, locations, systems, and, of course, the services those systems provide. Banner information is typically gathered as part of discovery to provide information about what version and type of service is being provided.
explanation_zh: 发现阶段包括收集 IP 地址、网络范围和主机名等活动，以及收集有关员工、位置、系统以及这些系统提供的服务的信息。横幅信息通常作为发现的一部分来收集，以提供有关所提供服务的版本和类型的信息。

question_en: Tony wants to conduct a disaster recovery plan test exercise for his organization. What type of exercise should he conduct if he wants it to be the most realistic event possible and is able to disrupt his organization’s operations to conduct the exercise?
question_zh: Tony 希望为其组织进行灾难恢复计划测试练习。如果他希望演习成为最真实的事件，并且能够扰乱其组织的运营来进行演习，那么他应该进行什么类型的演习？
explanation_en: The most realistic but also most disruptive option for disaster recovery plan testing is a full interruption. The least obtrusive but also least similar to real-world scenarios is a readthrough. After that, walk-throughs and simulations are each closer to a true scenario, but parallel operations is often the most popular option because it can be done without disrupting the organization and still reasonably test capabilities.
explanation_zh:
灾难恢复计划测试最现实但也是最具破坏性的选项是完全中断。最不引人注目但也与现实世界场景最不相似的是通读。之后，演练和模拟都更接近真实场景，但并行操作通常是最受欢迎的选择，因为它可以在不中断组织的情况下完成，并且仍然可以合理地测试功能。
作为新 BYOD 政策的一部分，

question_en: Jim has been asked to individually identify devices that users are bringing to work as part of a new BYOD policy. The devices will not be joined to a central management system like Active Directory, but he still needs to uniquely identify the systems. Which of the following options will provide Jim with the best means of reliably identifying each unique device?
options_en: {"A": "Record the MAC address of each system.", "B": "Require users to fill out a form to register each system.", "C": "Scan each system using a port scanner.", "D": "Use device fingerprinting via a web-based registration system."}
question_zh: Jim 被要求单独识别用户携带上班的设备。这些设备不会加入像Active Directory这样的中央管理系统，但他仍然需要唯一地标识这些系统。以下哪一个选项将为吉姆提供可靠地识别每个独特设备的最佳方法？
options_zh: {"A": "记录各系统的MAC地址。", "B": "要求用户填写表格来注册每个系统。", "C": "使用端口扫描器扫描每个系统。", "D": "通过基于网络的注册系统使用设备指纹识别。"}
explanation_en: Device fingerprinting via a web portal can require user authentication and can gather data such as operating systems, versions, software information, and many other factors that can uniquely identify systems. Using an automated fingerprinting system is preferable to handling manual registration, and pairing user authentication with data gathering provides more detail than a port scan. MAC addresses can be spoofed, and systems may have more than one depending on how many network interfaces they have, which can make unique identification challenging.
explanation_zh: 通过 Web 门户进行的设备指纹识别可能需要用户身份验证，并且可以收集操作系统、版本、软件信息以及许多其他可以唯一识别系统的因素等数据。使用自动指纹识别系统比处理手动注册更可取，并且将用户身份验证与数据收集配对可提供比端口扫描更多的详细信息。 MAC 地址可能会被欺骗，并且系统可能有多个地址，具体取决于其拥有的网络接口数量，这使得唯一识别变得困难。

question_en: Ben works in an organization that uses a formal data governance program. He is consulting with an employee working on a project that created an entirely new class of data and wants to work with the appropriate individual to assign a classification level to that information. Who is responsible for the assignment of information to a classification level?
question_zh: Ben 在一个使用正式数据治理计划的组织中工作。他正在咨询从事一个项目的员工，该项目创建了全新的数据类别，并希望与适当的个人合作为该信息分配分类级别。谁负责将信息分配到分类级别？
options_zh: {"A": "数据创建者", "B": "数据所有者", "C": "CISO", "D": "数据保管人"}
explanation_en: The data owner is normally responsible for classifying information at an appropriate level. This role is typically filled by a senior manager or director, who then delegates operational responsibility to a data custodian.
explanation_zh: 数据所有者通常负责在适当的级别对信息进行分类。该角色通常由高级经理或总监担任，然后将运营责任委托给数据保管人。

question_en: James wants to ensure that his company’s backups will survive a disaster that strikes the data center. Which of the following options is the best solution to this concern?
options_en: {"A": "Off-site backups", "B": "A grandfather/father/son backup tiering system", "C": "Redundant backup systems", "D": "Snapshots to a SAN or NAS"}
question_zh: James 希望确保公司的备份能够在数据中心遭受灾难时幸存下来。以下哪个选项是解决此问题的最佳方案？
options_zh: {"A": "异地备份", "B": "祖父/父亲/儿子备份分层系统", "C": "冗余备份系统", "D": "SAN 或 NAS 快照"}
explanation_en: Off-site backups are the best option for disaster recovery in a scenario where a disaster directly impacts the data center. None of the other scenarios as described will directly address the issue, although snapshots to a remote storage location can act as a form of off-site backup.
explanation_zh: 在灾难直接影响数据中心的情况下，异地备份是灾难恢复的最佳选择。尽管远程存储位置的快照可以充当异地备份的一种形式，但所描述的其他方案都无法直接解决该问题。

question_en: Gabe is concerned about the security of passwords used as a cornerstone of his organization’s information security program. Which one of the following controls would provide the greatest improvement in Gabe’s ability to authenticate users?
options_en: {"A": "More complex passwords", "B": "User education against social engineering", "C": "Multifactor authentication", "D": "Addition of security questions based on personal knowledge"}
question_zh: Gabe 担心作为其组织信息安全计划基石的密码的安全性。以下哪一项控制措施可以最大程度地提高 Gabe 验证用户身份的能力？
options_zh: {"A": "更复杂的密码", "B": "针对社会工程的用户教育", "C": "多因素身份验证", "D": "添加基于个人知识的安全问题"}
explanation_en: While all of the listed controls would improve authentication security, most simply strengthen the use of knowledge-based authentication. The best way to improve the authentication process would be to add a factor not based on knowledge through the use of multifactor authentication. This may include the use of biometric controls or token-based authentication.
explanation_zh: 虽然所有列出的控制措施都会提高身份验证安全性，但大多数只是加强基于知识的身份验证的使用。改进身份验证过程的最佳方法是通过使用多因素身份验证添加一个不基于知识的因素。这可能包括使用生物识别控制或基于令牌的身份验证。

question_en: The separation of network infrastructure from the control layer, combined with the ability to centrally program a network design in a vendor-neutral, standards-based implementation, is an example of what important concept?
options_en: {"A": "MPLS, a way to replace long network addresses with shorter labels and support a wide range of protocols", "B": "FCoE, a converged protocol that allows common applications over Ethernet", "C": "SDN, a converged protocol that allows network virtualization", "D": "CDN, a converged protocol that makes common network designs accessible"}
question_zh: 网络基础设施与控制层的分离，再加上在供应商中立、基于标准的实施中对网络设计进行集中编程的能力，是一个重要概念的示例？
options_zh: {"A": "MPLS，一种用较短标签替代长网络地址并支持多种协议的方法", "B": "FCoE，一种融合协议，支持以太网上的常见应用", "C": "SDN，一种融合协议，支持网络虚拟化", "D": "CDN，一种融合协议，使常见网络设计可访问"}
explanation_en: Software-defined networking (SDN) is a converged protocol that allows virtualization concepts and practices to be applied to networks. MPLS handles a wide range of protocols like ATM, DSL, and others, but isn’t intended to provide the centralization capabilities that SDN does. A content distribution network (CDN) is not a converged protocol, and FCoE is Fibre Channel over Ethernet, a converged protocol for storage.
explanation_zh: 软件定义网络 (SDN) 是一种融合协议，支持虚拟化概念以及应用于网络的实践。 MPLS 可处理 ATM、DSL 等多种协议，但并不旨在提供 SDN 所具有的集中化功能。内容分发网络 (CDN) 不是融合协议，而 FCoE 是以太网光纤通道，是一种用于存储的融合协议。

question_en: Susan is preparing to decommission her organization’s archival DVD-ROMs that contain Top Secret data. How should she ensure that the data cannot be exposed?
question_zh: Susan 正准备停用她所在组织中包含绝密数据的档案 DVD-ROM。她该如何保证数据不被泄露？
explanation_en: The best way to ensure that data on DVDs is fully gone is to destroy them, and pulverizing DVDs is an appropriate means of destruction. DVD-ROMs are write-only media, meaning that secure erase and zero wipes won’t work. Degaussing only works on magnetic media and cannot guarantee that there will be zero data remanence.
explanation_zh: 确保 DVD 上的数据完全消失的最佳方法就是销毁它们，而粉碎 DVD 是一种适当的销毁方式。 DVD-ROM 是只写介质，这意味着安全擦除和零擦除不起作用。消磁仅适用于磁介质，不能保证数据剩磁为零。

question_en: Susan is worried about a complex change and wants to ensure that the organization can recover if the change does not go as planned. What should she require in her role on the organization’s change advisory board (CAB)?
options_en: {"A": "She should reject the change due to risk.", "B": "She should require a second change review.", "C": "She should ensure a backout plan exists.", "D": "She should ensure a failover plan exists."}
question_zh: Susan 担心复杂的变革，并希望确保如果变革未按计划进行，组织也能恢复。她在组织变革顾问委员会 (CAB) 中的角色应该有什么要求？
options_zh: {"A": "由于风险，她应该拒绝改变。", "B": "她应该要求进行第二次变更审核。", "C": "她应该确保存在取消计划。", "D": "她应该确保存在故障转移计划。"}
explanation_en: Backout plans are required in some change management processes to ensure that the thought process and procedures for what to do if something does not go as planned are needed. Validating backout plan quality can be just as important as the change, and you may find, in many organizations, if nobody is watching that backout plans may read, “Undo the change we made.” Rejecting the change won’t fix the problem if the change has been made. Change review is useful to identify problems before the change is made. Failover plans are not a term commonly used in change management processes.
explanation_zh: 在某些变更管理流程中需要撤销计划，以确保在事情未按计划进行时需要采取行动的思维过程和程序。验证撤销计划的质量与变更同样重要，您可能会发现，在许多组织中，如果没有人关注撤销计划，则撤销计划可能会写着“撤消我们所做的更改”。如果已经进行了更改，则拒绝更改并不能解决问题。变更审查有助于在变更之前发现问题。故障转移计划不是变更管理流程中常用的术语。

question_en: Angie is configuring egress monitoring on her network to provide added security. Which one of the following packet types should Angie allow to leave the network headed for the internet?
options_en: {"A": "Packets with a source address from Angie’s public IP address block", "B": "Packets with a destination address from Angie’s public IP address block", "C": "Packets with a source address outside Angie’s address block", "D": "Packets with a source address from Angie’s private address block"}
question_zh: Angie 正在其网络上配置出口监控以提供额外的安全性。 Angie 应允许以下哪一种数据包类型离开网络前往互联网？
options_zh: {"A": "源地址来自 Angie 公共 IP 地址块的数据包", "B": "目标地址来自 Angie 公共 IP 地址块的数据包", "C": "源地址位于 Angie 地址块之外的数据包", "D": "源地址来自 Angie 私有地址块的数据包"}
explanation_en: All packets leaving Angie’s network should have a source address from her public IP address block. Packets with a destination address from Angie’s network should not be leaving the network. Packets with source addresses from other networks are likely spoofed and should be blocked by egress filters. Packets with private IP addresses as sources or destinations should never be routed onto the internet.
explanation_zh: 所有离开 Angie 网络的数据包都应具有来自 Angie 公共 IP 地址的源地址块。带有来自 Angie 网络的目标地址的数据包不应离开网络。具有来自其他网络的源地址的数据包可能是欺骗性的，应该被出口过滤器阻止。以私有 IP 地址作为源或目标的数据包不应路由到互联网上。

question_en: Matt is conducting a penetration test against a Linux server and successfully gained access to an administrative account. He would now like to obtain the password hashes for use in a brute-force attack. Where is he likely to find the hashes, assuming the system is configured to modern security standards?
question_zh: Matt 正在对 Linux 服务器进行渗透测试，并成功获得对管理帐户的访问权限。他现在想获取密码哈希值以用于暴力攻击。假设系统配置为符合现代安全标准，他可能在哪里找到哈希值？
options_zh: {"A": "/etc/passwd", "B": "/etc/hash", "C": "/etc/secure", "D": "/etc/shadow"}
explanation_en: Security best practices dictate the use of shadowed password files that move the password hashes from the widely accessible /etc/passwd file to the more restricted /etc/ shadow file.
explanation_zh: 安全最佳实践规定使用影子密码文件，将密码哈希从广泛访问的 /etc/passwd 文件移动到更受限制的 /etc/shadow 文件。

question_en: Theresa is implementing a new access control system and wants to ensure that developers do not have the ability to move code from development systems into the production environment. She wants to ensure that a developer who checks in code cannot then approve their own code as part of the process. What information security principle is she most directly enforcing?
question_zh: Theresa 正在实施新的访问控制系统，并希望确保开发人员无法将代码从开发系统移至生产环境。她希望确保签入代码的开发人员无法在该流程中批准自己的代码。她最直接执行的信息安全原则是什么？
options_zh: {"A": "职责分离", "B": "两人控制", "C": "最低权限", "D": "工作轮换"}
explanation_en: While developers may feel like they have a business need to be able to move code into production, the principle of separation of duties dictates that they should not have the ability to both write code and place it on a production server. The deployment of code is often performed by change management staff.
explanation_zh: 虽然开发人员可能觉得他们有能够将代码移至生产环境的业务需求，但职责分离的原则规定他们不应该同时具备编写代码并将其放置在生产服务器上的能力。代码的部署通常由变更管理人员执行。

question_en: Which one of the following tools may be used to achieve the goal of nonrepudiation?
question_zh: 可以使用以下哪一种工具来实现不可否认性的目标？
options_zh: {"A": "数字签名", "B": "对称加密", "C": "防火墙", "D": "IDS"}
explanation_en: Applying a digital signature to a message allows the sender to achieve the goal of nonrepudiation. This allows the recipient of a message to prove to a third party that the message came from the purported sender. Symmetric encryption does not support nonrepudiation. Firewalls and IDS are network security tools that are not used to provide nonrepudiation.
explanation_zh: 对消息应用数字签名可以使发送者实现不可否认的目标。这允许消息的接收者向第三方证明该消息来自声称的发送者。对称加密不支持不可否认性。防火墙和 IDS 是网络安全工具，并不用于提供不可否认性。

question_en: In this diagram of the TCP three-way handshake, what should system A send to system B in step 3? A 1 B 2 A 3 B
question_zh: 在这张 TCP 三向握手图中，系统 A 在步骤 3 中应该向系统 B 发送什么？ A 1 B 2 A 3 B
explanation_en: System A should send an ACK to end the three-way handshake. The TCP three-way handshake is SYN, SYN/ACK, ACK.
explanation_zh: 系统 A 应发送 ACK 来结束三向握手。 TCP的三向握手是SYN、SYN/ACK、ACK。

question_en: What RADIUS alternative is commonly used for Cisco network gear and supports two-factor authentication?
question_zh: Cisco 网络设备通常使用哪种 RADIUS 替代方案并支持双因素身份验证？
options_zh: {"A": "RADIUS+", "B": "TACACS+", "C": "XTACACS", "D": "Kerberos"}
explanation_en: TACACS+ is the most modern version of TACACS, the Terminal Access Controller AccessControl System. It is a Cisco proprietary protocol with added features beyond what RADIUS provides, meaning it is commonly used on Cisco networks. XTACACS is an earlier version, Kerberos is a network authentication protocol rather than a remote user authentication protocol, and RADIUS+ is a made-up term.
explanation_zh: TACACS+ 是 TACACS（终端访问控制器访问控制系统）的最现代版本。它是 Cisco 专有协议，具有超出 RADIUS 提供的附加功能，这意味着它通常在 Cisco 网络上使用。 XTACACS 是早期版本，Kerberos 是一种网络身份验证协议而不是远程用户身份验证协议，而 RADIUS+ 是一个虚构的术语。

question_en: What two types of attacks are VoIP call managers and VoIP phones most likely to be susceptible to?
options_en: {"A": "DoS and malware", "B": "Worms and Trojans", "C": "DoS and host OS attacks", "D": "Host OS attacks and buffer overflows"}
question_zh: VoIP 呼叫管理器和 VoIP 电话最容易受到哪两种类型的攻击？
options_zh: {"A": "DoS 和恶意软件", "B": "蠕虫和特洛伊木马", "C": "DoS 和主机操作系统攻击", "D": "主机操作系统攻击和缓冲区溢出"}
explanation_en: Call managers and VoIP phones can be thought of as servers or appliances and embedded or network devices. That means that the most likely threats that they will face are denial-of-service (DoS) attacks and attacks against the host operating system. Malware and Trojans are less likely to be effective against a server or embedded system that doesn’t browse the internet or exchange data files; buffer overflows are usually aimed at specific applications or services.
explanation_zh: 呼叫管理器和 VoIP 电话可以被视为服务器或设备以及嵌入式或网络设备。这意味着他们最有可能面临的威胁是拒绝服务 (DoS) 攻击和针对主机操作系统的攻击。恶意软件和特洛伊木马不太可能对不浏览互联网或交换数据文件的服务器或嵌入式系统有效；缓冲区溢出通常针对特定的应用程序或服务。

question_en: Vivian works for a chain of retail stores and would like to use a software product that restricts the software used on point-of-sale terminals to those packages on a preapproved list. What approach should Vivian use?
options_en: {"A": "Antivirus", "B": "Heuristic", "C": "Whitelist", "D": "Blacklist For questions 21–23, please refer to the following scenario: Hunter is the facilities manager for DataTech, a large data center management firm. He is evaluating the installation of a flood prevention system at one of DataTech’s facilities. The facility and contents are valued at $100 million. Installing the new flood prevention system would cost $10 million. Hunter consulted with flood experts and determined that the facility lies within a 200-year flood plain and that, if a flood occurred, it would likely cause $20 million in damage to the facility."}
question_zh: Vivian 在一家连锁零售店工作，希望使用一种软件产品，将销售点终端上使用的软件限制为预先批准列表中的软件包。薇薇安应该使用什么方法？
options_zh: {"A": "防病毒", "B": "启发式", "C": "白名单", "D": "黑名单 对于问题 21-23，请参考以下场景： Hunter 是一家大型数据中心管理公司 DataTech 的设施经理。他正在评估在 DataTech 的一处设施中安装防洪系统的情况。该设施和内容价值1亿美元。安装新的防洪系统将花费 1000 万美元。亨特咨询了洪水专家，确定该设施位于 200 年一遇的洪泛平原内，如果发生洪水，可能会对该设施造成 2000 万美元的损失。"}
explanation_en: The blacklist approach to application control blocks certain prohibited packages but allows the installation of other software on systems. The whitelist approach uses the reverse philosophy and only allows approved software. It is worth noting that the terms blacklist and whitelist are increasingly deprecated and that you may encounter terms like block list or deny list and allow list as language and terminology shifts. As you prepare for the exam and your professional work, make sure to consider these equivalents. Antivirus software would only detect the installation of malicious software after the fact. Heuristic detection is a variant of antivirus software.
explanation_zh: 应用程序控制的黑名单方法会阻止某些禁止的软件包，但允许在系统上安装其他软件。白名单方法使用相反的原理，只允许经过批准的软件。值得注意的是，术语黑名单和白名单越来越被弃用，并且随着语言和术语的变化，您可能会遇到阻止列表或拒绝列表和允许列表等术语。当您准备考试和专业工作时，请务必考虑这些同等内容。防病毒软件只会在事后检测恶意软件的安装。启发式检测是防病毒软件的一种变体。

question_en: Based on the information in this scenario, what is the exposure factor for the effect of a flood on DataTech’s data center?
question_zh: 根据此场景中的信息，洪水对 DataTech 数据中心影响的暴露因子是多少？
explanation_en: The exposure factor is the percentage of the facility that risk managers expect will be damaged if a risk materializes. It is calculated by dividing the amount of damage by the asset value. In this case, that is $20 million in damage divided by the $100 million facility value, or 20 percent.
explanation_zh: 暴露系数是风险经理预期风险发生时将受到损害的设施的百分比。它的计算方法是用损失金额除以资产价值。在本例中，即 2000 万美元的损失除以 1 亿美元的设施价值，即 20%。

question_en: Based on the information in this scenario, what is the annualized rate of occurrence for a flood at DataTech’s data center?
question_zh: 根据此场景中的信息，DataTech 数据中心的洪水发生率每年是多少？
explanation_en: The annualized rate of occurrence is the number of times each year that risk analysts expect a risk to happen in any given year. In this case, the analysts expect floods once every 200 years, or 0.005 times per year.
explanation_zh: 年化发生率是指风险分析师预计某一特定年份每年发生风险的次数。在这种情况下，分析师预计每 200 年发生一次洪水，即每年 0.005 次。

question_en: Based on the information in this scenario, what is the annualized loss expectancy for a flood at DataTech’s data center?
question_zh: 根据此场景中的信息，DataTech 数据中心发生洪水的年化损失预期是多少？
explanation_en: The annualized loss expectancy is calculated by multiplying the single loss expectancy (SLE) by the annualized rate of occurrence (ARO). In this case, the SLE is $20 million, and the ARO is 0.005. Multiplying these numbers together gives you the ALE of $100,000.
explanation_zh: 年化损失预期是通过将单次损失预期 (SLE) 乘以年化发生率 (ARO) 来计算的。在本例中，SLE 为 2000 万美元，ARO 为 0.005。将这些数字相乘即可得出 ALE 为 100,000 美元。

question_en: Which accounts are typically assessed during an account management assessment?
options_en: {"A": "A random sample", "B": "Highly privileged accounts", "C": "Recently generated accounts", "D": "Accounts that have existed for long periods of time"}
question_zh: 在账户管理评估期间通常会评估哪些账户？
options_zh: {"A": "随机样本", "B": "高特权帐户", "C": "最近生成的帐户", "D": "已存在很长时间的帐户"}
explanation_en: The most frequent target of account management reviews are highly privileged accounts, as they create the greatest risk. Random samples are the second most likely choice. Accounts that have existed for a longer period of time are more likely to have a problem due to privilege creep than recently created accounts, but neither of these choices is likely unless there is a specific organizational reason to choose them.
explanation_zh: 帐户管理审核最常见的目标是高特权帐户，因为它们产生的风险最大。随机样本是第二个最可能的选择。与最近创建的帐户相比，存在时间较长的帐户更有可能因权限蔓延而出现问题，但除非有特定的组织原因选择它们，否则这两种选择都不太可能。

question_en: Cloud computing uses a shared responsibility model for security, where the vendor and customer both bear some responsibility for security. The division of responsibility depends upon the type of service used. Place the cloud service offerings listed here in order from the case where the customer bears the least responsibility to where the customer bears the most responsibility. 1. IaaS 2. SaaS 3. PaaS
question_zh: 云计算使用安全共享责任模型，其中供应商和客户都承担一定的安全责任。责任划分取决于所使用的服务类型。按照从客户承担最少责任到客户承担最多责任的顺序排列此处列出的云服务产品。 1. IaaS 2. SaaS 3. PaaS
explanation_en: The cloud service offerings in order from the case where the customer bears the least responsibility to where the customer bears the most responsibility are SaaS, PaaS, and IaaS. In an infrastructure as a service (IaaS) cloud computing model, the customer retains responsibility for managing operating system and application security, while the vendor manages security at the hypervisor level and below. In a platform as a service (PaaS) environment, the vendor takes on responsibility for the operating system, but the customer writes and configures any applications. In a software as a service (SaaS) environment, the vendor takes on responsibility for the development and implementation of the application while the customer merely configures security settings within the application.
explanation_zh: 云服务产品按客户承担最少责任到客户承担最多责任的顺序排列责任包括 SaaS、PaaS 和 IaaS。在基础设施即服务 (IaaS) 云计算模型中，客户保留管理操作系统和应用程序安全性的责任，而供应商则管理管理程序级别及以下级别的安全性。在平台即服务 (PaaS) 环境中，供应商负责操作系统，但客户编写和配置任何应用程序。在软件即服务 (SaaS) 环境中，供应商负责应用程序的开发和实施，而客户只需在应用程序内配置安全设置。

question_en: What type of error occurs when a valid subject using a biometric authenticator is not authenticated?
options_en: {"A": "A Type 1 error", "B": "A Type 2 error", "C": "A Type 3 error", "D": "A Type 4 error"}
question_zh: 当使用生物特征认证器的有效主体未通过认证时，会发生什么类型的错误？
explanation_en: Type 1 errors occur when a valid subject is not authenticated. Type 2 errors occur when an invalid subject is incorrectly authenticated. Type 3 and Type 4 errors are not associated with biometric authentication.
explanation_zh: 当有效主体未经过身份验证时，会发生 1 类错误。当无效主体被错误验证时，就会发生类型 2 错误。类型 3 和类型 4 错误与生物识别身份验证无关。

question_en: An emergency button under the desk is a common example of what type of physical security system?
options_en: {"A": "An airgap button", "B": "A keylogger", "C": "A pushbutton lock", "D": "A duress system"}
question_zh: 桌子下的紧急按钮是哪种类型的物理安全系统的常见示例？
options_zh: {"A": "气隙按钮", "B": "键盘记录器", "C": "按钮锁", "D": "胁迫系统"}
explanation_en: Duress systems are intended to allow employees to notify security or others when they are in a dangerous situation or when they need help. Duress systems may be as simple as a push button and as complex as a code word or digital system that allows specific entries to trigger alarms while still performing a desired or deceptive but real-appearing action.
explanation_zh: 胁迫系统旨在让员工在处于危险情况或需要帮助时通知保安或其他人。胁迫系统可以像按钮一样简单，也可以像代码字或数字系统一样复杂，允许特定的条目触发警报，同时仍然执行所需的或欺骗性的但真实的动作。

question_en: Henry runs Nikto against an Apache web server and receives the output shown here. Which of the following statements is the least important to include in his report?
options_en: {"A": "The missing clickjacking x-frame options could be used to redirect input to a malicious site or frame.", "B": "Cross-site scripting protections should be enabled, but aren’t.", "C": "Inode information leakage from a Linux system is a critical vulnerability allowing direct access to the filesystem using node references.", "D": "The server is a Linux server."}
question_zh: Henry 针对 Apache Web 服务器运行 Nikto 并接收此处显示的输出。以下哪项陈述对于他的报告来说是最不重要的？
options_zh: {"A": "缺少的点击劫持 x 框架选项可用于将输入重定向到恶意站点或框架。", "B": "应该启用跨站点脚本保护，但没有启用。", "C": "Linux 系统的索引节点信息泄漏是一个严重漏洞，允许使用节点引用直接访问文件系统。", "D": "服务器是Linux服务器。"}
explanation_en: Exposing inode information is not as important as the other information shown. Clickjacking and cross-site scripting are both important issues, and knowing that the server is a Linux server is also important.
explanation_zh: 暴露 inode 信息并不像显示的其他信息那么重要。点击劫持和跨站脚本都是重要问题，了解服务器是 Linux 服务器也很重要。

question_en: George is assisting a prosecutor with a case against a hacker who attempted to break into the computer systems at George’s company. He provides system logs to the prosecutor for use as evidence, but the prosecutor insists that George testify in court about how he gathered the logs. What rule of evidence requires George’s testimony?
options_en: {"A": "Testimonial evidence rule", "B": "Parol evidence rule", "C": "Best evidence rule", "D": "Hearsay rule"}
question_zh: 乔治正在协助检察官处理一名试图闯入乔治公司计算机系统的黑客的案件。他向检察官提供系统日志作为证据，但检察官坚持要求乔治在法庭上就他如何收集日志作证。什么样的证据规则需要乔治的证词？
options_zh: {"A": "证言证据规则", "B": "口头证据规则", "C": "最佳证据规则", "D": "传闻规则"}
explanation_en: The hearsay rule says that a witness cannot testify about what someone else told them, except under very specific exceptions. The courts have applied the hearsay rule to include the concept that attorneys may not introduce logs into evidence unless they are authenticated by the system administrator. In this question, scenario George might also be able to provide a sworn affidavit, but the question doesn’t include that option. The best evidence rule states that copies of documents may not be submitted into evidence if the originals are available. The parol evidence rule states that if two parties enter into a written agreement, that written document is assumed to contain all of the terms of the agreement. Testimonial evidence is a type of evidence, not a rule of evidence.
explanation_zh: 传闻规则规定，证人不能就其他人告诉他们的内容作证，除非在非常特定的例外情况下。法院应用了传闻规则，以包含律师不得将日志引入证据的概念，除非它们经过系统管理员的验证。在这个问题中，场景乔治也可能能够提供宣誓证词，但问题不包括该选项。最佳证据规则规定，如果有原件，则不得将文件副本提交为证据。口头证据规则规定，如果双方签订书面协议，则该书面文件被视为包含协议的所有条款。证言证据是一种证据，而不是一种证据规则。

question_en: Which of the following is not a valid use for key risk indicators (KRIs)?
options_en: {"A": "Provide warnings before issues occur.", "B": "Provide real-time incident response information.", "C": "Provide historical views of past incidents.", "D": "Provide insight into risk tolerance for the organization."}
question_zh: 以下哪项不是关键风险指标 (KRI) 的有效用途？
options_zh: {"A": "在问题发生之前提供警告。", "B": "提供实时事件响应信息。", "C": "提供过去事件的历史观点。", "D": "深入了解组织的风险承受能力。"}
explanation_en: While key risk indicators can provide useful information for organizational planning and a deeper understanding of how organizations view risk, KRIs are not a great way to handle a real-time security response. Monitoring and detection systems like IPS, SIEM, and other tools are better suited to handling actual attacks.
explanation_zh: 虽然关键风险指标可以为组织规划和更深入地了解组织如何看待风险提供有用的信息，但 KRI 并不是处理实时安全响应的好方法。 IPS、SIEM 等监控和检测系统以及其他工具更适合处理实际攻击。

question_en: Which one of the following malware types uses built-in propagation mechanisms that exploit system vulnerabilities to spread?
question_zh: 以下哪一种恶意软件类型使用利用系统漏洞进行传播的内置传播机制？
options_zh: {"A": "特洛伊木马", "B": "蠕虫", "C": "逻辑炸弹", "D": "病毒"}
explanation_en: Worms have built-in propagation mechanisms that do not require user interaction, such as scanning for systems containing known vulnerabilities and then exploiting those vulnerabilities to gain access. Viruses and Trojan horses typically require user interaction to spread. Logic bombs do not spread from system to system but lie in wait until certain conditions are met, triggering the delivery of their payload.
explanation_zh: 蠕虫具有不需要用户交互的内置传播机制，例如扫描包含已知漏洞的系统，然后利用这些漏洞获取访问权限。病毒和特洛伊木马通常需要用户交互才能传播。逻辑炸弹不会从一个系统传播到另一个系统，而是等待满足某些条件，触发其有效负载的传送。

question_en: As part of your company’s security team, you have been asked to advise on how to ensure that media is not improperly used or stored. What solution will help staff members in your organization to handle media appropriately?
options_en: {"A": "Labeling with sensitivity levels", "B": "Encrypting the sensitive media", "C": "Dual control media systems", "D": "A clear desk policy"}
question_zh: 作为贵公司安全团队的一员，我们要求您就如何确保介质不被不当使用或存储提供建议。什么解决方案可以帮助您组织中的员工正确处理媒体？
options_zh: {"A": "标记敏感度级别", "B": "加密敏感媒体", "C": "双重控制媒体系统", "D": "明确的桌面政策"}
explanation_en: As simple as the answer may seem, labeling media or even color coding it with sensitivity levels and ensuring staff are appropriately trained on what the levels mean will normally have the biggest impact. Encrypting media can help, but without the labels, files may be stored on inappropriate media. A clear desk policy can help if casual media theft is an issue but is not likely to be an important control in this scenario. Dual control is used to ensure that a task cannot be performed by a single staff member to avoid malfeasance and is not directly useful here.
explanation_zh: 答案可能看起来很简单，用敏感度级别标记媒体或什至对其进行颜色编码，并确保员工接受有关级别含义的适当培训，通常会产生最大的影响。加密媒体会有所帮助，但如果没有标签，文件可能会存储在不适当的媒体上。如果偶然的媒体盗窃是一个问题，那么明确的办公桌政策会有所帮助，但在这种情况下不太可能成为重要的控制措施。双重控制用于确保某项任务不能由单个工作人员执行，以避免渎职，在这里没有直接用处。

question_en: Alaina wants to use a broadly adopted threat modeling framework for her organization’s threat intelligence efforts. Which of the following would you advise her to adopt if she wants to use pre-existing tools to help her threat modeling team integrate both internally created intelligence and external threat feed data?
options_en: {"A": "The Diamond Model of Intrusion Analysis", "B": "ATT&CK", "C": "Microsoft’s Threat-JUMP modeling system", "D": "Threat-EN"}
question_zh: Alaina 希望为其组织的威胁情报工作使用广泛采用的威胁建模框架。如果她想使用现有工具来帮助她的威胁建模团队集成内部创建的情报和外部威胁源数据，您会建议她采用以下哪一项？
options_zh: {"A": "入侵分析钻石模型", "B": "ATT&CK", "C": "微软的 Threat-JUMP 建模系统", "D": "Threat-EN"}
explanation_en: MITRE’s ATT&CK framework is broadly adopted by threat modeling and threat intelligence organizations and is used as a default model in many software packages and tools. The Diamond Model specifically addresses how to think about intrusions but does not address broader threats, and the other answers were made up for this question.
explanation_zh: MITRE 的 ATT&CK 框架被威胁建模和威胁情报组织广泛采用，并在许多软件包和工具中用作默认模型。钻石模型专门解决了如何思考入侵，但没有解决更广泛的威胁，其他答案都是针对这个问题的。

question_en: Which one of the following is not a principle of the Agile approach to software development?
options_en: {"A": "The most efficient method of conveying information is electronic.", "B": "Working software is the primary measure of progress.", "C": "Simplicity is essential.", "D": "Businesspeople and developers must work together daily."}
question_zh: 以下哪一项不是敏捷软件开发方法的原则？
options_zh: {"A": "传达信息最有效的方法是电子方式。", "B": "可用的软件是衡量进度的主要标准。", "C": "简单至关重要。", "D": "商人和开发者必须每天一起工作。"}
explanation_en: The Agile approach to software development states that working software is the primary measure of progress, that simplicity is essential, and that businesspeople and developers must work together daily. It also states that the most efficient method of conveying information is face to face, not electronic.
explanation_zh: 软件开发的敏捷方法指出，工作软件是进度的主要衡量标准，简单性至关重要，并且业务人员和开发人员必须每天一起工作。它还指出，传达信息最有效的方法是面对面，而不是电子方式。

question_en: Harry is concerned that accountants within his organization will modify data to cover up fraudulent activity in accounts that they normally access. Which one of the following controls would best defend against this type of attack?
question_zh: Harry 担心他的组织内的会计师会修改数据以掩盖他们通常访问的帐户中的欺诈活动。以下哪一项控制措施最能防御此类攻击？
options_zh: {"A": "加密", "B": "访问控制", "C": "完整性验证", "D": "防火墙"}
explanation_en: Encryption, access controls, and firewalls would not be effective in this example because the accountants have legitimate access to the data. Integrity verification software would protect against this attack by identifying unexpected changes in protected data.
explanation_zh: 在此示例中，加密、访问控制和防火墙不会有效，因为会计师对数据具有合法访问权限。完整性验证软件将通过识别受保护数据中的意外更改来防止这种攻击。

question_en: Ben wants to use the concept of crime prevention through environmental design to help secure his facility. Which of the following is not a common example of this design concept in use?
options_en: {"A": "Mounting cameras in full view to act as a deterrent", "B": "Limiting the size of planters to avoid having them used to hide behind", "C": "Locating data centers at the edge of the building to enhance security", "D": "Making delivery access driveways and entrances less visible to the public"}
question_zh: Ben 希望通过环境设计运用预防犯罪的概念来帮助保护他的设施。以下哪一项不是这种设计理念的常见使用示例？
options_zh: {"A": "在全视野范围内安装摄像头以起到威慑作用", "B": "限制花盆的大小，以避免它们被用来隐藏在后面", "C": "将数据中心置于建筑物边缘以增强安全性", "D": "使送货通道和入口不易被公众看到"}
explanation_en: Crime prevention through environmental design (CPTED) focuses on making crime less likely due to design elements. Data centers are often placed near the core of a building to make them easier to secure and less likely to be impacted by natural disasters or accidents. Mounting cameras where they can be seen, avoiding the creation of easy hiding places, and keeping delivery areas less visible and thus less attractive to access are all common techniques used in CPTED.
explanation_zh: 通过环境设计预防犯罪 (CPTED) 的重点是通过设计元素降低犯罪的可能性。数据中心通常放置在建筑物的核心附近，以使其更容易保护并且不太可能受到自然灾害或事故的影响。将摄像头安装在可见的地方、避免创建容易隐藏的地方、以及保持送货区域不那么明显，从而降低访问的吸引力，这些都是 CPTED 中使用的常见技术。

question_en: Meena wants to ensure that her supply chain risks are well managed. Which of the following is not a common practice she should include in her supply chain risk management (SCRM) plan?
options_en: {"A": "Use contractual controls such as insurance and liability limitations where appropriate.", "B": "Sole source to provide vendor stability.", "C": "Ensure multiple suppliers exist for critical components.", "D": "Validate the financial stability of potential suppliers. Using the following table and your knowledge of the auditing process, answer questions 38–40. Report Content Audience Internal controls for financial Users and auditors SOC 1 reporting Confidentiality, integrity, Auditors, regulators, SOC 2 availability, security, and privacy management, partners, and controls others under NDA Confidentiality, integrity, Publicly available, often SOC 3 availability, security, and privacy used for a website seal controls"}
question_zh: Meena 希望确保其供应链风险得到良好管理。以下哪项不是她不应将其纳入供应链风险管理 (SCRM) 计划的常见做法？
options_zh: {"A": "在适当的情况下使用保险和责任限制等合同控制措施。", "B": "提供供应商稳定性的唯一来源。", "C": "确保关键部件存在多个供应商。", "D": "验证潜在供应商的财务稳定性。使用下表和您对审核流程的了解，回答问题 38-40。报告内容 受众 财务用户和审计员的内部控制 SOC 1 报告 机密性、完整性、审计员、监管机构、SOC 2 可用性、安全性和隐私管理、合作伙伴以及 NDA 下的其他控制 机密性、完整性、公开，通常用于网站密封控制的 SOC 3 可用性、安全性和隐私"}
explanation_en: Sole sourcing can create additional fragility in supply chains due to reliance on a single supplier. Contractual controls including requirements for supplier insurance and liability limitations, having multiple suppliers, and validating their financial stability are all common ways to help reduce supply chain risk.
explanation_zh: 由于依赖单一供应商，单独采购可能会在供应链中造成额外的脆弱性。合同控制，包括供应商保险和责任限制的要求、拥有多个供应商以及验证其财务稳定性，都是帮助降低供应链风险的常见方法。

question_en: As they prepare to migrate their data center to an infrastructure as a service (IaaS) provider, Susan’s company wants to understand the effectiveness of their new provider’s security, integrity, and availability controls. What SOC report would provide them with the most detail, including input from the auditor on the effectiveness of controls at the IaaS provider?
options_en: {"A": "SOC 1.", "B": "SOC 2.", "C": "SOC 3.", "D": "None of the SOC reports is suited to this, and they should request another form of report."}
question_zh: 当 Susan 的公司准备将数据中心迁移到基础设施即服务 (IaaS) 提供商时，他们希望了解新提供商的安全性、完整性和可用性控制的有效性。哪份 SOC 报告将为他们提供最详细的信息，包括审计员对 IaaS 提供商控制有效性的意见？
options_zh: {"A": "SOC 1.", "B": "SOC 2.", "C": "SOC 3.", "D": "没有任何 SOC 报告适合于此，他们应该要求其他形式的报告。"}
explanation_en: SOC 2 reports are released under NDA to select partners or customers and can provide detail on the controls and any issues they may have. A SOC 1 report would only provide financial control information, and a SOC 3 report provides less information since it is publicly available.
explanation_zh: SOC 2 报告根据 NDA 发布给选定的合作伙伴或客户，并可以提供有关控制措施及其可能遇到的任何问题的详细信息。 SOC 1 报告仅提供财务控制信息，而 SOC 3 报告提供的信息较少，因为它是公开的。

question_en: Susan wants to ensure that the audit report that her organization requested includes input from an external auditor and information about control implementation over a period of time. What type of report should she request?
question_zh: Susan 希望确保其组织要求的审计报告包含外部审计员的输入以及一段时间内有关控制实施情况的信息。她应该要求什么类型的报告？
explanation_en: An SOC 2, Type 2 report includes information about a data center’s security, availability, processing integrity, confidentiality, and privacy, and includes an auditor’s opinion on the operational effectiveness of the controls. SOC 3 does not have types, and an SOC 2 Type 1 is only conducted at a point in time.
explanation_zh: SOC 2，类型 2 报告包括有关数据中心的安全性、可用性、处理完整性、机密性和隐私的信息，并包括审计员对数据中心运行有效性的意见控制。 SOC 3没有类型，SOC 2 Type 1仅在某个时间点进行。

question_en: When Susan requests an SOC 2 report, she receives an SOC 1 report. What issue should Susan raise?
options_en: {"A": "SOC 1 reports only reveal publicly available information.", "B": "SOC 1 reports cover financial data.", "C": "SOC 1 reports only cover a point in time.", "D": "SOC 1 reports only use a three-month period for testing."}
question_zh: 当 Susan 请求 SOC 2 报告时，她会收到 SOC 1 报告。苏珊应该提出什么问题？
options_zh: {"A": "SOC 1 报告仅披露公开信息。", "B": "SOC 1 报告涵盖财务数据。", "C": "SOC 1 报告仅涵盖一个时间点。", "D": "SOC 1 报告仅使用三个月的时间进行测试。"}
explanation_en: Susan asked for a security controls report (SOC 2) and received a financial internal controls report (SOC 1). This question doesn’t specify whether a Type 1 or Type 2 report is desired, but most security practitioners will prefer a Type 2 report if they can get it since it tests the actual controls and their implementation instead of their descriptions.
explanation_zh: Susan 要求提供安全控制报告 (SOC 2)，并收到了财务内部控制报告 (SOC 1)。该问题没有具体说明是否需要类型 1 或类型 2 报告，但大多数安全从业者如果可以获得类型 2 报告，他们会更喜欢类型 2 报告，因为它测试实际控件及其实现而不是它们的描述。

question_en: Brad wants to engage third-party auditors to assess a vendor that his company will be signing a contract with. If Brad wants to assess the vendor’s security policies and controls as well as the effectiveness of those controls as implemented over time, what SOC level and type should he request the auditors perform?
options_en: {"A": "A SOC 1, Type 2", "B": "A SOC 2, Type 1", "C": "A SOC 1, Type 1", "D": "A SOC 2, Type 2"}
question_zh: Brad 希望聘请第三方审核员来评估其公司将与之签订合同的供应商。如果 Brad 希望评估供应商的安全策略和控制以及这些控制随着时间的推移实施的有效性，他应该要求审计员执行什么 SOC 级别和类型？
options_zh: {"A": "A SOC 1，类型 2", "B": "A SOC 2，类型 1", "C": "A SOC 1，类型 1", "D": "A SOC 2，类型 2"}
explanation_en: An SOC 2 assessment looks at controls that affect security, and a Type 2 report validates the operating effectiveness of the controls. SOC 1 engagement assesses controls that might impact financial reporting, and a Type 1 report provides the auditors opinions of the descriptions of controls provided by management at a single point in time—not the actual implementations of the controls.
explanation_zh: SOC 2 评估着眼于影响安全性的控制措施，而 2 类报告则验证控制措施的运行有效性。 SOC 1 参与评估可能影响财务报告的控制措施，并且类型 1 报告提供审计师对管理层在单个时间点提供的控制描述的意见，而不是控制措施的实际实施。

question_en: Bell–LaPadula is an example of what type of access control model?
question_zh: Bell–LaPadula 是哪种类型的访问控制模型的示例？
options_zh: {"A": "DAC", "B": "RBAC", "C": "MAC", "D": "ABAC"}
explanation_en: Bell–LaPadula uses security labels on objects and clearances for subjects and is therefore a MAC model. It does not use discretionary, rule-based, role-based, or attribute-based access control.
explanation_zh: Bell–LaPadula 在对象上使用安全标签并在主体上使用许可，因此是 MAC 模型。它不使用任意的、基于规则的、基于角色的或基于属性的访问控制。

question_en: Martha is the information security officer for a small college and is responsible for safeguarding the privacy of student records. What law most directly applies to her situation?
question_zh: Martha 是一所小型学院的信息安全官，负责保护学生记录的隐私。哪条法律最直接适用于她的情况？
options_zh: {"A": "HIPAA", "B": "HITECH", "C": "COPPA", "D": "FERPA"}
explanation_en: The Family Educational Rights and Privacy Act (FERPA) protects the privacy of students in any educational institution that accepts any form of federal funding.
explanation_zh: 《家庭教育权利和隐私法案》(FERPA) 保护接受任何形式联邦资助的任何教育机构中学生的隐私。

question_en: What U.S. federal law mandates the security of protected health information?
question_zh: 美国哪些联邦法律规定受保护的健康信息的安全性？
options_zh: {"A": "FERPA", "B": "安全法案", "C": "GLBA", "D": "HIPAA"}
explanation_en: The Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act (HIPAA) mandates the protection of protected health information (PHI). The SAFE Act deals with mortgages, the Graham– Leach–Bliley Act (GLBA) covers financial institutions, and FERPA deals with student data.
explanation_zh: 健康保险流通与责任法案 (HIPAA) 强制要求保护受保护的健康信息 (PHI)。 《SAFE 法案》涉及抵押贷款，《Graham–Leach–Bliley 法案》(GLBA) 涉及金融机构，而 FERPA 则涉及学生数据。

question_en: Which one of the following techniques can an attacker use to exploit a TOC/TOU vulnerability?
question_zh: 攻击者可以使用以下哪一项技术来利用 TOC/TOU 漏洞？
options_zh: {"A": "文件锁定", "B": "异常处理", "C": "算法复杂性", "D": "并发控制"}
explanation_en: Attackers may use algorithmic complexity as a tool to exploit a time of change/time of use (TOC/TOU) condition. By varying the workload on the CPU, attackers may exploit the amount of time required to process requests and use that variance to effectively schedule the exploit’s execution. File locking, exception handling, and concurrency controls are all methods used to defend against TOC/TOU attacks.
explanation_zh: 攻击者可以使用算法复杂性作为工具来利用更改时间/使用时间 (TOC/TOU) 条件。通过改变 CPU 上的工作负载，攻击者可以利用处理请求所需的时间量，并利用该差异来有效地安排漏洞的执行。文件锁定、异常处理和并发控制都是用来防御 TOC/TOU 攻击的方法。

question_en: Susan is configuring her network devices to use syslog. What should she set to ensure that she is notified about issues but does not receive normal operational issue messages?
options_en: {"A": "The facility code", "B": "The log priority", "C": "The security level", "D": "The severity level"}
question_zh: Susan 正在配置她的网络设备以使用系统日志。她应该如何设置才能确保收到有关问题的通知，但不会收到正常操作问题消息？
options_zh: {"A": "设施代码", "B": "日志优先级", "C": "安全级别", "D": "严重性级别"}
explanation_en: Implementations of syslog vary, but most provide a setting for severity level, allowing configuration of a value that determines what messages are sent. Typical severity levels include debug, informational, notice, warning, error, critical, alert, and emergency. The facility code is also supported by syslog, but is associated with which services are being logged. Security level and log priority are not typical syslog settings.
explanation_zh: syslog 的实现各不相同，但大多数都提供严重性级别的设置，允许配置一个值来确定发送哪些消息。典型的严重性级别包括调试、信息、通知、警告、错误、严重、警报和紧急。系统日志也支持设施代码，但与正在记录的服务相关联。安全级别和日志优先级不是典型的系统日志设置。

question_en: What RAID level is also known as disk mirroring?
question_zh: 什么 RAID 级别也称为磁盘镜像？
options_zh: {"A": "RAID 0", "B": "RAID 1", "C": "RAID 3", "D": "RAID 5"}
explanation_en: In RAID 1, also known as disk mirroring, systems contain two physical disks. Each disk contains copies of the same data, and either one may be used in the event the other disk fails.
explanation_zh: 在 RAID 1 中，也称为磁盘镜像，系统包含两个物理磁盘。每个磁盘都包含相同数据的副本，并且在另一个磁盘发生故障时可以使用其中一个磁盘。

question_en: Isaac recently purchased a 48 port switch from his switch vendor. The switch vendor has announced that the model of switch that Isaac purchased will reach end of life next year. What does this tell Isaac about the devices?
options_en: {"A": "The devices will stop being sold next year.", "B": "The devices will stop functioning next year.", "C": "The devices will no longer be supported next year.", "D": "The devices will be supported for a minimum of three more years."}
question_zh: Isaac 最近从其交换机供应商购买了一台 48 端口交换机。该交换机供应商宣布，Isaac 购买的交换机型号将于明年到期。这告诉艾萨克关于这些设备的什么信息？
options_zh: {"A": "这些设备将于明年停止销售。", "B": "这些设备将于明年停止运行。", "C": "明年将不再支持这些设备。", "D": "这些设备将获得至少三年的支持。"}
explanation_en: Most vendors use the term end of life, or EOL, to denote when the product will stop being sold. End of support typically comes sometime after end of life, and this problem does not specify when end of support (EOS) will occur. Devices will still function after end of life and likely after end of support, but security professionals should raise concerns about the security of devices or software after the end of support because patches and updates will likely no longer be available.
explanation_zh: 大多数供应商使用术语“生命周期终止”(EOL) 来表示产品何时停止销售。支持终止通常在生命周期结束后的某个时间出现，并且此问题未指定何时发生支持终止 (EOS)。设备在生命周期结束后（可能在支持结束后）仍可正常运行，但安全专业人员应在支持结束后对设备或软件的安全性提出担忧，因为补丁和更新可能不再可用。

question_en: Surveys, interviews, and audits are all examples of ways to measure what important part of an organization’s security posture?
question_zh: 调查、访谈和审计都是衡量组织安全态势的重要部分的方法示例？
options_zh: {"A": "代码质量", "B": "服务漏洞", "C": "意识", "D": "攻击面"}
explanation_en: Interviews, surveys, and audits are all useful for assessing awareness. Code quality is best judged by code review, service vulnerabilities are tested using vulnerability scanners and related tools, and the attack surface of an organization requires both technical and administrative review.
explanation_zh: 访谈、调查和审计对于评估意识都很有用。代码质量最好通过代码审查来判断，服务漏洞使用漏洞扫描器和相关工具进行测试，组织的攻击面需要技术和管理审查。

question_en: Tom is the general counsel for an internet service provider, and he recently received notice of a lawsuit against the firm because of copyrighted content illegally transmitted over the provider’s circuits by a customer. What law protects Tom’s company in this case?
options_en: {"A": "Computer Fraud and Abuse Act", "B": "Digital Millennium Copyright Act", "C": "Wiretap Act", "D": "Copyright Code"}
question_zh: Tom 是一家互联网服务提供商的总法律顾问，他最近收到了针对该公司的诉讼通知，原因是客户通过提供商的电路非法传输受版权保护的内容。在这种情况下，什么法律可以保护汤姆的公司？
options_zh: {"A": "计算机欺诈和滥用法", "B": "数字千年版权法", "C": "窃听法", "D": "版权法"}
explanation_en: The Digital Millennium Copyright Act extends common carrier protection to online service providers, which are not liable for the “transitory activities” of their customers.
explanation_zh: 数字千年版权法将公共运营商保护扩展到在线服务提供商，这些提供商对其客户的“临时活动”不承担责任。

question_en: A Type 2 authentication factor that generates dynamic passwords based on a timeor algorithm-based system is what type of authenticator?
question_zh: 基于时间或基于算法的系统生成动态密码的 2 类身份验证因素是什么类型的身份验证器？
explanation_en: Tokens are hardware devices (something you have) that generate a one-time password based on time or an algorithm. They are typically combined with another factor like a password to authenticate users. CAC and PIV cards are U.S. government–issued smartcards.
explanation_zh: 令牌是基于时间或算法生成一次性密码的硬件设备（您拥有的东西）。它们通常与另一个因素（例如密码）结合使用来对用户进行身份验证。 CAC 和 PIV 卡是美国政府发行的智能卡。

question_en: Fred’s new employer has hired him for a position with access to their trade secrets and confidential internal data. What legal tool should they use to help protect their data if he chooses to leave to work at a competitor?
question_zh: Fred 的新雇主雇用他担任一个可以访问其商业秘密和机密内部数据的职位。如果他选择离开去竞争对手工作，他们应该使用什么法律工具来帮助保护他们的数据？
explanation_en: A nondisclosure agreement (NDA) is a legal agreement between two parties that specifies what data they will not disclose. NDAs are common in industries that have sensitive or trade secret information they do not want employees to take to new jobs. Encryption would only help in transit or at rest, and Fred will likely have access to the data in unencrypted form as part of his job. An AUP is an acceptable use policy, and a stop-loss order is used on the stock market.
explanation_zh: 保密协议 (NDA) 是两方之间的法律协议，指定他们不会披露哪些数据。保密协议在拥有敏感或商业秘密信息且不希望员工带到新工作的行业中很常见。加密只会在传输或静态时有帮助，作为工作的一部分，Fred 可能会以未加密的形式访问数据。 AUP 是一种可接受的使用政策，止损单用于股票市场。

question_en: Mark’s company is involved in a civil case. What evidentiary standard is he likely to need to meet?
options_en: {"A": "The real evidence standard", "B": "Beyond a reasonable doubt", "C": "Preponderance of evidence", "D": "The documentary evidence standard"}
question_zh: 马克的公司卷入民事案件。他可能需要满足什么证据标准？
options_zh: {"A": "真实证据标准", "B": "排除合理怀疑", "C": "优势证据", "D": "书证证据标准"}
explanation_en: Civil cases typically rely on a preponderance of evidence. Criminal cases must be proven beyond a reasonable doubt. Real evidence is object evidence—tangible things that can be brought into a court of law. Documentary evidence are written items used to prove facts. Neither of these is an evidentiary standard; instead, they describe types of evidence.
explanation_zh: 民事案件通常依赖优势证据。刑事案件必须得到毫无合理怀疑的证明。真正的证据是实物证据——可以带上法庭的有形的东西。文件证据是用来证明事实的书面物品。这些都不是证据标准；相反，他们描述了证据的类型。

question_en: How many possible keys exist when using a cryptographic algorithm that has an 8-bit binary encryption key?
question_zh: 使用具有 8 位二进制加密密钥的加密算法时，存在多少种可能的密钥？
explanation_en: Binary keyspaces contain a number of keys equal to 2 raised to the power of the number of bits. Two to the eighth power is 256, so an 8-bit keyspace contains 256 possible keys.
explanation_zh: 二进制密钥空间包含的密钥数量等于 2 的位数次方。 2 的 8 次方为 256，因此 8 位密钥空间包含 256 个可能的密钥。

question_en: What activity is being performed when you apply security controls based on the specific needs of the IT system that they will be applied to?
question_zh: 当您根据要应用的 IT 系统的特定需求应用安全控制时，正在执行什么活动？
